[**June 23, 1865:** Confederate General Stand Watie surrendered at Doaksville in the Choctaw Nation (present-day Oklahoma) by signing a cease-fire agreement with Union representatives. He led the First Indian Brigade of the Army of the Trans-Mississippi and is remembered as the last Confederate General to surrender during the American Civil War. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc57959256cf45188503cf07e56d32d0&_e=PrvoO1diH_xFvt6Zi2pY35IRHfpIqok7freg2ZeeGO81yiBS9SefdlOz2GnZaR5CQuNCQOwYemEylMpA55N4-EI9jhsyQpIQbDSFithXluo8SWbXeWx4nUeBbaA9PEMprT89ci5rJak4NHY1hkf4B8iLmY4AUf0pLBlVCFu-z7HSwCPqjS6Qs-45vsheFSZFbVVbGNcO30ZT8nbYP_HOXbj_AmfmUJ8fWPadOQ90V3JQcGU0SG8YGQ2a9HAeTcNNhyJe-h3RJlNNZhE2vQmgWQ%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc57959256cf45188503cf07e56d32d0&_e=PrvoO1diH_xFvt6Zi2pY35IRHfpIqok7freg2ZeeGO81yiBS9SefdlOz2GnZaR5CQuNCQOwYemEylMpA55N4-EI9jhsyQpIQbDSFithXluo8SWbXeWx4nUeBbaA9PEMpxwehRy5um5MHXZRgR4htWI9gfAicSdOjET_F8zUXIfgZxoW4bNQZmnkVb07oFuW6P3AUk282eREoCBVhN8zNZvV9wPLd-QvioshUV2xlL_lbr6oo493k6DdkV4w4o9ol823Gmn9EU8H9U4Qd57d6-A%3D%3D)**

[**June 23, 1961:** The Antarctic Treaty was enacted as an international agreement to govern Antarctica and the surrounding region as a demilitarized zone protected for scientific study and discovery. The unprecedented treaty was a historic diplomatic achievement signed in Washington, D.C., by 12 countries. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc57959256cf45188503cf07e56d32d0&_e=PrvoO1diH_xFvt6Zi2pY35IRHfpIqok7freg2ZeeGO-2yV8TrOhj3FAd6iXWGdT480V4gQwZ1Owl4Ta6p9hpYSD99RWO1v9viGzw2__YAx8R6ykns4Xb6gxIbSVB2QznndyIrWGujDfVKnjUwcoWUaTNcrqsAVldPxZFLnf_O018RcTtmXm00w4BWSw2dJZO5b1Nw-neEAj2fjiQRE9G4GnmCczpvbtCMZBnTzpkdjYCI5QlO-u3RV0kgoGV0qig) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc57959256cf45188503cf07e56d32d0&_e=PrvoO1diH_xFvt6Zi2pY35IRHfpIqok7freg2ZeeGO-2yV8TrOhj3FAd6iXWGdT480V4gQwZ1Owl4Ta6p9hpYUF89Rp4UMYRVzWm2c3JyTla1VbnKHp3mVbjE2ySfnu4tj_JVilapLVM4VtzGhn7jwus5mkNoFzDU4-eZSIAD_UHfIS3t2mZt60ALWIAlAb8iADSDQpef0ycVkfpPXwqtou3j3OEOVocP9XWML7kcSlk3WX2gFOrAtNNbQ_S08ck)**

[**June 23, 1972:** Title IX was enacted as part of the Education Amendments of 1972 to prohibit sex-based discrimination in any school or education program which received federal funding. The law came at a time when only 42% of college students were female, and it has led to a significant increase in women's participation in sports.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc57959256cf45188503cf07e56d32d0&_e=PrvoO1diH_xFvt6Zi2pY35IRHfpIqok7freg2ZeeGO8L2_LqGQpeXTLkRXCulePJPP9_zzEkN_ZZLXeNQtun8QpOKb-bcEDL_CtYZViL_tqWalHyfH2EbQzBlDQbXR7fs3C6y_btUpukIHOiuQyfh0pTE_sZVmsZ7eeEj6ZyNobRXU1X4TX03MigBvs0jLayQdORW0Jl_fJNUL4RpfZ-qRf1XF86sk7VBmFD-hgh8Dw%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc57959256cf45188503cf07e56d32d0&_e=PrvoO1diH_xFvt6Zi2pY35IRHfpIqok7freg2ZeeGO8L2_LqGQpeXTLkRXCulePJxJmmqAb-O0ZuVT8MIX5HIADWsdrf40BkUly3KEWxYXDP24RLSyNNtU5p60iKCe8-wevKBw7jYncE6fn1NOsICGspfVZSwD3AN1rYzHJ6jg_x73VIrY1M6YGuptZxbV3tOEMAVXY0ZrT4OGLhAEA4HVp-z1JAIj6Y7nlcjmFVgvI%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: "I destroyed my marriage...fortunate I didn't die."
body:
Happy Friday! Mark and Krysty Ronchetti here.

New Mexico weatherman Steve Stucker joined us for the latest episode of No Doubt About It, and you HAVE to hear his amazing story.

→ WATCH HERE: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2d21a6cef9&e=567664f14c

>From partier to weatherman and preacher, Steve has been through a lot. But, his faith keeps him grounded and moving forward.

→ WATCH HERE: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2258ce02d1&e=567664f14c

New episodes of No Doubt About It come out every Tuesday and Thursday. You can download the show on your favorite podcasting platform or even subscribe and stream it on YouTube.

→ YouTube: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=02dd3c612f&e=567664f14c

→ Apple Podcasts: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2c50c2ce9a&e=567664f14c

→ Spotify: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=09a64a75c5&e=567664f14c

Thank you for your time and unwavering support. We truly appreciate each and every one of you. We hope you thoroughly enjoy this episode and that it sparks meaningful conversations among your circles. Stay tuned for more exciting content in the near future!

- Mark and Krysty

P.S. Check out our website to see ALL the places you can watch or listen and subscribe to the No Doubt About It Podcast: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=56b0bd6431&e=567664f14c

→ Forward this email to a friend:
https://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=482adf0004&e=567664f14c

name: Adam Schiff
subject: MAGA Republicans officially passed their resolution to censure me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

Kevin McCarthy just took up the resolution attacking me for holding Trump accountable.

**After Trump threatened a primary challenge against any Republican who refused to vote for it, MAGA Republicans officially passed their resolution to censure me. Why? Because I upheld my oath of office and held Donald Trump accountable for his many abuses of power.**

[They will never silence me — not now and not ever — but I need your help to fight back. If you can, split an urgent $10 contribution to the Voter Protection Project and our campaign right now to help us respond to this unprecedented political attack.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48132?t=6&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)

We face many pressing challenges as a country — affordable housing, access to health care, creating jobs, and so much more. Instead of addressing any of these challenges, Kevin McCarthy chose to take up this MAGA effort to distract from Donald Trump’s legal problems. They will never stop doing his bidding.

We've already known that the GOP is completely unhinged and beholden to Donald Trump.

With his call now to imprison me and primary any Republican who didn’t vote to censure me, Trump is telling the entire Republican Party that they must seek retribution against me politically and do whatever they can to prevent me from being elected to the Senate. **This is not just a political stunt to rile up the MAGA base — it’s an attack on all accountability and constitutional oversight.

But make no mistake: If they thought this was going to deter me from holding Trump and his accomplices accountable or delivering real results for California and our nation, they thought wrong.** I will not stop my fight to put truth and our democracy first — even if it means standing up to a twice-impeached ex-president and his lackeys.

[With Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans ramping up their attacks against me, I’m going to need you by my side more than ever. Will you split a grassroots donation of $10 to help the Voter Protection Project and me stand up to the GOP’s attacks?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48132?t=7&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48133?t=8&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48134?t=9&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48135?t=10&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48136?t=11&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48132?t=12&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)
MAGA Republicans may have voted to censure me, but I will always use my voice to hold them accountable. No matter what political retribution they throw at me next.

Let’s work together to push back against these attacks on our democracy.

Thank you,

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=8641%2E878179%2EXmaYcq)

Friend,

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65309252/413038971/-662322978?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTU2ODkxZC0yYzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rp2YGP31JsjxY_y5XgqqrQIq-5cBXK22cR-JDrmo8b8=)
I wanted you to hear it from me, friends. Two days ago, MAGA clowns in the House moved forward with their censure of my friend and colleague, Rep. Adam Schiff. This comes as their way of ‘getting back’ at Adam — who stood up for our democracy and protected election integrity by investigating Trump’s role in the 2016 election. After the absolute circus behavior vote took place — and passed — **I stared down Kevin McCarthy on the House floor to call him out for what he is:_weak and pathetic._** | [GROW UP KEVIN! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65309253/413038972/-1733728394?&refcode=E3120-20230623-McCarthyPathetic-SB-Corruption&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTU2ODkxZC0yYzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rp2YGP31JsjxY_y5XgqqrQIq-5cBXK22cR-JDrmo8b8=)

Furthermore, we are wasting time on nonsense issues because MAGA clowns have twisted Kevin McCarthy into running the entire circus _their way_. And he doesn’t care. That’s why — I’ll say it once more — Kevin McCarthy is _**weak and pathetic**_.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65309254/413038973/-1733728394?&refcode=E3120-20230623-McCarthyPathetic-Image-Corruption&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTU2ODkxZC0yYzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rp2YGP31JsjxY_y5XgqqrQIq-5cBXK22cR-JDrmo8b8=)
I’ve had it, friend. I am fighting everyday in Congress to get things back on track but act after act, MAGA clowns continue to spoil it for everyone — including people like you.
**[Will you chip in whatever you can so I can continue to stand up against MAGA clowns and their ringleader Kevin McCarthy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65309255/413038974/-1733728394?&refcode=E3120-20230623-McCarthyPathetic-SL-Corruption&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTU2ODkxZC0yYzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rp2YGP31JsjxY_y5XgqqrQIq-5cBXK22cR-JDrmo8b8=) **

body:
I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never once experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left.

The mainstream media thinks you are a racist, Peter.

They think you are a xenophobe.

They think any America First conservative is small-minded - but the Left should take a deeper look in the mirror.

I've been all over the country since announcing my campaign for President of the United States. I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never *once* experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left.

_**It's shameful.**_

**[Peter, I am hoping you can help me prove the Left and the mainstream media wrong.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=97ce401fd291476a9273b1a18fe7d297&_e=gZQKYcBrGgHkF6afE4vj1N1wQx6TZVGS58ns-05ZyssbghO8Z3MtPAZ8RXetE5i1pkuhon4itctjubkkgfkmBMyMYa6H8exXt6xYFdhLok3DWWN_C6NujIsHPb-OezoxZ885fd9Zrr2lC89JyLPInaAAxeqnyX2E40rFKLz32UiiGrc4zUnrrCH_sRUOO4EX8CoVidrEvVmcRmhPeOCYpMFzhBdcIPqoaGcRulFWav49dPXwKo-rPXLCXTQTjKJYGR3B0cxF5bnwlrzkrqfNazvMCHQommiGJkuWEEnwskJL_GIggER3yf2Rof_e_KTBlZOURIrmjt-EUjf1yh_BiqdOAdcoLbYzJur8c7R4WZWMBtSlxZHLtZVnDPtDL8BEZMaFFyPWWQDdG9TYk0c1WULx9hnjM5hvEEDBPO5foqE%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never once experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left. | | The mainstream media thinks you are a racist, Peter. They think you are a xenophobe. They think any America First conservative is small-minded - but the Left should take a deeper look in the mirror. I've been all over the country since announcing my campaign for President of the United States. I've met with grassroots conservatives across America and never once experienced the kind of bigotry that I regularly see from the Left. It's shameful. That's why it's so important for me to secure a prominent spot on the debate stage this August. We need to prove to the mainstream media that their bias won't stop us from speaking the TRUTH. [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=41029527a48f415983156b53057851d5&_e=RvP-iit6itbIxgwZNgWF5DBPc0bOD5V7f_nAj2enfCMNc_0K2flOz_kWbyz1IjVokbn0Sl2ZGK1d394lddFNmxTTTYYbISRXdu2YN2YRmWHOS2DLhFIU_RcQpjBvlXgotJch7xNoZo5IHXKJWgDZ28CiGwH9kRajHPAljmcK1QuSTM4eROOqjvt-YxbtfumSATcKeanPNeol7hzmjVQXYCfzDyv1vIPm4W7yhKxDCurK4vk9s4uQYzBrq3MRAbg_Kep-p7gkwuwO__XeJSNGJn82GJB0hhpRuV1N2OFfMl41e9_L0c3PMzyQgnmWGKrOEY6Ox8DusEQFYawve0iYUKgGAStBMc4-tV4YGzYrl7dMk8S5ubfnGp7ye-uiRW_v3q_pbBZ-zBxQ-rYvZLchRATdKmc5PKs1ivb4K9BifcZHYzUwpEo-6KlrcK7oC4na)

In these conflicting times, we need leaders like Rick Scott. In the 2018 Senate election:

* **It was the closest race in the country,** he won by ONLY 0.12% - a 10,000 vote margin.
* Democrats raised $80 million for the seat - making it **one of the most expensive races in the entire country**

This is not a race we can sit on - there is no Election Day. The race for the election has already started and we cannot afford to let the Democrats get ahead for a second.

[**AMERICA IS WORTH FIGHTING FOR RESCUE AMERICA >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=41029527a48f415983156b53057851d5&_e=RvP-iit6itbIxgwZNgWF5DBPc0bOD5V7f_nAj2enfCMNc_0K2flOz_kWbyz1IjVokbn0Sl2ZGK1d394lddFNmxTTTYYbISRXdu2YN2YRmWHOS2DLhFIU_RcQpjBvlXgotJch7xNoZo5IHXKJWgDZ28CiGwH9kRajHPAljmcK1QuSTM4eROOqjvt-YxbtfumSATcKeanPNeol7hzmjVQXYCfzDyv1vIPm4W7yhKxDCurK4vk9s4uQYzBrq3MRAbg_Kep-p7gkwuwO__XeJSNGJj3I39uXIKiYlj4XUXmcSubDz5Z7bRaOfL5FpNByk--jAHjYr9P9dI_bdS7CAhZ-_MByAOyduJHIIq5mBK-XgRll1TeilvDbx5wRvZ2axPehEalHqAubDGvvQSzWJH5tA5C6xe9KE0X-bEsNCPQEcleSxhUfWB-Y9owM0U8sgt5T)

body:
Hunter Biden's Plea Deal is Nepotism on Steroids!

The Garland Justice Department’s disparate treatment of Hunter Biden
and President Trump is an abomination unto the law. The sweetheart
plea deal with Hunter Biden is a “thumb in the eye” to the fair
administration of law. This is a miscarriage of justice whose chief
beneficiary is President Biden. For far too long, Biden has avoided
any serious investigation of his involvement in Hunter’s corrupt
foreign business dealings. The plea deal, which doesn’t address the
strong evidence of Biden family racketeering, is a sham.

Garland has now cleared the board for Biden’s reelection campaign by
arresting Trump and shutting down the Biden family corruption issue
with this rigged plea deal. And by refusing to appoint a special
counsel, Garland avoids having to issue a public report disclosing the
facts and details behind this charade. The Justice Department has been
irredeemably compromised by its politicized prosecutions and
cover-ups.

Congress now has no choice but to initiate an immediate impeachment
inquiry into Joe Biden and Merrick Garland. In the meantime, Judicial
Watch will continue its leadership role of investigating and exposing
the worsening Biden corruption crisis through numerous Freedom of

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the DHS’s Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency failed to
comply with an October 27, 2022, FOIA request for:

1. All emails, direct messages, task management alerts, or other
records of communication related to the work of the Election Integrity
Partnership (EIP) sent via the Atlassian Jira platform between any
official or employee of the Cybersecurity and Information Security
Agency and any member, officer, employee, or representative of any of
the following:

* The Election Integrity Partnership
* The University of Washington’s Center for an Informed Public
* Stanford University’s Internet Observatory
* The Center for Internet Security
* The Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing & Analysis Center
* The National Association of Secretaries of State
* The National Association of State Election Directors
* Graphika
* The Atlantic Council’s Digital Forensics Research Laboratory
* Any social media company

2. All memoranda of understanding, guidelines, or similar records
related to the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency’s use
of the Atlassian Jira platform for work related to the Election
Integrity Partnership.

clean_body: Hunter Biden's Plea Deal is Nepotism on Steroids! [INSIDE JW] THE HUNTER BIDEN PLEA DEAL IS A SHAM [] We are not surprised that the Biden Justice Department struck a corrupt plea deal [] with Hunter Biden for misdemeanor tax violations and a false statement tied to a gun purchase. The Garland Justice Department’s disparate treatment of Hunter Biden and President Trump is an abomination unto the law. The sweetheart plea deal with Hunter Biden is a “thumb in the eye” to the fair administration of law. This is a miscarriage of justice whose chief beneficiary is President Biden. For far too long, Biden has avoided any serious investigation of his involvement in Hunter’s corrupt foreign business dealings. The plea deal, which doesn’t address the strong evidence of Biden family racketeering, is a sham. Garland has now cleared the board for Biden’s reelection campaign by arresting Trump and shutting down the Biden family corruption issue with this rigged plea deal. And by refusing to appoint a special counsel, Garland avoids having to issue a public report disclosing the facts and details behind this charade. The Justice Department has been irredeemably compromised by its politicized prosecutions and cover-ups. Congress now has no choice but to initiate an immediate impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden and Merrick Garland. In the meantime, Judicial Watch will continue its leadership role of investigating and exposing the worsening Biden corruption crisis through numerous Freedom of Information Act (FOIA), federal, and state lawsuits. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DHS FOR RECORDS TIED TO ELECTION CENSORSHIP COLLUSION In 2018 Congress created [] the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA) to protect our country’s vital infrastructure. In that short time, it seems, this relatively obscure agency has stuck its fingers where they don’t belong. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all records of communications tied to the Election Integrity Partnership (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:23-cv-01698)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the DHS’s Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency failed to comply with an October 27, 2022, FOIA request for: 1. All emails, direct messages, task management alerts, or other records of communication related to the work of the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP) sent via the Atlassian Jira platform between any official or employee of the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency and any member, officer, employee, or representative of any of the following: The Election Integrity Partnership The University of Washington’s Center for an Informed Public Stanford University’s Internet Observatory The Center for Internet Security The Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing & Analysis Center The National Association of Secretaries of State The National Association of State Election Directors Graphika The Atlantic Council’s Digital Forensics Research Laboratory Any social media company 2. All memoranda of understanding, guidelines, or similar records related to the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency’s use of the Atlassian Jira platform for work related to the Election Integrity Partnership. Jira is a software application developed by the Australian company Atlassian. The Atlassian website [] states: “Jira helps teams plan, assign, track, report, and manage work. It brings teams together for everything from agile software development, customer support, start-ups, and enterprises.” Based on representations from the Election Integrity Partnership (see here [] and here []), the federal government, social media companies, the EIP, the Center for Internet Security [] (a non-profit organization funded partly by DHS and the Defense Departmen [) and numerous other leftist groups communicated privately via the Jira platform. In a July 2022 blog [], the Election Integrity Partnership states: “The EIP’s core conveners are the Stanford Internet Observatory and the University of Washington’s Center for an Informed Public. We work in collaboration with some of the nation’s leading institutions focused on analysis of online harms, including the National Conference on Citizenship, Graphika, and the Digital Forensic Research Lab.” To be blunt, the Biden DHS is unlawfully hiding evidence of their election interference and censorship of Americans. In January 2023we sued [] the DOJ for records of communications between the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story. In September 2022, we sued [] the Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In May 2022, YouTube censored our video about Biden corruption and integrity issues in the 2020 election. The video [], titled “Impeach? Biden Corruption Threatens National Security,” was falsely determined to be “election misinformation” and removed by YouTube, and Judicial Watch’s YouTube account was suspended for a week. The video featured an interview with me. We continue to post our videos [] on our Rumble channel (). In April 2021, we published [] documents revealing how California state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about the 2020 election. In May 2021, we revealed [] documents showing that Iowa state officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. In July 2021, we uncovered [] records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. AFTER BILLIONS IN HAITI AID VANISH U.S. ALLOTS MILLIONS FOR CLIMATE FUNDING It is reported [] that more civilians have been killed in Haiti this year than in Ukraine, as gang violence dominates the streets. The billions we have sent there over the years seem to have had little effect, but now, as our Corruption Chronicles blog explains [], we’re continuing to throw good money after bad. Rife with fraud and corruption, the U.S. government’s multi-billion-dollar Haiti aid program has failed miserably to help citizens of the impoverished island nation, yet the Biden administration is sending tens of millions more under the auspice of Caribbean climate funding. At a recent meeting in the Bahamas, Vice President Kamala Harris unveiled a new $100 million allocation [] from American taxpayers earmarked as general “support for the Caribbean” to among other things transition renewable energy, address climate change and resilience building across the region. The money will also address energy, food security and humanitarian needs in the various islands. Buried deep in this month’s announcement is that fact that the biggest chunk of money will go to Haiti, though billions in U.S. aid have disappeared over the years as American taxpayer dollars keep flowing to the poverty-stricken country with no oversight. In fact, billions in U.S. assistance—with billions more from the international community—has made little difference. Since the 2010 earthquake Uncle Sam alone has provided Haiti with over $5.6 billion [] to help it bounce back but more than a decade later that has not materialized and no one really knows what happened to the money. The funds were supposed to provide Haiti with “life-saving post-disaster relief as well as longer-term recovery, reconstruction, and development programs,” according to the State Department, which confirms that after the 2021 earthquake the U.S. “again mobilized a whole-of-government effort to provide immediate assistance at the Haitian government’s request.” Haiti’s reconstruction and development will continue for many years, the State Department predicts, adding that since 2021 it has doled out a whopping $278 million in humanitarian and health assistance for Haiti. The U.S.—under both Democratic and Republican administrations—has poured lots of money into Haiti despite systemic lapses in the programs it funds. For instance, a costly initiative a to build housing failed miserably after the U.S. spent $90 million [] and tens of thousands of Haitians remain homeless a decade later. The Clinton Foundation and Clinton Bush Haiti Fund also came up with some $88 million for earthquake recovery but Haiti remains a disaster, the poorest country in the western hemisphere. Even before the tremor a federal audit [] revealed that hundreds of millions of American taxpayer dollars were wasted on reckless Haitian projects with the single largest chunk—$170.3 million—going to a failed port and power plant adventure heavily promoted by Bill and Hillary Clinton. The Clinton-backed power and port venture is the biggest and most expensive failure mentioned in the probe, which was ordered by a Florida congresswoman who at the time confirmed a “troubling lack of progress and accountability” in Haiti reconstruction projects. All these years later many Haitians still live in deplorable, shanty town tent cities and a never-ending epidemic of cholera keeps claiming lives. Nearly half of the Haitian population does not have enough food [], according to the United Nations, which confirms that armed gangs have overrun most of the country’s capital of Port-au-Prince. Where has all the U.S. aid gone and why does the government keep sending our taxpayer dollars when it has failed to help the Haitian people? Earlier this year the Biden administration awarded Haiti another $56.5 million [] in humanitarian aid, explaining that it was “for the people of Haiti in response to the country’s humanitarian crisis and cholera epidemic.” This month’s allocation includes $54 million to counter the island’s “humanitarian crisis,” including gang violence on civilians that has prevented Haitians from accessing critical food, safe drinking water and other basic supplies. More than $10.4 million will go to Haiti’s agricultural and livestock sector to enhance resilience and productivity that will improve food security. “This new funding will provide vulnerable Haitians with urgently needed humanitarian assistance, including vital food assistance, as 4.9 million people face acute food insecurity amid the crisis,” according to the recent U.S. government announcement. “In addition, these funds will provide access to safe drinking water and health care, as well as support care for survivors of gender-based violence and other protection services for the most vulnerable.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2023, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTc1LTgzZjU0M2ExZWRiMDQ0ZWFhNjU1YzA5ODkzNGYxZTRiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3ZpdmVrLTIwMjQvMTAtdHJ1dGhzLWFlLXI_c2M9MjAyMzA2MjFfVklWRUtfRUVfQUVfMTAtVFJVVEhTX1JFVl9GRk8wNjI0MjAyMyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXJldiZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MTB0cnV0aHMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCJ9/xJ0sTrAgl0G3E9cgJI24oA)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Join the Fight Against the College Cartel
body:
THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of The College Scam -- have you?

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=suJB6uz0gNZPRhVsL7xwvA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of **_The College Scam_** \-- have you? [**If not, I want to send you your very own copy when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to TPUSA today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26364%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6PJzNkUcEuOimjy7zwRvnw&sysid=1) Yes -- ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $5 will help us cover the cost of shipping. [**Just click here to get your copy!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26375%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fV5u%2blQjOVKwFz2VcrZ%2biQ&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=suJB6uz0gNZPRhVsL7xwvA&sysid=1)
---
The Left is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities, brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX DOLLARS. Turning Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help. [**That's why I'm offering you this special thank-you gift when you make a donation of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26376%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kcbHUoDOUFyqtkPOWu57Aw&sysid=1) We want to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned Americans as we can! I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people with their toxic “woke” ideology. [**But we're not giving up. We're fighting back by exposing them in _The College Scam_ , and I want to send you a copy as a special thank-you for your support.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26377%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2YiM2qMOdm6J0nt7W1Gp9A&sysid=1)
---
[Get Your Copy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26378%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PA6LYKyLPJUbLxuRp%2f83sQ&sysid=1)
---
When you read _The College Scam_ , you'll learn: \- My 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge of whether or not it’s a good investment for students OR taxpayers \- The real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness \- How the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists. Instead, it combines frontline experience from my eleven years criss-crossing America to speak with students, extensive research into the dirty secrets of higher education, and a prosecutor's intensity to present my case against the College Cartel. This book has a phenomenal **_4.7 out of five stars on Amazon_** , with glowing reviews like:
> _“Charlie Kirk does a great job of exposing the craziness on contemporary college campuses. Even for those reasonably well informed about this, he adds more valuable information.” -- Susan_

> _"Charlie absolutely nails the problems of the system... Thanks!! Keep doing what you are doing!!” -- Michal_
And there are hundreds more just like these from grassroots Americans who are ready to fight back against this rigged, bloated, and broken college system. Are you one of them? Are you ready to arm yourself with the knowledge and the strategy that will help us dismantle the College Cartel? [**Then please -- let me send you a copy of The College Scam right now. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a few dollars, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26379%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bjvIVebZqKdqPadvYK5bGA&sysid=1)
---
[Get Your Copy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26378%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PA6LYKyLPJUbLxuRp%2f83sQ&sysid=1)
---
When you claim your copy, you get the best of both worlds: You'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! Join the thousands of Americans who have already taken advantage of this limited-time offer, and learn how you can join the fight against the College Cartel today. **Claim your copy of The College Scam and help us defend America's future!** Thank you for your support,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669291%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m26kFCrfeabmi2Hg%2bkM%2fxg&sysid=1)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669291%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m26kFCrfeabmi2Hg%2bkM%2fxg&sysid=1)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. **[https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669292%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e9a9s9cxDnl1tcedSPtLOg&sysid=1)**

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation’s Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you’ll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Update
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America Is a Christian Nation
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5dqt9ptkkv25p6s51a2pml6k7omfru9t84kasv8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdg6cpb0cjh2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2vodiro8nqerrurkn03j61ncegae1a3n9iqncsg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdg62ob2cth2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Join the Fight Against Chemical Abortion
body:
Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children.

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26385%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZYWAArPH3X%2f448%2f5mF9b6Q&sysid=1)
---
#
Hello Friend,

As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26386%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XDV7h0%2brOX9OgRsc%2fX8oUw&sysid=1)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother’s health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26387%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eOTcopSSQSRT8GrSp2vLbQ&sysid=1)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fXP9CtGRyuJ2CTajYCKERQ&sysid=1)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Your America News
---

clean_body: Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children. | Hello Friend, As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother’s health. For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications. For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent. We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government. We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together. Sincerely, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206 Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: I learned something new...
body:
I'm neither of those things...

---
Yesterday was a GREAT day for our team. Our supporters rallied around us as we launched this movement. Thousands of folks across America have joined _**Team Hurd**_... and our list of supporters is still growing. When I announced my candidacy for President yesterday, I was attacked with FALSE claims by both Trump and the DNC. This means they’re petrified. Trump knows we’re a threat. Biden knows I’ll beat him. That’s why I’m the best candidate in this race.
---

| | While the irony isn't lost on me, THIS is the problem I want to fix in America's political arena. Status quo politicians have the fringes of the parties controlling the narrative. _**I'm neither of those things.**_ I am a common sense, modern Republican who wants to build a better country and solve our complicated problems. If you are a part of the exhausted majority like me, let's do something different because we're better together. [**Donate $1 or more today and let's do this thing.**](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ztkdlhd-jhlkdhlhhk-i/) Thank you, **Will Hurd**

If you take out a loan, you pay it back.

_America needs more victors and less victims._
I'm Tim Scott and I approve this message because these aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

And -- unlike too many Establishment "Leaders" in Washington, D.C. today -- I truly want GRASSROOTS PATRIOTS to win big and bring TRUE CONSERVATIVE PRINCIPLES to the White House and Congress. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: STOP THE PRO-ABORTION AGENDA NOW!
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zogod3ahap9m58rsm5o9d2eifr05r8acm0bc5o50_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob4c3h2bs)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zetpnlatb4r43pk9l43064k94h4kbh2l7gmoo6ko_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob4c3h2bs) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5pna88vmesuar7i24k5pusnfckh3jq6u50ucimg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob4c3h2bs)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr2o4i1qq21i0gfspnu7dl6tgpjdkj27kn6hhbng_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob4c3h2bs)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

American Defense News

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A meaningful way to keep up the fight for abortion rights on today’s awful anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Two terrific coalitions are fighting to protect abortion rights in their state constitutions. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65318382/413075534/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14X_TAN_E_20230624_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ0ZmQxZi05NDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uIkUquoSLTlF1r2izOJ_GsxzYqNZh5dqTPVLDPRRynk=&emci=0f44fd1f-9412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1044fd1f-9412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I’m still angry. And I’m still determined. One year ago today, right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court put ideology over the rule of law and threw out nearly half a century of precedent to overturn Roe v. Wade. The consequences have been brutal. For women forced to carry pregnancies against their will. For people denied life-saving health care. For patients forced to somehow take time off work, arrange child care, and pay to travel across state lines for abortions. For parents who were already struggling to make ends meet for the children they already had. We’ve also seen an incredible outpouring of activism to fight for the right to an abortion. For example: last year, this team responded to the Supreme Court’s ruling and pitched in to help Reproductive Freedom for All and Kansans for Constitutional Freedom win powerfully important state ballot initiatives. Those groups’ victories enshrined reproductive freedom in the Michigan state constitution and held the line on maintaining abortion access in Kansas, a state that’s an oasis in a region with severe restrictions. **Even though right-wing extremists have been able to enact their agenda through capturing the courts, it’s still clear: the American people overwhelmingly support abortion rights, and we can win at the ballot box when we fight at the ballot box.** So let’s keep up the momentum in other states. **Two terrific coalitions are fighting right now to put abortion rights on the ballot in Ohio and Florida. If they succeed, they’d enshrine reproductive freedom in their state constitutions and overturn extreme bans that right-wing lawmakers have enacted.** [_**Can you please split a donation of $15 or any amount between Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom and Floridians Protecting Freedom on today’s anniversary of the overturning of Roe? 100% of your contribution will go directly to these two groups.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65318383/413075535/2044001268?amount=15&refcode=EMZ14X_TAN_E_20230624_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ0ZmQxZi05NDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uIkUquoSLTlF1r2izOJ_GsxzYqNZh5dqTPVLDPRRynk=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65318395/413075547/2044001268?refcode=EMZ14X_TAN_E_20230624_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ0ZmQxZi05NDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uIkUquoSLTlF1r2izOJ_GsxzYqNZh5dqTPVLDPRRynk=)
---
>
Ohio’s deadline for collecting signatures and getting this measure on the ballot is coming up fast: July 5. They would be on the ballot this November. Florida’s initiative would be on the ballot next November, but advocates are already hustling to get all the signatures they need — we’re talking outdoor outreach in the summer heat — and we’ve got to fight by their side.
If we get these measures on the ballot and win these votes, millions more Americans will have reproductive freedom. And we’ll continue lighting the way for more progress to come.
I won’t stop fighting to protect the right to an abortion nationwide. That means ending the filibuster so we can codify Roe v. Wade into federal law — which is possible if we flip a handful of U.S. House seats, win one more Senate seat, and hold onto the White House. I’ll also keep pushing back against the right-wing takeover of our Supreme Court by working to expand and rebalance it. I am in those fights all the way.
But in the meantime, here are two places where we can take concrete action to ensure reproductive freedom for all. Here are two coalitions who can use all the help they can get. And here are two ways we can mark today’s anniversary by fighting back against the far right’s extreme agenda.
[_**If it makes sense for you right now, please split a donation between Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom and Floridians Protecting Freedom. Help build on last year’s victories at the ballot box, and help guarantee the right to an abortion in two more states.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65318396/413075548/2044001268?amount=15&refcode=EMZ14X_TAN_E_20230624_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ0ZmQxZi05NDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uIkUquoSLTlF1r2izOJ_GsxzYqNZh5dqTPVLDPRRynk=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
P.S. I hope you’re taking good care of yourself today. Anniversaries like these are hard. They hurt. But by channeling our righteous anger into righteous fights, we can turn our pain into power.

clean_body: Two terrific coalitions are fighting to protect abortion rights in their state constitutions. | | | I’m still angry. And I’m still determined. One year ago today, right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court put ideology over the rule of law and threw out nearly half a century of precedent to overturn Roe v. Wade. The consequences have been brutal. For women forced to carry pregnancies against their will. For people denied life-saving health care. For patients forced to somehow take time off work, arrange child care, and pay to travel across state lines for abortions. For parents who were already struggling to make ends meet for the children they already had. We’ve also seen an incredible outpouring of activism to fight for the right to an abortion. For example: last year, this team responded to the Supreme Court’s ruling and pitched in to help Reproductive Freedom for All and Kansans for Constitutional Freedom win powerfully important state ballot initiatives. Those groups’ victories enshrined reproductive freedom in the Michigan state constitution and held the line on maintaining abortion access in Kansas, a state that’s an oasis in a region with severe restrictions. Even though right-wing extremists have been able to enact their agenda through capturing the courts, it’s still clear: the American people overwhelmingly support abortion rights, and we can win at the ballot box when we fight at the ballot box. So let’s keep up the momentum in other states. Two terrific coalitions are fighting right now to put abortion rights on the ballot in Ohio and Florida. If they succeed, they’d enshrine reproductive freedom in their state constitutions and overturn extreme bans that right-wing lawmakers have enacted. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Ohio’s deadline for collecting signatures and getting this measure on the ballot is coming up fast: July 5. They would be on the ballot this November. Florida’s initiative would be on the ballot next November, but advocates are already hustling to get all the signatures they need — we’re talking outdoor outreach in the summer heat — and we’ve got to fight by their side. If we get these measures on the ballot and win these votes, millions more Americans will have reproductive freedom. And we’ll continue lighting the way for more progress to come. I won’t stop fighting to protect the right to an abortion nationwide. That means ending the filibuster so we can codify Roe v. Wade into federal law — which is possible if we flip a handful of U.S. House seats, win one more Senate seat, and hold onto the White House. I’ll also keep pushing back against the right-wing takeover of our Supreme Court by working to expand and rebalance it. I am in those fights all the way. But in the meantime, here are two places where we can take concrete action to ensure reproductive freedom for all. Here are two coalitions who can use all the help they can get. And here are two ways we can mark today’s anniversary by fighting back against the far right’s extreme agenda. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. I hope you’re taking good care of yourself today. Anniversaries like these are hard. They hurt. But by channeling our righteous anger into righteous fights, we can turn our pain into power. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t serious

body:

| | | Sean Spicer here reaching out on behalf of Speaker McCarthy.

I know you're busy, so I'll keep this huddle brief:
* With the White House, Senate, and House Majority on the line, **2024 will be the most consequential election of our lives.**
* The Democrats have already released a list of **GOP seats to target** ahead of 2024.
* AND I hate to admit this but Republicans are already falling behind in the money game.

I don't know about you, but I do not want to live through two more years of TOTAL Democrat control. That's why it's imperative we reach our goals NOW and stay on pace.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Join the Fight Against Chemical Abortion
body:
Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children.

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhpq81o99gk3plg3rgaapsbh55k56lkv61ugsvoo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob2c3h2bs)
---
#
Hello Friend,

As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfbm5qid6fl3lt5ui83k54uq50cnbkut4h8982l0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob2c3h2bs)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother's health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgvhfosoo2vou61vbpltt8klvl0f7docoioadeo0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob2c3h2bs)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpq3d953pr06r5js8bu9vb8gfa0f9g9o5t6bip3g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6cob2c3h2bs)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

1600 Daily

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt0u8nke8r9pbuvtrq6d94rpk5bjuammkakpvueo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi62pj0c3h2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zigcg911g1rv0a8hfm97os9qmu8u3638oho7efog_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi62pj0c3h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqv3sgsqranfurb857tavs7cgmp06qp1oa537iq8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi62pj0c3h2bs)
---

However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab04cf1280474a0ea99fb2de9e857d70&_e=IellvLMFP27SwDge-4BgCsEofWLxchexM_QTXnpBKm31Jed9vbAyY97FgrGxTOs81hP1gwpKWOkAp7D4pKHU62i8_YqawnfXjhkmiqTNpaXa8AVKZ-nzWnYilHLUWhC6enkMaZRYmQUWqoDL-dRxyswmjR-g4RoeOf1yzh33Hbwmrs_uL-7jTVwggQFr7RYri0qLBnZBLHAMhhCuaGeO0HWse4XOv5ahrOW9J7qIqu7mPIb1V2mtCeWrdSyFg5tYZIkYR8LmkRm8ET9of8vGQ4Unw4R_HXSc7fbrvo7dkf2nJRXpKLhfYqolyIuMEk25PvWwnRidd4SuBsf8QCLxcAwW1aLRXV8si277vFzNIsKlBt8TJkNl4U2PZs_LuCwTmf6nq-ySPFilh1CINMh4h7g4ZQqybYuGBnA5Pr-4Urk%3D)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother's health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab04cf1280474a0ea99fb2de9e857d70&_e=IellvLMFP27SwDge-4BgCsEofWLxchexM_QTXnpBKm31Jed9vbAyY97FgrGxTOs81hP1gwpKWOkAp7D4pKHU62i8_YqawnfXjhkmiqTNpaXa8AVKZ-nzWnYilHLUWhC6enkMaZRYmQUWqoDL-dRxyswmjR-g4RoeOf1yzh33Hbwmrs_uL-7jTVwggQFr7RYri0qLBnZBLHAMhhCuaGeO0HWse4XOv5ahrOW9J7qIqu7mPIb1V2mtCeWrdSyFg5tYZIkYR8LmkRm8ET9of8vGQx3MiFod8LCu6w4AG-jG-bfixuqb_kPQ8VOtqdhxLfy7aNzGBxwp3KsyWXemJx3EW9Ud7GmXuunubaGybI8ooTLZZDCE9zNhjihK0x3_eIRe9Cw_mZoAD-6ikuGXKv0IhYgt-oiCnYLiy6l4eQAAU1w%3D)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab04cf1280474a0ea99fb2de9e857d70&_e=IellvLMFP27SwDge-4BgCsEofWLxchexM_QTXnpBKm31Jed9vbAyY97FgrGxTOs81hP1gwpKWOkAp7D4pKHU62i8_YqawnfXjhkmiqTNpaXa8AVKZ-nzWnYilHLUWhC6enkMaZRYmQUWqoDL-dRxyswmjR-g4RoeOf1yzh33Hbwmrs_uL-7jTVwggQFr7RYri0qLBnZBLHAMhhCuaGeO0HWse4XOv5ahrOW9J7qIqu7mPIb1V2mtCeWrdSyFg5tYZIkYR8LmkRm8ET9of8vGQ-qz51qZ2yWVvBEhENUnUvDAUj5DQYlgp-b8I8qGtnpX-qg92rTmR4KeSsVQQ3xM3d2y_Ij5H-uC_qYn32zz5vn2v1cGyePwIIFC1J9gsyT2SP1RShwh2sy3_nXW1ofdS8nZ2Zks79yAkLUtcwKzjHQ%3D)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206
