name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My hero son is facing life in prison
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMvPIFjM_o173YWWLyQbSzo0jvasKpRb7yyuHyMWdQbR9qhlagLd3nHmX5go9n6TGSGungtxJAx8cKcsPHN9ESlpCJ2MvLVtE_dGdeso27TCe_Wiju0rMzBb34L1fMtUX_B3Mrc-m079tU7CMUOWraDQ%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMhu_Mwn5H_8rDC-BtvJvdCkfX-N6EVNgf5Sifw6cC67yhyNLEv64DKKOPvObpB8YRcn-NsNP4mHyl1EvfU7Wla4lHvd_qO7W_eKQi-ANw74oDeWb91zc4Cj0solk7fl--8uylxR30iv0508RUo_yUv0%3D) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMn5qd_AvvXYnejDE8b0uRyQdaLyZd-V2W6CmDkNAd4h8sz7AYg2Ei_oxaQOStIeIHLeJBo-yx9rcrFNH0XwFHY_E06TnL45G-cA780kHiv2gnpf4M9Q3lf6Psli08Jv7fzPx_y8QxX_aPtomIIxXpoo%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMs1_ZNIBGRW7JRBNvgfuXtg2Vg8TmHTxnF6kkyS7F35NeA_W6a7T_Ca3hvco3wKYjwa9DH1cJepP_ePGZVIj5MscDHn1V33RqTB4jNfNt9pN3wxn0zyXQkKYhz9m3SF2UgUUvVdcx7SQCsQAAx-FMGc%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMsjChShiujCgqrPrk5e80O7Oi5s9nmhQYTIrT_etxqlHNkk_XoHG2Cnv6WwtCLSa_qYBETXfp1Dbg-xaSmSOhxVCRYJoet6IMlO9DfZ35gC72kZP6DfAVF1Q09adNaY7De-FzY8w9Ma4FrLMvvRGdW8%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMoxncf3q5HaL9-AtZwpH2qn05-QrSxAzzTly8lMUZ1b_7vlduOQNH8Qx8u4leB2RGR8rP7jb5k3QnFttdH3OGo3bGl0ZJVQa-7Kh2p10U7EFVr9w9RoTZ8bTxbzmWJQDUK1VMeTuHTSdFF4D_kBTUhs%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMqsvISwRNaNrokuhd4yISjFvVwoDXbkRyT2RWGR4DfgI8I4kPy6LuLLiZRVD0HuXg3qBLWeKRjm5iFuL6CBUzllGIPkp2QRBtrEWoMHRHrJQZ_OoAvmI4Sg1MthvWVhFgB2e2FbBVaySRpwRGBb5kyk%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMkXO986xDRr73sGGGM7M5quC2PznTwsE2AsY_nTL2-1TuEKBrfckwS3_5P4y-Gn4DjonMjQHDk19wBR0NuwURk7OmXahFOlS784550blHbhMRgxH_4GaqKJGqgLNzX8EZUfIHXvfvaTCF1cLvKTjNZs%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMgHY5b1Nc8GZhT3Onv-VOHSFPzo61PaweezfrWZUlAVct6GvU9z_ihTIctfxyBEePKNKu3WWs1cepEzVkwugOmZ-v7q0iFn-HP0dSawPoSBDx4B8jmfsiMaX_rn_Q4T39WVSp9y_lnw3qyINLgpmn2U%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91118ae152ec4e69b8a0cb07d8dfc09f&_e=Ze7q7Fn4GtJ21-ZmOM97-BK6XkFdaJJUmHu4kZ4WXur1XSfU8AfWsbEOWb9MqiM_BkvR8dMOq-tzxfveRxN3PVubYRR9wHdkfkxFbUTtYgU_q7kHAYKhj0dg2Rfo_Q1NdZbPoZHWsS4bNC-rM7EW2PUW8zKwaDIT7ezctlHxaNUKiFk2SzgUEbkOIJt_Qr-ev4yuYqzhjCJUL1ufThiRMnaldswvrHPVE9Ij85XYgpqrACbLhB2bt3O3_ogHtLRwhaUkUtMKyB2ZdiLzW2g5SPyhEFSN90WzALDj6mtWqaVXGqVOXTQ8vW8xfeOc5cHnarb_c2MLdKqp-AlTbAUmCTiqf_GBa6Jiu24EzYbO4Lc%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc445c2aaf484b548435990f1f1350e0&_e=ZTPDZkuXTb9VLCrX7hOQveqKj6tr-MGs59mNNy9tuHPNGs689ALyamcUO-fRxDvHaFKfPA5VIZF3bT7irvGStFXWE-6FZbAivnlBHN22H3kXB9JMGOsxJfGcyE9lKIpSMWclNmjz0QwvShA-WV60q8pz5C3_kx9-QWeM3jxCwgdANWXRM_-SG8FzzPqLwdmMTktRV2E864J-nRx41Pc6AI2Bf87eZYANA8YwFkndWMr8pj00idqnEYWg3LaHBUrnxwwCgzSNO-3AMFpm0REVpjvv5rc-pdKag6BBmy-Ip5Ra9NmZiLF2AefaVDhgBBS5HKYg2nmXosooHt4YRmkV7mBzXrVi4iwAMh78hNwWAf9tPcLqM0us8DreU9Jn4csMPuDMvLEmA7QmPUypksfSYHTt0MHEuiRiXL1dRbZSC3Q%3D)

Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.

clean_body: THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of The College Scam -- have you? | | | Fellow Patriot, THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of The College Scam \-- have you? Yes -- ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $5 will help us cover the cost of shipping. The Left is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities, brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX DOLLARS. Turning Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help. We want to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned Americans as we can! I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people with their toxic "woke" ideology. When you read The College Scam , you'll learn: \- My 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge of whether or not it's a good investment for students OR taxpayers \- The real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness \- How the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists. Instead, it combines frontline experience from my eleven years criss-crossing America to speak with students, extensive research into the dirty secrets of higher education, and a prosecutor's intensity to present my case against the College Cartel. This book has a phenomenal 4.7 out of five stars on Amazon , with glowing reviews like: " Charlie Kirk does a great job of exposing the craziness on contemporary college campuses. Even for those reasonably well informed about this, he adds more valuable information." \-- Susan "Charlie absolutely nails the problems of the system... Thanks!! Keep doing what you are doing!! " \-- Michal And there are hundreds more just like these from grassroots Americans who are ready to fight back against this rigged, bloated, and broken college system. Are you one of them? subject: One year since Roe overturned
body:
| | Friend, **Today marks one year since the Supreme Court ruled to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ ** And since then, we’ve seen the impact rip through all of our communities, as anti-abortion state lawmakers across the country continue to restrict abortion care. But make no mistake: **The fight for our right to abortion is far from over.** [Congress can federally protect our right to abortion through the Women’s Health Protection Act. Urge your representatives to pass it now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65320541/413084838/1810592644?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGJkNjQ2Mi05NzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xk7xRfxSvooZt0Z_9Jesu8xu4K5YHdQ6ie2Q3DuV_5s=&emci=e5f29d56-d70a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=04bd6462-9712-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) Our fight for abortion isn’t just one for reproductive rights — it’s a fight for racial, gender, and economic justice. And we have the power to create a future we believe in. Over 70 million Americans ages 18-35 are now eligible to vote, more than any other age group. **We’re going to continue to bring this fight to the ballot box, just like we did in 2022.** [They messed with the wrong generation. Urge Congress to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65320543/413084840/244508703?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGJkNjQ2Mi05NzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xk7xRfxSvooZt0Z_9Jesu8xu4K5YHdQ6ie2Q3DuV_5s=&emci=e5f29d56-d70a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=04bd6462-9712-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) In this with you, NextGen America

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z55a4dldqq77g3p2ls08ivlu4sveflapjk4l6ik8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj4c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z20d3ajnkg5o0j8ccf2o4mska2qiab4gekdohu2g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj4c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg8pdi6hn7a8d0e9ojur6uhhcg22rjr3u99diak8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj4c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Should we support Joe Biden’s impeachment?
body:
| | |
---
We urgently need to know your thoughts about impeaching Joe Biden. [**Please fill out this very short survey right away!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) Rep. Lauren Boebert has filed articles of impeachment against Joe Biden for his dereliction of duty at our border. **From her bill:** Impeaching Joseph R. Biden, Jr., President of the United States, for high crimes and misdemeanors. Resolved, That Joseph Robinette Biden, Jr., is impeached for high crimes and misdemeanors and that the following articles of impeachment be exhibited to the United States Senate: **Key point** Using the powers of his high office, President Biden has knowingly presided over an executive branch that has continuously, overtly, and consistently violated Federal immigration law by pursuing an aggressive, open-borders agenda by purposefully and knowingly releasing more than 2,000,000 illegal aliens into the interior of the United States without the intention or ability to ensure that they appear in immigration court to face asylum or deportation proceedings. What we know right now is that Rep. Boebert's bill was sent to committee as a way of burying it. There are currently no other Republicans working to help her move the articles. We would like your opinion on whether or not to support her efforts, and get other Republicans to work on this and support it.
---
[COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We’re exposing lies that kill unborn babies
body:
What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

| [ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi3fioe36v72nrnlq3l752rfmgd9sok61ll7mko8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj4c3h2bs)
---
#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won't stop.

That's why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zon81ih3r76khvq3cs686voh105jf7sdn5p618no_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj4c3h2bs)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America's research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmtqo1l6loe6c7h12ttuo530tcqhp25senn2f3lg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj4c3h2bs)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That's why we're blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We're telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I'm thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs5fp3tnu8eo7f7345balsreqc4atum8bjd3rodo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj4c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your support. You are helping save lives and redeem the future of America.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stopping abortion on demand
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zca3jb56cd2stdntd39ih3p429ecqa24sh9m31bo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj0cjh2bs)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1lduidkil2vltugsaevdq0n9m1lht67nsnuf858_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj0cjh2bs) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdr48pvuqavo7damk3d37btfkmv1mbsilqotd1k8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj0cjh2bs)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgakklkfa821cr4d60iejoi3bvbs1715tngrpu2o_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj0cjh2bs)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Deroy Murdock

body:

| | | | | Peter, [**Lauren Boebert's up to her usual tricks. On Tuesday, she filed a motion to impeach President Biden. Why? She doesn't know.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bc99c7d-67d3-4143-87b4-5610f234a78e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Then, as her motion competed with Marjorie Taylor Greene's own dumb impeachment resolution, the two got into a screaming match on the House floor. _From _ The HIll:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9959a230-db00-43b9-901b-c1bb01be30c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _That Boebert represents CO's 6th district is embarrassing. _**_It's only a +6 GOP district, with enough Republicans sick of her circus act that in 2022, it was the closest race in the country. Democrat Adam Frisch only lost by 546 votes. _** _Frisch is running again to protect a woman's right to choose, our democracy, our climate and create jobs. Boebert? She's too busy trying to impeach President Biden and getting into fights on the House floor as part of her daily **" Angertainment."**_ **_Frisch only lost to Boebert in '22 because he was massively outspent._** Meanwhile, **_Boebert has sucked up every corporate cent since_** , with **over $1MM in her campaign. **So **_we must ensure Frisch is well-funded. If he is, he'll win._** [**_Will you give Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to send a businessman and family man to Congress, while ridding our Capitol of Boebert the clown?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ea52246-4822-47c4-8af7-76bec64d7908/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thanks for helping us take back the House from the GOP lunatic caucus._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: one year without Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---
| | | Peter, today marks one year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and stripped women across America of their fundamental rights and freedoms.

[**I launched a petition to show that – even after one year – Democrats will not allow extreme MAGA Republicans to continue their anti-choice crusade.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324094/413097116/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)

[**_SIGN MY PETITION: We need to prove we will never stop fighting to restore reproductive freedom. I need 10,000 signatures before midnight to show resounding support for _Roe v. Wade_. Will you add your name to support our mission to restore the rights enshrined in _Roe_? >> _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324095/413097117/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)

[**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324096/413097118/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350) ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324100/413097120/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)**
---
Peter, it’s been one year since the Supreme Court’s disastrous ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade_.

Since the Court’s decision, extreme MAGA Republicans have been scheming to enact a nationwide ban on abortion.

House Democrats support a woman’s freedom to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions. We must all speak up, show up and stand up until the far-right uprising is defeated.
[_**I need 10,000 signatures on my petition before midnight to make our voices heard. Will you sign right away to show women from coast to coast that we have their backs? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324101/413097124/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)
I need you to understand how serious this situation is, Peter.
–[**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324102/413097125/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350) The Supreme Court overturned the constitutional right to an abortion.
–[**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324105/413097126/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350) Extreme MAGA Republicans plotted to impose a nationwide ban.
–[**AND NOW: Women across our nation have lost access to critical reproductive care and life-saving measures.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324106/413097128/-2114759271?source=20230624_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZiNDM5OC05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pm7N6YgtsKgAxLc5nRsT0KMLDEseLCyxepB2N0BQdqg=&emci=3bd61ed1-e611-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=38fb4398-9b12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)
**[_**We cannot stand by while extreme MAGA Republicans eviscerate fundamental rights, Peter. I just launched a petition to send a powerful message that Americans overwhelmingly support the rights enshrined in _Roe v. Wade_. I’m calling for 10,000 signatures before midnight because we believe a woman should be allowed to make her own healthcare decisions. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stand Against Chemical Abortion
body:
Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children.

| [ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7cbhmtctavsslqc35ql670a0dkpq13bjqfi55s0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj2chh2bs)
---
#
Hello Friend,

As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zikvqfepjk4d3lfpbhcf9c98d869qpga1ac0n7sg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj2chh2bs)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother's health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znc5mqomkgoti02uf5psbqn7n1p6gn9voc519gm8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj2chh2bs)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpkqq4sqis371742pfg92kh508ng72uus8m71n3g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdi6aoj2chh2bs)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Trump Train News

| WHY I STILL HAVE QUESTIONS ABOUT THE RESPONSE TO THE TITAN SUB DISASTER

| |

| Here are some updates and here is why I still have serious questions: First off, it appears the evidence definitively shows that the implosion did indeed happen on Sunday.
But what is also true is that no one could say for certain that it meant the crew had been killed. There was a "significant seismic event" detected which certainly dampened hopes, but did not mean for certain all was lost.
According to experts familiar with the engineering of the Titan, it was possible that other components of the sub imploded while keeping the habitat intact. So in conclusion, it was reasonable to believe there still might be uncertainty about the meaning of the seismic event heard on Sunday. Then the situation became stranger. I have heard from multiple on-site crew members that they heard tapping at 30 minute intervals throughout Tuesday and Wednesday, and that these signals were widely assumed by Canadian and American officials to be the Titan crew doing interval tapping. The U.S. Coast Guard acknowledged these signals and even tweeted at one point "this is a rescue operation." In hindsight, most experts have analyzed the tapping noises and concluded there are other possible explanations for them. It remains a mystery.
So why do I still have questions? Because if the Coast Guard made the decision to pursue a rescue operation (which, given the information they had, was the right decision), why wouldn't you bring all necessary assets to be successful?
This is why an investigation is needed. My questions for the Coast Guard have not changed. If they were operating under the assumption that there was even a small chance of survivors, why did they choose to deny the deployment of the only asset that could rescue a crew if they were still alive - the Magellan system? They actively delayed the deployment of the only 6KROV that could dive deep enough to the ocean floor to get eyes on the sub. Why? My point is this: given what they knew at the time, it seems to me that they made the wrong decisions. If the crew had been alive, the decisions made by the Coast Guard would not have saved them. That is a sobering realization and especially important when we consider future rescue operations. Whose fault is it? The Coast Guard leadership? The White House? Where was Biden during all this?
We need answers, because we should not let poor decision making affect future rescue operations. When America is called to the task, there should be no doubt that we will execute it better than anyone else.
I want to correct another misconception being repeated by many in the media, which is that the Titan was not rated to go down to that depth. The truth is that same submersible had made 17 prior trips to the Titanic. Clearly there was another reason for this catastrophic failure.

| At an Energy & Commerce's Environment Subcommittee hearing on Thursday, I questioned an EPA official on the agency's new proposed standards for tailpipe emissions that would in effect make gasoline-powered cars more expensive for Americans. Their intent is to hasten America's transition to electric vehicles under the pretext that the shift in demand would make EVs more affordable for everyday Americans.
But increasing demand for EVs has never led to a corresponding decrease in price. The price of new EVs has [risen by 50%](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016WPNhYzE6ZIeKXFr0V-zwjDtMSCVxtYFl_lKTSNiQz_bIWWGAW1ZGjxk4Wt6TA0X-10xPin68QKLmaeKJUh3Fs6uyDOGVRUu0W2utiFCw5ATXv6CjrgqHAgOwicHFc--nlGbcqJBfhP4y22akUaSTQvBh1HbFo-YvV6Mip20dpYpPsGG32dhzGHR3UDGrGAVaLrP1z6WX7GBDnWzCq7kGQ==&c=pwSys2hoSYArsMB_7MXQdyJOwNCwiMzdvgFphXZg-PhRNtfG0taKog==&ch=-IY1Na98lR6QrJLhsxHfXl_OUd7ZWfEJjP6V4X0M6FoN2xXQ9xCdhg==) in the last ten years, despite a concurrent increase in sales and production scalability. EVs on average cost $20,000 more than a similarly sized internal combustion engine vehicle. And it's no mystery why. On average over [500,000 lbs](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016WPNhYzE6ZIeKXFr0V-zwjDtMSCVxtYFl_lKTSNiQz_bIWWGAW1ZGjxk4Wt6TA0X7SGWHpOKC115UVKOJLQVTB-91rbnKJYRHVmEW_W8u4CFoBuQFF4SinMd0v4W16cYtxkeu9k8Ife-D9f2aT4hB1OikdkxD-TNKUjBjPv3qpeh57NC6UEEFqe75G1dKTH1HlOEglzTKO4ei0M3Z2sqMdAWGAOasDv3IMdzV5ii6b0OUuTE-7JSTUR6jJM3vnki81-O0EivaDs=&c=pwSys2hoSYArsMB_7MXQdyJOwNCwiMzdvgFphXZg-PhRNtfG0taKog==&ch=-IY1Na98lR6QrJLhsxHfXl_OUd7ZWfEJjP6V4X0M6FoN2xXQ9xCdhg==) of earth must be mined to obtain the minerals required to make a single EV battery. The supply chain is almost totally outside America's control - with 85% of all critical mineral processing done in China. These are facts about EVs that will not change anytime soon.
Car manufacturers like Volvo and Volkswagen have conducted their own [studies](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016WPNhYzE6ZIeKXFr0V-zwjDtMSCVxtYFl_lKTSNiQz_bIWWGAW1ZGjxk4Wt6TA0XhEWjhZtjGFlKNJlnsH_R8Yxs6KmrSwWW20xaK9C0yxSbd1nq1gJxwPzcQFBPfHvtQwQ-fifqmwJFm4ig85CfH0he5GSMHdArTCowdZOzTJVAqnLZgrawVSscpgfin_mXKKM2PjVu86NiFglqZV0WqjTSEe52ywNLh04f5RMOGB5Mp8TBOxpmMS92qVzymva09c8bHCeuHEHyMnIOIcsY76IHUAjurzJTCPsbLdNdBNfCLmvWEfVyMQ==&c=pwSys2hoSYArsMB_7MXQdyJOwNCwiMzdvgFphXZg-PhRNtfG0taKog==&ch=-IY1Na98lR6QrJLhsxHfXl_OUd7ZWfEJjP6V4X0M6FoN2xXQ9xCdhg==) which show manufacturing an EV produces 70% more emissions than manufacturing an internal combustion engine. And you need to drive an EV for 70,000 miles before you can break even with the emissions of an internal combustion engine. Even driving an EV for 100,000 miles only leads to a 20-30% reduction in carbon emissions compared to a gasoline-powered vehicle. And most EV drivers don't even reach that number of miles driven. So the transition to EV actually increases global emissions in the short term.
So what are we getting out of all this? The EPA's own [website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016WPNhYzE6ZIeKXFr0V-zwjDtMSCVxtYFl_lKTSNiQz_bIWWGAW1ZGjxk4Wt6TA0Xltclv8lKgyOJwm07FzaU-N3bb0VksmQUSPUW1ruJMGuS_-tnwtnzTLH3Z4H-aeAgZMu7KkYQPh70Carys9vuLdHiyK5F6BvjecbHN_Pm6ugGPoVb19SyyxcImrnTpKW6&c=pwSys2hoSYArsMB_7MXQdyJOwNCwiMzdvgFphXZg-PhRNtfG0taKog==&ch=-IY1Na98lR6QrJLhsxHfXl_OUd7ZWfEJjP6V4X0M6FoN2xXQ9xCdhg==) shows that since 1980, the total emissions of the 6 principal air pollutants have dropped by 73% even while there has been a corresponding increase in vehicle miles traveled by 100%. Our air quality is improving because of greater efficiencies in internal combustion engines and the broader transition to clean natural gas.
The EPA is attempting to impose enormous costs on Americans without any clear benefit and very obvious negative impacts to our economy and, ironically, the environment.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – This week, I questioned the Coast Guard's response to the Titan sub disaster. I also called out the Biden Administration's new standards for gasoline-powered vehicles that would burden Americans with enormous costs and no clear benefits. If you enjoy receiving my newsletters, please consider donating to my campaign. These updates, along with my entire operation, take a team of writers, editors, and content creators. I am only able to continue providing these free, regular updates with the resources provided from patriots like you. == As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your Campaign Brief: | | | | | | | | WHY I STILL HAVE QUESTIONS ABOUT THE RESPONSE TO THE TITAN SUB DISASTER | | | == | == | | | Here are some updates and here is why I still have serious questions: First off, it appears the evidence definitively shows that the implosion did indeed happen on Sunday. But what is also true is that no one could say for certain that it meant the crew had been killed. There was a "significant seismic event" detected which certainly dampened hopes, but did not mean for certain all was lost. According to experts familiar with the engineering of the Titan, it was possible that other components of the sub imploded while keeping the habitat intact. So in conclusion, it was reasonable to believe there still might be uncertainty about the meaning of the seismic event heard on Sunday. Then the situation became stranger. I have heard from multiple on-site crew members that they heard tapping at 30 minute intervals throughout Tuesday and Wednesday, and that these signals were widely assumed by Canadian and American officials to be the Titan crew doing interval tapping. The U.S. Coast Guard acknowledged these signals and even tweeted at one point "this is a rescue operation." In hindsight, most experts have analyzed the tapping noises and concluded there are other possible explanations for them. It remains a mystery. So why do I still have questions? Because if the Coast Guard made the decision to pursue a rescue operation (which, given the information they had, was the right decision), why wouldn't you bring all necessary assets to be successful? This is why an investigation is needed. My questions for the Coast Guard have not changed. If they were operating under the assumption that there was even a small chance of survivors, why did they choose to deny the deployment of the only asset that could rescue a crew if they were still alive - the Magellan system? They actively delayed the deployment of the only 6KROV that could dive deep enough to the ocean floor to get eyes on the sub. Why? My point is this: given what they knew at the time, it seems to me that they made the wrong decisions. If the crew had been alive, the decisions made by the Coast Guard would not have saved them. That is a sobering realization and especially important when we consider future rescue operations. Whose fault is it? The Coast Guard leadership? The White House? Where was Biden during all this? We need answers, because we should not let poor decision making affect future rescue operations. When America is called to the task, there should be no doubt that we will execute it better than anyone else. I want to correct another misconception being repeated by many in the media, which is that the Titan was not rated to go down to that depth. The truth is that same submersible had made 17 prior trips to the Titanic. Clearly there was another reason for this catastrophic failure. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | NEW EPA STANDARDS WOULD BURDEN AMERICANS WITH ENORMOUS COSTS AND NO BENEFITS | == | == | | | At an Energy & Commerce's Environment Subcommittee hearing on Thursday, I questioned an EPA official on the agency's new proposed standards for tailpipe emissions that would in effect make gasoline-powered cars more expensive for Americans. Their intent is to hasten America's transition to electric vehicles under the pretext that the shift in demand would make EVs more affordable for everyday Americans. But increasing demand for EVs has never led to a corresponding decrease in price. The price of new EVs has == in the last ten years, despite a concurrent increase in sales and production scalability. EVs on average cost $20,000 more than a similarly sized internal combustion engine vehicle. And it's no mystery why. On average over == of earth must be mined to obtain the minerals required to make a single EV battery. The supply chain is almost totally outside America's control - with 85% of all critical mineral processing done in China. These are facts about EVs that will not change anytime soon. Car manufacturers like Volvo and Volkswagen have conducted their own == which show manufacturing an EV produces 70% more emissions than manufacturing an internal combustion engine. And you need to drive an EV for 70,000 miles before you can break even with the emissions of an internal combustion engine. Even driving an EV for 100,000 miles only leads to a 20-30% reduction in carbon emissions compared to a gasoline-powered vehicle. And most EV drivers don't even reach that number of miles driven. So the transition to EV actually increases global emissions in the short term. So what are we getting out of all this? The EPA's own == shows that since 1980, the total emissions of the 6 principal air pollutants have dropped by 73% even while there has been a corresponding increase in vehicle miles traveled by 100%. Our air quality is improving because of greater efficiencies in internal combustion engines and the broader transition to clean natural gas. The EPA is attempting to impose enormous costs on Americans without any clear benefit and very obvious negative impacts to our economy and, ironically, the environment. | | | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | == | == | | | | | | | | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for reading and your support. Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | == | If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. | | | == == == | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06ba20f63067450987aa73fd0228d4ff&_e=vNjlkV51vUr_tk51Vx4jrPHaJjIsV7qTWJQX-_dME2d1sxPKHkCIf3mpvI4Qf0wt5vjq9qZtn9-szlaq6pe1MCY2uybV_c5niMXvTR8UC2LoDAVD869RoYvu7SohosfdGuuwVsro9ti4gbpp5IlQinwlmRFGYJyUUTUs7ow53UxwTHlLTRdmpn2DKI28g0yv7bHHUklwEoMVrZ14ysUkJ5AhfjFAytglHk_W5g9av4T7t2801KF1oEwJCFg-JTshQakgWg2m4FoW8eebHy0Wb3Jrd7ocxSSMHvyGfPk73vILRMk4nTuhyoyd0FN2Xqt9_a1t9AX59SDfNwAdCROuQjVZ3jiKyb6vfIaz8Z6z-Mxa70gaXMiY_zRWMbZIqNeJxiPsvp8Nj1UsW-Ke8d7U-ieZ2etHdROqDPpnc9dYgRg%3D)

| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06ba20f63067450987aa73fd0228d4ff&_e=vNjlkV51vUr_tk51Vx4jrPHaJjIsV7qTWJQX-_dME2d1sxPKHkCIf3mpvI4Qf0wt5vjq9qZtn9-szlaq6pe1MCY2uybV_c5niMXvTR8UC2LoDAVD869RoYvu7SohosfdGuuwVsro9ti4gbpp5IlQinwlmRFGYJyUUTUs7ow53UxwTHlLTRdmpn2DKI28g0yv7bHHUklwEoMVrZ14ysUkJ5AhfjFAytglHk_W5g9av4T7t2801KF1oEwJCFg-JTshQakgWg2m4FoW8eebHy0Wb7wbNko7mr_DPb8dW_kOBx6bi0Ulb4BPXt-Bk2-G7Qs4SfQNBRzBKIJqAw0-L8IsetXDAAv9GX7SNQYc5lqAMAOpjfc2u27jpqFr7Rr3UKcq0h5fQZZJhBRoc56sW8IVabnBfibbblOdXDHhlgP4Bs0%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06ba20f63067450987aa73fd0228d4ff&_e=vNjlkV51vUr_tk51Vx4jrPHaJjIsV7qTWJQX-_dME2d1sxPKHkCIf3mpvI4Qf0wt5vjq9qZtn9-szlaq6pe1MCY2uybV_c5niMXvTR8UC2LoDAVD869RoYvu7SohosfdGuuwVsro9ti4gbpp5IlQinwlmRFGYJyUUTUs7ow53UxwTHlLTRdmpn2DKI28g0yv7bHHUklwEoMVrZ14ysUkJ5AhfjFAytglHk_W5g9av4T7t2801KF1oEwJCFg-JTshQakgWg2m4FoW8eebHy0Wb1eNOB-LvWOHq4YA5eTRt2anuhElMWfdIZ-NTslJAqMLeVt_iUXYltEA6LcN2eJdNMjAH7DwZgcbSDzz5AxgUn-clXevnSU8C-OzalStYiGfYbOuV8R2vRsSZNWUKDpYcG1flZ0ggn03KNI9iKBgEbc%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=63be812ccc6541d6a6c09f8a27b90e2c&_e=82MD_qg1MMFME36T1rEL1OkVAGgSYE14SJWWhCpkLT6aCypTQ9WPfpNGnCQFSSrh-moudfO60CpHWn5j7IpGDmJnRVgp_sz2K0Ykz105R9A7i1fHeK49LBX-OrmYsNpjzjsMn8tpJ0S8Yk8OipdUIEkpTqvATbQqNFpLdAhSaCKOWtezgp3VzXsVyKy-3_efluE0jV2EQwtScqgchUjn_loDxbdsPMD72qOVYIFE0fTrfnovX-KhxiIyHjNaBZpU3YcaqsneSVXGQorGdLYlN3axhlkqGlcxabU_QMziX3_o8hH673PF4NLYkGl6XQxEYcvQQLM5g-qcGu_pHozcH84t1lLgfBg1BAJCbkb74P-3RbT9sh0_i4QwS_yNJwdxCuyoCveTkBWPrJ0adIFNo807tFpOPQCy0Jz9kXkX3tY%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=63be812ccc6541d6a6c09f8a27b90e2c&_e=82MD_qg1MMFME36T1rEL1OkVAGgSYE14SJWWhCpkLT6aCypTQ9WPfpNGnCQFSSrh-moudfO60CpHWn5j7IpGDmJnRVgp_sz2K0Ykz105R9A7i1fHeK49LBX-OrmYsNpjzjsMn8tpJ0S8Yk8OipdUIEkpTqvATbQqNFpLdAhSaCKOWtezgp3VzXsVyKy-3_efluE0jV2EQwtScqgchUjn_loDxbdsPMD72qOVYIFE0fTrfnovX-KhxiIyHjNaBZpU-yFKNaNfQtWA2D0gOmR4ETRsSLANOikVWVRsHULXXPkbkJUFxHnq2jSz-GbgkSW2Ak0TEW_cbut7mDSjAo1IHisN9m3gdqRLj5HcWtPi9L80PdZH45VLCnf6qf7RUT83RAKIWbDmSKQCB6DtkYY_prgqHbRWKOtlel07OIjbtwQ%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=63be812ccc6541d6a6c09f8a27b90e2c&_e=82MD_qg1MMFME36T1rEL1OkVAGgSYE14SJWWhCpkLT6aCypTQ9WPfpNGnCQFSSrh-moudfO60CpHWn5j7IpGDmJnRVgp_sz2K0Ykz105R9A7i1fHeK49LBX-OrmYsNpjzjsMn8tpJ0S8Yk8OipdUIEkpTqvATbQqNFpLdAhSaCKOWtezgp3VzXsVyKy-3_efluE0jV2EQwtScqgchUjn_loDxbdsPMD72qOVYIFE0fTrfnovX-KhxiIyHjNaBZpUh1P2pyfYMXytsqKVqsG1BLliHfzzwIHH_GXpPcRaCthgtaMDwOE1_HBTU1V7OXZCNGJsMOWwHPuMMvKmv_M3bHfAY9myUkfTYOY8GfeBKSsAM3LqM11oxitmmbSWwdDU7_at5WxO63w3KvqRszYtxnlhPI6ZjMDnPhI5UKLfCks%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=63be812ccc6541d6a6c09f8a27b90e2c&_t=kvo1-IC71GrbVJ7Jy_UDMOBcAGF4Vfk2sQPkqO3wLJYzpx0FwFD_SGa5mOsUS-YcjPISkMX-Cuo2Faovil4oiVNJG2wTA2e_y6P_HtDeW3w%3D)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Congress to STOP animal cruelty in slaughterhouses
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841679?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Your eyes flutter open, but it’s dark, and you don’t know where you are. The room shakes, metal rattling around you. As your eyes adjust, you realize you’re in a cage -- too small to even turn around. It’s hot and stuffy, but there’s no water. **You’ll be stuck here for hours and hours.** These are the conditions that **millions of animals** find themselves in on their way to being slaughtered. _And it only gets worse from there._ Strung upside down by their ankles while fully conscious, birds are then put through an electrified water bath meant to knock them out. Finally comes the “kill machine” whose blades **SEVER THEIR NECKS!** It’s gruesome, I know, Friend. But it’s happening to animals across the country right now. The Industrial Agriculture Accountability Act would create much needed protections for animals during transportation and slaughter. [**Demand your representatives PROTECT innocent animals from Big Ag abuses by 11:59pm TONIGHT! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841680?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841681?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The bill would also offer protections for factory farm and slaughterhouse workers who regularly deal with the unsanitary conditions in which animals are kept and slaughtered. This includes health care benefits and severance pay if they’re let go due to natural disasters. For example, during the early COVID-19 pandemic, many slaughterhouses shut down and laid off workers without pay.
During these shutdowns, slaughterhouses used taxpayer dollars to “depopulate” -- aka **killing millions of animals under cruel conditions, including GASSING and SHOOTING them.** But the Industrial Agriculture Accountability Act would **PREVENT these inhumane methods of slaughter** in disaster situations.
[**If just 1 of every 13 people reading this email sends a message to their Congressmembers, we can stand up to Big Ag, protect workers, and fight animal abuse! Please, Friend, add your name now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841682?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841681?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Understanding the Difference Between Freedom and Liberty
body:

Hi Friend, It's been almost a year since the reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ , yet so many lives are still on the line. **I'm writing because mothers and babies at risk from pro-abortion forces desperately need your help.** **Many babies** face abortion this year unless we act. This month we are launching a campaign to help rescue mothers and babies from the pain of abortion. But we cannot do it without you. **It takes just $60 to save a baby from abortion through the _Option Ultrasound_ program. [Please give now to save a child's life.](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNzUtZTg5MTczZmE4MTJjNGVmYTlmMzM2YWI1ZGIwYWYzMjkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZG9uYXRlLmZvY3Vzb250aGVmYW1pbHkuY29tL2Rvbi1jcm0tMjNtYXktc29obC1hY3E_cmVmY2Q9MTY5NDgwMyJ9/-RaNDI1gGHrGwJ_wBzS7-g)**

---
Your action is so critical. Now that abortion laws are left to individual states, pro-abortion forces have amped up their efforts even more. While some states protect life, others work for radical abortion laws. The federal government is also overreaching its powers to make chemical abortions more widely available.
* The U.S. Food and Drug Administration and the U.S. Department of Justice are ensuring that companies sending abortion drugs through the mail will not be blocked.
* The government began allowing retail pharmacies to distribute abortion pills previously only dispensed by clinics, medical offices, and hospitals under the direct supervision of a licensed physician.

These are examples of how anti-life forces are pushing abortion. **But you can save lives with your gift today to support our _Option Ultrasound_ program.** Through the _Option Ultrasound_ program, you'll equip pregnancy medical centers with equipment and training to provide free ultrasounds to mothers considering abortion. Then they saw their 8-week-old baby through an ultrasound made possible by friends like you. At the appointment's end, Trinity sat on the ultrasound table and exclaimed, "That is my baby!" She chose life for her baby. **Your support also saves lives through the My Choice Network** , which helps expectant moms find the pregnancy medical center nearest them with a quick online search. **And you'll help provide training in abortion pill reversal** to help mothers who change their minds after starting a chemical abortion. Fellow American,

One year ago today, the Dobbs decision overturned Roe v. Wade, ensuring we continue to protect the most vulnerable - _the unborn_.

Right now, we are at a defining moment in the pro-life movement.

Our next Republican presidential nominee MUST be pro-life.

**[Fellow American, please take a moment to watch highlights of my comments at a recent pro-life townhall in Iowa:](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61957335:sPQqVnD_N:m:1:877327319:6648A08D1D044F4C17AD8277AD8E3F7E:r)**

body:
In the State of the Union speech, Biden pushed for mass amnesty of MILLIONS of illegal immigrants

| |
---
| | | In the State of the Union speech, Biden pushed for mass amnesty of MILLIONS of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his two years in office.

**The way I see it. We have 2 options.**

**_Option 1:_ We surrender to Biden's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**
---
| | | [OPTION 1](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ab554bfb420495ea0d4b78de6c24380&_e=WZ7ZxDxNrhujyKr9MP8dulSWq1pXjtw5ecryBdgFoE_5biOz7Uh9UGtWGX1ehtO75aDtEkYqPI9s6JW3zugqYapZ9mC06dnIPxSc5Z7TGv5zHFAE8JPODmbmNcEpiXUbmzxpcIDz5ZRxFDTZvWMYYnWozs33icJR0y6xdIeOHJP6-i5HrpzAvDaAbC1GgOmDTqWJMX42Hr105iXKAqsaxO11s9rZEQeirbAOhrtQ06VDOTkeZ-HvyQFifHiQBjoBHYFcrcfikEC6srjwAd3T64VrN0LiJLOG7IyukAwdmYzCh6eJke8fRTqUU0h6jrDhUM1LXu36xqcpAKkPOHxIpSSC22BubUh_p-ThN0V2OiWMZHRfv4Av7g25YJRv0ntVFJciVaMPaAhGmabHA_NiMfd05MXhx45Hhikl534g6UIcSraKfmPLuedb7T8kChSgUAKgjq8gt_XtCXuCcGQEgA%3D%3D)

**OR**
**_Option 2:_ We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**
---
| | | [OPTION 2](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ab554bfb420495ea0d4b78de6c24380&_e=WZ7ZxDxNrhujyKr9MP8dulSWq1pXjtw5ecryBdgFoE_5biOz7Uh9UGtWGX1ehtO75aDtEkYqPI9s6JW3zugqYapZ9mC06dnIPxSc5Z7TGv5zHFAE8JPODmbmNcEpiXUbmzxpcIDz5ZRxFDTZvWMYYnWozs33icJR0y6xdIeOHJP6-i5HrpzAvDaAbC1GgOmDTqWJMX42Hr105iXKAqsaxO11s9rZEQeirbAOhrtQ06VDOTkeZ-HvyQFifHiQBjoBHYFcrcfikEC6srjwAd3T64VrN0LiJLOG7IyukAwdmYzCh6eJke8fRTqUU0h6jrDh2koa9dkL_vmHtO5L-94EHPz4aZYkLadAWbRmgvKAFE0XRU6dHd1PHMQqvnR3YFke4cpHAIwK_tY7B5xKTiriRxrtk5lZszPiQJeXTCMon576NPLBp6PfEUpKoFTdZemfEE6fzGTpkL0cj_fPHDz1ww%3D%3D)
---
_**Which option should I put you down for?**_
My mind is made up: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _**NO**_ amnesty for illegal immigrants!

Do you agree? I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name on my list of Pro-Border patriots.
---

Take a look at this week's highlights. But if Democrats get their way, black and brown kids will think they’re inferior and have no place in our country “You’d think the first black President of the United States would have hope and pride in America. Not just that: You’d think he’d say that my candidacy for president – as the first female minority governor in American history – is further proof of our national progress. But Barack Obama didn’t say that. Instead, he criticized me for saying America isn’t racist. In his words, I’m one of the minority candidates within the Republican Party who will validate Americans saying, ‘everything’s great, we can make it.’ He further accused me of ‘pretending as if everything’s equal and fair.’ He even tried to mimic me, claiming I say, ‘I’m an Asian Indian American woman and my family came here and we worked hard.’” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7b0569732febb55ef823fe8ebdd9b09d9a6809117dcaa2a2157bb65fbb1063d7378a603830498c8ce9bb542b975c319234d1803bcc508388e1901c4b5a0a17f4 CONTINUE READING >> Nikki joined Hannity for an interview on Fox News where she blasted President Biden for letting China walk all over the United States. Nikki has been the most outspoken presidential candidate against China. In her interview, she committed to building up America’s military, holding Beijing accountable for COVID, closing Chinese spy stations across America, stopping China from stealing our intellectual property, stopping the flow of fentanyl, and stopping American technology exports to China. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7b0569732febb55ee3e7d5b9bcc8b91cc77bfdf4d9c9e02fc39ed95f3aca97d4b6d04ed4b42898282aec2f28a6fa33633dfe2f0b8477812858e03d43fa724396 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7b0569732febb55ee3e7d5b9bcc8b91cc77bfdf4d9c9e02fc39ed95f3aca97d4b6d04ed4b42898282aec2f28a6fa33633dfe2f0b8477812858e03d43fa724396 WATCH NOW https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7b0569732febb55ed1ede39b4e467c644e524d943cc7b63a286db432c33eb9d18057c75e2944b49ebcc675fd141b34c597a3c5bc29c7f18149783457f3c9af0d Washington Examiner: Haley vows to ‘no longer give money to countries that hate America’ as president “Presidential candidate Nikki Haley recalled her time at the United Nations during a town hall in South Carolina on Monday, detailing some of the animosity that other countries held against the United States. Worst of all, she said, is that many of those countries were recipients of billions of dollars of foreign aid from the U.S. “When I am president, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America,” Haley told attendees at a town hall in Moncks Corner, South Carolina. “There were two things that I knew that Russia, China, Iran, and our enemies never wanted America to have when I was at the U.N.,” she said. “They didn’t want us to have a strong military, and they didn’t want us to be energy independent.” “We need to do both of those things,” Haley said. “Strong militaries don’t start wars. Peter, I don’t believe politics is entertainment. I don’t believe politics is building a brand or virtue signaling.

Ultimately, politics is about **WINNING** and about **PRODUCING RESULTS.**

So instead of writing you a long email about what I believe, I just want to show you what I've DONE in Florida.

**Do you want results like these for all of America?** **[Then join my campaign today.](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=8f1903fb234f493abd0784155c0b9893&_e=tLnBn4gzIvcmjOg-hchFeXOWXWiblzRFCcsk6T6IiXgx1DPvBjyuZqaIrNYNwGADN5-g6gVL_7eja8bl9qyGmDVR6gzr-JuOHbtwpLyxEsOgID6N-cHwIG0YXSB3i-iWMW2sOk2uY3Q5pPT-7WLSDDgnWaCXpY7JqAPJ4bAlfEIDRd04kPT3FR_5Rf_ac7lHPoKLKtKzkxZ9DkUPaZ0cOCGMNqdbs7p9VESCvR1Xr5xFCilBGHNB7S_Y7H2mwyFxASdt4vBVmYZ18qKmPJ0T0EplYmrQoeTmy2gl0Os2Tl2BTpBYXzdT08kkzZcreki6aQuYht4bQT2c_kxDTo-L52G4kQvwVHUP4osI5QTGaeh_db0xgmzeby64OUS9G8NhQPcVcn25irD07-6EjdRNqA%3D%3D "Then join my campaign today.")**
