[**DONATE**](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=8f1903fb234f493abd0784155c0b9893&_e=tLnBn4gzIvcmjOg-hchFeXOWXWiblzRFCcsk6T6IiXgx1DPvBjyuZqaIrNYNwGADN5-g6gVL_7eja8bl9qyGmDVR6gzr-JuOHbtwpLyxEsOgID6N-cHwIG0YXSB3i-iWMW2sOk2uY3Q5pPT-7WLSDDgnWaCXpY7JqAPJ4bAlfEIDRd04kPT3FR_5Rf_ac7lHPoKLKtKzkxZ9DkUPaZ0cOCGMNqdbs7p9VESCvR1Xr5xFCilBGHNB7S_Y7H2mwyFxba01Za1vBSCEoFjIoSnYKUDucrcI_Tb4z1y5SPhpJs-uG6Eoed88Fe7jpqDohiQlO6ccc-QPVP0CoQaPEMhJhV3VCZDW4kYhTN4v6AV0bJGMJS0-5MGouLMZ0lQd2-w0qbAL_weNGRRr_d7UkWYKow%3D%3D)
---
Ron DeSantis
---
**RON DESANTIS GOT RESULTS FOR FLORIDA**
---
| | **K-12 Education**

Parents' rights have been increasingly under assault around the nation, but in Florida, we stand up for the rights of parents and the fundamental role they play in the education of their children.
* School choice is available for all Floridians by eliminating enrollment caps and income requirements while still prioritizing lower-income families and expanding scholarships for students with special needs.
* Florida is now the first state in the nation to have school choice fully integrated in the public K-12 funding process.
* Florida is ranked #1 in education freedom, #1 in parental empowerment, #1 in state spending on private school choice, and #1 in school choice enrollment.
* Florida eliminated Critical Race Theory in its K-12 schools.
* In 2021 Florida created annual increases in scholarships for students with special needs and we provided $750 for transportation costs to the chosen school.
* Florida has established robust civics education requirements so that students learn about the constitution and what it means to be an American.

**Higher Education Reform** Academia, writ large, across the country, has lost its way. In Florida, we’re changing that with a series of reforms:
* Ending tenure by instating regular performance reviews.
* Dismantling the monopolistic style of higher ed accreditation agencies.
* Resetting the focus of higher ed towards preparing students to be contributing members of society, rather than imposing political ideology.
* Ensuring students and staff are evaluated based on merit and eliminating so-called D.E.I. programs, which are effectively programs based in discrimination, exclusion, and indoctrination.

**China** Ron DeSantis has taken action to stand against the United States’ greatest geopolitical threat — the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). He signed legislation that:
* Prevents Chinese entities or affiliates from buying farmland in Florida or land near our military bases.
* Stops sensitive data from being stored on servers that might be owned by entities affiliated with the CCP.
* Prohibits the Chinese influence that we rooted out of higher education from working its way into our primary and secondary education institutions, including a prohibition on Confucious institutes.
* Blocks access to dangerous applications, such as TikTok, on government servers and devices.

**Protecting Life**
* The Heartbeat Protection Act protects the most vulnerable: babies in the womb whose hearts have already begun to beat.

**Defending 2nd Amendment Rights**
* Enacted constitutional carry that allows Floridians to carry concealed weapons without a government-issued permission slip.

**Law and Order** Other states endanger their citizens by making it easier to put criminals back on the street. Here in Florida, we support and enact policies to protect our communities and keep our people safe. Governor DeSantis signed reforms that:
* Strengthen pre-trial detention and pushed back against woke “bail reform” efforts
* Increasing sentences for drug traffickers that target children with dangerous fentanyl.
* Subjected child rapists to the death penalty while simultaneously reforming death penalty statutes to ensure justice.
* Gov. DeSantis is also the only elected official in America to remove a “progressive” Soros-funded district attorney from office.

**Immigration** The Biden Border Crisis has wreaked havoc across the United States and has put Americans in danger. But Governor DeSantis did not stand idly by while the federal government abandoned its lawful duties to protect our country, instead he:
* Mandated immigration status verification through E-Verify for public and private employers.
* Made knowingly transporting illegal immigrant minors a felony.
* Made using a fake ID to gain employment a felony.
* Required hospitals to report healthcare costs for illegal aliens.
* Gave Florida more money to send more illegal immigrants to more “sanctuary” jurisdictions such as Martha’s Vineyard.

**Prescription Drugs** Pharmacy benefit managers and Big Pharma have managed to escape the public eye and work in the shadows for far too long. Ron DeSantis signed a bill that takes the reins back from these healthcare monopolies while empowering consumers.
* With the legislation passed this session, drug companies must disclose wholesale drug price increases of 15% or more.
* Florida is also prohibiting pharmacy benefit managers from mandating mail orders.

**Tax Cuts** Florida’s economy has consistently outpaced the nation, but we are still fighting against inflationary policies imposed on us by the Biden administration. In Florida, we supported our residents and helped them afford the goods that they need.
* We lowered tolls across the state.
* We created a permanent tax exemption on diapers, wipes, baby clothes, cribs, strollers, and much more.
* We reduced taxes by nearly $5 billion – a Florida record.

**Legal Reform and Housing** As Florida’s population booms, we have provided record support for Florida’s workforce to get quality housing and live the American Dream.
* The Live Local Act dedicates more than half a billion dollars to incentivize and jumpstart new construction.
* The Hometown Heroes Program makes sure police officers, firefighters, teachers, and other community leaders can afford to live in or near the communities they serve.

**Environmental, social, and corporate governance & Central Bank Digital Currency** Ron DeSantis refuses to let elites circumvent the ballot box to implement a radical ideological agenda through financial sleight of hand.
* Governor DeSantis signed legislation that prohibits the financial sector from considering so-called “Social Credit Scores” in banking and lending practices that aim to prevent Floridians from obtaining loans, lines of credit, and bank accounts.
* And Governor DeSantis is on the record: NO to CBDCs or Federally-controlled digital dollar. Any proposal will be dead on arrival.

**Let Kids Be Kids** There is a disturbing trend in our society to try to sexualize young people. That is not the way you look out for our children. You protect children—and Governor DeSantis has, by signing landmark legislation that:
* Prohibits sex reassignment surgeries and prescriptions for children under 18.
* Bans children from attending drag shows.
* Protects students from having to “declare” their pronouns in school and ensures that students are not forced to use pronouns that are not based on a student’s biological sex.
* Expands parents' rights in the education of their children by prohibiting classroom instruction on sexual orientation and gender identity in Pre-K through 8th grade.
* Protects young women from being forced to use bathrooms and locker rooms alongside biological males who have decided that they can invade women’s spaces.

---
| | **These kinds of accomplishments are why Floridians re-elected Ron DeSantis as their governor by a whopping 20-point margin, turning Democrat strongholds red. We need candidates and proven records who can win—that’s Ron DeSantis. Are you ready to win big for ALL of America?**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=8f1903fb234f493abd0784155c0b9893&_e=tLnBn4gzIvcmjOg-hchFeXOWXWiblzRFCcsk6T6IiXgx1DPvBjyuZqaIrNYNwGADN5-g6gVL_7eja8bl9qyGmDVR6gzr-JuOHbtwpLyxEsOgID6N-cHwIG0YXSB3i-iWMW2sOk2uY3Q5pPT-7WLSDDgnWaCXpY7JqAPJ4bAlfEIDRd04kPT3FR_5Rf_ac7lHPoKLKtKzkxZ9DkUPaZ0cOCGMNqdbs7p9VESCvR1Xr5xFCilBGHNB7S_Y7H2mwyFxChvfV3UQ82L8PHKLG9SDJPisjpZmDiN85E4bXhh4vBJFjxPYoq0vrA_ur4sWmrTW2XRv7PjhliRkcYZo-yayAkhBH6eGd9bEXbKg3jtZdSgWZrdapeF0VWDbcZd2l6Oztuk4nPR7m2JNcr_pHflkwQ%3D%3D)

| | |
---
**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | [](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=8f1903fb234f493abd0784155c0b9893&_e=tLnBn4gzIvcmjOg-hchFeXOWXWiblzRFCcsk6T6IiXgx1DPvBjyuZqaIrNYNwGADN5-g6gVL_7eja8bl9qyGmDVR6gzr-JuOHbtwpLyxEsOgID6N-cHwIG0YXSB3i-iWMW2sOk2uY3Q5pPT-7WLSDDgnWaCXpY7JqAPJ4bAlfEIDRd04kPT3FR_5Rf_ac7lHPoKLKtKzkxZ9DkUPaZ0cOCGMNqdbs7p9VESCvR1Xr5xFCilBGHNB7S_Y7H2mwyFxqj19qEYBDq4Tr329G3k2MCUl3zST0iBjyAbRA-9OQCAni6XUcXlkd8Iyfb0E205ZUxdGmpWO1BPIxBmNpY6cwD2SJmxucX5TOpxCmRc_ObMEjyWAcfnS8P0Rm4srkLUN4HoHT6NIsfJPKtkbBUBpmQ%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
| | Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
* Protecting the unborn,
* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
* Expanding education freedom,
* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
* Lowering prescription drug costs,
* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
* Creating a universal school choice program,
* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief
* ESG prohibitions
* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
| | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---

Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Life is getting better – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11570833?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Mississippi was hit by some epic thunderstorms the other week. Perhaps you were one of the many people across our state left without electricity? **

For me that meant trying to work without air-conditioning (AC). It was not a productive experience.

**As I sweltered in the heat, I was left wondering how people in Mississippi managed before the advent of AC?**

Invented in 1902 by Willis Carrier, within living memory there were plenty of homes and offices in Mississippi that did not have any AC. For a start, it was once very expensive. According the HumanProgress.org the cost of AC units has fallen by 97 percent since the early 1950s. AC only became ubiquitous in cars and shop within the past two or three decades.

**What might life be like in Mississippi without refrigeration? As late as the 1950s, a significant number of Mississippi households did not have refrigeration.**

When the first self-contained refrigerator, the Frigidaire, went on sale in 1919 it cost $775 – or about $12,000 in today’s money. Today, you can buy a vastly better refrigerator for only a fraction of the cost.

**It’s not only the costs of keeping cool that have come down.**

In 1979, to buy a 14 inch television, the average American earning the average wage would have needed to work 70 hours to earn enough. Today, a vastly better TV can be purchased for the equivalent of 4 hours of work.

The other day I re-watched _Wall Street_ , that classic 1980s movie starring Michael Douglas as Gordon Gekko. In the movie, Gekko uses one of the first commercial cell phones, a DynaTec. **Apparently, Gekko’s phone retailed for almost $4,000 at the time, or over $10,000 in today’s prices. It needed re-charging after 30 minutes.**
---
|
---
_Thanks to the free market, people on low incomes today have access to better technology than Gordon Gekko did in the 1980s_
| **Today, even someone on the minimum wage in Mississippi could afford a vastly better cell phone than anything available to Wall Street billionaires a generation ago.**

Among those officially classified as ‘poor’ in America, 99 per cent live in homes that have a fridge, 95 per cent have a television, 88 per cent have a phone and over 70 per cent own a car.

**Since 1996, the real cost of household appliances has fallen by over 40 per cent. The cost of footwear and clothes by 60 per cent.** Indeed, the average American home is full of gadgets, entertainment systems and labour-saving devices many of which had not even been invented when Ronald Reagan was in the White House.

As my friend the author, Matt Ridley puts it, “our generation has access to more calories, watts, horsepower, gigabytes, megahertz, square feet, air miles, food per acre, miles per gallon, and, of course, money than any who lived before us”.

And here’s another remarkable thing. **We get all this extra stuff without having to work as hard. In 1913, the average American worker put in 1,036 hours that year, compared to less that 750 hours a year now. **

**Often, I hear people talking about there being ‘too much technology’.** It is fashionable to say that we should turn away from technology and get back to a pure and simple past. Really? I’ve never heard anyone express that sort of opinion in any of the poor countries I’ve lived in.

**If anyone ever tells you that we have too much technology, you might want to suggest that they switch off the air-conditioning for a few hours and think about it. **

Thank goodness for modern technology – and the free market that makes it available at an affordable price for everyone.

Have a wonderful – thunderstorm free - weekend!

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4e833c0cda&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm (but not too warm) regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: The future of abortion is at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for Attorney General
body:
**This year would have been the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade._**

But on this day last year, the Supreme Court handed down a shocking decision in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ – overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and opening the floodgates for anti-abortion laws to proliferate nationwide. name: Abortion Rights ALERT (via Unite the Country)
subject: One Year Later.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [https://unitethecountry
body:
We’ll cut straight to it, Peter.

We are at a pivotal moment in the fight to protect reproductive rights, and time is running out.

FIRST: Exactly one year ago today, far-right Supreme Court Justices overturned Roe v. Wade ; ending a guarantee to the right to abortion in this country while launching an all-out assault on the right to privacy.

THEN: 20 GOP-led states moved to ban or restrict reproductive freedoms. They’re even attacking the right to birth control.

NOW: MAGA Republicans are making alarming promises to ban abortion nationwide if they regain control of the White House in 2024.

Unite the Country is fighting tooth and nail to amplify President Biden’s pro-choice message and ensure that we elect more pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot to save the future of reproductive freedom.

But we can’t win this fight alone. That’s why we’re counting on every Biden supporter reading this email to step up and join us right now!

We are only a few days away from our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we are still 697 donations short of our goal of 1,000 donors. Please chip in what you can before our deadline. There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWqbkkkvmtUx9_LoymEhQsE5nbdH_Au3iPAX2bAmP34dek53CuLzw1Bgb6NVotdDAWdnUpoEqqybZ4M0F6VTIVqB1wA4Jdnq6y148qhmvJ3Foe5a28bwAtzPnCcoqsY-mUEAhVOrDbKILqM6ltqI3oQc3abumbYbZ03AFqw4aUWCL0n05aidzMNrjTKEsrTxxkb9T8lKdGpv2VLoikIQXz_fqmlEbqryeURj3u-HpK3zR_RAglQsoOV9QoBiJZMe1HkQkx5TDxbinRmtQbLSF50MoZ_HxY0Y5V2qrzMWGeFJPYs0mAVVJa_9TdGEV5W7o34iYB3C0WGdEFTTbxp8_sPKyMftfGCzJb5dHogyZXh4NJ1OIZr9hnyfEN7xPjz27BIraJGjF4vsNiasl7weg7Qg-aEPz4XweG45bLqowKYhX)
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWqbkkkvmtUx9_LoymEhQsE5nbdH_Au3iPAX2bAmP34dek53CuLzw1Bgb6NVotdDAWdnUpoEqqybZ4M0F6VTIVqB1wA4Jdnq6y148qhmvJ3Foe5a28bwAtzPnCcoqsY-mUEAhVOrDbKILqM6ltqI3oQc3abumbYbZ03AFqw4aUWCL0n05aidzMNrjTKEsrTxxkb9T8lKdGpv2VLoikIQXz_fqmlEbqryeURj3u-HpK3zR_RAglQsoOV9QoBiJZMe1HoGhPd1Bl0sT1CoFQE84AazW1kBhOG3eCxrZf8bkCshlO5rnZPWUZv4mQAXLAcbomImhaeTgtW_KCxOj9ZZ3AldsSHjLL1UD1L_U_cChouPKm7PI2Aj8k2l-bOlCvFXmkycTHo9Fb9I93-Mc2CChU029trEE-edpU1Y-QLSvgzKR)
I’m under no illusions that you will invest in this fight the first time you hear from me, but **I’m willing to work for your support**. I hope once you see that winning my race is a critical component in securing a Republican Senate Majority, you will feel inclined to help.

_Take a look at the math, Fellow Conservative:_

Republicans are only TWO seats away from a Senate majority, and there are THREE Democrat incumbents up for re-election in ruby-red states. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and right here in West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in 2024.
_
**This West Virginia race is a TOP PRIORITY INVESTMENT for all conservatives, no matter where you live**_.

[** JOIN TEAM JUSTICE **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWqbkkkvmtUx9_LoymEhQsE5nbdH_Au3iPAX2bAmP34dek53CuLzw1Bgb6NVotdDAWdnUpoEqqybZ4M0F6VTIVqB1wA4Jdnq6y148qhmvJ3Foe5a28bwAtzPnCcoqsY-mUEAhVOrDbKILqM6ltqI3oQc3abumbYbZ03AFqw4aUWCL0n05aidzMNrjTKEsrTxxkb9T8lKdGpv2VLoikIQXz_fqmlEbqryeURj3u-HpK3zR_RAglQsoOV9QoBiJZMe1Hnf4C0ZJGZ1lek0ScC2hbMfJVHiFsNqRvyBFGnrBlgtT32eas82h_rmx1kqgEJFj912LqpcfHq0lnMgSlXLWSC4loUZweCLKM9qZPwHnWWO2vUljy5dCYingYovAQRt5oXtPMUjwlypsWlsYMXEd_R7Jh_UJOVJzC51Z0TLwlQ12)

**My opponent is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate, with an abysmal 40% approval rating**. Plus, Republicans have won in six-straight presidential elections here in West Virginia!

Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? **Not in the slightest,_Fellow Conservative_. **

Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time.

**Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024.**

**We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash.**

I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to **[join my team and pitch into our West Virginia Battle Fund today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWqbkkkvmtUx9_LoymEhQsE5nbdH_Au3iPAX2bAmP34dek53CuLzw1Bgb6NVotdDAWdnUpoEqqybZ4M0F6VTIVqB1wA4Jdnq6y148qhmvJ3Foe5a28bwAtzPnCcoqsY-mUEAhVOrDbKILqM6ltqI3oQc3abumbYbZ03AFqw4aUWCL0n05aidzMNrjTKEsrTxxkb9T8lKdGpv2VLoikIQXz_fqmlEbqryeURj3u-HpK3zR_RAglQsoOV9QoBiJZMe1HlBAqhEW00SzzvM68LRflvxCQJF_wmfZVqET5ivKOfN9qq5DN4hpOKzo1q4JV2Hjh71reQqWOmS9sG0pRyo_oH2iTFYze9KD-kmYqSol1NTMoFic0H25prZfJAQUZxNbf3mtbqqfTVNogmZbJ0fYUaUy1q5bFX6iC7_V-OsF1zv8)**.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWqbkkkvmtUx9_LoymEhQsE5nbdH_Au3iPAX2bAmP34dek53CuLzw1Bgb6NVotdDAWdnUpoEqqybZ4M0F6VTIVqB1wA4Jdnq6y148qhmvJ3Foe5a28bwAtzPnCcoqsY-mUEAhVOrDbKILqM6ltqI3oQc3abumbYbZ03AFqw4aUWCL0n05aidzMNrjTKEsrTxxkb9T8lKdGpv2VLoikIQXz_fqmlEbqryeURj3u-HpK3zR_RAglQsoOV9QoBiJZMe1HuepvN41pP4UVV4SeC5CyhKCdSWtzpO-CYSjrCVaa2mzouewnyrXQuWU4IobJQXFv1SchUtc6Kuj-KT01J4N3bJQ30Fu4OCbXamWSmetxw254SntFj_QDXmDNCw_LcJk8Mj3Pm4Km1Ogcm7pQf73UjqavJ2yzdvnV8GBqN3Oyz92)
Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine.

The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats.

Remember, the stakes are high, and **[every contribution counts](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWqbkkkvmtUx9_LoymEhQsE5nbdH_Au3iPAX2bAmP34dek53CuLzw1Bgb6NVotdDAWdnUpoEqqybZ4M0F6VTIVqB1wA4Jdnq6y148qhmvJ3Foe5a28bwAtzPnCcoqsY-mUEAhVOrDbKILqM6ltqI3oQc3abumbYbZ03AFqw4aUWCL0n05aidzMNrjTKEsrTxxkb9T8lKdGpv2VLoikIQXz_fqmlEbqryeURj3u-HpK3zR_RAglQsoOV9QoBiJZMe1HvpP9buGy4t5tXoInz92HNk5tz_oOu2POcgix5ZZvWPEwszPkcGbtwp6jXVvn-Q7Ss6OfSkXz2hUxkWxeB063f34fyZogtFdOaGpKpk8G4qeyiv2EsTJ-ogmAeCiw5K-FiMlISEKxHRPrPwPjUN_70a4_C2mPwddOfKz-ry-0cj_)**.

Sincerely,
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWt_3A9I2OHhqLWBzSXf0KcCyqVHJlKJmBCbxM4ACj1gM4lvMgOyZcGnUuwmN-TpXtU7rcrMYvHAvgipmxxlwPcO294eAKNmqkb-M7q5hD6Ci2r3AN0SdEarAuWZc4Ui_QY67R4rfKbYYufVzfs4XftrMCyHdxLNWGqe21rjLdssZ0TymoVpTpDQQQxXkxyT5xA%3D%3D) [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d2d1fc13708748b998c29e6bc166b9cb&_e=aPuU8QfoaDrK-5NStT3bWvwob1rJQMrp0quer_m7tGmgqKaacWGO-P8M8SND6MXkpgNdpr2SeVeXEcHLyZWWrC8vaGbkVXs8l7yXayydOJ6wwydndYX4IvbHoqZJJ_-VEfKm9rySMIhBtEUoFL2B_BJKsspI-xuALdS1vjFRHI231faVO7CxIJ_tjkBHuFXYf9JXRCL9rxh4nsYfl7fTMQ%3D%3D)

| | **Today is the one-year anniversary of the horrific**** _Dobbs_****Supreme Court** **decision that overturned**** _Roe_****v.****_Wade_****. It is a somber day that reminds us of the battle we face.** A while back, I reached out and shared the devastating consequences of abortion bans and severe restrictions. It remains as true today as it was then. _Everyone_ deserves the right to choose. **Here's the truth, we need an unapologetically pro-choice majority in Congress.** That's going to take this movement showing up again and again for abortion rights. [**Can you chip in now and help fuel the movement for choice today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65314663/413061342/-821065315?refcode=2023-06-24-abortionfwd&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=80dde023-9012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGRkZTAyMy05MDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_4r-qOEfM3DYgd-KaL6yVpppw5a7FioYzl4fKXmjo5Y=) Support for abortion rights is strong, with the majority of Americans in support. It's time we come together and stop the erosion of reproductive rights in our country once and for all. More soon, _Andy_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65314664/413061343/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGRkZTAyMy05MDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_4r-qOEfM3DYgd-KaL6yVpppw5a7FioYzl4fKXmjo5Y=&emci=493f1e3a-e711-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=80dde023-9012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)

Since the Supreme Court struck down _Roe_ this summer, states across the country have cut off access to reproductive care and have criminalized doctors, while anti-choice members of Congress work to ban abortion nationwide. By eliminating the federal right to choose, right-wing extremists have set our country on a dangerous path.
**The consequences aren't abstract, and they're not mysterious: In a study of 11 wealthy countries, the United States had the highest maternal mortality rate. 80% of all maternal-related mortalities were from preventable conditions. For American women, pregnancy could be a death sentence. Personal health decisions should be made by a woman and her doctor, politicians don't belong in those conversations.**
In New Jersey, we are fortunate to have state laws that protect women's freedoms. But even in states where abortion is protected, access in rural areas is limited, and clinics are overwhelmed with patients traveling from out of state.
**Women's rights have been fundamentally degraded, as millions of women are denied their right to choose when or whether to have a family.**
**Here's the truth: most Americans support access to safe and legal abortion.** This year many states have expanded protections for abortions, abortion funds have popped up everywhere, and when abortion has been on the ballot, voters have chosen to protect it. Each day we are making progress, no matter how small.
**This isn't a time to sit on the sidelines. To restore reproductive rights, we'll have to energize a grassroots movement like never before.**
I will always stand on the side of the freedom to choose. And I promise to do everything in my power to expand access across every state.
_Andy_

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

clean_body: | | | Today is the one-year anniversary of the horrific DobbsSupreme Court decision that overturned Roev.Wade. It is a somber day that reminds us of the battle we face. A while back, I reached out and shared the devastating consequences of abortion bans and severe restrictions. It remains as true today as it was then. Everyone deserves the right to choose. Here's the truth, we need an unapologetically pro-choice majority in Congress. That's going to take this movement showing up again and again for abortion rights. = Support for abortion rights is strong, with the majority of Americans in support. It's time we come together and stop the erosion of reproductive rights in our country once and for all. More soon, Andy Forwarded Message | Since the Supreme Court struck down Roe this summer, states across the country have cut off access to reproductive care and have criminalized doctors, while anti-choice members of Congress work to ban abortion nationwide. By eliminating the federal right to choose, right-wing extremists have set our country on a dangerous path. The consequences aren't abstract, and they're not mysterious: In a study of 11 wealthy countries, the United States had the highest maternal mortality rate. 80% of all maternal-related mortalities were from preventable conditions. For American women, pregnancy could be a death sentence. Personal health decisions should be made by a woman and her doctor, politicians don't belong in those conversations. In New Jersey, we are fortunate to have state laws that protect women's freedoms. But even in states where abortion is protected, access in rural areas is limited, and clinics are overwhelmed with patients traveling from out of state. Women's rights have been fundamentally degraded, as millions of women are denied their right to choose when or whether to have a family. Here's the truth: most Americans support access to safe and legal abortion. This year many states have expanded protections for abortions, abortion funds have popped up everywhere, and when abortion has been on the ballot, voters have chosen to protect it. Each day we are making progress, no matter how small. This isn't a time to sit on the sidelines. To restore reproductive rights, we'll have to energize a grassroots movement like never before. I will always stand on the side of the freedom to choose. And I promise to do everything in my power to expand access across every state. Andy | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: As long as I’m Governor, abortion will be legal.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, one year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade.

Derek, one year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_.

Like you, I was furious. I am still furious today.

**But no matter what the Supreme Court says, abortion is still legal in Pennsylvania. And I promise you this: as long as I’m Governor, it’ll stay that way.**

Look, the right-wing attacks on the right to choose are only going to get worse, so we can’t back down in this fight.

**So today, I’m asking you to make your voice heard. Sign your name right now to pledge to continue the fight to protect abortion rights for all.** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65314624/413061120/1848489672?source=email_062423_dobbs&refcode=email_062423_dobbs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmVkMmNkYy04ZjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YNxQGgdK9j9jBr1pkz_D5w4_41RllrgjSxH1Bb-sf24=&emci=585dd7a6-0212-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=afed2cdc-8f12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)
---
In election after election, the voters of Pennsylvania made it clear: anti-choice extremism has no home in Pennsylvania.

But that doesn’t mean the attacks on abortion rights have stopped. In DC, Republicans have already pushed multiple bills restricting access to abortion, and in too many states across the country, they’ve passed near-total abortion bans.

That’s why we can never back down in this fight, not even for a moment. Your right to choose will stay protected in Pennsylvania, but it’ll take all of us working together to stop the GOP’s anti-choice agenda for good.

**Sign your name to keep up the fight to protect abortion rights now:**

[**https://action.joshshapiro.org/a/protect-choice** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65314626/413061122/1848489672?source=email_062423_dobbs&refcode=email_062423_dobbs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmVkMmNkYy04ZjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YNxQGgdK9j9jBr1pkz_D5w4_41RllrgjSxH1Bb-sf24=&emci=585dd7a6-0212-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=afed2cdc-8f12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)

Thanks for stepping up,

Josh

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: We want to know: What issues are most important to you in Alpharetta?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Republican extremists are making every effort to restrict the voting process between now and the next election. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65315459/413064385/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTk1MjJiMy05MDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMI1aKgx35peJoP1O0tTDRgP1PpUA-IAugmAxIFCtr4=&emci=3f94549e-0812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f99522b3-9012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | It can feel like pundits are always talking about national politics — who’s running for president, the latest Supreme Court decision, and so on. Those topics are incredibly important, but they’re not the only ones that deserve our attention. As a team, we're spending a lot of time focused on the local issues that will have a direct impact on our families and communities. And many of these issues will be on the ballot in the municipal elections this year, and in next year’s election cycle. The next time you fill out your ballot, you and your neighbors have a say in the makeup of your school board, the budget of your police department, the parks department’s maintenance of your child’s playground, or which district attorney is enforcing your community’s laws. We each have a say in electing representatives who we believe in, and who we know will bring about positive change in our communities. **So our team wants to know: What are the issues that are most important to you in Alpharetta?[_Take this quick survey._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65315462/413064388/907600709?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTk1MjJiMy05MDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMI1aKgx35peJoP1O0tTDRgP1PpUA-IAugmAxIFCtr4=&emci=3f94549e-0812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f99522b3-9012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)** **— 2023 Local Issues Survey for You —** | [COMPLETE YOUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65315464/413064391/907600709?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTk1MjJiMy05MDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMI1aKgx35peJoP1O0tTDRgP1PpUA-IAugmAxIFCtr4=&emci=3f94549e-0812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f99522b3-9012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
---
Extremist lawmakers have historically threatened our freedom to help determine the direction of our communities, by making voting less and less accessible — especially for Black and brown folks. Fair Fight Action wants to change that by partnering with other organizations on the ground to mobilize, educate, and protect every person’s right to vote. Together, we can make elections free and fair so that everyone has a voice in their community, their state, and their country.
Thank you for your support in this fight,
The Fair Fight Action Team
P.S. [_**If a donation to Fair Fight Action makes sense for you today, we’d be super grateful! Every contribution brings us one step closer to helping folks make their voices heard, at every level of government.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65315467/413064393/1170678056?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230624_e_issuessurvey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTk1MjJiMy05MDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMI1aKgx35peJoP1O0tTDRgP1PpUA-IAugmAxIFCtr4=)

clean_body: Republican extremists are making every effort to restrict the voting process between now and the next election. | | | It can feel like pundits are always talking about national politics — who’s running for president, the latest Supreme Court decision, and so on. Those topics are incredibly important, but they’re not the only ones that deserve our attention. As a team, we're spending a lot of time focused on the local issues that will have a direct impact on our families and communities. And many of these issues will be on the ballot in the municipal elections this year, and in next year’s election cycle. The next time you fill out your ballot, you and your neighbors have a say in the makeup of your school board, the budget of your police department, the parks department’s maintenance of your child’s playground, or which district attorney is enforcing your community’s laws. We each have a say in electing representatives who we believe in, and who we know will bring about positive change in our communities. So our team wants to know: What are the issues that are most important to you in Alpharetta? — 2023 Local Issues Survey for You — | Extremist lawmakers have historically threatened our freedom to help determine the direction of our communities, by making voting less and less accessible — especially for Black and brown folks. Fair Fight Action wants to change that by partnering with other organizations on the ground to mobilize, educate, and protect every person’s right to vote. Together, we can make elections free and fair so that everyone has a voice in their community, their state, and their country. Thank you for your support in this fight, The Fair Fight Action Team P.S. = = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Patriot.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62868252:JTEqylINU:m:1:3299561967:318295649201604502F5B53B607B1880:r)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you. **[If you chip in right now,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62868252:JTEqylINU:m:1:3299561967:318295649201604502F5B53B607B1880:r "If you chip in just $5 right
now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62868252:JTEqylINU:m:1:3299561967:318295649201604502F5B53B607B1880:r)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62868252:JTEqylINU:m:1:3299561967:318295649201604502F5B53B607B1880:r)
---

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand via Blue Amp Action
subject: When I was 6 years old
body:
A year after the Dobbs decision
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T667a8bc0-abf4-4476-b3e6-c11005127ac1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | It’s Cliff, here. I wanted to make sure you heard that pro-choice champion, Kirsten Gillibrand, is running for reelection. Her message is below: Peter, I was only 6 years old when Roe v. Wade was first decided. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a69baa5-8435-43bb-87f3-6dc30adb794a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I grew up, entered adulthood, went to law school, fell in love, got married and had two beautiful boys in a world where women's reproductive rights were always protected — where I had the choice to live whatever kind of life I wanted. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f3a5ffa-fae2-4d65-8c7e-a810c7b075f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But a year ago, six radical conservatives on the Supreme Court ruled to take away the freedom to choose that millions of us had counted on for decades. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d46ee01-d281-4607-b220-3924744225f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Today, a generation of young women are growing up in a world where that right isn’t guaranteed — where far-right extremists are working every single day to take away their right to choose and control their bodies. In the year since Roe v. Wade was overturned, we’ve watched radical state legislators pass increasingly extreme abortion bans, outlaw interstate travel to receive reproductive health care, make abortions a felony and attack the right to birth control. And if Republicans retake the Senate, far-right extremists within their ranks will do whatever it takes to pass a nationwide abortion ban. You have my word that I will never, ever give up the fight to restore our reproductive rights. But this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. [That’s why we’ve set a $25,000 goal to defend and expand our pro-choice Senate majority. Can I count on you to split a donation between Blue Amp Action and me before midnight? Please, Peter, this is the fight of our generation — none of us can afford to sit on the sidelines.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teae470c6-1130-4dac-b1b6-26d9d41a92d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With gratitude and hope, Kirsten
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | It’s Cliff, here. I wanted to make sure you heard that pro-choice champion, Kirsten Gillibrand, is running for reelection. Her message is below: Peter, I was only 6 years old when Roe v. Wade was first decided. I grew up, entered adulthood, went to law school, fell in love, got married and had two beautiful boys in a world where women's reproductive rights were always protected — where I had the choice to live whatever kind of life I wanted. But a year ago, six radical conservatives on the Supreme Court ruled to take away the freedom to choose that millions of us had counted on for decades. Today, a generation of young women are growing up in a world where that right isn’t guaranteed — where far-right extremists are working every single day to take away their right to choose and control their bodies. In the year since Roe v. Wade was overturned, we’ve watched radical state legislators pass increasingly extreme abortion bans, outlaw interstate travel to receive reproductive health care, make abortions a felony and attack the right to birth control. And if Republicans retake the Senate, far-right extremists within their ranks will do whatever it takes to pass a nationwide abortion ban. You have my word that I will never, ever give up the fight to restore our reproductive rights. But this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. With gratitude and hope, Kirsten | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

Peter, today is a somber anniversary.

One year ago today, the constitutional right to abortion was ended when the Supreme Court handed down the decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ in the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ case. The ruling single-handedly ended fifty years of federal protections for abortion, and destroyed access to reproductive healthcare for millions of patients across the country.

We want to remind you that Greta’s opponent is the one who pushed _Dobbs_ to the Supreme Court in her crusade to eliminate abortion access nationwide. Our Attorney General has used her platform to push her own agenda and attack reproductive freedom no matter your zip code, while ignoring the problems our families are facing here in Mississippi.

Peter, we can’t overstate how much damage Greta’s opponent has caused, and the landscape she’s created for continued attacks on reproductive rights. Just this week, she filed another lawsuit against efforts to improve reproductive healthcare access by the Biden Administration. It’s up to this team to make sure she can’t continue creating barriers for patients across the country by giving her the boot and electing Greta.

Greta is a champion for reproductive freedom who will use the office of Attorney General to protect our rights, not attack them. But with our opponent’s resources, we need every pro-choice supporter standing with us in this fight.

[Will you help us protect reproductive rights in our post-Roe landscape by electing Greta, and defeating the AG who started this assault on our freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65317872/413073481/-456841951?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_TG_8_TESTA_Subscribers_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU1NDEwYzUtOTMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=doztAFRcdkeZL6pK6yk7fgiokMqid36MhUy3I7uvJ_g=)

subject: BREAKING: New Justice Dept Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We have to take action
| When George Floyd was horrifically murdered by police, the nation erupted in fury and it seemed like we were finally moving toward progress.

But reform stalled. _**And here’s why we need to act now:**_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/justice-policing-act/?source=VPP_20230624_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=8684%2E878179%2EElPEMP) **The Attorney General’s newly released report detailed “racist and unconstitutional policing.”**

We must capitalize on this renewed momentum to revive the Justice in Policing Act and prevent more abuses of power that lead to injuries and death.

[**Call on Congress to reintroduce the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to stop police misconduct, excessive force, and racial bias »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/justice-policing-act/?source=VPP_20230624_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=8684%2E878179%2EElPEMP) | [**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: DEMAND CONGRESS REINTRODUCES THE GEORGE FLOYD JUSTICE IN POLICING ACT NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/justice-policing-act/?source=VPP_20230624_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=8684%2E878179%2EElPEMP)
---
Thank you for speaking up. Together, we can push for change.

_– VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8684%2E878179%2EElPEMP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8684%2E878179%2EElPEMP).**

Think about it for a second. Senator. Kari. Lake.
A Senator who denies election results and threatens armed violence against the government.

name: Susan Wild
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
The decision to overturn Roe was once unthinkable, but now we know what can result from a GOP-controlled government.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65319082/413078712/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230624-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDI5Mjk1MC05NTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=klVkEOCjAjEiN4r0QOLw6gwai5XezHM2bUhyvqMkyXI=)
---
| Peter,

Today marks one year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and ended the protected constitutional right to access an abortion.

The decision to overturn _Roe_ was once unthinkable, but now we know what can result from a GOP-controlled government. In the last year, state legislatures nationwide have enacted strict and catastrophic abortion bans that have taken away millions of Americans’ access to reproductive healthcare.

name: Governor Jim Justice
subject: Another decade of Democrat control

body:

There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90d677dbcce7424090f5f5421034ea61&_e=cELP6f4Iwsv9ukE-IAouBW-zD5zBb9ecUHOLZxTOdJyw3S-5yS_RSESNXHYKtqP9ELRUMflA26mqpgMhef9bYvigenz0SP8a5vc7kE7_CN_vmE33FF9nCNUCCZQCUybfs4O7Wz_Z5RGMDva7XgTp-rFRWP3CUIcFzfpBZ3ClJlIPN8LoCkFeEFf0lw7KW9KJXisCQPyfY-HXfsJUwke-frO5IqUcnLr-QsKIhUuDbjDzftYpbt9vQdZe85rjTkwHB0PdgVeLTziVVE7i7_egeTeSmTg8c_3ozZVIiF1XZu7NHCloOZ6jPKwDe1_FEq0k3Uh6pDmzehFP7O-pRoL5L8PBQ7tZul-3KrlAinW-FdzHKkZiBfu2mN0pHosOdasdESqQjKBJK9JneEpuvJ_ngfT3MqV3_xZw8INPwlZUWc1kB4E3e2IU1EcXWejw5xBj)
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90d677dbcce7424090f5f5421034ea61&_e=cELP6f4Iwsv9ukE-IAouBW-zD5zBb9ecUHOLZxTOdJyw3S-5yS_RSESNXHYKtqP9ELRUMflA26mqpgMhef9bYvigenz0SP8a5vc7kE7_CN_vmE33FF9nCNUCCZQCUybfs4O7Wz_Z5RGMDva7XgTp-rFRWP3CUIcFzfpBZ3ClJlIPN8LoCkFeEFf0lw7KW9KJXisCQPyfY-HXfsJUwke-frO5IqUcnLr-QsKIhUuDbjDzftYpbt9vQdZe85rjTkwHB0PdgVeLTziVVE7i7_egedRa1m5le22wf281M87v1LBLHBT4H8YNTuMF1dBZ0cqKvwTTZJY5Y_Wm02R3PloMGn6z1QHckScU3_l8RHeY62zHLrPfUxYAeUWGWP62IOoU-lywCAHovHyNLhr_k7kNrdHZrFyiRsz9t9wj-4vJzZWSIyrAKER79wR47x-N8L5K)
I’m under no illusions that you will invest in this fight the first time you hear from me, but **I’m willing to work for your support**. I hope once you see that winning my race is a critical component in securing a Republican Senate Majority, you will feel inclined to help.

_Take a look at the math, Fellow Conservative:_

Republicans are only TWO seats away from a Senate majority, and there are THREE Democrat incumbents up for re-election in ruby-red states. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and right here in West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in 2024.
_
**This West Virginia race is a TOP PRIORITY INVESTMENT for all conservatives, no matter where you live**_.

[** JOIN TEAM JUSTICE **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90d677dbcce7424090f5f5421034ea61&_e=cELP6f4Iwsv9ukE-IAouBW-zD5zBb9ecUHOLZxTOdJyw3S-5yS_RSESNXHYKtqP9ELRUMflA26mqpgMhef9bYvigenz0SP8a5vc7kE7_CN_vmE33FF9nCNUCCZQCUybfs4O7Wz_Z5RGMDva7XgTp-rFRWP3CUIcFzfpBZ3ClJlIPN8LoCkFeEFf0lw7KW9KJXisCQPyfY-HXfsJUwke-frO5IqUcnLr-QsKIhUuDbjDzftYpbt9vQdZe85rjTkwHB0PdgVeLTziVVE7i7_egebh6NwmrDq8RM2_KEn3-ny3ZaKGZ-t0iaB3RIe46ke-OPyS6HrKByxbi30AAJNKBJGpeamuc2Dot0U7ZbbPJQk_ezO-v5DOXzfoNPsWHL3QkKCQiSDCvCuK-uegjxbLbuZRGUFwda_Zx1b4QRX9mqABgwinctr4Z8gnjQZY7-Y89)

**My opponent is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate, with an abysmal 40% approval rating**. Plus, Republicans have won in six-straight presidential elections here in West Virginia!

Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? **Not in the slightest,_Fellow Conservative_. **

Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time.

**Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024.**

**We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash.**

I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to **[join my team and pitch into our West Virginia Battle Fund today](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90d677dbcce7424090f5f5421034ea61&_e=cELP6f4Iwsv9ukE-IAouBW-zD5zBb9ecUHOLZxTOdJyw3S-5yS_RSESNXHYKtqP9ELRUMflA26mqpgMhef9bYvigenz0SP8a5vc7kE7_CN_vmE33FF9nCNUCCZQCUybfs4O7Wz_Z5RGMDva7XgTp-rFRWP3CUIcFzfpBZ3ClJlIPN8LoCkFeEFf0lw7KW9KJXisCQPyfY-HXfsJUwke-frO5IqUcnLr-QsKIhUuDbjDzftYpbt9vQdZe85rjTkwHB0PdgVeLTziVVE7i7_egeZCMobvQamvuq42hthFPCmPFx1DwEfZCyW8Z_qWYpkDvze77TgD0w4ILHKFxXo-Q5t8h3176IQQITXN5GdY2Qx9ZwPvO1pMXiAL8O-jrGWttlljkOcH5ge6CEL5fEc2kgmU7R17H0ASTHuU_A_dNV5GIi4NX4RZjZyWRBPqiHP9S)**.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90d677dbcce7424090f5f5421034ea61&_e=cELP6f4Iwsv9ukE-IAouBW-zD5zBb9ecUHOLZxTOdJyw3S-5yS_RSESNXHYKtqP9ELRUMflA26mqpgMhef9bYvigenz0SP8a5vc7kE7_CN_vmE33FF9nCNUCCZQCUybfs4O7Wz_Z5RGMDva7XgTp-rFRWP3CUIcFzfpBZ3ClJlIPN8LoCkFeEFf0lw7KW9KJXisCQPyfY-HXfsJUwke-frO5IqUcnLr-QsKIhUuDbjDzftYpbt9vQdZe85rjTkwHB0PdgVeLTziVVE7i7_egecmur_a_FvQ5lrM-FtKkI5vgm2KSRqACrBExdWZI75oP8mNMxqLZrpB4NJ0bs0t8Yx20mBDUg7LrFVGbIsPK49cD6MLdn8X6oWD0c_fCF2r2lOgaCoKSaLbAgpbE5fYeIWlg33rVcGH6qwXKI_CjqvHDsDGC98eHB1vLUM4-zf9-)
Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine.

The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats.

Remember, the stakes are high, and **[every contribution counts](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90d677dbcce7424090f5f5421034ea61&_e=cELP6f4Iwsv9ukE-IAouBW-zD5zBb9ecUHOLZxTOdJyw3S-5yS_RSESNXHYKtqP9ELRUMflA26mqpgMhef9bYvigenz0SP8a5vc7kE7_CN_vmE33FF9nCNUCCZQCUybfs4O7Wz_Z5RGMDva7XgTp-rFRWP3CUIcFzfpBZ3ClJlIPN8LoCkFeEFf0lw7KW9KJXisCQPyfY-HXfsJUwke-frO5IqUcnLr-QsKIhUuDbjDzftYpbt9vQdZe85rjTkwHB0PdgVeLTziVVE7i7_egebVR1Q4jTeCKoOGzOyIRxoTEYnVsMPPNQWM_yfyqOzc-Y0pzcusnPLJlnvFlhHSRsFZa8YxW3i62YZjIIUftV8NQjI8RPJWGRJcfrLfB7lEdnucQE_5snHa3c02h4pxyDW_QZ2pqUeqQk1wi7vv9Us6P-YXMyBiRvf8OJIJwKZVC)**.

Sincerely,
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669231%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KbI7dvLrR3l9mTiYCqdo9g&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669232%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xOi%2fjAElf31WAFjV4GYjHA&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669233%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lXWwF1%2fJo%2f7B8hb%2bL3EGAQ&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669234%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nFtYixtD1ITBLDETmwUQvg&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669245%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SHjzDDQ33k5CbaLC%2f8dv9A&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: Only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: One year later…

Friend,
Today marks the anniversary of the _Dobbs_ decision, a historic blow to reproductive justice, overturning _Roe v. Wade_. It stands as a stark reminder of the challenges we still face.
**A year after the fall of _Roe_ , 25 million women live in states with abortion bans or tighter restrictions.** _[**“More than 25 million women ages 15 to 44, or about 2 in 5 nationally, now live in states where there are more restrictions on abortion access than there were before Dobbs. More than 5.5 million more live in states where restrictions have been adopted but are on hold pending court challenges.”**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65320509/413084733/178423398?refcode=20230624_AOTL_F_Dobbs_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2NjQ1ZjY4LTk3MTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2OKa23fQpQDZCJc-Li50NCCXFSr-DEORPP9u6ieTLD4=)_
\-- AP NEWS

But we refuse to be silent, friend.
All On The Line is not stopping our work to end gerrymandering across the country and protect one another from the overreach of extremists. [**With your support in our fight against gerrymandering, we can dismantle the barriers that impede progress, amplify the voices of the marginalized, and safeguard our democratic infrastructures.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65320587/413084906/178423398?refcode=20230624_AOTL_F_Dobbs_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2NjQ1ZjY4LTk3MTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2OKa23fQpQDZCJc-Li50NCCXFSr-DEORPP9u6ieTLD4=)

Friend, it’s been exactly one year since the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and the fight to defend abortion access is as important as ever. When I say I’m “Fighting Like Hell,” I’m talking about fighting for my daughters and young people like them. I’m doing everything in my power to ensure they have the same rights I’ve had my entire life. And thanks to this movement, not a single day went by this last year when Michiganders could not access abortion care. But abortion remains under attack in other states, and I want to help elect leaders who fight like hell for our rights. ****[Will you chip in today to fight like hell with me and help defeat MAGA extremists?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321155/413086990/-802841213?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJlZTQ2MWMtOTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pr2hKOjBKt0b2DyZGV_M2NxrRGeIYfEIaqQOLpQ-WH0=)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321156/413086991/-802841213?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJlZTQ2MWMtOTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pr2hKOjBKt0b2DyZGV_M2NxrRGeIYfEIaqQOLpQ-WH0=)**

The GOP is to blame for this full-scale reproductive health crisis
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321182/413087023/-1347208466?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk50-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWVhYWUxNS05ODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOTS96v1coXwJqvEjTG4-W3X1J8ItKFxh6i72Es_Vtc=)

One year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade, _turning the clock back on reproductive rights by nearly 50 years. **[If you’re as furious as Team Murray is that we even got to the point where politicians are telling women what they can and can’t do with their bodies and their futures, chip in $5 to help us fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321183/413087024/-1347208466?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk50-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWVhYWUxNS05ODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOTS96v1coXwJqvEjTG4-W3X1J8ItKFxh6i72Es_Vtc=)**
