In the last year, Republicans have **banned abortion in 14 states** , forcing women to stay pregnant when they don’t want to – _even in situations where their lives are at risk_. Some of these laws even threaten women who have abortions, as well as the doctors who provide abortion care, with fines and jail time.
Make no mistake: The GOP is to blame for this full-scale reproductive health crisis, and their anti-choice crusade is far from over.
**[That’s why we need to make sure we keep the Senate Democratic majority and take back the House – and we need your help to do it _._ With reproductive rights on the line, will you donate $5 today to keep up the fight for reproductive freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321185/413087026/-1347208466?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk50-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWVhYWUxNS05ODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOTS96v1coXwJqvEjTG4-W3X1J8ItKFxh6i72Es_Vtc=)**

clean_body: The GOP is to blame for this full-scale reproductive health crisis The GOP is to blame for this full-scale reproductive health crisis | | | = One year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, turning the clock back on reproductive rights by nearly 50 years. = = In the last year, Republicans have banned abortion in 14 states , forcing women to stay pregnant when they don’t want to – even in situations where their lives are at risk. Some of these laws even threaten women who have abortions, as well as the doctors who provide abortion care, with fines and jail time. Make no mistake: The GOP is to blame for this full-scale reproductive health crisis, and their anti-choice crusade is far from over. = | | = Thanks for all that you do. – Team Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Becca Balint
subject: Where we are one year post-Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
No man behind a bench gets the last word about our bodily autonomy

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321174/413087013/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWVhYWUxNS05ODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-RsQMgrZgiY3cYgwMp2ufaF0ZXcEQ5Ue9PYeNXATF0=&emci=0d712c7a-ce11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=baeaae15-9812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, One year ago, the conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned the precedent set by _Roe v. Wade_ – eliminating the constitutional right to abortion care nationwide. In the weeks and months that followed, our worst fears came true: **Republican-dominated state legislatures quickly introduced and passed laws to ban abortion in 13 states across the country, leaving tens of millions of Americans without access to essential abortion-related care. ** The Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe_ was dehumanizing, dangerous, and damaging. Just ask **[this woman](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321175/413087014/-1449727384?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWVhYWUxNS05ODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-RsQMgrZgiY3cYgwMp2ufaF0ZXcEQ5Ue9PYeNXATF0=&emci=0d712c7a-ce11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=baeaae15-9812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)** in Oklahoma who was told to “ _bleed out_ ” in a parking lot because miscarriage care could no longer be legally offered to patients like her under new state laws. _I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again:_**We all know and love someone who has had an abortion – regardless of your political affiliation, religion, occupation, race, or zip code.** Those who have had abortions are not nameless, faceless people. They are our friends, neighbors, partners, colleagues, and family members. They are us – and an attack on the dignity, respect, and rights of one person is an attack on all of us. In the years and months to come, I believe Republicans will continue to push their agenda of banning abortion nationwide. But hear this: **No man behind a bench gets the last word about our bodily autonomy, nor does a failed, twice-impeached-now-indicted president.** My Democratic colleagues and I will not stop until the protections guaranteed to every American by _Roe_ are restored as the law of the land. With the vast majority of Americans standing with us, we will not lose. Onward, Becca Balint **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321176/413087015/-1822715834?&refcode=E3102-20230624-Roe-SB-AbortionReproRights&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWVhYWUxNS05ODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-RsQMgrZgiY3cYgwMp2ufaF0ZXcEQ5Ue9PYeNXATF0=)**
---

name: Katie Hill
subject: angry women like you and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321877/413089587/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA1NTRhZTktOTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ulZCnhoT_5ADlFv6WSwvXCbxkkbz2a8Bz2o4UBkbThE=)
---
| | _On this day last year, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. One year later, we’re as motivated as ever to elect unapologetically pro-choice women up and down the ballot box to restore our rights._ [_**_Will you chip in now to help us do it?_**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321878/413089588/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA1NTRhZTktOTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ulZCnhoT_5ADlFv6WSwvXCbxkkbz2a8Bz2o4UBkbThE=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321879/413089589/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA1NTRhZTktOTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ulZCnhoT_5ADlFv6WSwvXCbxkkbz2a8Bz2o4UBkbThE=)
---
One year ago today, the Supreme Court reversed the right to bodily autonomy for hundreds of millions of women.
It’s been one year without the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ , and in those 12 months, we’ve seen dystopian nightmares of minors being forced to travel out of state to terminate pregnancies borne through rape or incest. We’ve seen laws pop up across the country trying to limit access to abortion pills, make it illegal to help minors obtain abortion care, and even censor what information is available about abortion online.
**It’s been a hellish year.** But in November, we saw women and young people channel all their rage into action at the ballot box. It was thanks to the efforts of angry women like you and me that we saved our Senate majority, and gave Republicans a historically small majority in the House.
**Angry women move our country forward.** We organize our communities, protest, run for office, and so much more. That’s one effect of last year’s _Dobbs_ decision that the far-right didn’t anticipate: a whole lot of angry, MOTIVATED women.
A lot of those women are going to run for office for the first time. They’re going to be the long-shot candidates who are overlooked and underfunded. _That’s where we come in. _
HER Time works year-round to support and elect candidates who have the vision and drive to stand up to the status quo and take serious action to protect our rights.
But there are A LOT of deserving candidates, and we can’t support them all without some serious help from this team. We’re counting on folks like you to chip in a grassroots donation today, so we can continue building on the righteous anger of women like you and me.
[_**Will you chip in a donation of $3 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65321880/413089590/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA1NTRhZTktOTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ulZCnhoT_5ADlFv6WSwvXCbxkkbz2a8Bz2o4UBkbThE=)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: one year without Roe, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
For 50 years, women in America had the right to make their own personal health care decisions. **And in a single day, 5 judges put those rights on the chopping block by handing those decisions over to politicians.**
Women are now growing up with fewer rights and freedoms than their mothers and grandmothers, and we know this burden is being disproportionately carried by low-income women and women of color. I’ve always believed women — not politicians — should be able to make their own health care decisions. Just ask my wife Connie, who only agreed to go on a date with me after she checked my voting record to ensure it was 100 percent on women’s rights.
It’s only been a year, and the attacks on reproductive freedom and abortion access have been even worse than we feared. Twenty states have restricted or outright banned abortion, and more are trying to follow suit — including right here in Ohio. **But here’s the thing: Polls show the majority of Americans support reproductive rights. And every time abortion access has been tested at the ballot box, it's been protected with overwhelming support.** GOP lawmakers in Ohio are so scared of this fact that they’re doing everything they can to stop the pro-choice organizers who are fighting to enshrine abortion access in our state constitution.
**I’ll never let up in this fight, but I need your help to show the GOP how absolutely out of touch they are on this issue. That's why I’m counting on 10,000 folks to speak out by midnight tonight, but I'm missing your response, friend. So please, tell me now:**
| | **Should we restore reproductive rights for all Americans?**

I’ll never let up in this fight, but I need your help to show the GOP how absolutely out of touch they are on this issue. That's why I’m counting on 10,000 folks to speak out by midnight tonight, but I'm missing your response, friend. So please, tell me now: | | Should we restore reproductive rights for all Americans? | | | | Our voices are so much more powerful when we combine them. Thank you for using yours today. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: One year ago today, the extremist Supreme Court took away our right to bodily autonomy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here's how we fight back:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65322161/413090711/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDdmMzE4MC05OTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_l97mUPAqTDupUWIQ3qO6_2VGVGlGgpAVePHuWEfHJo=) | Team,

Today marks one year since the far-right Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ The consequences of this ruling are far-reaching and have jeopardized the fundamental rights, autonomy, and **lives** of individuals across Ohio.

**Like the majority of Ohioans, we firmly believe that reproductive care IS healthcare. No lawmaker or judge should have the power to dictate the most intimate decisions concerning our bodies and futures. That's why Ohio Democrats have been working tirelessly to put a reproductive rights initiative on the ballot, and THIS WEEK, we turned in over 100,000 signatures from every county in Ohio.**

But, anti-choice politicians in our state are ready to fight us every step of the way, and make sure this is THE issue on the ballot. Threatened by the power of the people, they've forced "Issue 1" on the August 8 ballot to try and sabotage the initiative petition process. We need your help fighting back, and that's why on today's anniversary, I'm coming to you with two requests:

**ONE:[If you're able, will you please consider chipping in $5 or more to help us mobilize voters across the state? clean_body: Here's how we fight back: = | Team, Today marks one year since the far-right Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. The consequences of this ruling are far-reaching and have jeopardized the fundamental rights, autonomy, and lives of individuals across Ohio. Like the majority of Ohioans, we firmly believe that reproductive care IS healthcare. No lawmaker or judge should have the power to dictate the most intimate decisions concerning our bodies and futures. That's why Ohio Democrats have been working tirelessly to put a reproductive rights initiative on the ballot, and THIS WEEK, we turned in over 100,000 signatures from every county in Ohio. But, anti-choice politicians in our state are ready to fight us every step of the way, and make sure this is THE issue on the ballot. Threatened by the power of the people, they've forced "Issue 1" on the August 8 ballot to try and sabotage the initiative petition process. We need your help fighting back, and that's why on today's anniversary, I'm coming to you with two requests: ONE:= | = TWO: If you're ready to get involved, will you sign up to volunteer with Ohio Democrats to help turn out voters for the August 8 special election? With your help, we can ensure that the 60% threshold to pass a citizen-led constitutional amendment never, ever becomes Ohio law. Ohio Democrats are making it clear every single day that we will NOT go back. We're grateful to have you by our side as we fight to protect reproductive rights in our state. Together, we will defend the values we all hold dear! Onwards and upwards, Liz Walters Chair Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Thank you for joining my team! [**Will you take a moment to hear why I’m running for Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65322184/413090775/-1402003064?refcode=em_fr_2023.XX.XX_b1_ac_welcome1&amount=10&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFhZWY1OWEtOTkxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Z3h1VPL17K-RULvTtrtMxBHnS93wv5f-ODTE4KaHwQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65322185/413090777/-1402003064?refcode=em_fr_2023.XX.XX_b1_ac_welcome1&amount=10&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFhZWY1OWEtOTkxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Z3h1VPL17K-RULvTtrtMxBHnS93wv5f-ODTE4KaHwQ=) I’m the grandson of four Holocaust survivors and son of refugees from communism. I grew up in a small upstairs apartment watching my parents work so hard and yet struggle to make ends meet. But because America welcomed my family and because of public schools and Pell Grants, I went from being a kid whose parents didn’t speak much English to working in the White House and building a business that brought greater financial fairness to millions while fighting the climate crisis.

I’m proud to have served in uniform, taken on financial fraudsters and drug smugglers as an Arizona Assistant Attorney General, and started a sustainability-focused company that created good-paying jobs for thousands of people. But what I’m most proud of is being Ben and Belle’s dad.

And because of them, I refuse to stand on the sidelines while their future is at stake. I’ve called this community home for twenty years. **And I can’t just watch as my Congressman puts the interests of corporate donors ahead of our kids.

Congressman David Schweikert tried to overturn the election on January 6th, calls climate change “folklore,” and is one of only five people in the history of the United States to be unanimously reprimanded by both parties for his ethics violations.**

On top of that, he is out of touch with this new district that has resoundingly supported Joe Biden and Mark Kelly.

**I won’t sugarcoat coat it: This will not be an easy fight. This is one of only nine Republican-held seats in the country that is rated a “toss-up.” Picking up five seats means Democrats retake the majority in Congress.** And so Trump’s allies and dark money groups will spend _millions_ to keep David Schweikert in office.

**That’s why I’m counting on you to help me fight back.** We must win this race for our kids, for our environment, for our veterans, and for our democracy. And with your support, we’ll take on Congressman Schweikert and win.

[**So, please, will you consider becoming a Founding Donor to my campaign? Even $10 can make a big difference in our effort to flip this district blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65322186/413090779/-1402003064?refcode=em_fr_2023.XX.XX_b1_ac_welcome1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFhZWY1OWEtOTkxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Z3h1VPL17K-RULvTtrtMxBHnS93wv5f-ODTE4KaHwQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | ****[DONATE $10 ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65322187/413090780/-1402003064?refcode=em_fr_2023.XX.XX_b1_ac_welcome1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFhZWY1OWEtOTkxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Z3h1VPL17K-RULvTtrtMxBHnS93wv5f-ODTE4KaHwQ=)****

clean_body: = You're receiving this email because of your interest in electing Democrats. If you would rather not get as many emails, please, or if you don't want to receive any emails, please click to . Friends – Thank you for joining my team! = = I’m the grandson of four Holocaust survivors and son of refugees from communism. I grew up in a small upstairs apartment watching my parents work so hard and yet struggle to make ends meet. But because America welcomed my family and because of public schools and Pell Grants, I went from being a kid whose parents didn’t speak much English to working in the White House and building a business that brought greater financial fairness to millions while fighting the climate crisis. I’m proud to have served in uniform, taken on financial fraudsters and drug smugglers as an Arizona Assistant Attorney General, and started a sustainability-focused company that created good-paying jobs for thousands of people. But what I’m most proud of is being Ben and Belle’s dad. And because of them, I refuse to stand on the sidelines while their future is at stake. I’ve called this community home for twenty years. And I can’t just watch as my Congressman puts the interests of corporate donors ahead of our kids. Congressman David Schweikert tried to overturn the election on January 6th, calls climate change “folklore,” and is one of only five people in the history of the United States to be unanimously reprimanded by both parties for his ethics violations. On top of that, he is out of touch with this new district that has resoundingly supported Joe Biden and Mark Kelly. I won’t sugarcoat coat it: This will not be an easy fight. This is one of only nine Republican-held seats in the country that is rated a “toss-up.” Picking up five seats means Democrats retake the majority in Congress. And so Trump’s allies and dark money groups will spend millions to keep David Schweikert in office. That’s why I’m counting on you to help me fight back. We must win this race for our kids, for our environment, for our veterans, and for our democracy. And with your support, we’ll take on Congressman Schweikert and win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= = =** We don’t have a moment to waste when it comes to building an economy that works for everyone, turning the climate crisis from a clear and present danger to Arizona to an opportunity to make us ‘the Solar State,’ and protecting our democracy and freedoms – including a woman’s right to choose – here and throughout the country. Thank you so much for your support – it means the world to me. – Andrei P.S. I am so grateful to have the support of this team as I work to deliver for Arizonans. name: The Republican Team
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD1rNCEUhX-N083g3Ov6UVi88LJN2FSBlGL0zoyg66AuIf8-bIrUac85nAee95u7-ZTTfX_1hexow7XuWnGZdh--5qMWmiOddTjggDOXMwiHU7RCQUQ5kV2lVhIMGj4dVigRAIQ0G5AkiIAqokZtSAPflJmSff5wCWIVqwJcuNk2TZeolJYQAJngPlMbfRkHNTofHzkFfx_kyxJqmbI9xjg7w38MrgyuncKj0dLq_iAK9V5LCv25fNZ4DSky_H97eVMIegUGkn4TIS_iMjUbz8-Uc-pSMcH34lP-IY0_6_gOAAD__3PyZJU) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD1rNCEUhX-N083g3Ov6UVi88LJN2FSBlGL0zoyg66AuIf8-bIrUac85nAee95u7-ZTTfX_1hexow7XuWnGZdh--5qMWmiOddTjggDOXMwiHU7RCQUQ5kV2lVhIMGj4dVigRAIQ0G5AkiIAqokZtSAPflJmSff5wCWIVqwJcuNk2TZeolJYQAJngPlMbfRkHNTofHzkFfx_kyxJqmbI9xjg7w38MrgyuncKj0dLq_iAK9V5LCv25fNZ4DSky_H97eVMIegUGkn4TIS_iMjUbz8-Uc-pSMcH34lP-IY0_6_gOAAD__3PyZJU) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD1rNCEUhX-N083g3Ov6UVi88LJN2FSBlGL0zoyg66AuIf8-bIrUac85nAee95u7-ZTTfX_1hexow7XuWnGZdh--5qMWmiOddTjggDOXMwiHU7RCQUQ5kV2lVhIMGj4dVigRAIQ0G5AkiIAqokZtSAPflJmSff5wCWIVqwJcuNk2TZeolJYQAJngPlMbfRkHNTofHzkFfx_kyxJqmbI9xjg7w38MrgyuncKj0dLq_iAK9V5LCv25fNZ4DSky_H97eVMIegUGkn4TIS_iMjUbz8-Uc-pSMcH34lP-IY0_6_gOAAD__3PyZJU)
---

body:
One year since the Supreme Court extremist made the unjust decision to overturn Roe v. Wade.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65322366/413091255/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_N_TEAM_90do_6_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NzgxZWViLTk5MTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xEPXVV7EPjFekhUROMJ8PjzcZef2hPMUIyE-vbXFpPc=)
| Fellow activist,

One year ago today, the far-right Supreme Court majority made one of the most radical decisions in our nation’s history. Abusing their antidemocratic power and ignoring the will of the people, they overturned the right to bodily autonomy set out in _Roe v. Wade_ , and stripped away abortion care from half our nation.

Since then, anti-choice extremists have made it their top priority to ban abortions nationwide, **and have succeeded in 14 states with others still taking place in the courts**.

People have to travel hundreds of miles to have their own bodily autonomy respected. Those who lack the resources to travel are left with few alternatives. Unsafe and torturous pregnancies are forcibly continued until a life is deemed “sufficiently” in danger.

**[These far-right extremists are united in their ruthless will to force their radical agenda on Pennsylvanians and the entire nation, but they will not win. To keep it that way, we must keep up the work.

The majority of Pennsylvanians and Americans in every state support the right to choose. With your help, we will continue to register Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth to vote and mobilize these voters to the polls to vote their values.

**[We stand just as committed and energized to protect our rights as we did on this day one year ago. Every day we spend mobilizing our voters and expanding our electorate, we loosen the grip far-right officials have on our reproductive rights and democracy as a whole. clean_body: One year since the Supreme Court extremist made the unjust decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. = | Fellow activist, One year ago today, the far-right Supreme Court majority made one of the most radical decisions in our nation’s history. Abusing their antidemocratic power and ignoring the will of the people, they overturned the right to bodily autonomy set out in Roe v. Wade , and stripped away abortion care from half our nation. Since then, anti-choice extremists have made it their top priority to ban abortions nationwide, and have succeeded in 14 states with others still taking place in the courts. People have to travel hundreds of miles to have their own bodily autonomy respected. Those who lack the resources to travel are left with few alternatives. Unsafe and torturous pregnancies are forcibly continued until a life is deemed “sufficiently” in danger. = = Because we won the PA House Majority last November and have kept it since winning the two special elections so far this year, Pennsylvania’s right to abortion remains unquestioned. To keep it that way, we must keep up the work. The majority of Pennsylvanians and Americans in every state support the right to choose. With your help, we will continue to register Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth to vote and mobilize these voters to the polls to vote their values. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. name: Winsome Sears
subject: Can you complete this assessment before it’s too late?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

Over the past month, Senate Republicans have been reaching out for you to take their **[2024 Senate Battleground Assessment,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62868256:6b4WClINc:m:1:3299561967:5AB57BEB0EE264452287B8964FCF4CF0:r) **but you haven't responded.

Republicans cannot possibly prioritize correctly without the input of our most LOYAL patriots. Unfortunately, time is running out. The deadline to complete this assessment is at MIDNIGHT.

name: Katie Porter
subject: One year without the protections of Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We can’t accept this new reality as “good enough.”
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=25320%2E3422442%2EN1jveh)
Today marks one year since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade._
When I first heard the leaked decision, I was making pasta for a sick kid after a long day. I thought to myself, _how can any politician think they are equipped to make the deeply personal decision to become a parent for someone else?_
My Republican opponent at the time supported the GOP’s abortion bans, so our campaign got straight to work telling voters what was at stake—our first TV ad, countless mailers, and thousands of conversations at door-steps and over the phone focused on protecting the right to an abortion.
But I frequently heard from voters about their belief that abortion would always be legal in California. Unfortunately, that’s not the case. **Republicans have told us that if they control the House, Senate, and White House, they will ban abortion nationwide.**
This fight isn't over. This fundamental right can and must be codified into _federal_ law. **In the Senate, I'd be a fierce advocate for overturning the filibuster to do so.**
We can’t accept this new reality as “good enough.” I still can’t believe my kids are growing up in a world with fewer rights than I had at their age.
I’ll always fight for the right to a safe and legal abortion, to expand access to reproductive healthcare, and stand up to Republicans who think they should control our lives.
Onward,
Katie Porter
Our end of quarter deadline is Friday at midnight. We don't accept a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so we count on people like you to power Katie's fight for nationwide abortion rights. **[Can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230624-2?amount=3&refcode=EMAI24_2_ROE_20230624_V1_F&refcode2=25320_3422442_N1jveh&akid=25320%2E3422442%2EN1jveh)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=2&akid=25320%2E3422442%2EN1jveh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=25320%2E3422442%2EN1jveh)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Jennnifer Wexton
subject: The anger and hurt we felt one year ago have not subsided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65322647/413092243/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230624ROE_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWM2MzEzMy05YTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCvcPQsRXeFOKuOeFftADqCbBEG37MHfo035_pscd-E=)
---
Exactly one year ago today, shortly after 10 AM, we got official confirmation of what we'd long feared would happen: **the Republican-controlled Supreme Court had overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and ended the nationally-recognized right to abortion.**

The anger and hurt we felt on June 24, 2022, have not subsided. They've only gotten worse as the realities of the Dobbs decision have taken hold and _millions_ of Americans in nearly half of all states have been stripped of reproductive freedom.

**I stand in solidarity with everyone who has been forced into an impossible situation by restrictive and regressive state laws, and I am more determined than ever to stay in the fight to restore the rights that have been unjustly denied.**

**[Will you stand with me as I continue to champion legislation to restore abortion rights nationwide? In the wake of _Dobbs_ , voters across the country have spoken loud and clear in favor of abortion rights. They _blocked_ abortion bans in the red states of Kentucky, Montana, and Kansas. They enshrined abortion rights into law in the battleground state of Michigan. And they consistently rejected hard-right anti-choice candidates — leading Democrats to broadly overperform expectations in the midterm elections.

**There is true popular momentum behind the push to restore nationwide abortion rights, and we cannot afford to let up going into another critical election year.**

Every district is going to matter, and I fully expect to face another tough fight against an anti-choice MAGA Republican (last year, my opponent said he was "thrilled" that _Roe_ was overturned).

[**Please, chip in a few dollars or more now to help us show that support for the right to choose remains strong and that we will keep mobilizing and organizing in the face of injustice — no matter how many years it takes.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65322655/413092251/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230624ROE_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWM2MzEzMy05YTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCvcPQsRXeFOKuOeFftADqCbBEG37MHfo035_pscd-E=)

Thank you,

Jennifer

clean_body: = Exactly one year ago today, shortly after 10 AM, we got official confirmation of what we'd long feared would happen: the Republican-controlled Supreme Court had overturned Roe v. Wade and ended the nationally-recognized right to abortion. The anger and hurt we felt on June 24, 2022, have not subsided. They've only gotten worse as the realities of the Dobbs decision have taken hold and millions of Americans in nearly half of all states have been stripped of reproductive freedom. I stand in solidarity with everyone who has been forced into an impossible situation by restrictive and regressive state laws, and I am more determined than ever to stay in the fight to restore the rights that have been unjustly denied. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In the wake of Dobbs , voters across the country have spoken loud and clear in favor of abortion rights. body:
1 year ago, we promised as candidates to make Maryland a safe haven for abortion care. Here's how we've delivered: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65323204/413094504/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624dobbs_wmam_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJlZWUzZS05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feLMKGbbNGPn1Wno66x6DcLQmSwkCJyoq8R0NJlJPUY=)
---
Team, 1 year ago, far-right Supreme Court justices stripped Americans of our right to access abortion care. **Back then, we promised as candidates to make Maryland a safe haven for abortion care, and since we won – we've gotten to work doing just that.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65323205/413094505/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624dobbs_wmam_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJlZWUzZS05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feLMKGbbNGPn1Wno66x6DcLQmSwkCJyoq8R0NJlJPUY=)
---
Maryland is now a leading example of what supporting reproductive justice and abortion freedom looks like.
Here's what our administration along with the state legislature has been doing to protect abortion freedom in Maryland:
* **Stockpiling abortion medication.** When anti-choice extremists decided to go after mifepristone – which has been well-researched and safely in use for over 20 years – we jumped into action. Maryland is now building a 3-year stockpile to ensure we never lose access to this important drug.

* **Protecting everyone from other states' attacks.** We were proud to pass the Reproductive Health Protection Act this year which ensures no one in Maryland has to testify or produce evidence if another state tries to punish them for legally protected health care.

* **Helping Maryland college students access reproductive care.** Our new law requires Maryland’s public higher education institutions develop reproductive health access plans to provide or refer for the full range of reproductive health.

* **Protecting private medical information and reproductive health records** of in-state and out-of-state patients.

* **Joining 20 other governors to form the Reproductive Freedom Alliance** – a first of its kind, multi-state coalition committed to protecting and expanding reproductive care.

* **Enshrining abortion rights in our state constitution.** Together with the state legislature, we passed a bill that will put this issue to Maryland voters next year. The ULTIMATE guarantee that Maryland always remains a safe haven.

We are incredibly proud of all the work we've done in just six months to deliver on this key campaign promise. While millions of Americans are seeing abortion clinics in their state close – Maryland is opening new ones.
**But we also know far-right, anti-choice extremists aren't going to stop now that the Supreme Court has opened the door for them.**
We are seeing an influx of patients from other states coming to Maryland to access care. Appalachia has become an abortion care desert. We know Republicans in Congress want to pass a _national_ abortion ban.
It's so important that we keep up the fight for reproductive freedom today and every day. That's why **we're asking you to make TWO donations today:**
[**1\. Split a donation between 2 organizations that provide abortion services in Maryland.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65323206/413094506/854250941?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624dobbs_wmam_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJlZWUzZS05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feLMKGbbNGPn1Wno66x6DcLQmSwkCJyoq8R0NJlJPUY=) These groups are on the front lines and need our support more than ever.
[FUND THE FRONT LINES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65323207/413094507/1536706075?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624dobbs_wmam_180da_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJlZWUzZS05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feLMKGbbNGPn1Wno66x6DcLQmSwkCJyoq8R0NJlJPUY=)
---
[**2\. Pitch in a donation to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65323208/413094508/-1849318451?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624dobbs_wmam_180da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJlZWUzZS05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feLMKGbbNGPn1Wno66x6DcLQmSwkCJyoq8R0NJlJPUY=) So we can keep fighting to make Maryland the national leader in reproductive justice.
[DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65323209/413094509/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624dobbs_wmam_180da_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJlZWUzZS05YjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feLMKGbbNGPn1Wno66x6DcLQmSwkCJyoq8R0NJlJPUY=)

We hope you're as proud as we are of the example our state is setting for the nation. Together, we all are a part of making Maryland a place where no one is left behind.
Elevate,
Wes and Aruna

Back then, we promised as candidates to make Maryland a safe haven for abortion care, and since we won – we've gotten to work doing just that. | = Maryland is now a leading example of what supporting reproductive justice and abortion freedom looks like. Here's what our administration along with the state legislature has been doing to protect abortion freedom in Maryland: Stockpiling abortion medication. When anti-choice extremists decided to go after mifepristone – which has been well-researched and safely in use for over 20 years – we jumped into action. Maryland is now building a 3-year stockpile to ensure we never lose access to this important drug. Protecting everyone from other states' attacks. We were proud to pass the Reproductive Health Protection Act this year which ensures no one in Maryland has to testify or produce evidence if another state tries to punish them for legally protected health care. Helping Maryland college students access reproductive care. Our new law requires Maryland’s public higher education institutions develop reproductive health access plans to provide or refer for the full range of reproductive health. Protecting private medical information and reproductive health records of in-state and out-of-state patients. Joining 20 other governors to form the Reproductive Freedom Alliance – a first of its kind, multi-state coalition committed to protecting and expanding reproductive care. Enshrining abortion rights in our state constitution. Together with the state legislature, we passed a bill that will put this issue to Maryland voters next year. The ULTIMATE guarantee that Maryland always remains a safe haven. We are incredibly proud of all the work we've done in just six months to deliver on this key campaign promise. While millions of Americans are seeing abortion clinics in their state close – Maryland is opening new ones. But we also know far-right, anti-choice extremists aren't going to stop now that the Supreme Court has opened the door for them. We are seeing an influx of patients from other states coming to Maryland to access care. Appalachia has become an abortion care desert. We know Republicans in Congress want to pass a national abortion ban. It's so important that we keep up the fight for reproductive freedom today and every day. That's why we're asking you to make TWO donations today: = These groups are on the front lines and need our support more than ever. = = So we can keep fighting to make Maryland the national leader in reproductive justice. = We hope you're as proud as we are of the example our state is setting for the nation. Together, we all are a part of making Maryland a place where no one is left behind. Elevate, Wes and Aruna | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner, and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.
And if you're a man, you should play sports against men._
_America needs more victors and less victims._
I'm Tim Scott and I approve this message because these aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

Tim Scott

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d38277a1c5e649a19d1d17e76f91877d&_e=jHJHSxl2jFpI1Q0bEnAwIG6OZLeIog-pUHNtjAoPsDVNSd-nd2mrjCKC4BPwdox9tbOMXXh78JKePasUR9UaXNu_QXpScOAGle4qElI_MKjPWCKBjQ4NcnAees1u3OEhwpz-qPFihH2K-ltI6QIQLjxaZlDf7LyuGWKefhk7q9VNQMk9UU69AvpPd45p4F7E6q63vYADxm8vyth5tsjcZkfhTt4vgqXp5SDs5rkBvqjsCWmcQnWZQV3Tm2JC27JRWydr7Nb9wM3ScUUXM_S3e9by-XhgM-kmUpxeWupKCrzpkPKxQPtozy_H4Zfk7cIBWSwAihTtXNjK-zdhF32PA6gEHMd_a48g7wO1cDIgwJvQQM2rBe4uah4bKEK52-R67rIJ_pVU8ZZSxkdKBXBPWYu0JWfiRYD_0LXXBs2MSQLdKZ79TkYmdvibOCi2TMMHJnTCPIpj3B25j9phSGa16Sy8lobeED3tZ4yEYP1L04k%3D "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d38277a1c5e649a19d1d17e76f91877d&_e=jHJHSxl2jFpI1Q0bEnAwIG6OZLeIog-pUHNtjAoPsDVNSd-nd2mrjCKC4BPwdox9tbOMXXh78JKePasUR9UaXNu_QXpScOAGle4qElI_MKjPWCKBjQ4NcnAees1u3OEhwpz-qPFihH2K-ltI6QIQLjxaZlDf7LyuGWKefhk7q9VNQMk9UU69AvpPd45p4F7E6q63vYADxm8vyth5tsjcZkfhTt4vgqXp5SDs5rkBvqjsCWmcQnWZQV3Tm2JC27JRWydr7Nb9wM3ScUUXM_S3e9by-XhgM-kmUpxeWupKCrzpkPKxQPtozy_H4Zfk7cIBBUmYimQt9C1oVrD7pqoFWQbKuO2BKpanQ_4pUhUOsR_rME6_YkGzx-MNqabLNvsV6FVx8jyWiX6Jv0bEocbz5_wWCbW-voEmyXJ0jxsQj8y8XAp36JQzKQv7IG0sMlF6JcftmHYa-aobdPIy4xJaZTb9IJDaxhQeQx85U0jUeDs%3D "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

body:
| | | Hi, friend, it’s Chuck Schumer. One year ago today, the Supreme Court made the disastrous decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and strip millions of their reproductive rights.

In the 12 months since, over a dozen states have _completely_ banned abortion, and now Republicans want a nationwide ban that would reach into _every state and every community._

Democrats MUST fight back. **So please, before midnight, will you add your name to defend reproductive rights? Click here:**
[**www.dscc.org/defend-reproductive-rights/#9716520**](https://go.dscc.org/go/12708?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230624-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortReproRightsPetitionDobbsAnniversary-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230624-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortReproRightsPetitionDobbsAnniversary-Pros-sl1&akid=11120%2E9716520%2EEcy_a2)

Thank you,

Chuck Schumer

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12708?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230624-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortReproRightsPetitionDobbsAnniversary-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230624-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortReproRightsPetitionDobbsAnniversary-Pros-sl1&akid=11120%2E9716520%2EEcy_a2)

name: Burnett for Colorado
subject: We cannot lose this war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230624_db_roe?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230624_db_roe?refcode2=img_logo]
Peter, it’s been a year since the disastrous Supreme Court decision overturned decades of legal precedent and undermined our hard-won reproductive freedoms. Debby believes that women should have control of their bodies and will always fight for access to reproductive health care, including safe abortions — no matter what.
But our anti-choice “representative” Lauren Boebert and her right-wing cronies don’t support women’s autonomy. The overturning of Roe v. Wade is just one step in their ultra-MAGA authoritarian plan to take us back to the bad old days when women were unable to make their own health care decisions, were forced to stay in abusive marriages, and were not free to live openly in LGBTQ+ relationships.
Make no mistake, Lauren Boebert and her extremist accomplices are fully complicit in the GOP’s War on Women.
It will take every one of us doing our part to stop them. We need to know where you stand, Peter:
On the anniversary of the disastrous Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade , will you commit to joining us in fighting back against the GOP’s War on Women and standing up for women’s autonomy? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_XlLprG33k2lsEn5EUV9hQ2?contactdata=bc6K9QFa/OgSKWDMmzgbQFS/QyRbmhng6ZYHneWPGwChXjzQMSbFC16FYFmbVpEDfLPSVggYg6VhUPCMRf0T5hpRU6PNeGhON3vQbdGFt5yNUELZVnmN2x/Tov0KCVFk&refcode2=text_question]

Thanks for speaking out,
Team Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of western and southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20230624_db_roe?refcode2=btn_biobox]

body:
One year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade...

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324357/413098031/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODhiNjM0OC05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyej9b1_6h81CrfbZPCuUXugWIQzmbQH-K9wgpgmKro=&emci=6ad61ae5-3c11-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e88b6348-9c12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Today marks one year since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned by the Supreme Court. Since the decision, we’ve seen a confusing and shifting patchwork of statewide abortion policies, putting the health and livelihood of women all around our country at risk – including here in Virginia, where Republicans are trying to ban abortion after 15 weeks of pregnancy. While I’m still outraged and disappointed by SCOTUS’ decision, I’m not going to wait and hope for the best. I’m channeling this anger every day in the Senate, sponsoring legislation to protect women traveling to another state to access care and protecting safe, trusted, and necessary abortion medication. But the real key to safeguarding a woman’s right to choose? Expanding our Democratic Senate majority next year. I’m committed to doing everything I can to protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority in 2024 so we can protect women’s reproductive freedoms and codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. _**[Add your name now if you’re with me>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324359/413098033/-286677567?refcode=mw_em_230624_1_a&ms=mw_em_230624_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODhiNjM0OC05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyej9b1_6h81CrfbZPCuUXugWIQzmbQH-K9wgpgmKro=&emci=6ad61ae5-3c11-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e88b6348-9c12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**_ It’s pretty simple, folks. A nationwide abortion ban is on the ballot next year. We need to get more seats in the Senate and codify _Roe_. But I can’t do it alone. I’m counting on this grassroots team to step up, just like you did last November when you stopped the so-called “red wave” right in its tracks and secured huge wins for us in the Senate and Virginia. Those victories wouldn’t have been possible without your support and contributions, so I know I can count on you now. _**_**[Sign my petition right now to commit to electing a Democratic Senate next year so we can protect access to reproductive health care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324361/413098035/-286677567?refcode=mw_em_230624_1_a&ms=mw_em_230624_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODhiNjM0OC05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyej9b1_6h81CrfbZPCuUXugWIQzmbQH-K9wgpgmKro=&emci=6ad61ae5-3c11-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e88b6348-9c12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**_**_ Thank you, Mark **********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324363/413098037/-286677567?refcode=mw_em_230624_1_a&ms=mw_em_230624_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODhiNjM0OC05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyej9b1_6h81CrfbZPCuUXugWIQzmbQH-K9wgpgmKro=&emci=6ad61ae5-3c11-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e88b6348-9c12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**********

name: Sharice HQ
subject: What we know one year since Dobbs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Today marks one year since the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade. In the last year, states all across the country have introduced and passed restrictive abortion bans which are dangerous for both patients and doctors.

In Kansas, voters overwhelmingly voted to protect reproductive rights last August. But that hasn’t stopped anti-choice extremists from trying to take down our rights:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324453/413098464/1386699406?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230624_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_dobbs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzM4N2M5Mi05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=noZj8pq8FyIfFsCImDIgxSbAKP1bEu3jVGpr4NPeKoE=)
In Congress, Sharice continues to hold the feet of anti-choice Republicans to the fire, forcing the issue again on this anniversary. And still, despite the majority of Americans supporting reproductive rights, not a single Republican in Congress will stand with us.

**There’s a movement that will not rest until abortion is banned in every single state, which is why we must be vigilant and fight back.

[To mark this occasion, will you commit to helping Sharice prepare for the battles ahead by chipping in $20 in the next 24 hours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324454/413098465/1386699406?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230624_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_dobbs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzM4N2M5Mi05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=noZj8pq8FyIfFsCImDIgxSbAKP1bEu3jVGpr4NPeKoE=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: | Today marks one year since the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade. In the last year, states all across the country have introduced and passed restrictive abortion bans which are dangerous for both patients and doctors. In Kansas, voters overwhelmingly voted to protect reproductive rights last August. But that hasn’t stopped anti-choice extremists from trying to take down our rights: = In Congress, Sharice continues to hold the feet of anti-choice Republicans to the fire, forcing the issue again on this anniversary. And still, despite the majority of Americans supporting reproductive rights, not a single Republican in Congress will stand with us. There’s a movement that will not rest until abortion is banned in every single state, which is why we must be vigilant and fight back. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = We’re not going to stop fighting for our reproductive rights until there are federal protections in place. — Sharice HQ P.S. * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Emilia Sykes
subject: One year ago today, the Supreme Court stripped women of their bodily autonomy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
One year ago today, an ideologically-driven Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and stripped millions of Americans of their constitutional right to choose. And today, one year later, it couldn’t be more clear that the Supreme Court’s ruling last June was only just the beginning of the unprecedented assaults on our bodily autonomy and reproductive freedoms.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324787/413099923/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmJjYzlmOS05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JiZH8XVK0GzXbwdARnoHwOZM0iyMyYYOjEEObKgMb5Y=)
Peter,

One year ago today, an ideologically-driven Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and stripped millions of Americans of their constitutional right to choose.

**And today, one year later, it couldn’t be more clear that the Supreme Court’s ruling last June was only just the beginning of the unprecedented assaults on our bodily autonomy and reproductive freedoms.**

To say this decision was devastating would be an understatement.

Over the last year, we’ve seen draconian abortion bans enacted in dozens of states across the country. We’ve seen women and young girls travel hours across state lines to receive urgent abortion care. _And worst of all, we’ve seen women’s lives jeopardized — and, in some cases, lost — due to their inability to receive a life-saving abortion in their home state._

The implications of the _Dobbs_ decision stretch far beyond matters of government control — this is a matter of life or death.

And yet, the extreme, out-of-touch Republicans controlling the House are still floating the idea of using their Majority to pass a nationwide abortion ban.

**The last year has only underscored the importance of re-establishing a Democratic, pro-choice Majority to codify _Roe_ and stop these assaults on reproductive freedoms. [But we can’t do that without you, Peter. I hope you’ll consider chipping in to my re-election campaign to keep me in the fight for reproductive justice for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324788/413099924/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmJjYzlmOS05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JiZH8XVK0GzXbwdARnoHwOZM0iyMyYYOjEEObKgMb5Y=)**

Thank you for being in this fight with me,

Emilia

---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324789/413099925/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmJjYzlmOS05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JiZH8XVK0GzXbwdARnoHwOZM0iyMyYYOjEEObKgMb5Y=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65324790/413099926/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmJjYzlmOS05YzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JiZH8XVK0GzXbwdARnoHwOZM0iyMyYYOjEEObKgMb5Y=)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..V1FX1R2tzK_bX8FTOlgddedUIoQwOE1KTpBFQC4X5fE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=130738161)
As was [previously reported on my Substack,](https://substack.com/redirect/5db2652b-1059-4963-8fa6-98e3b8dff6f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The Ron DeSantis for President Campaign held a fundraiser on Friday, June 23, 2023. [The $1,000 per attendee event took place at 1155 F Street, Suite 1200 in Washington D.C, which is the office of Brownstein Hyatt Farber Schreck LLP](https://substack.com/redirect/8eb70223-36de-499f-9e6d-1470be013ac0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the [self-proclaimed largest lobbying firm by revenue in the nation's capital](https://substack.com/redirect/9d477a93-f881-43f5-8e02-ccaf9f1cc6cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [A quick check of the company's website shows that they proudly position themselves as a leader in Diversity, & Inclusion. ](https://substack.com/redirect/8fb9bb37-1ed8-459b-8c93-0a4f579c86c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Notably named on the host committee invite for the fundraiser is [Marc Lampkin](https://substack.com/redirect/4c759257-5587-4df2-8b00-a73d95613e9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Marc Lampkin](https://substack.com/redirect/4c759257-5587-4df2-8b00-a73d95613e9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who has been registered as a lobbyist for COVID 19 vaccine manufacturer Moderna since February 2021. In addition to his work with Moderna, Lampkin has also been registered as a lobbyist for Pharmaceutical manufacturer [AbbVie](https://substack.com/redirect/78b4a496-a7e8-4920-84e9-879461dcb05b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the maker of the youth gender transitioning drug [Lupron](https://substack.com/redirect/2d0b7c3c-7a90-4c3b-a7c3-b8b4c04cd63d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) since 2014.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1037b27c-8a3b-4182-8787-165f71f5c685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Mr. Lampkin was not expecting to be questioned on his participation in the event by Laura Loomer's team. When questioned, Mr. Lampkin quickly ducked into a Pret a Manger cafe attempting to avoid further questioning on the matter. Mr. Lampkin was pressed on why he, as a lobbyist for one of the biggest COVID-19 manufacturers and child castration drugs, was hosting a fundraiser for DeSantis, who claims to be against child mutilation. Lampkin continued to ignore the questions as he searched for a deli sandwich, only stating that he did not feel that he was being hypocritical in supporting Ron Desantis.
When pressed further for comment on specifically why he supported Ron Desantis, Lampkin merely uttered the word "freedom" in a hasty response. When asked if freedom consisted of child chemical castration, Lampkin ignored the question and walked inside the fundraiser.
WATCH:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/38ddfa55-6235-4133-84a9-b472299d2feb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
No members of the mainstream media were present at the entrance to the event, so perhaps the attendees assumed they would be allowed to enter & exit without being questioned by the press.
Ron DeSantis himself chose a much more secluded entrance to avoid any questions from members of the press after seeing Laura Loomer's team in front of the venue with cameras. As was captured on video, DeSantis utilized a private garage entrance, which his motorcade of SUVs used as a way to isolate DeSantis from any engagement or questioning. DeSantis did not acknowledge any of the questions that were shouted at him upon his arrival to his Big Pharma sponsored fundraiser.
It is worth noting that mere hours before this fundraiser, DeSantis openly declared that the gender [transition of minors was mutilation](https://substack.com/redirect/d0f35f39-cbd8-48d8-a5e5-2985bfb74338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while speaking at The Faith & Freedom Coalition's Road to Majority Conference in DC, where President Trump is set to speak on Saturday evening.
Is the DeSantis campaign willing to overlook their own self proclaimed values as long as the donor checks keep flowing? It's a question worth asking. It's a question we did ask, but received no answer to.
It seems like Ron DeSantis is willing to say anything and flip flop on his policies throughout his race to the White House, so long as the price is right.

subject: one year since Roe was overturned
body:
Friends - Today marks one year since the Dobbs v. Jackson ruling overturned the 50-year precedent of Roe. As

**Friends -** Today marks one year since the Dobbs v. Jackson ruling overturned the 50-year precedent of Roe. As a country, we have seen the consequences of restricting healthcare. Close to a dozen states have banned abortion with no exceptions for victims of rape or incest.
Several have 6-week bans, making it nearly impossible for women to have time from finding out they are pregnant to considering their options. The fight against women’s rights and their reproductive freedoms have always had one thing in common: a want for control. If those that claim their “pro-life” stances were sincere, the proposed death penalty addition to some anti-choice bills would not be included. The deaths of women and the cases of sexual assault would be a part of the conversation - but they are not. Because this has always been about control. Denying women access to reproductive healthcare is just one part of the problem, and it has yet to be seen as any solution other than to appease radical groups that believe religion should intersect law. **[Friends - today, we can make an impact. We can show the radical right-wing that the majority of Americans agree on the notion of choice and protecting women’s healthcare. Help us by being a part of this movement](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=47815.591.1.0a61d17dff4f834feeb4dfc478cecd39).**

#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won't stop.

That's why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkTGP3CAQhX8N7mzhwYvtwsUp1jbRRVGalGiAWRYtBgRs8vcj5zZSymvffHqaT-_nu3pHH3x03_Cg7WGKKlVFVFVjf_O_qG93H11VwEH0XPYwKdHZza5GouxoG-UySzHymXf37bZOsNB8Ic3tugKBEHLUE7d4kesCsvPb2cMlTOM0zWIZ7Ep0MaBv2qwrcssmjoFKGx5E2aToCtVaKD918AbjYNLRhe3eWq5MvDG4MriiaT7FoWrMJQV_oyEVx-D63_s96ZQeTFyf7VAGj4zeRSb2E1Evww8E5InU9CyGmNhzSTWTaT661-kg658HEzsd6MMrNCk2io2J_ftb__XLj_6fJgOJORMG5S0T-8jHhYHMaB7o6CMDIeWlK5vNv30IvsqZTdyd5X9t2ydH-RMAAP__H4KVOQ)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America's research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkTGP3CAQhX8N7mzhwYvtwsUp1jbRRVGalGiAWRYtBgRs8vcj5zZSymvffHqaT-_nu3pHH3x03_Cg7WGKKlVFVFVjf_O_qG93H11VwEH0XPYwKdHZza5GouxoG-UySzHymXf37bZOsNB8Ic3tugKBEHLUE7d4kesCsvPb2cMlTOM0zWIZ7Ep0MaBv2qwrcssmjoFKGx5E2aToCtVaKD918AbjYNLRhe3eWq5MvDG4MriiaT7FoWrMJQV_oyEVx-D63_s96ZQeTFyf7VAGj4zeRSb2E1Evww8E5InU9CyGmNhzSTWTaT661-kg658HEzsd6MMrNCk2io2J_ftb__XLj_6fJgOJORMG5S0T-8jHhYHMaB7o6CMDIeWlK5vNv30IvsqZTdyd5X9t2ydH-RMAAP__H4KVOQ)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That's why we're blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We're telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I'm thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkTGP3CAQhX8N7mzhwYvtwsUp1jbRRVGalGiAWRYtBgRs8vcj5zZSymvffHqaT-_nu3pHH3x03_Cg7WGKKlVFVFVjf_O_qG93H11VwEH0XPYwKdHZza5GouxoG-UySzHymXf37bZOsNB8Ic3tugKBEHLUE7d4kesCsvPb2cMlTOM0zWIZ7Ep0MaBv2qwrcssmjoFKGx5E2aToCtVaKD918AbjYNLRhe3eWq5MvDG4MriiaT7FoWrMJQV_oyEVx-D63_s96ZQeTFyf7VAGj4zeRSb2E1Evww8E5InU9CyGmNhzSTWTaT661-kg658HEzsd6MMrNCk2io2J_ftb__XLj_6fJgOJORMG5S0T-8jHhYHMaB7o6CMDIeWlK5vNv30IvsqZTdyd5X9t2ydH-RMAAP__H4KVOQ)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: No person should ever be put in this position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
One year ago today the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ stripping away abortion rights for people across the country in the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health_ decision.
Some of you may know about my personal experience with our reproductive health care system. I am fortunate to live in a state where pregnant people’s right to make choices about their own bodies is protected. The support network around me helped me to exercise my own choice, rather than imposing someone else’s views on me.
But for so many people across the country, because of this Supreme Court decision and a frightening far-right movement based on hatred and vitriol, **this constitutional right has been revoked.** To this day, right-wing Republicans are determined to pass more extreme abortion bans, all while simultaneously working to undermine voting rights to further silence the people.
Abortion is currently banned in 14 states and Republicans are fighting to further ban access to safe and effective methods of abortion like the FDA-approved medicine, mifepristone. Not only do these policies rip away a person's ability to make potentially life-saving decisions for themselves, it pushes people towards unsafe alternative options. _No person should ever be put in that position._
**Now more than ever, we need legislation that reaffirms everyone has a constitutional and fundamental right to the life-saving care they not only need, but also deserve.**
**This fight needs every ounce of grassroots support that we can muster. From the local level to the federal level, we need to be bold and determined in our collective fight for reproductive justice.**[**Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give to help power our collective work.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42545?source=em20230624-2636&t=1&akid=2636%2E420207%2EQmZgZ8)

Pramila Jayapal

clean_body: Peter, One year ago today the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, stripping away abortion rights for people across the country in the Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health decision. Some of you may know about my personal experience with our reproductive health care system. I am fortunate to live in a state where pregnant people’s right to make choices about their own bodies is protected. The support network around me helped me to exercise my own choice, rather than imposing someone else’s views on me. But for so many people across the country, because of this Supreme Court decision and a frightening far-right movement based on hatred and vitriol, this constitutional right has been revoked. To this day, right-wing Republicans are determined to pass more extreme abortion bans, all while simultaneously working to undermine voting rights to further silence the people. Abortion is currently banned in 14 states and Republicans are fighting to further ban access to safe and effective methods of abortion like the FDA-approved medicine, mifepristone. Not only do these policies rip away a person's ability to make potentially life-saving decisions for themselves, it pushes people towards unsafe alternative options. No person should ever be put in that position. Now more than ever, we need legislation that reaffirms everyone has a constitutional and fundamental right to the life-saving care they not only need, but also deserve. This fight needs every ounce of grassroots support that we can muster. From the local level to the federal level, we need to be bold and determined in our collective fight for reproductive justice. Thank you, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Wade and the Dobbs Decision, 15 states have banned nearly all abortions, another half dozen states have severely curtailed it, and several more states are in the process. body:
13 states have enacted near-total abortion bans. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65325922/413105157/-8511679?&refcode=E3104-20230623-Roe-Header-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3YWIyN2M5LTlmMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmhUifhoa3cMxXXQhPUssJETMK-FU3WjPz2z6N45Le8=) Peter, On June 24th, 2022, the Supreme Court threw out over 50 years of precedent to overturn Roe v. Wade, the landmark case guaranteeing the right to access abortion care. The fallout from this decision has been far-reaching and catastrophic. **Today, 13 states have adopted near-total abortion bans since this decision – leaving tens of millions of women without a choice over their reproductive health, family planning, or futures.** Since taking back the House, Republicans have continued to use their newfound majority to push further restrictions on reproductive care on the national level. **If we don’t take back the House in 2024, we risk losing our most fundamental freedoms to partisan extremists.** [**Re-commit yourselves to the fight for reproductive freedom by donating to re-elect pro-choice, Future Forum Democrats to Congress in 2024.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65325923/413105158/-8511679?&refcode=E3104-20230623-Roe-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3YWIyN2M5LTlmMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmhUifhoa3cMxXXQhPUssJETMK-FU3WjPz2z6N45Le8=) | [$10](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65325924/413105159/-8511679?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3104-20230623-Roe-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3YWIyN2M5LTlmMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmhUifhoa3cMxXXQhPUssJETMK-FU3WjPz2z6N45Le8=) | [$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65325925/413105160/-8511679?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3104-20230623-Roe-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3YWIyN2M5LTlmMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmhUifhoa3cMxXXQhPUssJETMK-FU3WjPz2z6N45Le8=)

Every single Future Forum Democrat supports the right to access critical abortion-related care, and we have spent the past year leading the charge to protect reproductive freedom in the House.
After Roe was overturned, Future Forum Democrats unanimously passed an updated version of the _Women’s Health Protection Act,_ along with the _Ensuring Access to Abortion Act,_ which would ban states from punishing those who travel out of state for reproductive health care.
In order to push back against state-level attacks on abortion and protect choice on the federal level from partisan attacks, Democrats must take back the House. **And with just five seats needed to establish a Democratic majority, we are within striking distance of getting it done.**
[**Your support will be critical to helping us protect our most fundamental freedoms at the ballot box in 2024. Please contribute $5 or more to help us elect Future Forum Democrats and take back the House.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65325930/413105165/-8511679?&refcode=E3104-20230623-Roe-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3YWIyN2M5LTlmMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmhUifhoa3cMxXXQhPUssJETMK-FU3WjPz2z6N45Le8=)
