clean_body: 13 states have enacted near-total abortion bans. = Peter, On June 24th, 2022, the Supreme Court threw out over 50 years of precedent to overturn Roe v. Wade, the landmark case guaranteeing the right to access abortion care. The fallout from this decision has been far-reaching and catastrophic. Today, 13 states have adopted near-total abortion bans since this decision – leaving tens of millions of women without a choice over their reproductive health, family planning, or futures. Since taking back the House, Republicans have continued to use their newfound majority to push further restrictions on reproductive care on the national level. If we don’t take back the House in 2024, we risk losing our most fundamental freedoms to partisan extremists. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Every single Future Forum Democrat supports the right to access critical abortion-related care, and we have spent the past year leading the charge to protect reproductive freedom in the House. After Roe was overturned, Future Forum Democrats unanimously passed an updated version of the Women’s Health Protection Act, along with the Ensuring Access to Abortion Act, which would ban states from punishing those who travel out of state for reproductive health care. In order to push back against state-level attacks on abortion and protect choice on the federal level from partisan attacks, Democrats must take back the House. And with just five seats needed to establish a Democratic majority, we are within striking distance of getting it done. = Thank you, Future Forum PAC Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: One year ago
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?refcode=062423hortman [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?refcode=062423hortman]
Friend,
One year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, putting politicians in charge of Americans’ most private, personal decisions about their health and bodily autonomy. I was livid, and I wasn’t the only one.
Seeing our fundamental rights and freedoms stripped away was infuriating. But people in Minnesota turned anger into action. We fought to protect our House DFL Majority and elect a DFL trifecta because we knew something had to be done to protect Minnesotans’ reproductive freedom.
While Republicans across the country enacted dangerous abortion bans, Minnesota Democrats passed the Protect Reproductive Options Act, making it clear in state law that Minnesotans have a right to bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom. We repealed unconstitutional, outdated, unjust, and harmful statutes. And we passed protections for doctors and patients who need access to the full range of reproductive health care options.
These victories wouldn’t have been possible without your help, friend. But we know this fight isn’t over. We know that with different election results, reproductive freedom could be in danger in Minnesota again. Extreme MAGA Republicans could flip the Minnesota House in 2024 and undo the progress we’ve made. [Name], will you make a donation today and help us protect our House DFL majority and reproductive freedom in Minnesota?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Contribute $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=062423hortman]

Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?express_lane_other=true&refcode=062423hortman]
The good work accomplished in the last legislative session will benefit Minnesotans for generations to come, and we couldn’t have done it without you. Friend, thank you for your support of the House DFL. I really appreciate it.
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives

subject: The true scope of the trans agenda in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committed to America PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
For too long, Republican leaders have let trans-activists and woke corporations push them around. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=7a232d96e6bf493db821554661166969&_t=28joeuxfkn420RR5O0wjCyXiq5sUsZgPPzAp2PLONp65k9yUF7c55QqpbNhJ7nQxbkJzyHzBmUrLUwYjIHCwb2jsSfQ1OuZfEX0m-S89yOk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=7a232d96e6bf493db821554661166969&_t=28joeuxfkn420RR5O0wjCyXiq5sUsZgPPzAp2PLONp65k9yUF7c55QqpbNhJ7nQxbkJzyHzBmUrLUwYjIHCwb2jsSfQ1OuZfEX0m-S89yOk%3D)

---
This week, All-American college swimmer **Riley Gaines** exposed the true scope of the trans agenda in our schools during her Senate hearing.

She testified that female swimmers were so **"VIOLATED"** by the prospect of changing with trans swimmer Lia Thomas, whom she described as 6’4” male, they had to change in a janitor’s closet.

This just scratches the surface of the scope of the trans agenda in our schools.

For too long, Republican leaders have let trans activists and woke corporations push them around. Mike Pence is the only candidate in the Republican Presidential race with the moral conviction and experience to take on this radical agenda head-on AND WIN.

# About Committed to America PAC

The Committed to America PAC is the only pro-Mike Pence super PAC. We began because we are at a crossroads in our country, and now, more than ever, we need servant leadership, not selfish ambition. Mike Pence embodies servant leadership. Vice President Pence continues to be driven by his need to give back to the country that has given him so much. The Committed to America PAC team is dedicated to acting with fiduciary responsibility while building the resources needed to win, defend our country from the radical left, and build a safer America. Committed to America is taking a data-driven, person-to-person approach to target the voters we need to win. There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4ffd4fdf8dce423f9336a025834124e6&_e=mKjcs_W5UKD4_8VAA0Kz5uWnqOMgcttsKP1Usr-beigoZHgy7TrTHhE9hjrnCBaLUwz-aRJ1LfALH3rP-rDalprITuuUBwo08GWO2voLp2JCdvtZ-AeQkbz2H7UI5ZbkNjK89pVNHYoGlOiEvTApb4E9q3frgniJoBKTR9wxk9c-swTm-qNK4maYAoANo8-MjDOto4QM4P5k5gPEjWlo6AEDQ98MWCRgBAXqcEeoplhIbdTFjBbzxte7q92ROoJFtj37TELLPWnSh6kCEIj_cNIOjPcdVIiMzt1ahL0yVlMOfpAEvfvgmlsRVpU3U6xR5axpAm4sq3ZaifUp82i2abzCrtqmXFrntMEV_UgfPoxxbdB2YhfdX3WX-6zzCIh1CCU3zDt-bkBLQ666bthfmAWVAQlpUoS8OW2JyWRIf1uigfHPrppm7t1C9ECMd7OT)
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4ffd4fdf8dce423f9336a025834124e6&_e=mKjcs_W5UKD4_8VAA0Kz5uWnqOMgcttsKP1Usr-beigoZHgy7TrTHhE9hjrnCBaLUwz-aRJ1LfALH3rP-rDalprITuuUBwo08GWO2voLp2JCdvtZ-AeQkbz2H7UI5ZbkNjK89pVNHYoGlOiEvTApb4E9q3frgniJoBKTR9wxk9c-swTm-qNK4maYAoANo8-MjDOto4QM4P5k5gPEjWlo6AEDQ98MWCRgBAXqcEeoplhIbdTFjBbzxte7q92ROoJFtj37TELLPWnSh6kCEIj_cNIOjPcdVIiMzt1ahL0yVlO-q8HGbLhiDD6MDKqKhWGDDcZ4b7bAkkTZJTfX3DxV_Acg-SDbzquxiCRH135Lj_qg8pYu_02u1Vjkeyr0pmqXjNLoSt0Wjw9jnxlSmol4Ss0gKqytahKbJShqNdbpnKc9UJrh6gxjMsTig9I9A6Bt)
I’m under no illusions that you will invest in this fight the first time you hear from me, but **I’m willing to work for your support**. I hope once you see that winning my race is a critical component in securing a Republican Senate Majority, you will feel inclined to help.

_Take a look at the math, Fellow Conservative:_

Republicans are only TWO seats away from a Senate majority, and there are THREE Democrat incumbents up for re-election in ruby-red states. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and right here in West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in 2024.
_
**This West Virginia race is a TOP PRIORITY INVESTMENT for all conservatives, no matter where you live**_.

[** JOIN TEAM JUSTICE **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4ffd4fdf8dce423f9336a025834124e6&_e=mKjcs_W5UKD4_8VAA0Kz5uWnqOMgcttsKP1Usr-beigoZHgy7TrTHhE9hjrnCBaLUwz-aRJ1LfALH3rP-rDalprITuuUBwo08GWO2voLp2JCdvtZ-AeQkbz2H7UI5ZbkNjK89pVNHYoGlOiEvTApb4E9q3frgniJoBKTR9wxk9c-swTm-qNK4maYAoANo8-MjDOto4QM4P5k5gPEjWlo6AEDQ98MWCRgBAXqcEeoplhIbdTFjBbzxte7q92ROoJFtj37TELLPWnSh6kCEIj_cNIOjPcdVIiMzt1ahL0yVlObhmg8gO4f1fq7bKLP-ACbNgj7cXW159XkjXL8FZ6i8TdrlhHjCxqs3D_QstyOaXvuOQLpeCxQMxO_c6qLwR_HOLwwKUjRUwly0uXU3viGYxXP8cERqqvdXTiH-X8zeEJcPvXfF-SPsoLcJPklVK42)

**My opponent is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate, with an abysmal 40% approval rating**. Plus, Republicans have won in six-straight presidential elections here in West Virginia!

Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? **Not in the slightest,_Fellow Conservative_. **

Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time.

**Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024.**

**We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash.**

I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to **[join my team and pitch into our West Virginia Battle Fund today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4ffd4fdf8dce423f9336a025834124e6&_e=mKjcs_W5UKD4_8VAA0Kz5uWnqOMgcttsKP1Usr-beigoZHgy7TrTHhE9hjrnCBaLUwz-aRJ1LfALH3rP-rDalprITuuUBwo08GWO2voLp2JCdvtZ-AeQkbz2H7UI5ZbkNjK89pVNHYoGlOiEvTApb4E9q3frgniJoBKTR9wxk9c-swTm-qNK4maYAoANo8-MjDOto4QM4P5k5gPEjWlo6AEDQ98MWCRgBAXqcEeoplhIbdTFjBbzxte7q92ROoJFtj37TELLPWnSh6kCEIj_cNIOjPcdVIiMzt1ahL0yVlMl91ADBO7VbbKK3CEvALYl_Ou63HL7As_0I--08OnkuSNeU5F9gLuHk6ZURvVWi_wrEsKjmvwbUGslDfiTia7ZQeut6U9h6VlTxZuqjO-xXbospcHKl7WSR3eaWOXKIDzPdvHwGQKGvSkzQs47oaF9)**.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4ffd4fdf8dce423f9336a025834124e6&_e=mKjcs_W5UKD4_8VAA0Kz5uWnqOMgcttsKP1Usr-beigoZHgy7TrTHhE9hjrnCBaLUwz-aRJ1LfALH3rP-rDalprITuuUBwo08GWO2voLp2JCdvtZ-AeQkbz2H7UI5ZbkNjK89pVNHYoGlOiEvTApb4E9q3frgniJoBKTR9wxk9c-swTm-qNK4maYAoANo8-MjDOto4QM4P5k5gPEjWlo6AEDQ98MWCRgBAXqcEeoplhIbdTFjBbzxte7q92ROoJFtj37TELLPWnSh6kCEIj_cNIOjPcdVIiMzt1ahL0yVlOj6Z6aAV-irFysPTuaNMTXeLbzTaBA460hArVpMxoFyGC0gcLhrfpZtR5ME1194Tf5pqgvrrbHIW59oyhxi7ULETLTzf7z14YK5z77keaI5Mgj3CS3g4uOOjQeQn6keut2WTry9sZVppSWyrSZXORH)
Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine.

The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats.

Remember, the stakes are high, and **[every contribution counts](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4ffd4fdf8dce423f9336a025834124e6&_e=mKjcs_W5UKD4_8VAA0Kz5uWnqOMgcttsKP1Usr-beigoZHgy7TrTHhE9hjrnCBaLUwz-aRJ1LfALH3rP-rDalprITuuUBwo08GWO2voLp2JCdvtZ-AeQkbz2H7UI5ZbkNjK89pVNHYoGlOiEvTApb4E9q3frgniJoBKTR9wxk9c-swTm-qNK4maYAoANo8-MjDOto4QM4P5k5gPEjWlo6AEDQ98MWCRgBAXqcEeoplhIbdTFjBbzxte7q92ROoJFtj37TELLPWnSh6kCEIj_cNIOjPcdVIiMzt1ahL0yVlM4pjPIKvQB4nSpBbakpJ-iiXea-1unHYYzvPJ6fxRGsHnIzVF2-U-LUx4i0AW45pzV_tE_DRKXsKb1v7WiadyQ1kbZ1Pg5RqmfZdegOWrPN5DVmZqiAS3_lB5ge4VxqBexYGXrfYp2NvNMEp9llUHx)**.

Sincerely,
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play. | | There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative: If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play. It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate. If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat. I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team. I’m under no illusions that you will invest in this fight the first time you hear from me, but I’m willing to work for your support. I hope once you see that winning my race is a critical component in securing a Republican Senate Majority, you will feel inclined to help. Take a look at the math, Fellow Conservative: Republicans are only TWO seats away from a Senate majority, and there are THREE Democrat incumbents up for re-election in ruby-red states. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and right here in West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in 2024. This West Virginia race is a TOP PRIORITY INVESTMENT for all conservatives, no matter where you live. My opponent is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate, with an abysmal 40% approval rating. Plus, Republicans have won in six-straight presidential elections here in West Virginia! Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? Not in the slightest,Fellow Conservative. Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time. Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024. We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash. I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to . Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine. The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats. Remember, the stakes are high, and . Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: A year ago today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
It is no exaggeration to say the decision to overrule Roe v. Wade has had disastrous consequences for the right to bodily autonomy, personal choice, and equitable access to healthcare.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65326297/413105766/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230624-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWFiMjdjOS05ZjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oV02HwPmQ_4LYDjOQihxuThUU64nEcW954bLTvGpN4A=)
---
| Peter,

A year ago today, 50 years of precedent upholding the right to abortion were overturned by the Supreme Court.

In the time since, legislatures across the country moved swiftly to repeal existing protections for reproductive access, and are continuing to do so today. It is no exaggeration to say the decision to overrule _Roe v. Wade_ has had disastrous consequences for the right to bodily autonomy, personal choice, and equitable access to healthcare.

**But 50 years of precedent have not come without a fortified movement to defend reproductive rights. The repeal of _Roe v. Wade_ has emboldened us too.**

Like millions of women across the country, I am emboldened to continue the fight to secure and protect reproductive rights. In Congress, I am committed to making this a reality for this generation and those that come after.

[_**On this one-year anniversary, I ask you to join me in showing the strength of our movement to defend reproductive rights by adding your name below.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65326301/413105770/-147618648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWFiMjdjOS05ZjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oV02HwPmQ_4LYDjOQihxuThUU64nEcW954bLTvGpN4A=&emci=0b121c27-dc11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=81ab27c9-9f12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=799895)
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65326305/413105774/-147618648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWFiMjdjOS05ZjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oV02HwPmQ_4LYDjOQihxuThUU64nEcW954bLTvGpN4A=&emci=0b121c27-dc11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=81ab27c9-9f12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=799895)

This fight is not over. I hope you’ll join me in demanding the codification of reproductive rights.

Onward,

Valerie

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you
can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach our daily
goal of $150,000? [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18979?t=1001&akid=3336%2E346206%2Edm2vvh ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a
people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our
Senate majority. Please donate now →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18979?t=1002&akid=3336%2E346206%2Edm2vvh ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots
movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it.
Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our
Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230624-3336-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3336_346206_dm2vvh&akid=3336%2E346206%2Edm2vvh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3336%2E346206%2Edm2vvh

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: We are at a critical point
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs8HSwnDTN

For years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to
destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the
freest and most...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os8HSwnDTN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I hope
you're having a great day. There's something important I want to
share with you today.

For
years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to
destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the
freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found
a willing ally in the Biden administration's education
department.

And right
now-with the help of these government bureaucrats-they are
actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools
while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory
and socialism.

We are at
a key point in our history. We must defend our nation's founding
documents and principles of liberty through education.

And
that's why I'm emailing you today.

Hillsdale
College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our
very popular "Constitution 101" online course, and I'd like you
to have a copy.

The
course features Hillsdale's faculty-the same professors who teach
our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you
view "Constitution 101," you'll learn about:

The
original design and purpose of the Constitution.
The
challenges it faced during the Civil War.
How
it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and
liberalism.
How
limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our
own time.

Right
now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100
or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61953538:s8HSwnDTN:m:3:2532013465:DD17CE68B11C4DFA65360E1FBE6E98EB:r

And when
you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help
expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free
online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and
Imprimis-our digest of liberty.

We need
your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even
indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

So,
please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61953538:s8HSwnDTN:m:3:2532013465:DD17CE68B11C4DFA65360E1FBE6E98EB:r

And
remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure
to reserve your copy today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

We will not waver in our devotion to people seeking or providing abortions.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65327310/413109523/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDdhNWNlNy1hMDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9EbBULZtoi_-TMufSlJHueldyyR80weDaQUmvbdz6o=&emci=92b4e63f-ef0a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=607a5ce7-a012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)

| | Peter, A year ago today, we were bracing for impact. That awful news that we all knew was coming – the Supreme Court ruling that overturned _Roe v. Wade_. **In just one decision, the most radical, anti-choice Supreme Court in our history revoked women's right to bodily autonomy.** But Peter, we didn't give in to our despair. We took to the streets, we volunteered our time, we fundraised for abortion provider networks, and shared our stories. And every day since, we've shown up for doctors, for patients, and for one another. The Supreme Court's decision was a culmination of a years-long coordinated campaign to take away our reproductive rights. By grabbing up seats in state and local governments while stacking the judiciary with extremist judges, right-wing radicals kept up a steady assault on _Roe v Wade_. Their plan culminated when Mitch McConnell destroyed the nomination process to allow Donald Trump to pack the Supreme Court with three radical anti-abortion justices. **The point is:****_Roe_****wasn't overturned overnight, and it's going to take all of us making a commitment to do what it takes, for as long as it takes, to restore the constitutional right to abortion.** **In a post-Roe era, we must work to gain ground.[Please, donate $3 now and let's keep the fight for abortion rights alive, together. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65327311/413109524/-1599294071?refcode=2023-06-24-dobbs&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=607a5ce7-a012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDdhNWNlNy1hMDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9EbBULZtoi_-TMufSlJHueldyyR80weDaQUmvbdz6o=)** Peter, here's my promise to you: so long as I'm around, no one will ever be alone in this fight. Our campaign will continue to lead the charge protecting a woman's right to choose, no matter what. We will not waver in our devotion to people seeking or providing abortions. [**But that means we have to elect a pro-choice Congress, ready to take action to protect reproductive rights on Day One. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Remember “states’ rights” Peter?
body:
Right-wing Republicans are passing extreme abortion bans and then making it harder to vote to avoid accountability.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1151%2E120351%2EiYMpts)
Remember “states’ rights” Peter?
For decades, Republicans argued that each state should be allowed to decide whether to ban abortion individually. They said that voters should be able to decide the issue for their own states and communities.
**But one year to the day after**** _Roe v. Wade_****was overturned by the Supreme Court’s new conservative supermajority, it’s clear that all of that was a lie.**
Right-wing Republicans in states like Florida are passing extreme abortion bans and then making it harder to vote in an attempt to stop voters from kicking them out of office. Their priority isn’t “states’ rights,” it’s enacting extreme, unpopular abortion bans through any means necessary.
[**Before we go further, you should know that Courier’s newsrooms in 8 battleground states have been diligently covering the fight for abortion rights, but they can’t do their work without your support. Will you pitch in $5 or anything you can today to help fund reliable local journalism like ours?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230624?refcode=em20230624&refcode2=1151_120351_iYMpts&akid=1151%2E120351%2EiYMpts)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230624?refcode=em20230624&refcode2=1151_120351_iYMpts&akid=1151%2E120351%2EiYMpts)**
Over and over again, we’ve seen what happens when voters head to the polls armed with the truth about reproductive rights — and it’s not pretty for anti-abortion Republicans.
Last year in Michigan, voters overwhelmingly approved Proposal 3 to establish the right to reproductive freedom in the state constitution. **And a novel experiment found that Michiganders were more likely to oppose abortion bans after reading reports from**** _The Gander_****, our local Michigan newsroom:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230624?refcode=em20230624&refcode2=1151_120351_iYMpts&akid=1151%2E120351%2EiYMpts)
So it’s no wonder that Republicans are working so hard to stop voters from making their voices heard. And it’s critical that local newsrooms like _The Gander_ continue working to **hold them accountable.**
But with mainstream media organizations prioritizing click rates and ads revenue over their duty to inform the public, these stories go unreported far too often.
**That’s why Courier Newsroom is committed to reporting on state and local issues to communities that lack other reliable sources of local news.**
[**But this work takes resources, Peter, and in today’s day and age, supporting local journalism is more important than ever. So if you want to help us keep up our work across 8 battleground states as the fight for abortion rights continues on, then please chip in $5 or whatever you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230624?refcode=em20230624&refcode2=1151_120351_iYMpts&akid=1151%2E120351%2EiYMpts)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230624?refcode=em20230624&refcode2=1151_120351_iYMpts&akid=1151%2E120351%2EiYMpts)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1151_120351_iYMpts&akid=1151%2E120351%2EiYMpts)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)

Box 509
New York, NY 10032
clean_body: Right-wing Republicans are passing extreme abortion bans and then making it harder to vote to avoid accountability. Remember “states’ rights” Peter? For decades, Republicans argued that each state should be allowed to decide whether to ban abortion individually. They said that voters should be able to decide the issue for their own states and communities. But one year to the day after Roe v. Wadewas overturned by the Supreme Court’s new conservative supermajority, it’s clear that all of that was a lie. Right-wing Republicans in states like Florida are passing extreme abortion bans and then making it harder to vote in an attempt to stop voters from kicking them out of office. Their priority isn’t “states’ rights,” it’s enacting extreme, unpopular abortion bans through any means necessary. Over and over again, we’ve seen what happens when voters head to the polls armed with the truth about reproductive rights — and it’s not pretty for anti-abortion Republicans. Last year in Michigan, voters overwhelmingly approved Proposal 3 to establish the right to reproductive freedom in the state constitution. And a novel experiment found that Michiganders were more likely to oppose abortion bans after reading reports from The Gander, our local Michigan newsroom: So it’s no wonder that Republicans are working so hard to stop voters from making their voices heard. And it’s critical that local newsrooms like The Gander continue working to hold them accountable. But with mainstream media organizations prioritizing click rates and ads revenue over their duty to inform the public, these stories go unreported far too often. That’s why Courier Newsroom is committed to reporting on state and local issues to communities that lack other reliable sources of local news. Thank you, The Courier Newsroom Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Derek,
On this day last year, the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ in the Dobbs decision.
It’s a decision that’s made life more difficult for millions of people — including hundreds of thousands of Veterans and Active Duty Servicemembers.
We’ve known for years that the GOP would do whatever they could to restrict access to abortions. But we never thought they’d go as far as they are right now.

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Turning Outrage into Action-1st anniversary of the INFAMOUS Dobbs decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
On this one-year anniversary of the heinous Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, I re-commit to turning our **OUTRAGE into ACTION**!! The ruling in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization demolished nearly 50 years of precedent to allow policing and oppression of women and birthing people.

As the 6th largest city in the nation, Philadelphia is at the forefront of protecting our bodily autonomy with the recently passed bills that protect patients and providers involved in abortion care! I will continue working to ensure Philadelphia stays at the forefront of that fight for unfettered access to reproductive healthcare. It is critical to safeguard and continue the fight for bodily autonomy, both locally, nationally and globally.
We must restore the fundamental right to make informed decisions about our bodies. Abortion is healthcare and all who need it must have access to it.
Please join me in this fight and [donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/Mu1MJtFqY_e84bRccUR7OSSFU9mp2bn91Kn5mQjfVxk=/Ndmnv-mpKqoQt6RKH8DpKnJRMCor58gSUPQrpcDObwA=) to elect me as your next Philadelphia City Council Member at-Large on November 8th!

| | Peter,

A year ago today, a group of right-wing extremist judges on our nation’s highest court — **_a court that was designed to protect the freedoms of ALL Americans_** — decided that they should have control over who receives reproductive healthcare and who doesn’t and overturned _Roe v. Wade._

But the attacks didn’t stop there.

13 states saw so-called ‘trigger laws’ go into effect. Laws were proposed within months across state legislatures further restricting access to reproductive healthcare. Republicans in Congress proposed a national abortion ban. Access to Mifepristone, a safe and legal drug used in medical abortions, is under attack and headed to the Supreme Court.

**Peter, women are less safe today than they were 50 years ago.** And Black and Brown women will disproportionately feel the consequences of these attacks, with Black women making up nearly a third of people getting abortions in the United States.

[You know just as well as we do that the ONLY WAY to right this wrong is to elect more Black women who will fight tooth and nail for guaranteed access to safe and legal abortions. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, A year ago today, a group of right-wing extremist judges on our nation’s highest court — a court that was designed to protect the freedoms of ALL Americans — decided that they should have control over who receives reproductive healthcare and who doesn’t and overturned Roe v. Wade. But the attacks didn’t stop there. 13 states saw so-called ‘trigger laws’ go into effect. Laws were proposed within months across state legislatures further restricting access to reproductive healthcare. Republicans in Congress proposed a national abortion ban. Access to Mifepristone, a safe and legal drug used in medical abortions, is under attack and headed to the Supreme Court. Peter, women are less safe today than they were 50 years ago. And Black and Brown women will disproportionately feel the consequences of these attacks, with Black women making up nearly a third of people getting abortions in the United States. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Attacks on abortion like these are not popular. We’ve seen that in special elections across the country and in the results of the 2022 midterms. But here’s the thing, Peter: THERE ARE STILL NO BLACK WOMEN IN THE UNITED STATES SENATE — so it’s no secret why our rights are being stripped away with no pushback. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. | Peter, Today marks the first anniversary of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade. _ Over the past year, we’ve seen the devastating consequences of losing a woman's legal right to choose play out in stark fashion. We’ve seen an assault on our constitutional right to privacy as abortion bans were enacted in state legislatures nationwide. _**The ramifications of the Supreme Court’s decision have been profound. **_ When the Supreme Court handed down its decision, Justice Clarence Thomas also questioned the right to use contraception, setting a dangerous precedent. Americans deserve privacy when making their personal healthcare decisions, and healthcare providers must retain the freedom to provide the necessary care to their patients. That’s why I’m co-sponsoring legislation to protect the right of all Americans to access contraception and calling to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. [_**I hope you’ll support my efforts today to protect our fundamental and life-saving right to choose. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65328371/413113642/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230624-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTBkMWY5YjctYTMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ba-EJJBbgvsbsii57AWkEZdWBTw4cDUGSvd7Fpr9AoY=)

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: 1 year ago: Dobbs v. Jackson and a decision that disregarded 50 years of precedent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Now, 10 states remain where ballot measures could be used to strike down existing bans and protect abortion access for good. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65328434/413113901/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ1YjZkOC1hMzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VvW-xUAbH7Xgy2SlImSpQo2yiCJk1aX-QIw1703izGk=&emci=f5471da9-4911-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0245b6d8-a312-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Dear friend, On this day one year ago, the Supreme Court released its formal decision on _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_. A decision that effectively overturned the landmark law of _Roe v. Wade_ , which protected every individual’s reproductive freedom for nearly 50 years. In its aftermath, abortion bans came down in extremist-packed state legislatures across the country and millions of Americans were left without access to reproductive care. At the time, we knew this decision was possible, so we teamed up with voters in Michigan and Vermont to run some of the first-ever ballot measure campaigns to preserve access to abortion. **And we won. In the 2022 November midterms, voters in 5 states decisively took action to preserve their access to reproductive health care. And now 10 states remain where we’re committed to doing everything we can to help voters pass policies to do the very same. ** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65328435/413113902/1801192403?refcode=E21751-20230622-DobbsAnniversary-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ1YjZkOC1hMzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VvW-xUAbH7Xgy2SlImSpQo2yiCJk1aX-QIw1703izGk=) **Ohio, Florida, Arkansas, Oklahoma, Montana, Missouri, North and South Dakota, Nebraska, and Arizona.** ALL places where ballot measures could be used to strike down existing bans and protect abortion access in each state _for good. _ **So now, 1 year after the devastating _Dobbs_ ruling, we’re gearing up for the fights ahead. **Six of these states are _serious possibilities_ for 2023 and 2024 campaigns, but raising the funds we need to kickstart these campaigns is _urgent_. [_**If you’re with us as we work to restore abortion access across the country, will you rush a donation of $25 or whatever you can afford to power our next slate of abortion ballot measure campaigns, friend?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65328436/413113903/1801192403?refcode=E21751-20230622-DobbsAnniversary-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ1YjZkOC1hMzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VvW-xUAbH7Xgy2SlImSpQo2yiCJk1aX-QIw1703izGk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65328437/413113904/1801192403?express_lane=true&refcode=E21751-20230622-DobbsAnniversary-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ1YjZkOC1hMzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VvW-xUAbH7Xgy2SlImSpQo2yiCJk1aX-QIw1703izGk=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65328438/413113905/1801192403?express_lane=true&refcode=E21751-20230622-DobbsAnniversary-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQ1YjZkOC1hMzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VvW-xUAbH7Xgy2SlImSpQo2yiCJk1aX-QIw1703izGk=)**

clean_body: Now, 10 states remain where ballot measures could be used to strike down existing bans and protect abortion access for good. | | Dear friend, On this day one year ago, the Supreme Court released its formal decision on Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization. A decision that effectively overturned the landmark law of Roe v. Wade , which protected every individual’s reproductive freedom for nearly 50 years. In its aftermath, abortion bans came down in extremist-packed state legislatures across the country and millions of Americans were left without access to reproductive care. At the time, we knew this decision was possible, so we teamed up with voters in Michigan and Vermont to run some of the first-ever ballot measure campaigns to preserve access to abortion. And we won. In the 2022 November midterms, voters in 5 states decisively took action to preserve their access to reproductive health care. And now 10 states remain where we’re committed to doing everything we can to help voters pass policies to do the very same. = Ohio, Florida, Arkansas, Oklahoma, Montana, Missouri, North and South Dakota, Nebraska, and Arizona. ALL places where ballot measures could be used to strike down existing bans and protect abortion access in each state for good. So now, 1 year after the devastating Dobbs ruling, we’re gearing up for the fights ahead. Six of these states are serious possibilities for 2023 and 2024 campaigns, but raising the funds we need to kickstart these campaigns is urgent. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, = Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m disappointed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Hey Peter, Jon here.

I’ve got to be honest with you, I’m disappointed. My team just let me know that we didn’t reach our fundraising goal. With the public FEC deadline right around the corner, this is bad news.

**I didn’t expect the “summer fundraising slump” to start this early. And with a GOP opponent joining the race any day now, we’re at serious risk of falling vulnerable to far-right attacks.**

This team always shows up when I need them most. With your help, a little luck, and some hard work, I know we’ll get back on track in no time.

**[So what do you say, Peter? Can I count on you to chip in right now to help us make up the difference so we can keep me in the Senate to fight for our Montana values? name: 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1tr3otl9csbciac8m3angk4j6orhpc17d2f8fjg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj6ao32c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze3pj46e71c8ofm54e5bqjf9hl9hviiqgv9m97co_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj6ao32c5h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu52lenl8cdrrqj14avodi9bnuc0j365jm7909eg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj6ao32c5h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm7h7c2j89ui9frs169l83r5u66hmm0pd8dg2ar8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj6ao32c5h2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi1hguconp8cc2ckiakjhdf6ad5r8poavpd7mog0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj6ao32c5h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: One year since Roe v. Wade. What now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
It’s been a year since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court robbed reproductive freedom from millions nationwide by overturning _Roe v. Wade._
We have seen the catastrophic damages this decision has caused all over the country. Abortion clinics are overloaded in blue states and women are being refused vital care in red ones. The past year has been a constant battle for women, doctors, and advocates across the country for their fundamental rights, but we all need to remain steadfast and determined in this fight because **_we collectively have the power to restore abortion rights.**_
And it starts with you and me, making sure we elect pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in 2024.
We need to reelect Joe Biden so a MAGA extremist president doesn’t pursue a nationwide abortion ban or pack the Supreme Court with more anti-abortion conservative justices.
We need to reelect Tammy Baldwin, Jon Tester, Jacky Rosen, and other Democrats who can vote to restore abortion access and protect our Senate majority.
We need to elect folks like Will Rollins, Sarah Klee Hood, and Josh Riley so we can take back the House majority and pass reproductive care legislation.
But they can’t do it alone, they need our unwavering support.
So we have a chance to create tangible change. Let’s team up and support pro-choice Democrats across the country so they can win the seats that will restore reproductive access to women, regardless of the color of their state.
[**Can you contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to The Long Run so we can continue supporting pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide? Every donation will help us fund and provide resources to candidates in critical races.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.F10pcU&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=1&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.Hs1Hq4&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=20&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.1mpGig&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=21&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.vrhXfl&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=22&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.OkZxWE&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=23&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.iH2dpA&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=24&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.F10pcU&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=25&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)
The past year has been tough but we must use our collective power to protect abortion access.
Thank you,
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.F10pcU&refcode=em230624-1-t45&t=26&akid=4570%2E196590%2EY5Q8NO)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: One year after Dobbs, the fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Add your name to protect reproductive rights.
#
Peter
One year ago today, the far-right anti-abortion movement got what they had been working toward for years: the Supreme Court overturned the landmark 1973 _Roe v. Wade_ decision.
But we all know that wasn’t the end of this fight. Now, with Republicans in states all across the country severely restricting — or outright banning — abortion care, the stakes are even higher.
**[More than ever, we need to codify reproductive rights into federal law and protect the right to abortion for every American. Will you add your name to the petition right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65328883/413115805/-1794708744?refcode=dd_em_230624_1_t1_a&ms=dd_em_230624_1_t1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc2N2RhYi1hNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WC9DxYzyK9q4NOVEM3dDLle_zSCSdkkGuQtXdK76pJg=&emci=b3263f5c-0912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4d767dab-a412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
A few weeks ago, I heard some of the most compelling testimony I’ve ever heard in the Senate Judiciary Committee. A young woman from Texas almost lost her life when she was denied abortion care during a miscarriage. She had to be near death to get the care she needed.
The United States of America is a country founded on the idea of freedom, and yet the GOP is hellbent on taking away our most fundamental choices about our bodies, health, and families. And they don’t seem concerned about who is endangered — or loses their life — because of it.
**[One year after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , Democrats are more committed than ever before to protecting Americans’ reproductive rights. Sign the petition now to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65328885/413115807/-1794708744?refcode=dd_em_230624_1_t1_a&ms=dd_em_230624_1_t1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc2N2RhYi1hNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WC9DxYzyK9q4NOVEM3dDLle_zSCSdkkGuQtXdK76pJg=&emci=b3263f5c-0912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4d767dab-a412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**** ****
********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65328888/413115809/-1794708744?refcode=dd_em_230624_1_t1_a&ms=dd_em_230624_1_t1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc2N2RhYi1hNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WC9DxYzyK9q4NOVEM3dDLle_zSCSdkkGuQtXdK76pJg=&emci=b3263f5c-0912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4d767dab-a412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)********

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Hawley’s latest hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This guy is a total fraud.
#
Peter — here’s the latest hypocrisy from Josh Hawley:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34541?refcode=em20230624-3309&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3309%2E614464%2ErhDkBR)
**This guy is a total fraud.** He’s willing to do and say whatever it takes to accumulate more power for himself while letting massive corporations continue to gut our communities and undermine our democracy.
We can’t let him keep getting away with it.
**Lucas Kunce is building the grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs.** He’s on a mission to fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country by taking back power for everyday working people — not the giant corporations and corrupt elites that have spent decades tearing up our country.
We need your help to get this message in front of voters and continue exposing Josh Hawley for the fraud he is. But the only way we’ll be able to do that is with a flood of grassroots support from real people just like you. **So Peter:**
**[Will you add your first donation right now so we’ll have the resources to reach voters with Lucas’ message and replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate next year? clean_body: This guy is a total fraud. Peter — here’s the latest hypocrisy from Josh Hawley: This guy is a total fraud. He’s willing to do and say whatever it takes to accumulate more power for himself while letting massive corporations continue to gut our communities and undermine our democracy. We can’t let him keep getting away with it. Lucas Kunce is building the grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs. He’s on a mission to fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country by taking back power for everyday working people — not the giant corporations and corrupt elites that have spent decades tearing up our country. We need your help to get this message in front of voters and continue exposing Josh Hawley for the fraud he is. But the only way we’ll be able to do that is with a flood of grassroots support from real people just like you. name: Shontel Brown
subject: Things are different without Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Show that we’re still fired up for federal abortion protections
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65329507/413118046/-1734261590?refcode=EM_PET_230624Roe_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODMxNGE3Ni1hNjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ths5pdzG1GvGy_4vN1WJN7VJs_jEbs29u0Trsa3VVpY=) Can you believe, Peter, it's already been a year?

The Supreme Court’s decision last year in _Dobbs v. Jackson_ overturned our constitutional basis for abortion protections. It was a massive blow to our reproductive freedoms.

Without federal protections, Republican legislatures have seized this opportunity to restrict abortion. **Right here in Ohio, they passed one of the most restrictive abortion bills in the country,** putting the lives of countless women at risk.

Women saw this for what it was, a blatant overreach by the GOP to restrict our rights. In the 2022 midterms, women fought back and defeated the GOP’s predicted red wave. But, Peter, Ohio Republicans haven’t learned anything and are still coming after our rights.

Ohio Republicans are working to undermine a reproductive rights amendment to the state constitution. GOP-controlled states around the country are still working to restrict our rights. We need federal action to stop the GOP’s attacks.

[**_In the year since Roe was overturned, we’ve seen firsthand why federal abortion protections are so important. Will you sign my petition demanding that Congress act to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, codifying reproductive rights into federal law?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65329508/413118047/593891301?refcode=EM_PET_230624Roe_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODMxNGE3Ni1hNjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ths5pdzG1GvGy_4vN1WJN7VJs_jEbs29u0Trsa3VVpY=&emci=db314a76-a612-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e8314a76-a612-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65329509/413118048/593891301?refcode=EM_PET_230624Roe_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODMxNGE3Ni1hNjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ths5pdzG1GvGy_4vN1WJN7VJs_jEbs29u0Trsa3VVpY=&emci=db314a76-a612-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e8314a76-a612-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) We're in this together,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65329510/413118049/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230624Roe_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_biobox&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODMxNGE3Ni1hNjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ths5pdzG1GvGy_4vN1WJN7VJs_jEbs29u0Trsa3VVpY=)

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: A year since Roe fell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This New York abortion fund needs our help.
#
It’s been exactly one year since the Supreme Court struck down the federal right to abortion.
Abortions have been fully banned in 14 states. In New York, the NY Abortion Access Fund has seen its operating costs quadruple in the last year as it provides support to people from 29 different states traveling to receive abortion care.
**It’s high time we codify Roe.** Outlawing abortions won’t make them go away — it only makes them dangerous and expensive.
[While we put pressure on Congress to act, if you’re able, please make a contribution to the NY Abortion Access Fund — a fund helping those who need access to abortion care, regardless of where they live or how much money they make. 100% of your donation will go to this grassroots-supported organization.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/20270?refcode=em20230624-4525-&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/20270?refcode=em20230624-4525-&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw)**
We’re focused on supporting local, on-the-ground abortion funds that help arrange and pay for abortion care for patients who need it. These funds also help pay for transportation and lodging for patients who have to travel hours — sometimes crossing state lines — just to access health care.
**Since last June, you have helped us to raise $578,615.36 for abortion funds** in Texas, Michigan, Mississippi, and other states where access has been whittled away almost entirely.
[Can you stand with us again today and make a contribution to keep abortion safe and accessible? Your donation will go directly to a local abortion fund that needs support →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/20270?refcode=em20230624-4525-&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw)
**[Contribute →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/20270?refcode=em20230624-4525-&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw)**
With resolve,
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw)
---|---|---
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4525%2E2526796%2EhN1xqw). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

clean_body: We're fired up, Peter | | BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight" = Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm. There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – and he knows it. Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred. We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. body:
It's been one year since the Supreme Court's devastating decision

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65329723/413118984/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_DBW_5_Actives_TESTB_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNlZTJlZmUtYTcxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a9KLmUTBN2LvX6aVsljMl-cE3LxvxCgyxr5o_1tTIxI=)
Peter,

Healthcare is a basic human right. As a trauma surgeon, denying any patient the care they need is indefensible. Yet for millions of patients and doctors across the country, the freedom to make life-altering medical decisions has been taken away by GOP politicians.

In a landmark decision one year ago today, _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ , the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ and gutted fifty years of federal protections for reproductive healthcare. Ending the constitutional right to abortion paved the way for broader attacks on reproductive rights, with state legislatures creating new barriers not just for abortion, but for birth control access, doctors providing patient care, and much more.

Fighting to protect reproductive freedom is a major reason I’m running for Congress. I’ve seen how bad policy impairs patient care. We need more doctors like myself who know firsthand how important it is to expand healthcare access, not create more deadly obstacles. And that’s just the start of what we will achieve together, Peter.

But right now — I’m up against my biggest deadline yet. clean_body: Together, we’ll shake up the system and get our state back on track. | = = Peter, I'm ready to shake up the system as the next Governor of Mississippi. = Together, we’ll defeat one of the most unpopular governors in the country. We’ll restore integrity to our state’s highest office and put an end to the corruption that’s plagued our state since the moment Tate Reeves stepped into the governor’s office. We’ll save our hospitals and expand Medicaid in our state, because not only is it the right thing to do, it’s what the vast majority of Mississippians want. And that’s just the start of what we will achieve together, Peter. But right now — I’m up against my biggest deadline yet. I need your help, now more than ever before, to hit my $50,000 end-of-quarter goal, defeat Tate Reeves, and ultimately, shake up the system in Jackson. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. name: Kim Nguyen
subject: One year after Dobbs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Like many around America, I was shocked and stunned at last year's Supreme Court decision to strip women of their fundamental right to choose for themselves when to start or grow their family and have access to basic reproductive health care.

Today, I'm as infuriated as ever as Republicans across the country, including my opponent Michelle Steel, want to go even further and place a total ban on abortions nationwide, even in the case of rape or incest, taking women's healthcare back decades.

Michelle Steel wants people to believe she's a different type of Republican, but she goes to DC and votes for every part of the MAGA Republicans' extreme anti-abortion agenda — even against our basic right to contraception — and women are taking notice.

I'm committed to doing everything possible at the federal level to protect, expand, and enshrine into law affordable healthcare access that ensures every woman, regardless of zip code or income, has the inalienable right to choose.

[Will you join this fight by pitching in today? With your help, I can beat Michelle Steel and bring pro-choice leadership to Congress:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65330151/413120877/766646889?contactdata=ImM8AuuT6Swu+69COgtNMyf+QUIu/sAebj0YTXPbcXe+YW1za9uVfZ/52NWMac4mYF2W/SC/7vVIFPwHxo0gbQisLtuHVz0XTnlH5x/CosQ=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230624_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWY4NzE3MmItYTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CBy4-FffWcTlaUHZdHv6GlDb3c8KPRns3j67stVPvtc=) | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65330152/413120878/766646889?contactdata=ImM8AuuT6Swu+69COgtNMyf+QUIu/sAebj0YTXPbcXe+YW1za9uVfZ/52NWMac4mYF2W/SC/7vVIFPwHxo0gbQisLtuHVz0XTnlH5x/CosQ=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230624_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWY4NzE3MmItYTgxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CBy4-FffWcTlaUHZdHv6GlDb3c8KPRns3j67stVPvtc=)**

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Abortion access is still at risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | **Today marks the first anniversary of the _Dobbs_ decision, which repealed the abortion protections contained in _Roe v. Wade._ **

But the attacks didn’t stop there. A year later far-right extremists continue to attack a woman’s bodily autonomy and personal privacy. While reproductive freedom is still secure in New Jersey, 20 states have moved to restrict or outright ban abortions since this fateful decision.

In 2016, I ran for Congress against an anti-choice extremist with the promise that I would fight to defend the right to choose. As your Congressman, I have fought to ensure that every individual can make their own decisions about their health, and I won’t stop now.

I have spent my career fighting for women’s rights – taking action to protect a woman's right to make her own healthcare choices by introducing the _Freedom to Decide Act_ , as well as other legislation that includes protections for IVF, reproductive health data, and attempts to codify _Roe v. Wade_.

I firmly stand for women's reproductive rights and oppose any interference in personal healthcare choices. It's about respecting women's autonomy and ensuring their freedom to make decisions about their own bodies.

I will not stop fighting until we guarantee a woman’s right to choose and restore their right to privacy.

— Josh
---

Friend, My sister in service Rep. Cori Bush has been a fierce advocate for Palestinian rights in Congress, helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. Cori first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from tear gas. **Since then, she has been unafraid to speak the truth about Israel’s apartheid against Palestinians—even when it makes her a target.** [**Please split a donation today between my campaign and Cori Bush’s campaign, to show her you have her back as she advocates for human rights in the U.S. and Palestine.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKcT6GzsVXTkTNNEfjTunO76pUj6-ZdLDFKCNCWcuWmJAlur3dNrm8fUnWo2SYmMkslzS03IJ5TNhmqglR70pg79o3-aGOvcNzqXLRwqR4m59PjKY-ilc-rhBwJppzn9FoK6LIGCfYHaCl_Zpg-QE0EbbH1XJp-gGitHH6FaOk5Nvywp_VGN4AZo7D3P6qL0grJClBgRgEI5eGM3FX6am87MCtvuN6Kb1zHP_ovajyfQD1_Yk4Cnp1ztTpSDBoViEpDmWUxCNPKzY06K48ca2J20I7G6Xwnr14httAURDUwLH40hBV_A5Vfq2ebR51AldsanCyARsiAv587hfS_a7hDnfgyqoYBmCsM-exvefXjsvS_GY44gK43lzymgUS4ec6uHGO5hCE91QmSPMMsk0b_g/3xb/qj_N-V41QmSg-eWKPhXKKw/h1/anars4opay1gfJsaQb18hrDC_mP7KEIY1DrO776ZX14) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKcT6GzsVXTkTNNEfjTunO798dAEpJvqG3BSaEyOYKZiyezD8v3jyIfflOFoqOujeRJ5wtmHNjRAPzkfcC_SakJ1sdpzEwo0WstVrmfRHEciEeMCQaKtpee2axEVUSc-CvTIiSpcgYkAhLscCiOckeyUDS1LnuWbxz2uHc42nSQxi_kQQMdj_N61x2KZp5_kmYk6jrXhnnESn6WEugolhcOj2hwI3I95V1DSphl_z-tHQfOatoaPQ-SWuZXLvcOAo0-o-UhN8XbT-QfFuhVeC1Np-xRyi7lbyz1_bqE7Bld9eWw7gccnooXIZNqZpxNVR0WcmqIQlMxXiYXatB6QsZZ1L5JgG01JwGrnEIE0mrsAMjHbA9QIARYVuQj3ic7Oo5nqJpUTSw7wFMNVXI16oEPg/3xb/qj_N-V41QmSg-eWKPhXKKw/h2/I257xw5mBXqUC44cWfYQcquaVhoMu-qFr9Mds2UZVbI)

Like me, Cori Bush got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office.
As an activist in the movement for Black lives, Cori personally experienced brutal police violence and ongoing harassment by police. I’ve also witnessed and spoken out against violent police attacks on Black Lives Matter protesters in my district.
Unless we change the unjust status quo, my Black neighbors and my Palestinian family members will continue to face systemic racism and dehumanization.
**In Congress, Cori and I have advocated against ever-growing spending on police and military budgets, all while our communities are struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.**
Instead of investing in institutions that harm and kill people, we’re calling for investments in communities, to ensure that everyone can thrive. I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress for Black and Palestinian liberation, and to build a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being.

clean_body: Like me, Cori got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. | | | Friend, My sister in service Rep. Cori Bush has been a fierce advocate for Palestinian rights in Congress, helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. Cori first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from tear gas. Since then, she has been unafraid to speak the truth about Israel’s apartheid against Palestinians—even when it makes her a target. | Like me, Cori Bush got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. As an activist in the movement for Black lives, Cori personally experienced brutal police violence and ongoing harassment by police. I’ve also witnessed and spoken out against violent police attacks on Black Lives Matter protesters in my district. Unless we change the unjust status quo, my Black neighbors and my Palestinian family members will continue to face systemic racism and dehumanization. In Congress, Cori and I have advocated against ever-growing spending on police and military budgets, all while our communities are struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. Instead of investing in institutions that harm and kill people, we’re calling for investments in communities, to ensure that everyone can thrive. I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress for Black and Palestinian liberation, and to build a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much.
