body:
A year after Roe’s repeal, we’ve seen the reality of the right’s war on women.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65330798/413123157/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjRlZjQyNS1hOTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEzHWm-7_zHmGwtoVaJk1DlkVMLmEZtaKgTavtV-bi8=&emci=6517adf2-0f12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6b4ef425-a912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **One year ago today, the right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court overturned**** _Roe v. Wade._****This decision ripped reproductive health care from millions across the country.** In the one year since this decision, our country has read headline after headline about the reality of the far-right's war on women and the constitutional right to privacy. Women denied the health care they need in emergency rooms, some even being left to die. Doctors worried about being charged for doing their job or forced to flee states that have made abortion care illegal. Women forced to travel to neighboring states to seek basic care. The list of horrors goes on and on. **When it comes to the Republicans and their war on women, the cruelty is the point.** The party that claims to be "pro-life" is the same party denying women lifesaving health care and forcing them to bring children into a country without access to affordable child care, paid leave, or basic resources for parents – especially working parents. But I remain hopeful we can still make progress on this issue. Here's why: the vast majority of Americans support maintaining access to abortion. In fact, in the wake of _Roe's_ repeal, we've seen some states step up to protect reproductive freedom with record support from voters. We've also seen victories for the pro-choice movement in unexpected places. Take Kansas, for example, where voters successfully kept abortion legal in a deeply red state. Across the country, more than 27 abortion protections have been passed collectively by various states. I'm proud to be from Oregon, where we have the strongest abortion protections in the nation, but there are women in America who are not as lucky and have or will soon have their reproductive freedom ripped away by far-right lawmakers. **It's past time that we codify abortion access at every level. But we can't do it without expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate. That means making our voices heard and electing unapologetically pro-choice leaders up and down the ballot.** This fight won't be easy, but together we can defeat Republican cruelty and obstructionism. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Team, a year ago today, the Supreme Court issued its Dobbs decision, stripping away access to abortion care for millions of Americans.

While millions of women lost the right to choose in a matter of weeks, the overturning of Roe didn't happen overnight.

Anti-choice Republicans worked for this day for decades, blocking Merrick Garland, and stealing a Supreme Court majority.

The anti-choice minority has made huge strides forward in their crusade to strip women of a fundamental right — but this is only the beginning.

So we're not backing down. Democrats can't be afraid to do whatever it takes to protect reproductive freedom.

[**I will not stop fighting until reproductive rights are protected by federal law, but I need supporters like you in my corner to make it happen. | | It’s great to have you on the team, friend.

Mary Pat and I are so excited to be on this mission with you to restore **Truth** to American politics.

As a supporter of our shared cause, you are playing a critical role in shaping the future of our great country.

Americans deserve so much better from our leaders, and both Donald Trump and Joe Biden have let us down. We need leaders that will **inspire us, not embarrass us.** I promise that I will do my best to make you proud of this movement.

Listen here to what I said at my town hall shortly after announcing my candidacy for President:
---
| [ ](https://chrischristie.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3b914c82f8277858a0eba20&id=c0b48d633e&e=172a9e88c0)
---
| Together, we’re going to restore the truth and hold those who are lying to you accountable.

Stay tuned for updates and ways to actively contribute to our movement.

It’s great to have you on the team fighting for our mission!

Best,
---
|
---
| Chris

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: We will not go back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
One year without the protections of Roe v. Wade
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65331367/413125319/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJiY2IwM2YtYWExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KxYckatEPXTRjrSmBoedmvbybOEipVnZKcjFYqJaHog=&emci=61bc3ed6-d911-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a2bcb03f-aa12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

A year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , upending nearly 50 years of protection for a person's right to privacy, choice, and reproductive freedom.

Since this dangerous ruling, women of color, rural communities, people living paycheck to paycheck, and other marginalized folks have borne the brunt of the repercussions. People have been left with no choice but to travel hundreds of miles to the nearest clinic, struggle with long wait times, and deal with financial barriers.

**[Peter, I have always stood firm in my belief that access to reproductive health care is a fundamental right and that these deeply personal decisions should be made between a woman in consultation with their doctors. I urge you to join me in taking action today by calling on Congress to codify reproductive rights into federal law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65331369/413125321/-525677028?ms=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=dWloTPJw75FpKdXcVMx26SqAFFYhw0CVwWpOuUKO2aS2x8NPof4zrXqzgHkTDdkoVkI6W/bnLWPEXH8Pe0aBz52Ga0mm2Nwqa7WSWcqJCqH/BQVK5tM+uQKNSErVHMNFVOAFVHD7cE5B8ESAiY63TuXUi7cuSOuwE8KDs1gc/u4=&refcode2=a2bcb03f-aa12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJiY2IwM2YtYWExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KxYckatEPXTRjrSmBoedmvbybOEipVnZKcjFYqJaHog=&emci=61bc3ed6-d911-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a2bcb03f-aa12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

On our team, we say this: "Don't agonize. Organize!" Now, more than ever, we must remain vigilant and resolute in opposing any proposals that further restrict care options for women or jeopardize the health and well-being of individuals.

Across the country, Americans have passed legislation to restore and protect reproductive rights at the state level. And just this week, Ohio voters turned in over 100,000 petition signatures to put reproductive rights on the ballot!

Every day, people in Washington and across the country are making it clear that _we will not go back_. I will never stop fighting against these unjustified attacks on reproductive rights, and I will continue to support legislation that enshrines this essential freedom into federal law.

**[Add your name today to call on Congress to codify reproductive rights into federal law. Together, we can protect the rights of all Americans to make their own health care decisions, ensuring a future where autonomy and freedom prevail.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65331371/413125323/-525677028?ms=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230624_dobbs_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=dWloTPJw75FpKdXcVMx26SqAFFYhw0CVwWpOuUKO2aS2x8NPof4zrXqzgHkTDdkoVkI6W/bnLWPEXH8Pe0aBz52Ga0mm2Nwqa7WSWcqJCqH/BQVK5tM+uQKNSErVHMNFVOAFVHD7cE5B8ESAiY63TuXUi7cuSOuwE8KDs1gc/u4=&refcode2=a2bcb03f-aa12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJiY2IwM2YtYWExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KxYckatEPXTRjrSmBoedmvbybOEipVnZKcjFYqJaHog=&emci=61bc3ed6-d911-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a2bcb03f-aa12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

clean_body: One year without the protections of Roe v. Wade Peter, A year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , upending nearly 50 years of protection for a person's right to privacy, choice, and reproductive freedom. Since this dangerous ruling, women of color, rural communities, people living paycheck to paycheck, and other marginalized folks have borne the brunt of the repercussions. People have been left with no choice but to travel hundreds of miles to the nearest clinic, struggle with long wait times, and deal with financial barriers. On our team, we say this: "Don't agonize. Organize!" Now, more than ever, we must remain vigilant and resolute in opposing any proposals that further restrict care options for women or jeopardize the health and well-being of individuals. Across the country, Americans have passed legislation to restore and protect reproductive rights at the state level. And just this week, Ohio voters turned in over 100,000 petition signatures to put reproductive rights on the ballot! Every day, people in Washington and across the country are making it clear that we will not go back. I will never stop fighting against these unjustified attacks on reproductive rights, and I will continue to support legislation that enshrines this essential freedom into federal law. In solidarity, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

name: Kamala Harris
subject: The great aspiration of our nation has been to expand freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. | | |
---
Peter, For nearly 50 years, Americans relied on the rights that _Roe v. Wade_ protected -- the fundamental constitutional right of all people to make decisions about their own bodies. **Today, however, we speak of the _Roe_ decision in the past tense -- because one year ago today, the United States Supreme Court took away that fundamental right from the people of America. ** The great aspiration of our nation has been to expand freedom, but the expansion of freedom is not inevitable, Peter. It is not something that just happens -- not unless we defend our most fundamental principles. **The strength of our nation has always been that we move forward. We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. So I’m asking:** **[Can I count on you to make a $25 donation to Joe’s and my reelection campaign today? Together, we will build on the progress we’ve made and keep moving our country forward.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqTn1nB5X1rOxL7-i3KQqZ_wCAa2XScN-OPPqXwNKoi-UWWn2ZmG3x-kXUtrnhbeFjIkIrmxQlY2fP9eSbdRp0CqpRM_NzZrKTSAw6QZhNeYrnH0UxPTkJDsTvUsTl2JAysCQWKLNTPF5USuWpFzOeJ2gp0AOWG4wDZqhhALq7JTDvd8Qb76zDpnL2FfXRvl06LEHO55e-xFz7DAV-3-NcyNrYvRfK8Zik_wj-q3UhkI-j10zspXUhSHwfOR3shWjlKzd7e5rpSBhYBtKzr5i7EMlvGC1k7pZZYLGtNbIkC9dQxC_d-lIRau7P67DqQXrKkKbChEm_0nU9HPqKcj88qDWpU9pvgGaUxPzhHW_z97Z5XS1NLN89Pqa9VUq7m7h7UVfD8_Mf0I-aTbAkp1A5_tlQ25kfo3b7aaFCJh7V8HkkDLgWgRja08ft6tZ_IAdoGUSTjr3ylbfBvI4icdv-/3xb/ehIxC8bLQXaalh22EaF3XA/h0/ZLx-II7YTlrlIK4CNZCx6ubgO0uunX7A3qB2BqBDK6w) **

Since our founding, we have been on a march forward to fully realize our promise to complete the unfinished work of securing freedom and liberty for all.
But these outcomes will not just happen. It takes steadfast determination and dedication. The kind of determination and dedication possessed by some of our greatest patriots: Those Americans who fought a Civil War to end the sin of slavery, who organized at Seneca Falls to secure a woman’s right to vote, who launched the Freedom Rides to advance civil rights; and who spoke out at the Stonewall Inn to defend human rights.
**America is a promise. A promise we must all make real in every state and every community, in every state house, in every doctor’s office, and in every election.**
**[Make a $25 contribution to our reelection campaign today to ensure we can continue the work of making the promise of America real for everyone.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqTn1nB5X1rOxL7-i3KQqZ_wCAa2XScN-OPPqXwNKoi-UWWn2ZmG3x-kXUtrnhbeFjIkIrmxQlY2fP9eSbdRp0CqpRM_NzZrKTSAw6QZhNeX6uPrR6Cv_ZlxCYWPsRiSI5aS8p6kRSg_w_iSis1me2x1m92UZwZwRUi7nrJJGwznqV8aZvMpsrwsGBLq0pcRwb3vCW6YOe70OWdIn1OKG6XcmS611ieKGFC7hAdk7sM91aSs9R4wGNYx8dcF9fOR9CMuiTyZN2ajSf5V-c9G75K19hzr9I-rYCLwSQQH2UfYib5WK1-DOZYetIZT-MO_SL6J6rHxRps64-RLFvf4koSlTvEH5igR2I92jd4x9YaHaRpcUakOxNgpgwWV9PuWCoZ0FAZShOmEdb55riJvcgahw3lbjPwGuucDOYre0wiOOaFCGwsfBB8gOwKGOkUbvw3MQfLdbeHYDXQacQ_ZZJ/3xb/ehIxC8bLQXaalh22EaF3XA/h7/MLnFa0Pywy8tbezYC2QeyPkC0oykRKTEnmp17vrwR1A) **

clean_body: We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. | | | Peter, For nearly 50 years, Americans relied on the rights that Roe v. Wade protected -- the fundamental constitutional right of all people to make decisions about their own bodies. Today, however, we speak of the Roe decision in the past tense -- because one year ago today, the United States Supreme Court took away that fundamental right from the people of America. The great aspiration of our nation has been to expand freedom, but the expansion of freedom is not inevitable, Peter. It is not something that just happens -- not unless we defend our most fundamental principles. The strength of our nation has always been that we move forward. We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. So I’m asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Since our founding, we have been on a march forward to fully realize our promise to complete the unfinished work of securing freedom and liberty for all. But these outcomes will not just happen. It takes steadfast determination and dedication. The kind of determination and dedication possessed by some of our greatest patriots: Those Americans who fought a Civil War to end the sin of slavery, who organized at Seneca Falls to secure a woman’s right to vote, who launched the Freedom Rides to advance civil rights; and who spoke out at the Stonewall Inn to defend human rights. America is a promise. A promise we must all make real in every state and every community, in every state house, in every doctor’s office, and in every election. Thank you for your support -- today and every day. Kamala Kamala Harris Kamala Harris: Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. CC BY-NC-SA 2.0

# Hello,
---
| | Thanks for connecting with me! We will unseat Kevin Kiley in 2024! We lost the previous race because Millennials & Gen Z didn't show up. Let's build a movement! A fierce coalition, an overwhelming force for good. I don't like sales pitch emails about making political donations. I'll get straight to the point. I am planning several voter registration events to kickoff my campaign after the CADEM Convention. We desperately need supplies and promotional items. The initial amount I'd like to raise is $7,500. It's not much, but it will go far. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: 365 days later: The fight for abortion access continues.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
A year ago today the Supreme Court struck down the constitutional right to abortion, devastating millions of people across the country who desperately needed access to abortions.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65331963/413127608/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjAxODRmMC1hYjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcAiSWzMd6lXwcFCjfPO94kIEkWZ9iYc9wBgSv987Ho=)
---
Dear friends, A year ago today the Supreme Court struck down the constitutional right to abortion, devastating millions of people across the country who desperately needed access to reproductive care. **Since that dark day, abortion access in America has been in crisis.** In states across the country, people lost their fundamental right to make their own health care decisions, and we saw how it impacted the most vulnerable among us. As we watched the GOP celebrate this devastating loss of rights, it couldn’t be more clear that Republicans had been working towards this day for a long time. They are dead-set on rolling back our reproductive rights, and they have been working for years to lay the groundwork for a nationwide abortion ban — _which is why it’s no surprise that Kevin McCarthy and his extreme caucus attempted to pass an abortion ban on one of their first days in power._ **But as a proud pro-choice champion I stood with my fellow Democrats to fight back, just like I helped pass the strongest reproductive rights law in the country right here in Oregon.** **I will always fight to protect abortion rights and push back against efforts to put these decisions in the hands of the government because reproductive rights are human rights.** **[Now more than ever we need leaders who will fight for our fundamental right to an abortion in Congress. Is there anything you can chip in today to help me win my re-election and ensure I can continue the fight for freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65331964/413127609/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjAxODRmMC1hYjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcAiSWzMd6lXwcFCjfPO94kIEkWZ9iYc9wBgSv987Ho=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _ | _[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65331965/413127610/-1979597813?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_as_all-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjAxODRmMC1hYjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcAiSWzMd6lXwcFCjfPO94kIEkWZ9iYc9wBgSv987Ho=)_ | _[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65331966/413127611/-1979597813?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_as_all-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjAxODRmMC1hYjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcAiSWzMd6lXwcFCjfPO94kIEkWZ9iYc9wBgSv987Ho=)_

body:
One year ago today, Donald Trump’s far-right Supreme Court made the devastating decision to overturn Roe v. Wade.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332026/413127758/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNjZGJlMDktYWMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xkb2FlAaE9AXxXdH94YxH7qXTuDYPbhMuHZSfZcXPbU=)
Fellow Democrats,

Today marks the one-year anniversary of Donald Trump’s far-right Supreme Court taking away our freedom and destroying the nationwide right to abortion.

We have seen the devastation, heartache, and chaos caused by stripping the freedom of bodily autonomy from women.

**[The IDCCA remains steadfast in our commitment to fight for the right to choose. Can you pitch in $10 today to help us take back Congress and get _Roe v. Wade_ codified?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332027/413127759/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNjZGJlMDktYWMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xkb2FlAaE9AXxXdH94YxH7qXTuDYPbhMuHZSfZcXPbU=)**

As we fight to restore Congress, we also must continue to protect these freedoms in Illinois.

**[We have what it takes to keep Illinois a safe zone for abortion access and restore bodily autonomy for women across the country — but we cannot do this without your help. Will you pitch in $10 right now to help win the fight for reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332029/413127761/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmNjZGJlMDktYWMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xkb2FlAaE9AXxXdH94YxH7qXTuDYPbhMuHZSfZcXPbU=)**

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS: Major campaigns on student debt, medical debt, drug prices, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Bernie vs. Big Pharma | Medical Debt Team | Bernie Takes on
Amazon | Chicago Action to Raise the Wage | Virginia Victories | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

SUMMER OF ACTION

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8736?t=1011&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ][IMG]

Summer is in full swing, and things are heating up in the progressive
movement!

Our Revolution is in the midst of major campaigns to raise wages, cancel
student debt, end medical debt, lower drug prices, stop fossil fuels,
and more.

Our founder, Bernie Sanders, is going to the mat right now in the
Senate, leveraging his power as Chairman of the HELP Committee to take
on Bezos and Big Pharma in the fight for labor power and healthcare
justice.

As challengers arise against Joe Biden in the Democratic primary, the
President has a choice to make: boldly deliver for people and the planet
or alienate progressives and young voters ahead of 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8736?t=1012&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]Democrats cannot afford to side with the status quo at this moment.
That’s why we hope you’ll pitch in an extra donation to help us meet our
end-of-month goal and support our critical organizing work this summer.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

ONE FAIR WAGE CHIGACO

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8692?t=1013&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ][IMG]

Our Revolution’s campaign to Raise the Wage and End Subminimum Wages for
tipped workers is gaining steam state by state!

In Chicago, Our Revolution activists joined youth workers, small
restaurant owners, and dozens of city aldermen for a news conference
ahead of Wednesday’s City Council meeting to push for fair wage
legislation organizers have worked hard to get on the table.

Read all about it in the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8739?t=1014&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]Chicago Sun Times. Chicago Alderman and City
Council Floor Leader Carlos Rosa laid out the stakes of fair wages (with
tips on top!) and how it’s good for workers, customers, and businesses.

“When you put money in the pockets of the people that spend it, they
support businesses like ours,” said Jesse Iniguez of Back of the Yards
Coffee in Chicago.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8692?t=1015&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ][IMG]

And, thanks to the progressives you helped elect in Pennsylvania, the
Keystone State finally passed a $15 minimum wage this week - after 16
years at a stagnant $7.25 per hour!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8692?t=1016&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution’s campaign to End Medical Debt is taking off! Last week,
we flooded the CFPB with comments to take medical debt off credit
reports, and our work to expose the role of hospitals in the medical
debt crisis is paying off!

A recent New York Times story and a new report by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8737?t=1017&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]Human Rights Watch
are opening many eyes to how hospitals are raking in billions in federal
funding and tax breaks while failing to provide care to those who need
it.

This is why we’re organizing patient activists from our membership ranks
all across the country to demand action from Congress and the White
House and call out hospital chains, credit card companies, and anyone
who profits from this sickness in our healthcare system.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1018&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ][IMG]

Our Revolution member Mary Willis of Texas joined our meeting with Ro
Khanna’s team and shared her story of being price-gouged by a hospital
and sent to collections - despite paying her bill!

Another patient activist, D’Anne MacNeill of Arizona, said she beat
cancer multiple times, but now lives with her daughter after losing
everything - including $250,000 she’d saved up for retirement! “If you
aren't resilient, this medical system could kill you,” D’Anne told us.

These stories are painful — but more than getting angry, we need to get
active. Join Mary, D’Anne, and our growing coalition of patient
activists and allies to get involved in this fight. Our next meeting is
Thursday (June 29) at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1019&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]SHARE YOUR MEDICAL DEBT STORY
★ ★ ★

BERNIE VS. BIG PHARMA

Our founder, Bernie Sanders went to battle this week for lower drug
prices, and we’ve got his back!

Chairman Sanders is using his power as head of the HELP Committee to
block all health nominees until the Biden administration puts forward a
clear strategy to “lower the outrageously high cost of prescription
drugs.”

Bernie introduced his drug pricing bill in May and has been grilling Big
Pharma execs under oath. With PHrMA suing over 5 drugs set to be
negotiated under the IRA, now is the time for the White House to act
boldly.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/lower_drug_prices_survey/?t=1020&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]Our Revolution is bringing together a massive coalition to speak
out. Tell us how you or someone you know is being impacted by high
prescription drug prices and we’ll send it along to Bernie!

★ ★ ★
CANCEL STUDENT DEBT

As the rightwing Supreme Court stands poised to overturn Biden’s first
attempt to cancel student debt, Our Revolution is ramping up the fight
and calling for Plan B.

We’re joining US Rep. Ro Khanna to call on President Biden to use the
Higher Education Act to forgive $50,000 in student loan debt, expand
relief programs, and extend the payment pause.

President Biden’s promise to cancel student debt helped land him the
White House in 2020. He must now invoke his authority and stay true to
his promise.

Folks are sending in stories from coast to coast to show the real-life
impacts that will come from turning on student debt in the middle of an
affordability crisis — with interest!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/lower_drug_prices_survey/?t=1021&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]How would you or someone you love be affected by resuming student
loan payments? Speak out now and share your story!

★ ★ ★

LANDMARK LABOR LEGISLATION

On Wednesday, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8738?t=1022&akid=4396%2E5885482%2Esrsb6l ]Chairman Sanders got 3 bills through the HELP
Committee in a major push for landmark labor legislation in America:

1. The Paycheck Fairness Act to require equal pay for equal work.
2. The Healthy Families Act to guarantee up to 7 paid sick days for
every worker in America.
3. The PRO Act to make it easier for workers to form unions.

“At a time of unprecedented income and wealth inequality, we must pass
legislation which meets the needs of the working class,” Bernie said.

★ ★ ★

BERNIE VS. BEZOS

Our Revolution has been working with the coalition to Make Amazon Pay —
pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay for its damage to the
environment.

On Tuesday, Bernie launched an investigation into Amazon’s disastrous
safety record. As one of the richest companies in the world owned by one
of the richest men in the world, Jeff Bezos, Amazon should not be one of
the most dangerous places to work in America.

As workers fight to organize unions at Amazon, Starbucks, Chipotle, and
other big corporations - and as workers with Teamsters, UAW, and others
prepare to strike this summer - Our Revolution is proud to stand with a

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Bernie vs. Big Pharma | Medical Debt Team | Bernie Takes on Amazon | Chicago Action to Raise the Wage | Virginia Victories | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ SUMMER OF ACTION [ ][IMG] Summer is in full swing, and things are heating up in the progressive movement! Our Revolution is in the midst of major campaigns to raise wages, cancel student debt, end medical debt, lower drug prices, stop fossil fuels, and more. Our founder, Bernie Sanders, is going to the mat right now in the Senate, leveraging his power as Chairman of the HELP Committee to take on Bezos and Big Pharma in the fight for labor power and healthcare justice. As challengers arise against Joe Biden in the Democratic primary, the President has a choice to make: boldly deliver for people and the planet or alienate progressives and young voters ahead of 2024. [ ]Democrats cannot afford to side with the status quo at this moment. That’s why we hope you’ll pitch in an extra donation to help us meet our end-of-month goal and support our critical organizing work this summer. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ONE FAIR WAGE CHIGACO [ ][IMG] Our Revolution’s campaign to Raise the Wage and End Subminimum Wages for tipped workers is gaining steam state by state! In Chicago, Our Revolution activists joined youth workers, small restaurant owners, and dozens of city aldermen for a news conference ahead of Wednesday’s City Council meeting to push for fair wage legislation organizers have worked hard to get on the table. Read all about it in the [ ]Chicago Sun Times. Chicago Alderman and City Council Floor Leader Carlos Rosa laid out the stakes of fair wages (with tips on top!) and how it’s good for workers, customers, and businesses. “When you put money in the pockets of the people that spend it, they support businesses like ours,” said Jesse Iniguez of Back of the Yards Coffee in Chicago. [ ][IMG] And, thanks to the progressives you helped elect in Pennsylvania, the Keystone State finally passed a $15 minimum wage this week - after 16 years at a stagnant $7.25 per hour! [ ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution’s campaign to End Medical Debt is taking off! Last week, we flooded the CFPB with comments to take medical debt off credit reports, and our work to expose the role of hospitals in the medical debt crisis is paying off! A recent New York Times story and a new report by [ ]Human Rights Watch are opening many eyes to how hospitals are raking in billions in federal funding and tax breaks while failing to provide care to those who need it. This is why we’re organizing patient activists from our membership ranks all across the country to demand action from Congress and the White House and call out hospital chains, credit card companies, and anyone who profits from this sickness in our healthcare system. [ ][IMG] Our Revolution member Mary Willis of Texas joined our meeting with Ro Khanna’s team and shared her story of being price-gouged by a hospital and sent to collections - despite paying her bill! Another patient activist, D’Anne MacNeill of Arizona, said she beat cancer multiple times, but now lives with her daughter after losing everything - including $250,000 she’d saved up for retirement! “If you aren't resilient, this medical system could kill you,” D’Anne told us. These stories are painful — but more than getting angry, we need to get active. Join Mary, D’Anne, and our growing coalition of patient activists and allies to get involved in this fight. Our next meeting is Thursday (June 29) at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT. [ ]SHARE YOUR MEDICAL DEBT STORY ★ ★ ★ BERNIE VS. BIG PHARMA Our founder, Bernie Sanders went to battle this week for lower drug prices, and we’ve got his back! Chairman Sanders is using his power as head of the HELP Committee to block all health nominees until the Biden administration puts forward a clear strategy to “lower the outrageously high cost of prescription drugs.” Bernie introduced his drug pricing bill in May and has been grilling Big Pharma execs under oath. With PHrMA suing over 5 drugs set to be negotiated under the IRA, now is the time for the White House to act boldly. [ ]Our Revolution is bringing together a massive coalition to speak out. Tell us how you or someone you know is being impacted by high prescription drug prices and we’ll send it along to Bernie! ★ ★ ★ CANCEL STUDENT DEBT As the rightwing Supreme Court stands poised to overturn Biden’s first attempt to cancel student debt, Our Revolution is ramping up the fight and calling for Plan B. We’re joining US Rep. Ro Khanna to call on President Biden to use the Higher Education Act to forgive $50,000 in student loan debt, expand relief programs, and extend the payment pause. President Biden’s promise to cancel student debt helped land him the White House in 2020. He must now invoke his authority and stay true to his promise. Folks are sending in stories from coast to coast to show the real-life impacts that will come from turning on student debt in the middle of an affordability crisis — with interest! [ ]How would you or someone you love be affected by resuming student loan payments? Speak out now and share your story! ★ ★ ★ LANDMARK LABOR LEGISLATION On Wednesday, [ ]Chairman Sanders got 3 bills through the HELP Committee in a major push for landmark labor legislation in America: 1. The Paycheck Fairness Act to require equal pay for equal work. 2. The Healthy Families Act to guarantee up to 7 paid sick days for every worker in America. 3. The PRO Act to make it easier for workers to form unions. “At a time of unprecedented income and wealth inequality, we must pass legislation which meets the needs of the working class,” Bernie said. ★ ★ ★ BERNIE VS. BEZOS Our Revolution has been working with the coalition to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay for its damage to the environment. On Tuesday, Bernie launched an investigation into Amazon’s disastrous safety record. As one of the richest companies in the world owned by one of the richest men in the world, Jeff Bezos, Amazon should not be one of the most dangerous places to work in America. As workers fight to organize unions at Amazon, Starbucks, Chipotle, and other big corporations - and as workers with Teamsters, UAW, and others prepare to strike this summer - Our Revolution is proud to stand with a rising labor movement. Stay tuned to Our Revolution for ways you can help build worker power! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Progressives claimed important wins against conservative Democratic incumbents in Virginia’s elections on Tuesday, where Our Revolution member Rozia Henson pulled off an exciting victory and now likely heads to the State House! As a result, we’re going into the November election with stronger, progressive candidates on the ballot to safeguard the last haven for reproductive healthcare in the South and hold rightwing Gov. Glenn Youngkin in check. Our Revolution made thousands of calls into the state, and while not all of our candidates made it over the finish line, we made lots of connections with voters that will help grow our progressive movement in Virginia and beyond. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our network of Progressives in State Democratic Parties had a great meeting this week in which we began planning a role for progressives at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago next year. name: Mark Mullet
subject: Washington is leading the nation on abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Today marks the one-year anniversary of the Supreme Court’s devastating decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and rip reproductive rights away from millions of Americans.

Since first joining the State Senate in 2013, I’ve voted to protect women’s health and rights 100% of the time. In fact, I’m the only candidate in this race with a voting record on choice. For my wife, and daughters, and every Washingtonian, I vow to keep abortion safe and legal in our state as governor.

**_If elected, on day one as Governor, I will request legislation to codify the right to abortion in the Washington State Constitution. Washington must continue to have the strongest reproductive protections in the nation._**

For decades, Washington has led the nation in the fight for abortion access and reproductive freedom, and I’m committed to keeping us on the frontline of that fight, especially in the wake of the _Dobbs_ decision that has threatened the health and safety of so many.

[If you agree that Washington needs to codify reproductive freedom in our state’s constitution, please add your name today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332449/413129503/-1749386671?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_230624_1_1&refcode2=666867a6-ac12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=zWWhAgmWDME7l3mKf0R0yWyvsSf1PcB5vcPeJp3ONuO61KlNTkLod0/4x+3xMb0o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjY4NjdhNi1hYzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMojFj0SY702mrz44ZulDaeyiPEVOoOxjGOSViqIRqI=&emci=39186133-fb11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=666867a6-ac12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332450/413129504/-1749386671?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_230624_1_1&refcode2=666867a6-ac12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=zWWhAgmWDME7l3mKf0R0yWyvsSf1PcB5vcPeJp3ONuO61KlNTkLod0/4x+3xMb0o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjY4NjdhNi1hYzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMojFj0SY702mrz44ZulDaeyiPEVOoOxjGOSViqIRqI=&emci=39186133-fb11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=666867a6-ac12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**
---
Over the last decade, I’ve voted to protect reproductive healthcare workers from out-of-state prosecution, eliminate out-of-pocket costs for patients seeking an abortion, protect access to medication abortion, and more.

Whether it’s protecting pregnant workers, expanding access to birth control, or making sure abortion care is legal and safe – my voting record speaks louder than any other candidate in this race.

In the year since the _Dobbs_ decision, we’ve seen the havoc that some states have tried to push on our country, from 6-week abortion bans to limiting access to contraception. **That’s not the future I want for my daughters, and it’s not what I want for Washington.**

[Sign on to join me in the fight to keep Washington at the forefront of abortion rights – add your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332451/413129505/-1749386671?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_230624_1_1&refcode2=666867a6-ac12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=zWWhAgmWDME7l3mKf0R0yWyvsSf1PcB5vcPeJp3ONuO61KlNTkLod0/4x+3xMb0o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjY4NjdhNi1hYzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMojFj0SY702mrz44ZulDaeyiPEVOoOxjGOSViqIRqI=&emci=39186133-fb11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=666867a6-ac12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

Thank you,

Mark

|
* * *
---
Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous.

name: Movement Labs
subject: Not an anniversary to celebrate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
One year ago, the federal right to abortion was torn to shreds. We’re not done fighting back.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65332674/413130185/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_N_ML_90do_4_NG_A_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzE1YWQ0ZS1hZDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RMcSP35kthDVDVz0LWNJA54G098pGF4pM_vdAOX54kI=)
Team,
Today, we write you with heavy hearts as we mourn the official one-year anniversary of the overturn of _Roe v. Wade._
While voters have since stood up for reproductive rights **everywhere they were on the ballot** , anti-choice extremists in gerrymandered legislatures simply stopped putting them on the ballot. Across the nation, they have made destroying reproductive rights by any means their top priority, regardless of the horrific consequences.
But we will not back down from the fight for bodily autonomy. Here at Movement Labs, we strongly believe in the right to bodily autonomy and adequate reproductive healthcare. Our support for pro-choice candidates and the work of numerous pro-choice organizations in fighting for reproductive rights remains one of our core programs.
**[It’s countless grassroots supporters like you who make that continued support possible, team. clean_body: One year ago, the federal right to abortion was torn to shreds. We’re not done fighting back. = Team, Today, we write you with heavy hearts as we mourn the official one-year anniversary of the overturn of Roe v. Wade. While voters have since stood up for reproductive rights everywhere they were on the ballot , anti-choice extremists in gerrymandered legislatures simply stopped putting them on the ballot. Across the nation, they have made destroying reproductive rights by any means their top priority, regardless of the horrific consequences. But we will not back down from the fight for bodily autonomy. Here at Movement Labs, we strongly believe in the right to bodily autonomy and adequate reproductive healthcare. Our support for pro-choice candidates and the work of numerous pro-choice organizations in fighting for reproductive rights remains one of our core programs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = In solidarity, Movement Labs || Rapid Resist Action 5515 S. body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=179%2E552475%2EZUJDcH)
Peter,
One year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned nearly 50 years of legal precedent and ripped away a constitutional right that many women have known their entire lives.
We know that isn’t where this stops. Republicans in Congress have introduced legislation that would continue to roll back our rights — including our right to vote, LGBTQ+ rights, reproductive rights, and more.
Bob Casey is committed to protecting our rights, because future generations should not grow up with fewer rights than their parents and grandparents.
**[We can’t let Republicans retake the Senate majority and roll back the clock on our rights. Will you make a donation today to help us hold this seat and protect our rights?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230624-1?refcode=em20230624-1&refcode2=179_552475_ZUJDcH&akid=179%2E552475%2EZUJDcH)**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332750/413130535/1924984212?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzljMDRjOTItYWQxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YNqxllt_05DOhwTzu1EY3GDHKBVjcu572WmSQYnr8wo=)
Friend,

Today is the first anniversary of the ruling in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ – the Supreme Court decision that effectively overturned _Roe v. Wade_. It's almost impossible to believe that the rights that we have had over our own bodies for over 50 years have been stripped away for millions of Americans.

**As the only woman and mother in this race, I will tell you this:** I will fight like _hell_ to preserve the rights of my daughter and my granddaughter.

_It is very simple._ **The government has no place inside a doctor's office.**

The fact that my girls are growing up with fewer rights than I did and the women before me is sickening. My opponent, David Schweikert, signed the amicus brief urging the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe_ which has since opened the floodgates for the anti-choice movement.

Extremists across the country spent no time banning abortion in their states and beyond, and that includes Schweikert, who co-sponsored a federal abortion ban that would make no exceptions for rape or the mother’s life. He’s gone as far as voting to imprison doctors who provide abortion care and against protecting access to contraceptives.

**When I am elected to Congress, I will vote to protect our reproductive rights because it’s the right thing to do for my family and yours.**

**[Last year, Schweikert and 199 other members of Congress urged our Supreme Court to overturn _Roe_. So on the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned, I’d like to get 200 of you to sign our petition demanding Congress reinstate our reproductive rights. What do you say, friend - can you sign on today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332751/413130536/1023602997?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzljMDRjOTItYWQxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YNqxllt_05DOhwTzu1EY3GDHKBVjcu572WmSQYnr8wo=&emci=a094e4a1-ab12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=79c04c92-ad12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=626985)**

Marlene

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: One year since Roe fell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
Today is a monumental day – will you be a part of the pro-choice fight?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65332836/413130778/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230624Dobbs_NB_6_30DO_TESTA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDEwNGJmZi1hZDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rspvfbgcp2HxA1gnUVSEtR2k9svAM1WyJ6anIzwEo5o=)
Team,

I don’t like bothering you on the weekend, but this day is monumental. Today marks one year since the federal right to choose was lost when _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned by the Supreme Court. The decision was a devastating blow for the rights of hundreds of millions of patients and doctors across the country, and ever since, the GOP has used the ruling as a springboard for their continued attacks on reproductive rights.

But, the anger we felt one year ago today also spurred action on our end. I and so many other pro-choice members of Congress are fighting every day to reinstate federal protections for reproductive health care to safeguard against further attacks by far-right state legislatures. Friend,

Exactly one year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , stripping millions of women of their right to reproductive freedom. This has instituted an unprecedented and unacceptable level of government control.

We knew the _Dobbs_ decision would lead to extreme abortion bans across the country and cost lives. But the last year has shown that the implications of this ruling are worse than we could have ever imagined.

**The government has no place in our personal healthcare decisions.** Full stop. But it couldn’t be more clear that extremist House Republicans are hell-bent on stripping women of every last reproductive right.

**Our fundamental freedoms remain on the chopping block.** And with the national abortion ban still looming, we need to come together as a grassroots team to fight back against these continued assaults on bodily autonomy.

[**I hope you’ll join me in building up the resources we need to take back the House Majority from these anti-choice extremists and codify _Roe_ , once and for all. clean_body: Today marks the one year anniversary of the overturning of Roe v. Wade. | = Friend, Exactly one year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , stripping millions of women of their right to reproductive freedom. This has instituted an unprecedented and unacceptable level of government control. We knew the Dobbs decision would lead to extreme abortion bans across the country and cost lives. But the last year has shown that the implications of this ruling are worse than we could have ever imagined. The government has no place in our personal healthcare decisions. Full stop. But it couldn’t be more clear that extremist House Republicans are hell-bent on stripping women of every last reproductive right. Our fundamental freedoms remain on the chopping block. And with the national abortion ban still looming, we need to come together as a grassroots team to fight back against these continued assaults on bodily autonomy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. name: Artificial Intelligence Survey
subject: We need your input
body:
If you’ve ever used the internet, you need to answer this| | | Peter,you’re hearing it every day. The nation can’t stop talking about AI.

Americans across the nation are anxious about the impact it will have on our day-to-day lives, and the potential dangers it poses to humanity.

Many are wondering what will happen if we continue to let AI grow and learn from us _unopposed_.

We’re reaching out to concerned Americans to get their feedback on this pressing issue. **Would you support Congress if they regulated AI?**

name: Ret. SEAL Eli Crane
subject: Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdm76qnc0h9uh65c1tul5g7q1uvvgr0k86fgs5vg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj69pb0cdh2bs)
---

Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2b763h34g71sinv2m1vnv3fi8r2juk5d6rugla0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj69pb0cdh2bs "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH A PRO-TRUMP WARRIOR](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbo2terrc0728jqf4d1v2mas829pc68v4tf8i9po_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj69pb0cdh2bs)
---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zog4uigitvskd8iprvkskcja0kpn0kssgi8gb82g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdj69pb0cdh2bs "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

name: Colin Allred HQ
subject: did you see what Ted Cruz said about this race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight"
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/cruz.png]
Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm.
There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – and he knows it .
Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred.
We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, friend:
Please, rush $5, $10, or any amount you can spare to split between our campaign and Serve America so that we can compete with Ted Cruz's massive war chest. Every dollar will go toward our fight to flip Texas blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thanks for giving what you can to help us defeat Ted Cruz! Together, we can hold him accountable, flip Texas blue and defend the Senate.
Team Allred

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Did you see this article?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-cd18-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-cd18-email]
Friend,
Yesterday, we announced my campaign for Congress raised over $200,000 - just three days after I joined the race.
Houston Style was kind enough to reach out and spread the news of my campaign’s fundraising achievement and publish one of my quotes:
http://stylemagazine.com/news/2023/jun/22/amanda-edwards-congress-announces-over-200000-rais/ [http://stylemagazine.com/news/2023/jun/22/amanda-edwards-congress-announces-over-200000-rais/]
“We are grateful to be supported by a broad cross-section of residents who care about the future of our community. We need to extend the legacy of strong servant leadership in the 18th Congressional District by supporting a servant leader who will be bold, innovative, inclusive and results centered for the people,” said former At-Large Council Member Amanda Edwards. “Raising at this rate of speed this early is not the norm in an 18th Congressional District race. This is a strong indicator that we have the people, the momentum, and the resources to win this race.”
I couldn’t be more thrilled to represent Houston, and I’d be honored to have your support. Would you consider pitching in $27 to help my campaign keep its momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-cd18-email?amount=27]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-cd18-email]
Thank you,

subject: The fight to protect reproductive rights is far from over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
This fight is far from over.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65333652/413134396/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230624-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjlmYzJjYy1iMDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVrn2rktY4G1-Rpe_Pu_Bc6QIdGl7skZVRC4O3jDq_M=)

| Peter,

Today marks the one-year anniversary of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. It was a day marked with anger, frustration, and grief for the 50 years of precedent that protected our bodily autonomy, personal choice, and access to reproductive healthcare.

In the time since, Republicans wasted no time in challenging existing protections for reproductive rights across the country. But just as Republicans have become emboldened to restrict abortion, we have become emboldened to protect it.

This fight is far from over. One thing I am certain of is that 50 years of precedent did not come without a fortified movement to protect reproductive rights.

Peter, on this one-year anniversary of the overturning of Roe v. Wade, I want to make one thing clear: I will never stop fighting for our reproductive freedom.

[**_Today, I hope you can join me in showing the strength of our movement to protect reproductive rights by adding your name._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65333653/413134397/-1211999647?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjlmYzJjYy1iMDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVrn2rktY4G1-Rpe_Pu_Bc6QIdGl7skZVRC4O3jDq_M=&emci=9d9fc2cc-b012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ab9fc2cc-b012-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6681226)

name: =?utf-8?B?UmFxdWVsIFRlcsOhbg==?=
subject: The consequences of a near-total abortion ban are painful -- I've seen it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_062423_Dobbs&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_062423_Dobbs&amount=25]
Hi Peter,
Today is the one-year anniversary since the Supreme Court’s conservative majority decided to overturn Roe vs. Wade.
This was an outcome that anti-choice activists fought for decades to achieve, and now, as a country, we are left dealing with the ongoing consequences and devastating effects.
We see states trying to outdo one another by pushing extreme policies, from 12-week to 6-week to near-total abortion bans, leaving no exceptions for rape, incest, or threats to the mother’s life. Some states have even chosen to criminalize patients , along with the doctors and medical providers who dare provide abortion care.
We cannot and should not accept this as our new normal. I saw the deadly consequences of a full abortion ban when I visited El Salvador with a delegation of state legislators in 2019. During our visit, we met with the 13 women who had been incarcerated. These are women who were prosecuted after experiencing obstetric emergencies, including miscarriages and stillbirths. So, when extremist Republicans threaten to prosecute women for exercising their reproductive freedom, along with their doctors, this is the reality they’re fighting for: one in which our rights and freedoms are slowly chipped away.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_062423_Dobbs&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_062423_Dobbs&amount=25]
From my work at Planned Parenthood, to my fight for Arizonans as a state legislator, and now, as a future Congresswoman, I am unapologetic in my belief that people and families deserve to make decisions over their own bodies, lives, and futures. As an Arizona State Senator, I fought against legislation like SB 1457, which limits women’s reproductive choices. And, as the future Congresswoman of AZ-03, you can bet I will fight like hell to codify Roe into federal law and ensure everyone has access to safe and legal abortion. That’s the bare minimum.
We know this will be a tough and long fight, but I also know the people of this country deserve it, and that, together, it's a fight that we can and will win.
A ganar,
Raquel Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Today is the one-year anniversary since the Supreme Court’s conservative majority decided to overturn Roe vs. Wade. This was an outcome that anti-choice activists fought for decades to achieve, and now, as a country, we are left dealing with the ongoing consequences and devastating effects. We see states trying to outdo one another by pushing extreme policies, from 12-week to 6-week to near-total abortion bans, leaving no exceptions for rape, incest, or threats to the mother’s life. Some states have even chosen to criminalize patients , along with the doctors and medical providers who dare provide abortion care. We cannot and should not accept this as our new normal. I saw the deadly consequences of a full abortion ban when I visited El Salvador with a delegation of state legislators in 2019. During our visit, we met with the 13 women who had been incarcerated. These are women who were prosecuted after experiencing obstetric emergencies, including miscarriages and stillbirths. So, when extremist Republicans threaten to prosecute women for exercising their reproductive freedom, along with their doctors, this is the reality they’re fighting for: one in which our rights and freedoms are slowly chipped away. [] From my work at Planned Parenthood, to my fight for Arizonans as a state legislator, and now, as a future Congresswoman, I am unapologetic in my belief that people and families deserve to make decisions over their own bodies, lives, and futures. As an Arizona State Senator, I fought against legislation like SB 1457, which limits women’s reproductive choices. And, as the future Congresswoman of AZ-03, you can bet I will fight like hell to codify Roe into federal law and ensure everyone has access to safe and legal abortion. That’s the bare minimum. We know this will be a tough and long fight, but I also know the people of this country deserve it, and that, together, it's a fight that we can and will win. A ganar, Raquel Terán DONATE [] [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District. For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children. She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [] Terán for Congress PO Box 1041 Glendale, AZ 85311 United States Paid for by Terán for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Friend,

One year ago today, 5 far-right judges on the Supreme Court upended 50 years of legal precedent, forever altering the fundamental right to reproductive freedom.

**In the year since the _Dobbs_ decision**, far-right state legislatures across the country have passed into law horrifically cruel and draconian bans on abortion, reproductive healthcare, forcing patients to carry nonviable pregnancies to term.

**Through all of the darkness, there is still hope though.** Polling shows that reproductive choice is approved by an overwhelming majority of Americans, approval ratings for the Supreme Court are at historic lows, and in deep-red states like Montana, voters have voted down draconian laws that would limit reproductive healthcare and access to abortion.

clean_body: | | | | Today marks one year in a post-Roe world. On June 24, 2022, the U.S. the Supreme Court, led by right-wing-extremists, struck down Roe v. Wade and gave states almost unlimited power to ban abortion in its decision in the case Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization.** And many states have done just that. = Fifteen states – including Idaho, Georgia, Missouri, Texas, Wisconsin, and more – have full bans in place. And MAGA Republicans are even more brazen in their attempts to undermine abortion rights in every state. As soon as Roe was overturned, anti-choice extremists in the Senate started clamoring for a nationwide ban. = Jacky and Tammy won't give an inch in this fight; that's why the anti-choice fringe has named them top targets. = Since Roe was overturned last year, Senator Rosen has fought to have the VA lift restrictions on abortion care for veterans and eligible dependents. And Senator Baldwin authored the Women's Health Protection Act to restore reproductive rights for millions of Americans living in states with abortion bans. Our movement can't fight for abortion rights without Senator Jacky Rosen and Senator Tammy Baldwin. = Onward! Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Senator Jacky Rosen, Senator Tammy Baldwin, and the Blue Wave Project instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
Will you pitch in ahead of our deadline on June 30? | | |

| | June 30 marks our first FEC deadline since we launched this campaign. What’s that mean? After that, we’ll have to publicly report how much money this grassroots team has raised – our first chance to really size things up and see how ready we are to build a campaign that can compete for the long haul. **This is a big fundraising deadline! So I'm asking you personally:** **Will you split a $10 donation between the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and my reelection campaign today?** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Joe Biden and DLCC's Grassroots Victory PAC.

Grassroots supporters just like you helped elect Kamala, me, and Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. And I’m so proud of the incredible progress we’ve made together.
We’ve helped create a record 13 million new jobs – with more jobs created in two years than any president has ever created in four.
We passed a once-in-a-generation infrastructure law, building bridges to connect our nation.
We’re lowering costs for working families, combating climate change, and making big corporations pay their fair share.
_But our work to build a better America is far from over._
**My friends at the DLCC and I are counting on your support so we can elect Democrats up and down the ticket in every corner of the country.**
[Split a $10 donation between the DLCC and my reelection campaign ahead of our June 30 deadline.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yL3CVsFdvppaiKa7AmChaWWtnMPLSKY-6UmbzA7kW2Vb2nlsOzCSPMMlSlmHWYXA3k-3uNYwDAnDpJML2DRNfBufbcFLT9MKqNZsf0nAgbUKyBX4o0FhgVnoIoh2ksvYSdJd5R3IY8FdOsmYnWQsDAqDoDqF_HOdsoT1u9gJMqIvJXhDIUUO832qxt8h_VEZhcJUEtRUrbPXLjOd8GhOKizR1wRFEmmtvra28y8NW6SYtvns48jz7sDXPfr5ejfO_SLSs_EqSI8m1QnLD68lrZ5leoAGmxq8JrZgKSPgbUrTbLuOKRdzHtxknvX5-U8B4x548IiLIaQOJqMEh2JuQTB3yQnZw7Bi_muuXH9nWNDG03vnJ08SdO5DMAsGXmjpdsaoA7shP0hqNvfBnotAnhMuRoxDBdbYgVIp3H7Y_c9jYmzb5dqFtPOEjQxvrV3rHs-DuEeZAkY6zNifWs15SE/3xb/IuBpDvauS3aGZS5NcDEeyg/h5/LiAxKNZD75bOQaeCwT0RhlLGsmon-WjolqrjOhZUEA8)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: On the one-year anniversary of Dobbs v. Jackson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’ll never stop fighting to protect and defend our fundamental rights.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=453%2E35263%2ESfXmT3)
Peter, today marks the one-year anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs v. Jackson_ decision, which rolled back decades of protections for abortion access by overturning _Roe v. Wade._ **I’m still furious and heartbroken. But I promise you this: I am never ever going to give up on fighting for reproductive rights for every single person in this country.** In the time since the radical SCOTUS decision, I reintroduced the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , which would codify reproductive rights into federal law. We also protected our Democratic Senate Majority, reelecting my pro-choice colleagues in the U.S. Senate across the country. And right here in Wisconsin, we sent Janet Protasiewicz to the state Supreme Court instead of an anti-abortion candidate. But there’s more work to do. Wisconsin is held to an extreme law from 1849 banning most abortions. And far-right politicians across the country are supporting total abortion bans (including some of my potential opponents in my Senate race next year!). **Peter, we have a lot of hard work ahead to restore and protect abortion access. But I’ll never stop fighting to protect and defend our fundamental rights.** One way you can help today, on the one-year anniversary of _Dobbs v. Jackson_ , is by supporting organizations working to help folks get the reproductive care they need, like the Women's Medical Fund — an organization helping fund abortions and providing support for patients in Wisconsin. **[So if you can, please consider making a contribution to the Women’s Medical Fund today. 100% of your donation will go to this organization to support abortion care for patients who need it.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-wmf.SHCpGm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=453%2E35263%2ESfXmT3)** | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-wmf.SHCpGm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=453%2E35263%2ESfXmT3)
---
I won't stop fighting to defend reproductive rights — no matter how difficult the battle.
Thank you,
Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=453%2E35263%2ESfXmT3) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=453%2E35263%2ESfXmT3)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=453%2E35263%2ESfXmT3) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=453%2E35263%2ESfXmT3)

name: Cori Bush
subject: [signatures needed] Protect access to medication abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I’ll keep pushing for reproductive justice. | |
---
Peter, Today marks one year since the far-right Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and stripped millions of people of their right to safe, legal, and accessible abortion care. **Within minutes of this far-right extremist Supreme Court decision, my state of Missouri became the first state to outlaw abortion outright**. More states followed, and Republicans have since tried to lay the groundwork for a national abortion ban. These are attacks on our bodily autonomy, as well as class warfare and white supremacy at work. Black women, LGBTQ+ people, low-income communities, and others who are already marginalized have been disproportionately harmed. As someone who has received abortion care, I will keep doing all I can to protect people’s bodily autonomy and reproductive rights. **That’s why I introduced the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ , which would ensure that people seeking abortion care can always access medication abortion through telehealth and certified pharmacies, including mail-order pharmacies. ** [**Can you sign on today as a grassroots co-sponsor of the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_? The bill is a critical first step to protect what remaining access exists to safe and effective reproductive healthcare in a post-_Roe_ world.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QAq8aZFYTqg6d2QJwFOxuJI4e4TiYvw-uu-ylBzW-FoioMounDe31bILP3gq9IfxdKwzRcFptteGnyb3NMFmJR3UXh4a3nViCCvP2qADj4aVtZDMzK85720oaKosGu3QYLaJGYI3vVtDCBLL3KYHeF7uCWOZiY5MQRr9stLSumawQiaGPRpti5Lumos9-GQO80IouAaW_mqUzWhW0utMRkM3PAoonwZj6DdxPf7Pjsl5jIE9kGOkPHDLXZq6c-OvmBE2Prgr4Gh-evzdToTwTJRsU3B1Ag4Xh9C4KLUmMyV_BxdVh4KH1YlJup414OsPh/3xb/gk-z7d_ERJuxWXKiOcSHjg/h0/WfU4kWmNBbJSoevqcAmViWh4ySpJsW9XgLKFm6nx6bU)**** **[SIGN TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QAq8aZFYTqg6d2QJwFOxuJI4e4TiYvw-uu-ylBzW-FoioMounDe31bILP3gq9IfxdJgpi3dsR5iorkY1kIPWD5_4hSopRKoK22avsLaK_at9OoYO6cgHRQ7YdTbgYRBIM3ivIcJWQCgMPH-JLUto9ThpxmPSFJarfmbVYhO_LsWb-Gq4OH36c8NSHdg4KzSp5_R6jGn9YEjadMYb3Zjwtd76jQtEvCg5eB78eJsJ6-_uSzoQgkBK0iyyiBJ3UuMmOq_mpFvAVMXB_UH5-yS_E7eFs9NKx0GQvnPhCPaRFeseNra7ivgvoZHAfKQ1Gj_Wv/3xb/gk-z7d_ERJuxWXKiOcSHjg/h1/oQPnJq2TN3j6IdUGtqBD6wfqTVKZjFPGdG1acYDIZAk)** For over 20 years, medication abortion has proven to be safe and effective. It now accounts for over half of all abortions in the United States. Evidence has shown that abortion pills can be prescribed to patients without an in-person appointment, and can be sent through the mail for people to take safely and effectively in their own homes. But extremist Republican lawmakers have sought to block access to medication abortion and GOP-led states have imposed restrictions. **The _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ expands access to medication abortion services outside of clinic, hospital, and medical office settings. This removes barriers to care for patients with less income, including financial burdens associated with travel, arranging childcare, and taking time away from work. ** I’ve personally experienced barriers to getting the abortion care I needed. And I’ve seen up close how Black women are treated by our healthcare system and the challenges we face in accessing abortion care. In 1973, the year the Supreme Court first ruled on _Roe v. Wade_ , the leading cause of death for Black women was sepsis from unsafe abortions. Black maternal mortality has been on the rise in the U.S. even before _Roe_ was overturned, so we need health equity more urgently than ever. Congress has a responsibility to address the longstanding gaps in sexual and reproductive healthcare that existed even while _Roe_ was in place -- particularly the inadequate access and quality of reproductive care for Black, brown and other marginalized communities. That’s why I’ve introduced a number of important bills to secure reproductive justice, including the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_. [**Please sign on today as a grassroots co-sponsor of the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QAq8aZFYTqg6d2QJwFOxuJI4e4TiYvw-uu-ylBzW-FoioMounDe31bILP3gq9IfxdUdRd9zoDTTjjzpmX0n1gRcND4UKRm_XNObk3T3NUCgB0EBfl-Lhlox1ASd5Sf1Gy6aY8mT-pAj6YKOcio7cYEnKL_3VbDiuflzhh-qmaZWN-81zZPiButISbUt5xlBwVsMJRzGkVvSaoQWA4jR-7dbYrFdVRNxkdxVNOx9b1hBFaGSUxx2lla_uTA4iEmPQDR_T0vPRZFdDs0utD2_UzlZYZtZ3CUa4BLN6AwSOw8iXhiQfqSY3coCmNjLILJyfF/3xb/gk-z7d_ERJuxWXKiOcSHjg/h2/Oo-6JlnloLxwhzQFBXDfzk1cLLg6N0H14kvgWFTjsQM)**** Thank you for taking action. Everyone should be able to choose if and when they become a parent, and have the ability to raise children in communities that are safe and sustainable. I will continue doing everything I can to create a society that protects our right to bodily autonomy and that nurtures our families. [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlVQJOrztnCQ3DRnwta1VT4zAyRF1BGDW7lKKL_7OROx7gFoIqrxBwMjHxiFQme3RV_vMITpOiBpTQ0BSaZ8pCbYR6wrqUksvzq767yffepXyWbcaP2ILFZiM8qRR7oAQ-o3kiUm_s5yHcWpBETCihnHoVZq8K4TMOTZBNMteaPWlDlO5NFEMxuACBJ-smVK1_H3Gw-7ytm5lAnrGvRHsAnOR_l7puzx0V97wTy_u-OVaSdbgANgF-3N_1_0OHTkwaqgi9gQOED4ywFj_-KXBDpr36-kNyfrSuR1NSqpFkCKnbXFZoH8P_P4NzP30GIKxu7U07o6FakBl58ZPfGHA_M2juPeTsLkfu005gkt5znaZjbyno8k44QnMYJr5k0T5RvFq9MFfyPbjB0pk9O9TvzuEgbSZLlg7z6-_95tM53Jz6ZTgF8mnFJ2vWkdk0zV066ox3RF93rf8SRVTNQ50acqu3w7EH_g5puMVRjN_qrWJH1mszPa1cj6rCgLUbUG-2QWbjIM5Jplygpu10BaX2XkfNyYNx74y7lowUdeA7izUKV05OHN4Hkblf28or9s0pHQzNaVmKhbBzXDcqHYcrXxGQuh-5qGSdwuBS59U6-ng/3xb/gk-z7d_ERJuxWXKiOcSHjg/h3/vIYtZikOgG31wnVDO0SoATyp-1FeFO7__zBJ-M2vioQ) With love, Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zUH0Bd3Xj_UpXae4ZFbZqZkOvpvaTXNlP8gin4k5jfhcDtPIQs3po4DLY3ngAQ6uVjWEw_hzoQmUuhh3pJHSj-5yraQFU7tcCMSEPFNL06XKlcxcv6fYORjwnWMIN8ShawRnWK04crMUkdn_GLdngZU0sZmnXLAszZOG9x9RYzWlFQKRmn26AR2PwBkgRRgdh26SmD5blfxeIi2C3gh_jngz6FUjvj8a3jftle0yjtmuqaAq-xarLVck3B8IGltVytpBSjzeVh7CRp6Dh-95GyJ6TtXQWvXernT4dca8tpft-rT14-hqAnvar_jXSkmQoXEMI_jwSUJMZXJzHQy8E95pK4l3G0p1zb_Ur0Clq9iJDHay0QKR0v4eiC2YSGK80/3xb/gk-z7d_ERJuxWXKiOcSHjg/h4/4Q7IY0lSHqbPfye-TikAyZzqUck-cz6hOVInrwmFpx0) **

**_Failing to act now would be disastrous._**

**[So today, we’re gathering Democrats to sign our petition to DEMAND Congress abolish the filibuster and SAVE abortion rights. clean_body: We must act now. | With today's anniversary of SCOTUS's reversal of Roe v. Wade , it's past time to abolish the filibuster and codify Roe into federal Law to save reproductive rights. Failing to act now would be disastrous. | Peter, we are livid. Even though the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade one year ago today – there’s still hope, so we’re fighting like hell to save abortion rights, Peter: If Congress abolishes the Filibuster, we’ll be able to codify Roe v. Wade into Federal Law – and save women’s rights for generations to come!
