name: Hilary Franz
subject: My commitment to reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) **[https://hilaryfranz
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335549/413140784/-803653937?v=Pxlef0QnTk0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE5MDQyMDktYjQxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xaNDFtALWLZuwN1-EhNtJIn5h9LxBAONaBchpJhworM=&emci=ffc2e34b-f511-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e1904209-b412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312)
---
Peter,

One year ago today, we found ourselves in a changed America. The radical Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ stripped away a constitutional freedom that was law for nearly 50 years and handed over our health care decisions to judges and politicians rather than women and their doctors.

In one swoop, the Supreme Court took away a right that I and multiple generations of women have always had and always thought we would have.

On this somber anniversary, I wanted to share a personal message to all Washingtonians about how I’m committed, with every part of me, to defend and strengthen reproductive freedom in our state. [**Please take a couple of minutes to watch my message straight away.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335552/413140785/-803653937?v=Pxlef0QnTk0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE5MDQyMDktYjQxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xaNDFtALWLZuwN1-EhNtJIn5h9LxBAONaBchpJhworM=&emci=ffc2e34b-f511-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e1904209-b412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335554/413140786/-803653937?v=Pxlef0QnTk0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE5MDQyMDktYjQxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xaNDFtALWLZuwN1-EhNtJIn5h9LxBAONaBchpJhworM=&emci=ffc2e34b-f511-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e1904209-b412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312) **As your governor, I will ensure Washington remains a beacon of reproductive freedom, not just for women in Washington but for women in neighboring states, too.** I will stand against extremist efforts to roll back our rights, and I will prioritize new legislation that protects access to reproductive health care, especially for women in rural areas. And together, we will protect these fundamental freedoms that generations of women grew up with, are protected for generations to come.

Together with you in this fight and every fight that may come our way,

Hilary ** **
---

Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) **[https://hilaryfranz.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335556/413140787/-1036536034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE5MDQyMDktYjQxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xaNDFtALWLZuwN1-EhNtJIn5h9LxBAONaBchpJhworM=&emci=ffc2e34b-f511-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e1904209-b412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312)** Friends of Hilary Franz (D)

United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/1up9Bt7GLkWx7fRAZfwrqw2?unsubscribedata=jnVg3dw3sWii0b8zUve%2Fcy4EY5%2BIUQ75Gk%2F8t%2BwAkKDkYE1zXxUDGO%2FLmfccRnKoj3xmNydr0rDvqSn8c3lZRefdg6BT4C5AsrkDjeb1H543D9m3XhwmJ49QTudR%2FFGDoHlINryq%2B7b9KzGav5%2FEVkiJUoCORt1%2BcfDgEMWDhaLGAvyByfC%2BCxf1Uewi6hR5rLG%2FU34nErBVgZpolCed3iC174a7xyDNsm0JoB2WGB0HgvkPOWyG9AqZJHoqRxmwkJSoXWGnxABXNfOvCYCfFfP9RdG1vTrPtCbi18qgd9tlzTnYKUYKoudE7x%2BmTSn1n9OH9Df1ytraQyi0iZZ8nAv%2FRz359ZxAscnYXI65b5xGG4yBYF7FREdqk61U0F0%2BZr40DxiGMrq6V%2FlKXCXbAKlQpcXV%2Ffatm%2FLl%2BpEKopfhHN9gzIyhqoBESi28Oavx).

clean_body: | | Peter, One year ago today, we found ourselves in a changed America. The radical Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade stripped away a constitutional freedom that was law for nearly 50 years and handed over our health care decisions to judges and politicians rather than women and their doctors. In one swoop, the Supreme Court took away a right that I and multiple generations of women have always had and always thought we would have. On this somber anniversary, I wanted to share a personal message to all Washingtonians about how I’m committed, with every part of me, to defend and strengthen reproductive freedom in our state. As your governor, I will ensure Washington remains a beacon of reproductive freedom, not just for women in Washington but for women in neighboring states, too. I will stand against extremist efforts to roll back our rights, and I will prioritize new legislation that protects access to reproductive health care, especially for women in rural areas. And together, we will protect these fundamental freedoms that generations of women grew up with, are protected for generations to come. Together with you in this fight and every fight that may come our way, Hilary Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please .

name: Deluzio HQ
subject: Will you join Chris in the fight for reproductive freedom?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335622/413141152/-954707654?refcode=em_poll_2023.06.24_b2_dhq_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmZlMDk3Ni1iNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkfjQF6W0IqXN4o3Rcxpzr5v7xZrp02zEOH9Lmmwp3c=) Hey Derek,

Today marks one year since the Supreme Court ended the right to an abortion. Over the past 12 months we have seen tragedy after tragedy as millions of women and girls' lives are put at risk because of the radical right and their draconian laws.

_While it would be easy to lose our hope, today our team feels more motivated than ever to keep up the fight for abortion access._ But our true strength comes from standing together.

June 2023

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335672/413141192/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDkwNDIwOS1iNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vfy7NbGZ_QmRroimAYVl4Tdp1TQb98Az2MTe_41SbU=)

**Hi Peter, welcome to my political newsletter where I update you on our campaign and my work in Congress.**

This month we celebrate Pride – but this year, we must do more than celebrate. We must fight for LGBTQ+ rights, dignity, and our right to thrive.

With you by my side, I know we will succeed. Please read on to learn more about our important work!

– Mark | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335675/413141195/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230624_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDkwNDIwOS1iNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vfy7NbGZ_QmRroimAYVl4Tdp1TQb98Az2MTe_41SbU=)
---
* * *
_**Pride Month**_

House Republicans continued a national pattern of transphobia and anti-LGBTQ+ bigotry – Earlier this year, they passed a nationwide trans sports ban.

I was proud to lead the fight against this sickening transphobia. Not only did I speak out, **I also stood up for our LGBTQ+ communities by reintroducing the Equality Act last week.**

This monumental legislation is critical to the rights and dignity of LGBTQ+ people. I was proud to stand up for our LGBTQ+ community and I will continue to do so at every turn.
* * *
_**Inflation Reduction Act**_

Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act that we passed last August, 43 prescription drugs will become more affordable for Americans on Medicare Part B beginning next month.

I was proud to work with my fellow House Democrats to lower costs for you and your family.
* * *
_**Riverside infrastructure funding**_

I was thrilled to announce that $15 million in funding is headed to Riverside, California to improve our rail infrastructure. This funding will ensure a safer and more efficient transportation network for the residents and businesses of Riverside.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335678/413141198/656015310?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230624_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDkwNDIwOS1iNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vfy7NbGZ_QmRroimAYVl4Tdp1TQb98Az2MTe_41SbU=)
* * *
_**What’s Next**_

Summer is often a slow period for campaign operations, but I’m not letting up for one second. There is too much work to be done and too many people counting on us. **We must keep fighting for working families, veterans, and marginalized people across the country.**

So Peter, as we work to reclaim our House majority and fight against Republican extremism, your support is more critical than ever.

[**Peter, can you chip in $7 here to help me keep up my fight in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335680/413141202/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230624_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDkwNDIwOS1iNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vfy7NbGZ_QmRroimAYVl4Tdp1TQb98Az2MTe_41SbU=)

subject: A year without Roe
body:
We can’t stop fighting.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335735/413141310/-1773493304?&refcode=E3129-20230624-Dobbs-Image-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQ3NjQ2NmQtYjQxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LzY1-aT3G2Vm5b85SRXzPqW-_nxoZigGIYub5_EQlWw=) | Hey Peter, Today is a sad day. June 24 marks one year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and took away the constitutional right to abortion. Since the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision, we have all seen the devastating outcomes. Abortion is now completely banned in 14 states and many more have instituted bans as early as 6 weeks - before many women even know they are pregnant. This fight is still very real. If we don’t take back the House and the Republicans win the White House, they could enact a nationwide ban - including here in California. I’m really scared about this and I know many of you are too. We can’t allow these extremists to criminalize doctors for providing abortion care and take away women’s freedom. And we have to keep fighting to codify Roe v. Wade and restore access to abortion in all 50 states. This year, we should have been celebrating the 50th anniversary of Roe and all of the hard-fought progress to make access to safe, legal abortion the law of the land. Instead, we’re here - fighting to protect women’s basic rights to control their own bodies. I won’t give up this fight. If you’re still as fired up as I am over a year later, please give a donation to our campaign today. We are on frontlines of this fight here in CA-9. body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ff0b8f3cb004c20a5bfbb9c1cd596d2&_e=_9I738Hj2q8tE6sFmOD9TitRkKKO1-7mKTEXkh7u6gGxxqJA2Fm0QdqwDhC5CQIxlP1B9uxDkGUYs0YKXQSEN0cwQ8WGvtGXlOeA_BMzhgEggRLvkx97D9sRd4vWdSpy94SB3wQMag5cRAtn-LiJNcNHzrwz9_lLgAC9bL6syeGtGE-pGDKOYe7bGC0TgCFbuO6ZzBXFMAJsmMzZs8BnTYbQdU8LSYkQzUe77Gk7IAhNdyrgGvuVv1_6U5wcUa_Kxyy4pe5qzbTHmOzcM05A-A%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ff0b8f3cb004c20a5bfbb9c1cd596d2&_e=_9I738Hj2q8tE6sFmOD9TitRkKKO1-7mKTEXkh7u6gGxxqJA2Fm0QdqwDhC5CQIxlP1B9uxDkGUYs0YKXQSEN0cwQ8WGvtGXlOeA_BMzhgEggRLvkx97D9sRd4vWdSpyMX3KHjtQjCw4zquG1XjaQhDXIKLI9HiDOPHDjhOxdcTPeYoBqwDgcI04_LfhYaHb3fUhzcn9tdaOUvLbcehX1Lj8GyJV6gMbzBCho0EJBCVRkj187zEX9NhYW9eUl36OdlC5-A6QCvPWarUVA5wLow%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ff0b8f3cb004c20a5bfbb9c1cd596d2&_e=_9I738Hj2q8tE6sFmOD9TitRkKKO1-7mKTEXkh7u6gGxxqJA2Fm0QdqwDhC5CQIxlP1B9uxDkGUYs0YKXQSEN0cwQ8WGvtGXlOeA_BMzhgEggRLvkx97D9sRd4vWdSpyImyxj5QnBuqTB43MwTGu7rez6HNTULUYIo7-MACYBZsr_naV6UFnhQTPmEtafPUSe4caEPaQYr_zqUt4Bu2bsc9bV5uzosCxaSD5lEGNaHQZu1d8AnRd6mrddEHE9kdcZs-w5YfJcFeubK3fbUuKUQ%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Will I see you at Nashville Pride this weekend, Peter?🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Peter,
This year’s Nashville Pride celebration is taking place in the middle of a disheartening year for LGBTQ+ folks in Music City.
During session, many of my colleagues in the state legislature introduced a slew of anti-LGBTQ+ bills, including one that attempted to restrict where and when drag shows can be performed.
I have pushed back against legislation targeting same-sex marriage, trans people, and even access to books that feature LGBTQ+ folks. Let's not forget, EXACTLY one year ago today the U.S. Supreme Court put marriage equality under threat with the Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization decision—I won't rest until Tennesseans aren't discriminated against because of who they love or how they identify.
As a public servant, I have and will always decry racist, sexist, homophobic, anti-immigrant rhetoric and discriminatory policies and practices.
As mayor, I will honor and serve ALL Nashvillians, because Music City does better when we ALL do better.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Peter, I am overjoyed that so many beautiful people will be able to gather and celebrate at Bicentennial Capitol Mall State Park in our world-class city this weekend.
I hope that Nashville Pride 2023 marks a renewed commitment to protecting the rights of queer and trans Tennesseans—especially with **First Lady Jill Biden** making an appearance.
Peter, ensuring that Nashville is a warm, welcoming place where LGBTQ+ folks are able to live accepting, fulfilling lives is a top priority of mine. I want to deliver a Music City that is affordable, accepting, and safe by bringing every community into the fold. Can you help me make that possible by donating to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
GIVE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Thank you, and I hope to see you at Bicentennial Capitol Mall State Park this weekend!
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230624_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]

clean_body: [] Peter, This year’s Nashville Pride celebration is taking place in the middle of a disheartening year for LGBTQ+ folks in Music City. During session, many of my colleagues in the state legislature introduced a slew of anti-LGBTQ+ bills, including one that attempted to restrict where and when drag shows can be performed. I have pushed back against legislation targeting same-sex marriage, trans people, and even access to books that feature LGBTQ+ folks. Let's not forget, EXACTLY one year ago today the U.S. Supreme Court put marriage equality under threat with the Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization decision—I won't rest until Tennesseans aren't discriminated against because of who they love or how they identify. As a public servant, I have and will always decry racist, sexist, homophobic, anti-immigrant rhetoric and discriminatory policies and practices. As mayor, I will honor and serve ALL Nashvillians, because Music City does better when we ALL do better. [] Peter, I am overjoyed that so many beautiful people will be able to gather and celebrate at Bicentennial Capitol Mall State Park in our world-class city this weekend. I hope that Nashville Pride 2023 marks a renewed commitment to protecting the rights of queer and trans Tennesseans—especially with First Lady Jill Biden making an appearance. Peter, ensuring that Nashville is a warm, welcoming place where LGBTQ+ folks are able to live accepting, fulfilling lives is a top priority of mine. I want to deliver a Music City that is affordable, accepting, and safe by bringing every community into the fold. Can you help me make that possible by donating to my campaign today? [] GIVE TODAY [] Thank you, and I hope to see you at Bicentennial Capitol Mall State Park this weekend! With gratitude, Heidi Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill. [] As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves. Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment. Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote. Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream. Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Campbell for Mayor P.O. Box 330302 Nashville, Tennessee 37203 SUPPORT HEIDI [] Paid for by Campbell for Mayor Chip Forrester, Treasurer Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer Campbell for Mayor PO Box 330302 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: the latest culture war attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | **This past fall, New Jersey became the first state to adopt standards for learning about climate change in grades K through 12.**

Across the country, people are looking at New Jersey as an example on climate education – it’s one reason we’re consistently cited as having some of the best public schools in America. None of this should be political – it’s just teaching science. But the right wing school censorship crusaders want to strip it from our kids’ curriculum.

[Will you sign our petition to promote educational excellence in our best-in-the-nation public schools?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65335842/413141956/-265147064?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230624_PT_ClimateChange_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_Climate&refcode2=e61022be-b412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjEwMjJiZS1iNDEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o7S0nOyNrfI1zTgU5aJVoIcY5XPHPV8jRVuWYJQgTg0=&emci=dde14201-fa11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e61022be-b412-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)

On May 3 at the New Jersey State Board of Education, teacher Carolyn McGrath and other supporters of the new standards were outnumbered by right-wing extremists demanding the elimination of climate change in school curriculums. Members of Team “Protect Your Children” claimed climate education is a "_weak science_ ,” “ _very divisive_ ,” and “ _scary for little children_.”

In pretty much every school I visited as a member of Congress, kids would pepper me with smart questions about how to fight climate change. Some of their homes had been damaged by Hurricane Ida. Others live on family farms threatened by extreme weather. They deserve a chance to study a problem that threatens their futures and to gain the science and tech skills needed to solve it. **We shouldn’t tolerate outside groups (some of which are funded by the fossil fuel industry) coming to our state to dumb down these kids’ educations.**

Districts for Democracy is fighting to protect our kids from these culture wars, and we need you to fight with us. clean_body: | | This past fall, New Jersey became the first state to adopt standards for learning about climate change in grades K through 12. Across the country, people are looking at New Jersey as an example on climate education – it’s one reason we’re consistently cited as having some of the best public schools in America. None of this should be political – it’s just teaching science. But the right wing school censorship crusaders want to strip it from our kids’ curriculum. On May 3 at the New Jersey State Board of Education, teacher Carolyn McGrath and other supporters of the new standards were outnumbered by right-wing extremists demanding the elimination of climate change in school curriculums. Members of Team “Protect Your Children” claimed climate education is a "weak science ,” “ very divisive ,” and “ scary for little children.” In pretty much every school I visited as a member of Congress, kids would pepper me with smart questions about how to fight climate change. Some of their homes had been damaged by Hurricane Ida. Others live on family farms threatened by extreme weather. They deserve a chance to study a problem that threatens their futures and to gain the science and tech skills needed to solve it. We shouldn’t tolerate outside groups (some of which are funded by the fossil fuel industry) coming to our state to dumb down these kids’ educations. Districts for Democracy is fighting to protect our kids from these culture wars, and we need you to fight with us. Now, our New Jersey teachers need the resources and support to stand up to censorship and bring climate education to their classrooms. | | – Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. body:
Republicans call for a NATIONAL abortion ban
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-choice/?source=VPP_20230624_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=8664%2E878179%2EPwPJtn) One year after _Roe's_ overturn, MAGA Republicans across the country are ramming through EXTREMIST anti-abortion laws — **_and Mike Pence just called for a NATIONWIDE ban!_**

Our best chance of fighting back and stopping these horrific attacks is if we show MASSIVE approval for reproductive choice. **Please, we need 2,000 responses by MIDNIGHT:** [**DO YOU SUPPORT THE RIGHT TO CHOOSE?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-choice/?source=VPP_20230624_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=8664%2E878179%2EPwPJtn) | [YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-choice/?source=VPP_20230624_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=8664%2E878179%2EPwPJtn)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062423_Dobbs_Act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062423_Dobbs_Act]
Team,
It’s been exactly one year since the Supreme Court handed down the Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization decision, overturning nearly 50 years of national abortion rights.
In the absence of those protections, Republican lawmakers rushed to pass abortion bans across the country. Many succeeded: as of today, abortions are substantially limited or entirely banned in over twenty states.
But this is not where our fight ends.
Polling has shown that the overwhelming majority of Americans do not want lawmakers controlling their intimate medical decisions. Ballot measures attempting to ban abortion have failed in states like Kansas and Kentucky. And multiple state legislatures have flipped party control, giving Democrats the majorities they need to protect reproductive freedom.
On the anniversary of this decision, we must listen to the American people and recommit to passing legislation to restore abortion rights nationwide as quickly as possible.
That's why I've made it one of my top priorities to pass the Women’s Health and Protection Act (WHPA), which would finally codify abortion rights into federal law, guarantee equal access to abortion across the nation, and protect against any future challenges to our reproductive rights.
Can I count on you to take action today to pass the WHPA and restore reproductive freedoms nationwide? Join me by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor now. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_062423_abortion_dobbs]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_062423_abortion_dobbs]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_062423_abortion_dobbs]
I have been working hard to champion this bill in the Senate, but I need the grassroots support of people like you behind me.
My Republican colleagues have made it clear that they will pass a nationwide abortion ban as soon as they get the chance — despite the will of the American public. By signing on now, you can help me make the WHPA into federal law >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_062423_abortion_dobbs]
Thank you for being a part of this, friend,
Michael

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Shop and support with brand new Kennedy merch!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
You asked and we delivered! Check out our new RFK merch store today.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merch_store_launch_non_donors1&n=1)
---
Peter -- You asked for it and we delivered! We're thrilled to introduce our [**brand new Kennedy 2024 Collection**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqS50r0c3GmVoVWD6T1-QtOY&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merch_store_launch_non_donors1&n=2), chock full of everything you need to show the world **you stand with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.** The legacy media may try to pretend that RFK isn't [**leading in the polls**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6NS2bKpYnMmDAAaH_sla531WxGaNa80SX-imQAPRBu_V6-LBWDeAQjsFLwxUIDJ1_8RJaUi4cNBV7XLVqL4aAejxv2bXIt6yMOcdoEopsVwiI0mX6WqWe49X55r0kc85zXlDXOiffPx6FzAU8pfR-yDV_FE6dCO5COj4gOYrW7H2wbsoPR96lg_-LTlYNPVo&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merch_store_launch_non_donors1&n=3), but they **can't deny him** if we sport our support by the millions. So grab a [**Kennedy beach towel**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqcpC3Uu0TtfyErPHzkeABYjpaGxrDkmUAKx6jwMzpxWErMAdsQ1h-IHObqDwhHVaHQ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merch_store_launch_non_donors1&n=4) to **fight for freedom on the sand** and a [**grillmaster apron**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqcpC3Uu0TtfyErPHzkeABYgw1297gh5MpBGjPCD0BRbq4M_4e53To-eSg4q_tWs7tA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merch_store_launch_non_donors1&n=5) to **back Bobby at your summer cookouts with friends**. name: Tim Walz via Blue Amp Action
subject: I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in Minnesota
body:
We’re not letting this moment go to waste
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a2eeae0-8cdb-4ba1-9066-57922594d485/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, When Minnesotans swept in a one-seat Democratic governing trifecta last November by a margin of 321 votes, we came together and agreed on two things: First, our mission was to make Minnesota the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. And second, that we would use every ounce of our power to make that vision a reality. **In other words, we realized we had a one-in-a-generation opportunity to make transformational change, and we weren’t going to let it go to waste.** So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We became the first state in the country to codify abortion rights into state law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, banned the harmful practice of conversion “therapy,” made Minnesota a refuge for gender-affirming care, and enacted common sense gun reforms. We put Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy, passed a budget to give educators the resources they need to teach our children, funded essential projects to rebuild our roads and critical infrastructure, passed universal school meals for Minnesota students, and so much more. The forces of hatred and bigotry are on the march across the country and around the world. But in Minnesota, we came together to make a clear statement: That march stops at our borders. I’m telling you this not to brag (that would be very un-Minnesotan). I’m telling you this because I believe with all my heart that if we come together and rise above the politics of fear and division, every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. [If you are ready to embark on this journey with me as we look to defend and expand on our progress over the coming year and beyond, I’m asking you to join our movement by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22d975dd-3b5b-4ee9-b974-fbbd708ca53e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10371f11-fef6-43be-9173-5f10a034e61c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’ve always believed that the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in our state, and not just because we’re showing the people of Minnesota that Democrats are capable of delivering on the promises we make. We’re showing people across this country just how much promise is contained in a progressive vision shared by so many. We’re drawing a roadmap for 49 other states by doing whatever it takes to be a state that works for everyone. And we’re proving that not only can you campaign on compassion and foresight and decency, you can actually govern that way, too. **[Peter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2e1f475-885a-4594-b631-e43190a53ef4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ , if you’re with me, split a donation that works for you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us build this movement.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38b1ad82-2a7a-4a92-b62c-3096f63ccc0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** I’m grateful, Tim Walz
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa7a7d95-bd60-470b-be4e-c74d54b0a508/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/timwalz-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=9b7154f6-d10d-4ed2-9a81-84f1e49d981b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=9b7154f6-d10d-4ed2-9a81-84f1e49d981b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:

If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=d4392d912cfa46c4910f429d73eafd49&_t=3QL5jBmmp0MN2sOdsnJ1cTzuiUA36ERe2iHrxxUeDF-m1CVz9ADe3PmgP_PyL71-lT_ODLBqv4PPG3KUExiENOCoLyb4XGuNMhClwRmdOG0%3D)_.

Peter, Recently, I met with military folks in Hawaii, and a high-ranking official said to take this message back to my colleagues in the Senate...
---
**War with China is NOT inevitable. It** _**CAN**_**be prevented.**
---
My goodness, Peter. _[**Shouldn’t there be**** _someone_****in the government trying to avoid war with China, not thinking it’s inevitable?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4392d912cfa46c4910f429d73eafd49&_e=qyNyhTiOmKFt6Gbnty-9hcATzcEc25xAldXF6BGRp22uHuC2N-QuOCgANhL1eQ5Vf3bIdntMV-0jkeZQQWMn8bt3f1qV7tyAaAxU2g7XFlfnKkgyvZIf6vcMsQr94Yjzt-eFVLPm3yEtq4NIUdOlWFdRdVE8n4Djm0CSEU33koy1-G7nP_RaNP5yLkeRBoA2_kZBQZXS_8--qdOiUtJf9bjJFMJzQgAvSxYpSnmfNhIfJod5o07X0a_CKDw9IRohJMfywjAGkwS2BQZpHtl7IpmlrrPjTjGAm_n7FKHIn_R1skdHJDhjxVskyb2PphuNNLO78XTL7xtLg8dgluHVKxdFQ-EQoIUAI1J6rbZIR99npcdLJUngNWrmzmoSSFVL)_
---
[**PREVENT WAR WITH CHINA >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4392d912cfa46c4910f429d73eafd49&_e=qyNyhTiOmKFt6Gbnty-9hcATzcEc25xAldXF6BGRp22uHuC2N-QuOCgANhL1eQ5Vf3bIdntMV-0jkeZQQWMn8bt3f1qV7tyAaAxU2g7XFlfnKkgyvZIf6vcMsQr94Yjzt-eFVLPm3yEtq4NIUdOlWFdRdVE8n4Djm0CSEU33koy1-G7nP_RaNP5yLkeRBoA2_kZBQZXS_8--qdOiUtJf9Xi1s1uP2XW3TdFUu9VDmB03QQY-5hBXKxbhrxNSpU_v-Ge8z0V75IbreE-M6Lkfq2xNM79GrH5TbWFeoKSInCH_jMokElOXn-_LOpPcJb7BX5eXFmjIQUqLPnmo2dVooEG5-eAmmCPyFEE86xOn_ohT0GL2q1M8m1Ej2dlI68gs)
---
| | **_Globalist Democrats and Neocons have us inching closer to war with China. It’s because they’re ignoring our strategic decision not to tell Xi Jinping our plans if war should take place._** Every week, there’s some sort of bill involving Taiwan and China, usually with harsher language directed at China and a war plan. Here’s the thing my colleagues seem to forget... The more you talk about America’s response in specific scenarios, the less leverage you’ll have down the road. **Being strategically ambiguous isn’t the greatest solution to avoiding war with China, but it’s kept the peace for at least the last 50 years.**
---
[**KEEP THE PEACE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4392d912cfa46c4910f429d73eafd49&_e=qyNyhTiOmKFt6Gbnty-9hcATzcEc25xAldXF6BGRp22uHuC2N-QuOCgANhL1eQ5Vf3bIdntMV-0jkeZQQWMn8bt3f1qV7tyAaAxU2g7XFlfnKkgyvZIf6vcMsQr94Yjzt-eFVLPm3yEtq4NIUdOlWFdRdVE8n4Djm0CSEU33koy1-G7nP_RaNP5yLkeRBoA2_kZBQZXS_8--qdOiUtJf9Vf3VLEUsKokgzcDbcx1ORKwrLhnRDE9m6YaWwzL2seUHhj2En2p4_4fC31HRp5gjd0DGUMyR_xbjNGICYw_K14J8dA2RgyIcjww4oj3uHW58f3Mu-kYvQ5Cyg9oFVhsXPtwr416Sss3PQyWJe7u_bRI5i3-Fz0ktjyfJZUzkcm5)
---
Even though Globalist Democrats and Neocons have us inching toward war with China, I’m going to continue to be a thorn in their side and a voice of reason in this insanity. We can’t afford a war with China – financially or troop-wise, Peter. _[**Chip in $10, $25, $35, $50, or whatever you can afford to stand with me and help prevent the so-called “inevitable war.”**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d4392d912cfa46c4910f429d73eafd49&_e=qyNyhTiOmKFt6Gbnty-9hcATzcEc25xAldXF6BGRp22uHuC2N-QuOCgANhL1eQ5Vf3bIdntMV-0jkeZQQWMn8bt3f1qV7tyAaAxU2g7XFlfnKkgyvZIf6vcMsQr94Yjzt-eFVLPm3yEtq4NIUdOlWFdRdVE8n4Djm0CSEU33koy1-G7nP_RaNP5yLkeRBoA2_kZBQZXS_8--qdOiUtJf9QeV-8Klj244AdfissCF1l7JBmIt742jVKQ2AQS71q0dhZ5uYslvNXU14LASnLVow3kg7TSCwixdBVHCm2DYOsrhAl2CerD7DnVD-M-u7yAcPDwnTQzyBHEjV1wFKMxk48NAZwZ1a82vLfjyQCpZMQA_mqzHbLU4ld0Tf1jWg2eI)_

clean_body: We’re on this trajectory because of Globalist Democrats and Neocons, Peter.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this . Peter, Recently, I met with military folks in Hawaii, and a high-ranking official said to take this message back to my colleagues in the Senate... War with China is NOT inevitable. It CANbe prevented. My goodness, Peter. | | Globalist Democrats and Neocons have us inching closer to war with China. It’s because they’re ignoring our strategic decision not to tell Xi Jinping our plans if war should take place. Every week, there’s some sort of bill involving Taiwan and China, usually with harsher language directed at China and a war plan. Here’s the thing my colleagues seem to forget... The more you talk about America’s response in specific scenarios, the less leverage you’ll have down the road. Being strategically ambiguous isn’t the greatest solution to avoiding war with China, but it’s kept the peace for at least the last 50 years. Even though Globalist Democrats and Neocons have us inching toward war with China, I’m going to continue to be a thorn in their side and a voice of reason in this insanity. We can’t afford a war with China – financially or troop-wise, Peter. In liberty,Rand Paul | | . | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | P.O. name: Chrissy
subject: June updates from my office
body:
A note from Chrissy.

We're in the thick of summer, and I hope you've been enjoying all this season has to offer - swimming pools, the shore, barbecues, and long days and warm days. But while school's out for summer, my work isn't slowing, and I'm excited to check in with an update on how we're building a better future for you and your family.

National Security Town Hall.

Last month, at my 73rd town hall, we had a productive conversation on our national security. We discussed the southern border, the war in Ukraine, and our relationship with China, just to name a few topics. As a veteran and a eformer business leader of an internationally distributed brand, I know firsthand how events around the world impact our domestic security and economic vitality here at home, and I was grateful to hear from you on these important topics.

President Biden's National Advisory Board.

I've been so honored to be selected for President Biden's campaign's National Advisory Board. There are just four of us from Pennsylvania: Governor Josh Shapiro, State Rep Malcolm Kenyatta, U.S. Rep Brendan Boyle, and me. I firmly believe in President Biden's vision for our country - one in which we all have equal rights, good work, and a prosperous future - and so I'm excited to help him get reelected.

Protecting Pennsylvania's Mushroom Farmers

Our community — specifically Kennett Square — is known as the "Mushroom Capital of the World" because 60% of all the nation's mushrooms are grown here. But the unique conditions that allow mushrooms to grow make them especially vulnerable to pests that can kill an entire crop in one fell swoop. I'm prod to have introduced legislation that takes the first step towards providing crop insurance to mushroom farmers across our country and Commonwealth.

Thank you for staying in touch, for sharing your concerns and ideas, and for keeping up to date on how I and my team are working for our community. I'm so excited about everything we've accomplished so far and everything yet to come as we pass through the summer months. I'll be back next month with another update. In the meantime, happy summer!

There's work to be done.

- Chrissy

Chrissy is proud to be your voice in Congress and is committed to fighting for values that matter in our community. But a divided Congress means there will be challenges ahead. We must all work together to have any chance of creating a better future that works for everyone.

So we're counting on the support of people like you to keep Chrissy's momentum going throughout the year. Can we count on you to join us and donate whatever you can spare right now? Thank you for your support and for believing in our vision for a better future.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan4casey?refcode=jtk829-ot-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=keJkiN6pK%2F27gH3wuqZP222LYpra0pWval%2FiD44Tka3IDUaJ3%2F%2B66WnINP5n2ajx7hwdPhIw86RokJXyEI5U9Vi1NBQBBPC4Va7jAQMx3UFb9XAfwYRCJRko5gQgt3TAPqpBfGAt6I8PAmRE6WIydK8%2B%2FDIKDo38EXYKQIUUShy1dzHvqLo5Co9YPWIPjQ0NAQn%2BEkZMK6nepWrhxxO2F%2FVqT%2F2GtDUwr%2Fvlsqm%2B6pbghndTVn9N3WvyMI5huX47yJ6VO52aecYsNriCWsRIZKw1aiT9QGvL1j3sHN5FJfxEGAPiMeyqnHsmST3FGN1CfVAdTUyGc8HbIGQoMyKBAmx3LoTjHzyBUhif6LXmEbD5o6l4tuu2vKhZGAD8MVEYzV5WQd2qsaMg7CFJEbosDC%2FbzYHUyepWPH7R%2F1iFz6aN%2B1H%2BjdRmEW0uaTeWkEm1

Devon, PA 19333

Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force.

subject: A year after Dobbs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We’re keeping up the fight.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65337368/413145805/823540626?refcode=ea.a2c9abf0-b812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.a2c9abf0-b812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmM5YWJmMC1iODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h68buIoonf0GTya7jhd3OEriu41OMlTPYVfqI21rcfA=&emci=0eec7f5b-da11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a2c9abf0-b812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I just stepped off the stage with Vice President Harris, where we marked one year since the right-wing Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ When the constitutional right to abortion access was overturned, we immediately anticipated that anti-choice Republicans would target North Carolinians’ reproductive health care access. And, unfortunately, we were right. Your zip code should not determine your constitutional rights — but radical GOP legislators defied the will of the majority of North Carolinians by placing cruel restrictions on abortion rights without any medical justification. Meanwhile, burdensome and unnecessary requirements for health care providers are aimed at making it more difficult for them to operate. This is a difficult time, Peter. But we keep up the fight in the courts, in the halls of the legislature, and at the ballot box — and I’m counting on you to continue the fight with me now. **The radical right thinks they are winning — and they want to turn their 12 week abortion ban they just passed into a total ban if they are successful in the next elections. They think we will give up _but we have to prove them wrong._** Restoring abortion care access and preventing further attacks on our fundamental rights will come down to our success at the ballot box. I’m determined to work to elect Democrats who we can trust to fight to restore reproductive rights. **[We need to power them to victory at every level of government all across the state, and I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to make it possible. clean_body: We’re keeping up the fight. | Peter, I just stepped off the stage with Vice President Harris, where we marked one year since the right-wing Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade When the constitutional right to abortion access was overturned, we immediately anticipated that anti-choice Republicans would target North Carolinians’ reproductive health care access. And, unfortunately, we were right. Your zip code should not determine your constitutional rights — but radical GOP legislators defied the will of the majority of North Carolinians by placing cruel restrictions on abortion rights without any medical justification. Meanwhile, burdensome and unnecessary requirements for health care providers are aimed at making it more difficult for them to operate. This is a difficult time, Peter. But we keep up the fight in the courts, in the halls of the legislature, and at the ballot box — and I’m counting on you to continue the fight with me now. The radical right thinks they are winning — and they want to turn their 12 week abortion ban they just passed into a total ban if they are successful in the next elections. They think we will give up but we have to prove them wrong. Restoring abortion care access and preventing further attacks on our fundamental rights will come down to our success at the ballot box. I’m determined to work to elect Democrats who we can trust to fight to restore reproductive rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = I’m deeply grateful, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. **Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our reproductive freedom. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 371 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65338133/413148056/1753456815?code=jtk1129-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMThlNDJhMS1iOTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SkDbsM7ku4VFzsNcgvjuf6N8igu11amLbHUA7Tj-FsE=&emci=a0907c91-1611-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d18e42a1-b912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect reproductive freedom.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this past summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65338135/413148058/1753456815?code=jtk1129-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMThlNDJhMS1iOTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SkDbsM7ku4VFzsNcgvjuf6N8igu11amLbHUA7Tj-FsE=&emci=a0907c91-1611-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d18e42a1-b912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue. But Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we all work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now. | | Thank you for standing with me to defend reproductive rights for every last person. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: this fight isn't hopeless if we stand together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I was six years old when Roe v. Wade was first decided. **I grew up, went to law school, fell in love, got married and had two beautiful boys in a world where my fundamental rights to privacy and self-determination were always protected.** That's not a right that my mother's generation had. And, because of the actions of six radical justices one year ago, that's not a right that today's generation has either. **Today, young women are growing up in a world where they cannot count on the right to make life-or-death decisions about their own health and well-being.** Where they are no longer full citizens—no longer entitled to the basic promises to Life and Liberty guaranteed in our founding documents. Fourteen states have banned all abortions with no exceptions. Another 10 have enacted extreme restrictions that effectively make it impossible for women to access the care they need. Roughly 1 in 3 women live in states where extremist legislators have taken away basic human rights. Let me be clear here: **This isn't about medicine or science or patients' health. It's about an extremist minority dead-set on imposing their own religious views on the general public.** I know that this fight may seem hopeless today. In just a year, we've already gone so far backward. But, friend, they'll only win when we give up, when we stop fighting to restore the rights that have been taken away from us. **I promise you that I'll never give up this fight—never. And if you join me in that commitment, in this promise to future generations, then I know that we _will_ win. ** With gratitude, love, and relentless hope, Kirsten

|

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65338320/413148709/1575385346?refcode=jtk4243-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY1MWEwOS1iYTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w66yPvMoKdhXpl5-2MSn5hrl0yPiv50wASkDxnGbU9c=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65338321/413148710/1575385346?refcode=jtk4243-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY1MWEwOS1iYTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w66yPvMoKdhXpl5-2MSn5hrl0yPiv50wASkDxnGbU9c=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Voting Rights Watch | The NDRC
subject: NC GOP is advancing a “Monster Voting Law”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
it’s a preview of what they want to do across the country
|
---

Team, Republicans in North Carolina are openly undermining our democracy – and it’s a preview of what GOP lawmakers hope to do across the country. [**_Will you rush a quick donation before the end-of-quarter deadline to help the NDRC fight back against these brazen power grabs?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65338478/413149228/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230624_FR_6CC_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllY2ZlMzA2LWJiMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mWk_up905PEHfas-Qopz2NYL9ZEwEbibFrGtQaAIg2o=) | **FIRST:**
Last year, our movement won _huge_ victories for fair maps and voting rights at the North Carolina Supreme Court.

**BUT THEN:**
After the 2022 election, the makeup of NC’s state supreme court changed, so Republicans asked the new justices to overturn these precedents.

A.G. Holder blasted the decision, saying it **“was not a function of legal principle, it was a function of political personnel and partisan opportunism.”**

**NOW:**
NC Republicans are advancing what one local outlet called a “Monster Voting Law” that would impose extreme voting restrictions ahead of the 2024 election.

**AND TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE:**
More than 30 states will soon elect new supreme court justices, and right-wing extremists are hoping to stack the courts with judges who they believe will enable their anti-democratic agenda.

[**_The NDRC is fighting back against the GOP’s anti-democratic tactics across the country – and we’re getting results. Will you pitch in now to help keep our work going nationwide?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65338479/413149229/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230624_FR_6CC_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllY2ZlMzA2LWJiMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mWk_up905PEHfas-Qopz2NYL9ZEwEbibFrGtQaAIg2o=)

Republicans know that a majority of voters reject their far-right, anti-choice agenda. That’s why they rely on tactics like voter suppression, gerrymandering, and filling courts with their preferred justices to advance their extreme policies.

**But here’s the good news, team: Together, we can stop them.**

**Attorney General Eric Holder said, "When the people are able to participate in the democratic process, they have the power to protect democracy and deliver real change."** We proved that earlier this year in Wisconsin, where the fair maps movements helped elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a _double-digit_ margin. Now, we’re counting on you to keep fighting with us.

[**_Your donation today will help power the NDRC’s efforts to defend our democracy across the country. clean_body: it’s a preview of what they want to do across the country | Team, Republicans in North Carolina are openly undermining our democracy – and it’s a preview of what GOP lawmakers hope to do across the country. = | FIRST: Last year, our movement won huge victories for fair maps and voting rights at the North Carolina Supreme Court. BUT THEN: After the 2022 election, the makeup of NC’s state supreme court changed, so Republicans asked the new justices to overturn these precedents. A.G. Holder blasted the decision, saying it “was not a function of legal principle, it was a function of political personnel and partisan opportunism.” NOW: NC Republicans are advancing what one local outlet called a “Monster Voting Law” that would impose extreme voting restrictions ahead of the 2024 election. AND TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE: More than 30 states will soon elect new supreme court justices, and right-wing extremists are hoping to stack the courts with judges who they believe will enable their anti-democratic agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Republicans know that a majority of voters reject their far-right, anti-choice agenda. That’s why they rely on tactics like voter suppression, gerrymandering, and filling courts with their preferred justices to advance their extreme policies. But here’s the good news, team: Together, we can stop them. Attorney General Eric Holder said, "When the people are able to participate in the democratic process, they have the power to protect democracy and deliver real change." We proved that earlier this year in Wisconsin, where the fair maps movements helped elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin. Now, we’re counting on you to keep fighting with us. = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Their Future PAC
subject: one year ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
| | | Hey,

Today is the one year anniversary of the Supreme Court’s Dobbs decision that repealed Roe V Wade. Because of that ruling, millions of Americans have lost access to healthcare and their reproductive freedoms—with devastating consequences for women and girls all across this country.

This decision sent the healthcare system into chaos. Doctors and hospital lawyers couldn’t interpret the state laws written by predominantly male lawmakers who honestly don't have a clue what they are talking about. As a result, OB-Gyn physicians are leaving states with restrictive abortion bans, making it even harder for women to access care.

We want better, not just for the current generations, but for future generations who will have to pay the price for our inaction.

**_[That’s why Dr. Annie Andrews and Their Future PAC want you to join us in our Dobbs Anniversary Day of Action. Write a letter to your state reps demanding an end to the attacks on our personal freedoms in your state. Let’s show our people-power!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmk7VLDqraLr6wrJ3dq9gn0KLYgMShD3Z3ZkGNVocWSnxi3tXqjMC2Wb059vqE5jh4xbXF7Hmtmh97oiuqhEbVTHxP1ag-OAZeXHMBvwj8l71153Wk1pPLV72BCj7i2qyVOblEOcCO7OiiKrum2sRo9XTDbGQZVPOLw7kJHskkV0QpDnmqEpGu65WGH3j0TjD9cvt5lkdXfan_PCYoM9xRYx1ESsE4mwHGmNzVxu7ctBWIP6TwuIbRJQ6-wcsCfWgsN4iLuI_fK1N4bdSyxl6Rh/3xb/tj933_2NTFKibVSPev1XvQ/h0/AXqrGdZANb2Xz8Rkg_cDaHBC2YrEf3p7e1yulQscHv4)_**

Let’s be clear, personal medical decisions should be kept between patients and doctors—politicians and judges have no place in that equation.

While we mark this terrible anniversary, we’re also waiting for a ruling on Mifepristone’s FDA approval. If they decide to ban the leading abortion pill, that would call into question the FDA’s authority to regulate any drug—all based on nothing more than political grandstanding.

**_[We must take action today to defend the right to choose for future generations. Are you in?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmk7VLDqraLr6wrJ3dq9gn0KLYgMShD3Z3ZkGNVocWSnxi3tXqjMC2Wb059vqE5jh4xbXF7Hmtmh97oiuqhEbVTHxP1ag-OAZeXHMBvwj8l71153Wk1pPLV72BCj7i2qyWuzbGbaU4LdjHsV-BMKNTYBL19dbccnp24wsMzxb4s6YM86nqQDhsrJmVXB7ZTPI5katVaEWcVqQuwml-DJNi-_e9cGLsyuwUis6T7hpdZ2ljQiC9RdWTTXBSa-NR2p-9urEgMclSszH8k-f01WATt/3xb/tj933_2NTFKibVSPev1XvQ/h3/wttceE4vbHn3DdDVLOIaq2Qx2ukOWGKlUnatZsSFgJc)_**

name: Callie Barr
subject: Your medical decisions are none of Bergman's business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65338760/413150046/-384735071?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624Dobbs_cb_90do_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk2YjUwM2MtYmMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CXXxxo1y69Ac_YAk8vvHjnvGV12JyfOffAYwQ8JPcRU=)
---
Dear Peter, One year ago today, the Supreme Court stripped away the legal rights of millions of women by overturning the protections of Roe v. Wade. There’s a lot that could be said about this decision – and I’m sure you have your own views on the topic – but here’s what sticks with me: **Women are perfectly capable of making their own health decisions** , and inserting politicians between a patient and her doctor isn’t just an invasion of privacy – it’s bad policy. It puts women’s lives at risk. Every minute our lawmakers spend legislating women’s bodies and dictating medical decisions is time that could have been better spent addressing the real problems that plague our nation. Rep. Jack Bergman is no exception. Since being elected, he’s either cosponsored or supported more than 8 bills to restrict women’s access to healthcare or dictate women’s medical decisions. **Bergman even cosponsored a bill that would ban nearly all abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest** \- all when he could have been supporting women and children by focusing on reducing costs so families can feed their children, bringing jobs to the district, or supporting childcare and education. As a mother of two daughters, I will do everything I can to ensure a future for them that is safe, and I know better than to think the government can make those decisions for us. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65338761/413150047/-384735071?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624Dobbs_cb_90do_xx_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk2YjUwM2MtYmMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CXXxxo1y69Ac_YAk8vvHjnvGV12JyfOffAYwQ8JPcRU=)
---
When elected, I promise to spend my time actually helping families - by focusing on solving the very real challenges that face the First District.
If that sounds like the type of representative you’d want in office, [make a donation today to fuel our campaign and help unseat Rep. Bergman – who thinks he knows better than we do.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65338762/413150048/-384735071?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624Dobbs_cb_90do_xx_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk2YjUwM2MtYmMxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CXXxxo1y69Ac_YAk8vvHjnvGV12JyfOffAYwQ8JPcRU=)

clean_body: | = Dear Peter, One year ago today, the Supreme Court stripped away the legal rights of millions of women by overturning the protections of Roe v. Wade. There’s a lot that could be said about this decision – and I’m sure you have your own views on the topic – but here’s what sticks with me: Women are perfectly capable of making their own health decisions , and inserting politicians between a patient and her doctor isn’t just an invasion of privacy – it’s bad policy. It puts women’s lives at risk. Every minute our lawmakers spend legislating women’s bodies and dictating medical decisions is time that could have been better spent addressing the real problems that plague our nation. Rep. Jack Bergman is no exception. Since being elected, he’s either cosponsored or supported more than 8 bills to restrict women’s access to healthcare or dictate women’s medical decisions. Bergman even cosponsored a bill that would ban nearly all abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest \- all when he could have been supporting women and children by focusing on reducing costs so families can feed their children, bringing jobs to the district, or supporting childcare and education. As a mother of two daughters, I will do everything I can to ensure a future for them that is safe, and I know better than to think the government can make those decisions for us. | = When elected, I promise to spend my time actually helping families - by focusing on solving the very real challenges that face the First District. If that sounds like the type of representative you’d want in office, = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Respectfully, Callie Barr Candidate for Michigan's 1st Congressional District | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. clean_body: The left is pouring in MASSIVE campaign cash to flip this seat. Read more >>>| | | | Fellow Conservative, The 2024 battleground map is taking shape – I wrote you about this last month. The “Top 8” seats in play are all held by Democrats. That’s the good news. The bad news is my seat here in Texas is next on the list. I am the left’s #1 target and they are ALL-IN to defeat me... Radicals across America are pouring money into Colin Allred’s campaign war chest, and this week a new political action committee backed by seven-figure funding (dubbed the Lose Cruz PAC) was launched to viciously attack and smear me. In fact, their main message so far is TED CRUZ IS A TRAITOR. It is shameful, but not surprising, that a massive leftwing Super PAC built to take down the left’s #1 target (me) would immediately try to smear me as a traitor- no rhetoric or tactic is too extreme for today’s Democrats! That’s why I need your help right now. I’m counting on your EMERGENCY SUPPORT as we ramp up to KEEP TEXAS RED! The far-left founder of the Lose Cruz PAC has declared that this group will be used as a “good old-fashioned attack machine.” They’re DESPERATE to defeat me, Fellow Conservative. And you know they’ll say and do anything, no matter how dishonest, to make it happen! Your support is crucial. It’s all hands on deck to expose the left’s lies and rally Texans behind us in this fight. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

Disloyal Republicans – or RINOs as we call them – are furious that President Trump continues to surge higher in the polls and garner new support.
_So, if they can’t beat him in a fair fight, they’ve decided to pool together an unprecedented $300 MILLION to**BUY** the nomination away from him._
_Not even Soros is spending anything close to that amount of money (yet)..._
_**...And he has no reason to! These backstabbers are doing Soros’ dirty work *for* him!**_
It’s truly unfortunate. We, as a Party, have a unique opportunity to stand as a UNITED FRONT against the single worst encroachment from the federal government in American history – but these RINOs would rather attack President Trump.
That’s why it’s imperative that the rest of us who *_ARE_ * disgusted by the Department of Justice’s brazen corruption UNITE and showcase the _strength_ of our movement.

_**Why do they want to stop me so bad?**_
_**Because they say they want a candidate who is approved by the Deep State.**_
These cowards just watched the federal government INDICT and ARRAIGN me as an innocent man – and yet, their response is to drop to their knees and beg the Deep State for mercy.

clean_body: That’s not a typo. That’s the correct grand total. | | Friend, President Trump emailed you about the newly uncovered $300 MILLION PLOT to destroy our campaign in the Republican primary. Disloyal Republicans – or RINOs as we call them – are furious that President Trump continues to surge higher in the polls and garner new support. So, if they can’t beat him in a fair fight, they’ve decided to pool together an unprecedented $300 MILLION toBUY the nomination away from him. Not even Soros is spending anything close to that amount of money (yet)... ...And he has no reason to! These backstabbers are doing Soros’ dirty work for him! It’s truly unfortunate. We, as a Party, have a unique opportunity to stand as a UNITED FRONT against the single worst encroachment from the federal government in American history – but these RINOs would rather attack President Trump. That’s why it’s imperative that the rest of us who ARE disgusted by the Department of Justice’s brazen corruption UNITE and showcase the strength of our movement. So, President Trump is asking you to give whatever you can – even if that’s $1, there are so many of us ,that it all adds up FAST – to counter this $300 million plot to stop us. Thank you, Team Trump | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: (2) Donald J. Trump, me Date: Fri, June 22, 2023 Subject: re: Now a $300 million plot against me? To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Friend, At the end of May, I told you about a $200 MILLION plot led by RINO special interest donors to try and destroy our campaign in the Republican primary. But now that we have maintained (and even grown) our LEAD in the face of the most vicious adversity imaginable, these RINOs have a new plan of attack... ...A new report shows that they’re now considering adding another $100 MILLION to the special interest effort to destroy our campaign. Why do they want to stop me so bad? Because they say they want a candidate who is approved by the Deep State. These cowards just watched the federal government INDICT and ARRAIGN me as an innocent man – and yet, their response is to drop to their knees and beg the Deep State for mercy. Cowardice doesn’t even begin to describe these spineless traitors. As the age-old saying goes, “I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.” But while these RINOs may not have a backbone or an ounce of dignity or self-respect, they do have $300 MILLION that they are preparing to use against us in the primary. But I have something far better... ...MILLIONS of grassroots donors like YOU who do have courage, self-respect, and an undying love for our country. That’s why I’m asking you to give whatever you can – even if that’s $1, there are so many of us, that it all adds up FAST – to counter this $300 million plot to stop us. | Thank you, | Donald J. But I’m not going to let a few special interest RINOs get in the way of saving America. We need to stand strong against this $200 MILLION PLOT aimed at destroying us and PROVE to the nation that grassroots Republicans are UNITED behind the greatest political movement in history – the MAGA movement. name: Sara (personal)
subject: It was never just about abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hey friends,
Exactly one year ago today, the Supreme Court ruled in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization that our constitutional right to abortion doesn’t exist. By ignoring half a century of precedent to overturn Roe v. Wade , they deemed us not worthy of a fundamental right like bodily autonomy.
It’s been one year since that disgraceful ruling, but the punch to my gut is still raw and I’m still reeling.
Conservatives won’t stop until they’ve stripped us of our collective agency – until they’re the ones making decisions about our bodies.
And that’s the point – it was never about abortion. It’s always been about power – inflicting pain and grasping for control are the tools they’re using to gain more ground.
Right now they’re taking power where they can. Just in the last six months, 37 abortion restrictions have been enacted around the country.
Ten bills criminalizing abortion for pregnant people or providers have been introduced in state legislatures this year.
When we start seeing this fight as actually about power, we can see all the throughlines as a roadmap for what’s next.
We start to see how the 100 state bills targeting young trans people and banning gender-affirming care are intrinsically tied to the fight for reproductive freedom. Because in those 17 states where gender-affirming care bans have passed, 14 of those same states have put abortion bans in place since Roe v. Wade was struck down.
As long as these inhumane attacks continue, so will my rage. This is why I have two asks for you today – the first is that you don’t look away. We have to be clear-eyed about what’s at stake here, and that means bearing witness to the colossal damage and immense suffering that Conservatives have inflicted on so many people.
And the second is to plumb the depths of your anger and examine where you can harness that power for good. If you’re in this fight for reproductive freedom and the power to make your own choices about your body, add your name to my petition right now. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/cDwOgCHmgkKN0S7gZlO4TQ2?contactdata=Eq+H1fWIX+oTWkhajqfDSeMvTXIlrUFKqPnkBFWhMAGEA8/kab3lEL6BsE7V9Z0tmOZUDk2LP+v0xZW6kRzRCy1vCVe2p14aKHmYm9VKBwx5FhZf3SXyxJNgbPRD1JwqP+COniuuLg9B6Oo1Wqd6/g==]
The extremists may be making strides in this fight, but with all of us together, we don’t have to cede any more ground. Thanks for being here with me, especially today.
-Sara

California’s 51st District
