Just in the last six months, 37 abortion restrictions have been enacted around the country. Ten bills criminalizing abortion for pregnant people or providers have been introduced in state legislatures this year. When we start seeing this fight as actually about power, we can see all the throughlines as a roadmap for what’s next. We start to see how the 100 state bills targeting young trans people and banning gender-affirming care are intrinsically tied to the fight for reproductive freedom. Because in those 17 states where gender-affirming care bans have passed, 14 of those same states have put abortion bans in place since Roe v. Wade was struck down. As long as these inhumane attacks continue, so will my rage. This is why I have two asks for you today – the first is that you don’t look away. We have to be clear-eyed about what’s at stake here, and that means bearing witness to the colossal damage and immense suffering that Conservatives have inflicted on so many people. And the second is to plumb the depths of your anger and examine where you can harness that power for good. If you’re in this fight for reproductive freedom and the power to make your own choices about your body, add your name to my petition right now. [==] The extremists may be making strides in this fight, but with all of us together, we don’t have to cede any more ground. Thanks for being here with me, especially today. -Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Working Families Party
subject: The state of abortion access in the U.S.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter — Exactly one year ago today, the U.S. Supreme Court threw out nearly 50 years of precedent by overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and undermining the fundamental right to an abortion. In the 12 months since _Roe_ fell, we have seen rollbacks and outright abortion bans in state after state. These bans don’t just hurt those who wish to obtain an abortion, but also prevent pregnant people who may have serious health complications from receiving lifesaving medical care. And in some places like **Alabama** , **Mississippi** , **Texas** , **Indiana** , **Florida** , and **Missouri** , doctors can actually face hefty fines or even jail time for providing an abortion.1 With so many different state laws, we know it can be hard to keep track, so we wanted to give you an updated state of play of where abortion rights stand across the country. **[But before we do, can you split a donation between abortion funds and pro-choice groups in states where abortion rights are under attack? Your support is especially critical to groups fighting on the front lines.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUBrP7ye3aQWltooL52rvKCm8pmsHPLA1ly2dzZPECjoSMOODAJ9tx4jE8_njlJonmYJ28KpMz8hyPccfk-Z3JSpnCuSQFx2MV7NpHJtadE8s2vi_5IibUPxwfFKLTt_r2B48fcO8DaeHM0IuRxOVFxcHB-DmPXaA7AS_Q98_ZdbxT5j1SLKCvRNq-vqkF9FTpVVNMN3ge9ZWvnCWYrkpc37qxPvBWAqUQGscZEJESt45y61WI_yxD96sYxeIazZStnGBeFjauUHAVwMQhgfuMjjscV2Z7Omvxhy4cMpkWUz6WkFEqi9K-jQcjrNBOi6nrTey5VA35kVJP60_csHfWt9Lb4yaFWFo_WqCYasQw2_w/3xb/bqukvFsCRlWq4MpfZ1shjQ/h0/X_0CSCQwuJne7vOVjvfNztdASUB3pOiE7PpY0KqNX0s)** **[Split a Donation to Abortion Funds](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUBrP7ye3aQWltooL52rvKCm8pmsHPLA1ly2dzZPECjoSMOODAJ9tx4jE8_njlJonmEYD2VsmnoCIvQ7KuDP99idGuiQmfiLKOtRGRe_6fFJiF5ouR3oH746DfXSxelSYhRSHOsarLkg3DM2pCHSVu1-zwtJXmuKz-xPcnf-sGsGp4X98as-yHgbyM70QmCACjCIWD245QcZf0zW1m4D2rPLU-eTmlpqh6P5NN0f2YvnImJNZb9eTg2jr3r-ATZZrgI9EBoOoqRZUlzx25rU6bnXRbHiffEzRNaTKmZB64mwiTU_riTYU2eOAaH-OhDUL5VqvQxeCnrPnYfd-uYcUF_GmqN03txzmhivQMSRUtE1E/3xb/bqukvFsCRlWq4MpfZ1shjQ/h1/2bzDdVST1ySxq-bPjU1ub71aoCAr72PMzgIkjsFIwng)** **Then, check the map below to see where abortion stands across the country:** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUBrP7ye3aQWltooL52rvKCm8pmsHPLA1ly2dzZPECjoSMOODAJ9tx4jE8_njlJonmis10NxEl5SI641Z7q26I4Y7mbmfnEGFnL_7EpV8yOA-hbwbLRYDEJwyujJj-ORkFmpXdj6hzWlsIZpZ2lYIZ8ljC-UTeGNKaPH4lyrAHZuBX3PXOMyhL2AuWMqufhbk4nMbdEHDkYVyHqRfwlybu0ufeChCBSjSxcoaEySFRrDERTcUEOuQNkiJLaoh_H-oSh6aXWRDHA64H4eYtGUnbJs9RfFrdf_FhH1lwH7B07OdpH4KVcX5a28Cf-AyHdd5-VNL_lFqKmBJu6UAhud5XQfXxOy6-wWIVhfaAhsvXGKo/3xb/bqukvFsCRlWq4MpfZ1shjQ/h2/LEGw1Kr4Ul174yXqAAvWwkblJVPQXxd84nxQ1md7gnI) _Information from the Guttmacher Institute as of June 20, 2023 2 _ Since the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ ruling that struck down _Roe,_ 25 states have banned or restricted access to abortion.3 This has forced those seeking an abortion to cross state lines, often at great risk and expense, to obtain medical care. And even in states where abortion is banned except in the case of a life threatening condition, because these laws are so vague and confusingly worded, many medical professionals have denied care even when the mother’s life was at risk.4 But it hasn’t all been doom and gloom. Over the past year, at least 11 states have actually strengthened abortion rights including **Illinois** , **Colorado** , and **Maryland**.5 And since _Roe_ fell, we have seen time and time again that voters overwhelmingly support the right to a safe and legal abortion.
* Voters in **California** , **Michigan** , and **Vermont** voted to enshrine the right to an abortion in the state constitution over the past year,6
* And in **Kentucky** , voters rejected a proposed constitutional amendment to ban abortion.
* Earlier this year, voters in **Wisconsin** elected a pro-choice justice to the Wisconsin Supreme Court in hopes that she will rule against an abortion ban that has been on the books since before the Civil War.
* And just this week, in a Democratic primary, voters in **Virginia** overwhelmingly voted out the last anti-choice Democrat in the state legislature and nominated WFP Champion Lashrecse Aird to replace him.

But even in states where abortion isn’t outright banned, we can’t get complacent. Anti-choice extremists are working around the clock to whittle away our rights. Like in **Ohio** , where Republicans are trying to make it harder to pass an amendment to the state constitution ahead of a critical vote in November where voters can decide to enshrine the right to an abortion into the state constitution.7 And in **Virginia** , where abortion rights are very much at risk if Republicans are able to win a trifecta in the General Election in November. That’s why we must remain vigilant, and continue to fight back against any attempts to rollback abortion rights. Right-wing forces may have thought the fight was over when _Roe_ fell. But we’re just getting started. Wherever abortion rights come under attack, we’re prepared to fight back. That’s why we’re working overtime to elect pro-choice candidates up-and-down the ballot and pass ballot initiatives that will protect abortion rights into law. But this will continue to be an ongoing issue for years to come, and we’ll need you to stick with us in this fight, Peter. **[Today, on the one-year anniversary of the fall of _Roe,_ will you split a donation between abortion funds and pro-choice groups who are fighting on the front-lines to provide critical care to those in need?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUBrP7ye3aQWltooL52rvKCm8pmsHPLA1ly2dzZPECjoSMOODAJ9tx4jE8_njlJonmT_fnaXhxQCHPrynxDGIGjmkVTRwzW_BWFsdF0K3-PCBPRvDEXdnZjRcpOtdYRA5M3V9cYCi_XnJDiT2RUqm06F_1UzH4H-vQazfdM_hbhEEZsibv-1TgN7Q72-LsunlHwV7Z4bFv-S1aPcV0u07dC6Xx8Oa2evLZAqjQUAJFfwwbEgbHtsLmCwEQIqH4sHzL0tbPXKQ8nSfJW7hksUU68sYvdMgusEzDr-o2oG1hOGNuFKNjY_Evvr3X53qDoK_n_aWrqv7ACYME2WISrmtbA-oC6y68IYG4MExLD9T02-c/3xb/bqukvFsCRlWq4MpfZ1shjQ/h3/hNf_RjSWR9XYIVOcbY6h198l4X4MAMepeoph1NiHNIM)** **[Split a Donation to Abortion Funds](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUBrP7ye3aQWltooL52rvKCm8pmsHPLA1ly2dzZPECjoSMOODAJ9tx4jE8_njlJonmEMAJ-BNyylCIPRtask1uwA3m8xXnWyqHHNTfDTCdF9s5YpJtSnO3wWCsG4VtSRRasQmpk3SU4exCcpgWed7XXxMuHrEMk3TcDDBTrkQbFR17zgJyMXGsi3S1Bl35Rixz04OddM8xIxvv32ujX-XFg41QUqdkJtCiwJEJ2mBi9r1atNf4JmE9tR02V5oRETQZji3RB-YkJ8t-howVDcnIPnGznVNiFXXkWzrstCEIY_KdTIjgO_hb1N622DUCVpAE9CV9Ret3yTRmahUQqrprur-EAU7HQCG_GgxY05Gebzw/3xb/bqukvFsCRlWq4MpfZ1shjQ/h4/xZGCv8wkPW2E7_CmJzymuPoKOR-X-Zh6mlpBqy1Mf2A)** **Then, text ROE to 30403 to stay updated on the fight for abortion rights and to find ways to get involved.**

clean_body: | | | Peter — Exactly one year ago today, the U.S. Supreme Court threw out nearly 50 years of precedent by overturning Roe v. Wade and undermining the fundamental right to an abortion. In the 12 months since Roe fell, we have seen rollbacks and outright abortion bans in state after state. These bans don’t just hurt those who wish to obtain an abortion, but also prevent pregnant people who may have serious health complications from receiving lifesaving medical care. And in some places like Alabama , Mississippi , Texas , Indiana , Florida , and Missouri , doctors can actually face hefty fines or even jail time for providing an abortion.1 With so many different state laws, we know it can be hard to keep track, so we wanted to give you an updated state of play of where abortion rights stand across the country. Then, check the map below to see where abortion stands across the country: Information from the Guttmacher Institute as of June 20, 2023 2 Since the Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization ruling that struck down Roe, 25 states have banned or restricted access to abortion.3 This has forced those seeking an abortion to cross state lines, often at great risk and expense, to obtain medical care. And even in states where abortion is banned except in the case of a life threatening condition, because these laws are so vague and confusingly worded, many medical professionals have denied care even when the mother’s life was at risk.4 But it hasn’t all been doom and gloom. Over the past year, at least 11 states have actually strengthened abortion rights including Illinois , Colorado , and Maryland.5 And since Roe fell, we have seen time and time again that voters overwhelmingly support the right to a safe and legal abortion. Voters in California , Michigan , and Vermont voted to enshrine the right to an abortion in the state constitution over the past year,6 And in Kentucky , voters rejected a proposed constitutional amendment to ban abortion. Earlier this year, voters in Wisconsin elected a pro-choice justice to the Wisconsin Supreme Court in hopes that she will rule against an abortion ban that has been on the books since before the Civil War. And just this week, in a Democratic primary, voters in Virginia overwhelmingly voted out the last anti-choice Democrat in the state legislature and nominated WFP Champion Lashrecse Aird to replace him. But even in states where abortion isn’t outright banned, we can’t get complacent. Anti-choice extremists are working around the clock to whittle away our rights. Like in Ohio , where Republicans are trying to make it harder to pass an amendment to the state constitution ahead of a critical vote in November where voters can decide to enshrine the right to an abortion into the state constitution.7 And in Virginia , where abortion rights are very much at risk if Republicans are able to win a trifecta in the General Election in November. That’s why we must remain vigilant, and continue to fight back against any attempts to rollback abortion rights. Right-wing forces may have thought the fight was over when Roe fell. But we’re just getting started. Wherever abortion rights come under attack, we’re prepared to fight back. That’s why we’re working overtime to elect pro-choice candidates up-and-down the ballot and pass ballot initiatives that will protect abortion rights into law. But this will continue to be an ongoing issue for years to come, and we’ll need you to stick with us in this fight, Peter. Then, text ROE to 30403 to stay updated on the fight for abortion rights and to find ways to get involved. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , Axios, June 24, 2022 2\. , Guttmacher Institute, June 20, 2023 3\. , PBS News Hour, June 22, 2023 4\. , CNN, June 20, 2023 5\. , NPR, June 23, 2023 6\. , KFF, September 20, 2022 7\. , CBS News, June 21, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Ted Cruz
subject: This is a Humanitarian Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, I’ll cut to the chase. The Biden Administration has _**utterly failed**_. ❌ The Biden Administration has failed to secure the border. ❌ The Biden Administration has encouraged parents to send their minor alien children on dangerous trips to the United States unaccompanied. ❌ The Biden Administration has failed to protect these children after they were let into the United States. The Democrats running this committee have also failed. There was not a single official from Health and Human Services that attended this hearing to discuss the placement of the unaccompanied minors, leaving our questions unanswered. The absence of HHS is not an accident. It is a decision to protect The Biden Administration from accountability. [_**I need help from every supporter like you, Fellow Conservative, to hold The Biden Administration accountable right now >>**_](http://trk.tedcruz._b-LmZQ) During the last year of Trump’s presidency, 30,000 unaccompanied minors entered the United States. As The Biden Administration began, the numbers drastically increased to approximately 107,686 unaccompanied minors entering the United States in 2021 and approximately 127,000 unaccompanied minors entering the United States in 2022. **The result of the open borders is what The Biden Administration is avoiding.** HHS admitted that it received $7.8 BILLION last year just for unaccompanied minor children, but could not contact approximately 20,000 minor children it placed in 2021... Then in March 2023, HHS failed to account for 85,000 previously placed alien children... it just lost them! Earlier this year I joined my colleagues to address the HHS failures, where we highlighted the facts that _The Biden Administration loosened vetting, fired HHS staffers who filed complaints and ignored HHS contracted organizations who voiced concerns_. This is a humanitarian crisis and a man-made crisis produced by political decisions from the White House. [_**I’m counting on your support to help hold the Biden Administration accountable >>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-Q7tXo6A) Thank you for your support. For Liberty,

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My blueprint to protect and expand access to abortion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is an issue that affects all of us. Access to abortion is about rights, justice, and the protection of freedom.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3)
Derek,

Today marks the one-year anniversary since a Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell-stacked Supreme Court ruled on _Dobbs v. Jackson_ , the decision that overturned _Roe v. Wade_. This ruling has had devastating effects on reproductive rights across the country.
Since last year, 14 states have effectively banned abortion and several others have enacted laws and timelines so restrictive that they deny abortion access at 6 weeks, _before most people even know they’re pregnant._
As a result, providers across the country have all reported a significant increase in the number of out-of-state patients, some of which are traveling up to 670 miles to receive health care — including to California.
**Derek, one year after this devastating decision, I’m asking that you contribute what you can to your local abortion fund.**
Abortion funds are support groups who help patients pay for their appointment, or help with the logistical cost of travel, housing, and childcare. **[Please, contribute what you can to help patients across the country access reproductive health care today. 100% of your donation through this email will go to the National Network of Abortion Funds.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em_nnaf.H70Tmt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3)**
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em_nnaf.H70Tmt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3)
---
I’m running for Senate because we are up against a radical and partisan Supreme Court hellbent on forcing a social agenda on a country that does not want it. In fact, data shows that abortion bans are _deeply unpopular_ across the nation.
**But there is hope.** In the last year, we have seen millions of advocates mobilize to protect reproductive freedom. From Kansas to South Carolina, the work of passionate and dedicated activists has helped defeat right-wing attacks on abortion access.
Derek, it is vital that in Congress we stand up to these extreme right-wing assaults on our freedoms. Here is what we must do:
* **Expand our Supreme Court:** Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump stacked the Supreme Court, and unless we want an entire generation to suffer, we must unstack it.
* **Abolish the filibuster:** so we can continue to protect our fundamental rights and freedoms so everyone has the ability to make decisions about their own bodies, their own health, and their own future without the government interfering in their doctor’s office.

This is an issue that affects all of us. When a country starts losing its rights, it starts losing its democracy. Access to abortion care is about human rights and fundamental freedoms.
**[Please, chip in what you can today to help us provide the financial or logistical support a person needs to access abortion.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em_nnaf.H70Tmt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3)**
Together, we can rebuild the legal safeguards for reproductive rights.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em_nnaf.H70Tmt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230624_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2702%2E5257348%2Er2qqk3)

name: Emily @ UTS
subject: Have we met?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
this’ll be the shortest email in your inbox

| Hi Peter, I’m Emily from Team UTS!

Did you know Ohio is shaping up to be the _biggest_ toss-up race of 2024? _(And it will likely decide control of the Senate!)_ 😅

#
One year ago today, the Supreme Court stripped a woman’s constitutional right to access safe and legal abortion. As the only Senator who has worked at Planned Parenthood, I deeply understand how devastating this decision continues to be for the millions of women across America who have lost the freedom and dignity to make their own health care decisions. **Republicans’ shameful crusade against women’s reproductive freedoms has created national chaos that is a mortal threat to women’s health.** The threat has only become more dire as right-wing state legislatures and Congressional Republicans continue their attempts to roll back reproductive rights across the country. And it’s clear that if Republicans take the majority, they’ll push for a national abortion ban. **I am determined to push back against these dangerous Republican efforts, and I will not stop organizing and fighting until women can exercise our freedoms equally in all parts of this country.** **Overturning Roe was just the beginning.[Will you make an urgent donation to help support my organizing efforts to defend abortion rights nationwide? name: Will Rollins
subject: re: Roe v. Wade

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65340592/413155719/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzYxMTE0My1jMjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8d9dBkTkyWxG7Ju28OHglWsjHAwTOds3uwvZ46ZnRI=)
Peter,

A year ago today, the U.S. Supreme Court officially overturned _Roe v. Wade_.

The _Dobbs_ decision was a devastating blow to the fundamental rights of women, and the legal implications were almost immediately felt.

Republican-led states used this decision to enact sweeping, in-state bans on abortions. We saw activist attorneys general move to invalidate FDA approval on a widely-used abortion medication, mifepristone. That’s had an impact on access to reproductive care even in Democratic states like California.

In addition to women’s rights, many can’t help but ask:**“what's next?”** _Roe v. Wade_ is the legal foundation that protects same-sex marriage. The concern among many in the LGBTQ+ community is that its reversal could lead to a roll back for equality.

One thing is clear: it's never been more urgent that we retake and hold a majority in Congress in order to pass bills like the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law.

**It's also a reminder that who we elect can have a lifetime of consequences. Right-wing politicians like Ken Calvert have opposed choice for decades, and leaving them unchecked would only further erode our rights.**

Voters across the 41st District have an opportunity to unseat a Republican in Ken Calvert who has been one of the staunchest allies of the anti-choice movement. This is an important chance to send a message that we are ready to take back the majority and protect our constitutional rights. Lives are literally at stake.

**[If you’re with me, please make an urgent $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress in this critical swing seat. Let’s take back the majority and codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65340593/413155720/1321783056?refcode=em-6.24.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzYxMTE0My1jMjEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8d9dBkTkyWxG7Ju28OHglWsjHAwTOds3uwvZ46ZnRI=)**

Thanks,

Will

One year ago today, the radical conservative majority of the Supreme Court threw out decades of constitutional precedent and overturned _Roe v. Wade_. As a result, at least 15 states have stopped providing the majority of abortion services and 25 million women live in states where abortion is restricted or banned. In New Mexico, we fought and organized to elect pro-choice legislators who took an archaic abortion ban off the books. I’m proud to represent a state that protects abortion access, but we cannot rest until we defend and expand reproductive rights in every single state. I’m fighting in the Senate to protect abortion and contraception access on the federal level. **But our Democratic Majority is razor-thin, and Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to take back the majority.** **[That’s why your support today is so important. name: Gabe
subject: re: my abortion votes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m running for re-election in a TOSS UP race against Yvette Herrell, who supports a total abortion ban. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65340904/413156772/-730477937?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230624Roe_g_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2JhZDEyMi1jMzEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SbK9O2lyb_IPUSa17WEFz2NoqxvWHP-fBUvHZJrUCf4=)
---
One year ago today the Supreme Court gutted the right of women to decide what’s best for their health, their bodies, and their lives, by overturning the constitutionally-protected right to abortion. Immediately, far-right Republicans introduced legislation to ban and criminalize reproductive care. I want to be clear: **New Mexico remains a safe haven for patients seeking abortions.** Right now, reproductive rights are up to each individual state. Unfortunately, **far-right extremists in Congress are trying to overrule New Mexico and force a NATIONAL abortion ban.** **In Congress, I’ve stood up to their extremism and repeatedly voted NO on anti-choice legislation.** I've also cosponsored the Women's Health Protection Act which would restore the right to access abortion care nationwide. I believe that decision should always be between a patient and their doctor — not politicians — and the majority of my constituents agree. While I’m a guaranteed pro-choice vote in Congress, my seat is in danger. **[I’m running for re-election in a TOSS UP race against Yvette Herrell, who supports a total abortion ban. clean_body: I’m running for re-election in a TOSS UP race against Yvette Herrell, who supports a total abortion ban. | = One year ago today the Supreme Court gutted the right of women to decide what’s best for their health, their bodies, and their lives, by overturning the constitutionally-protected right to abortion. Immediately, far-right Republicans introduced legislation to ban and criminalize reproductive care. I want to be clear: New Mexico remains a safe haven for patients seeking abortions. Right now, reproductive rights are up to each individual state. Unfortunately, far-right extremists in Congress are trying to overrule New Mexico and force a NATIONAL abortion ban. In Congress, I’ve stood up to their extremism and repeatedly voted NO on anti-choice legislation. I've also cosponsored the Women's Health Protection Act which would restore the right to access abortion care nationwide. I believe that decision should always be between a patient and their doctor — not politicians — and the majority of my constituents agree. While I’m a guaranteed pro-choice vote in Congress, my seat is in danger. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for helping keep New Mexico a pro-choice state. Fellow Conservative, The 2024 battleground map is taking shape – I wrote you about this last month.

The “Top 8” seats in play are all held by Democrats. That’s the good news.

The bad news is my seat here in Texas is next on the list. **I am the left’s #1 target and they are ALL-IN to defeat me...** Radicals across America are pouring money into Colin Allred’s campaign war chest, and this week a new political action committee backed by seven-figure funding (**dubbed the Lose Cruz PAC**) was launched to viciously attack and smear me. In fact, their main message so far is **TED CRUZ IS A TRAITOR**. It is shameful, but not surprising, that a massive leftwing Super PAC built to take down the left’s #1 target (me) would immediately try to smear me as a traitor- _no rhetoric or tactic is too extreme for today’s Democrats!_ _That’s why I need your help right now._ **I’m counting on your EMERGENCY SUPPORT as we ramp up to KEEP TEXAS RED!** [_**R**_ _**ush your most generous possible donation to help >>>**_](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=36a4cdf31ea04cf2b8858c4d3e893190&_e=gQyCzb1DlblLM5sHi1y_8tPNXKmS5nr826JP9il6d0i0YRWRbkYZ55Q4QMBnDmdLhSe6GB2LutPCjU1aAq9G5JY3vhX8seMJ5knBMIrEqfvgxIIyvzk6CU1vjqtL8vjaj_vCpnhnP1hna05CSymvBGX1FZm9ZGZ1DUie3-Efj_FZQE1CdsgB7TV35LnKiKEzyTM1PaAqoZFEu77hawUMTtQEMbtX_xelTwPrvZ_AnkATZa7CE0vieI4QN_TT0KeRFDJwhiZvAxtm-BguUd-_1EPdyx7zYXLTk5Uk6jiIEkEDRhlkVtKeQRM_QcXT-tq8vYisL6gushAu6-h9-x8ahbEiOwiTnAJgJF1fRx0YmCSvxWBsc8aX3o2gM2LX_qrW33uWSg0N4Wyg61jYWDqdLv-88BfIsgaQNoyEaHJugwPNsfAvKglSePKnpxFbyCE3_HwbWofKUfRCfbv7opox5QC2NZYN3d7zOngGbvlLhlk%3D)

clean_body: The left is pouring in MASSIVE campaign cash to flip this seat. Read more >>>| | | | Fellow Conservative, The 2024 battleground map is taking shape – I wrote you about this last month. The “Top 8” seats in play are all held by Democrats. That’s the good news. The bad news is my seat here in Texas is next on the list. I am the left’s #1 target and they are ALL-IN to defeat me... Radicals across America are pouring money into Colin Allred’s campaign war chest, and this week a new political action committee backed by seven-figure funding (dubbed the Lose Cruz PAC) was launched to viciously attack and smear me. In fact, their main message so far is TED CRUZ IS A TRAITOR. It is shameful, but not surprising, that a massive leftwing Super PAC built to take down the left’s #1 target (me) would immediately try to smear me as a traitor- no rhetoric or tactic is too extreme for today’s Democrats! That’s why I need your help right now. I’m counting on your EMERGENCY SUPPORT as we ramp up to KEEP TEXAS RED! The far-left founder of the Lose Cruz PAC has declared that this group will be used as a “good old-fashioned attack machine.” They’re DESPERATE to defeat me, Fellow Conservative. And you know they’ll say and do anything, no matter how dishonest, to make it happen! Your support is crucial. It’s all hands on deck to expose the left’s lies and rally Texans behind us in this fight. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

I’m not a typical Congressman, Peter.

I’m not a millionaire who was born into powerful connections.

**I’m a kid from the Bronx who was raised by a single mother on the minimum wage, so I’ve _lived_ the experiences that many other politicians just talk about.**

I’ve experienced food and housing insecurity.
I’ve faced racism and homophobia firsthand.
People I love have been ensnared by the criminal justice system.

Peter, people like me don’t usually end up in the halls of power.

**But despite all of the odds,_I won_ and became the first openly gay Afro-Latino to be elected to Congress.**

And every time I walk into my office, I feel the weight of history on my shoulders -- because I know how much work we have to do.

We have _a duty_ to end child poverty.
We have _a duty_ to create safe housing.
We have _a duty_ to protect our nation’s most vulnerable.

So we need to prepare now to protect it.

I’m in Congress to fight for the people of this country. **So I really need help from grassroots donors like you.**

[My team wants to raise $20,000 this month, and at our current pace, I don’t know if we’ll make it. Can you rush $3 to help get us where we need to be to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65341478/413158259/-922949292?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=RTFC_20230624_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2E4Nzc4MS1jNTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOUUypaC8NoLZttcp2XS5H5Kat92Smb__vOiKrstR-w=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: This is an email about why our work is so important to me. | = Hey Peter, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about why this work is so important to me personally. = | = I’m not a typical Congressman, Peter. I’m not a millionaire who was born into powerful connections. I’m a kid from the Bronx who was raised by a single mother on the minimum wage, so I’ve lived the experiences that many other politicians just talk about. I’ve experienced food and housing insecurity. I’ve faced racism and homophobia firsthand. People I love have been ensnared by the criminal justice system. Peter, people like me don’t usually end up in the halls of power. But despite all of the odds,I won and became the first openly gay Afro-Latino to be elected to Congress. And every time I walk into my office, I feel the weight of history on my shoulders -- because I know how much work we have to do. We have a duty to end child poverty. We have a duty to create safe housing. We have a duty to protect our nation’s most vulnerable. So we need to prepare now to protect it. I’m in Congress to fight for the people of this country. So I really need help from grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Peter, if you made it all the way to the end of this email, thank you. I really appreciate your support, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Re: New poll in Michigan Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Despite Democrats’ success last year, Michigan is a swing state, and will flip red under the right conditions.

| Peter,

My team got some breaking news: **A new poll shows that the Senate race in Michigan is a dead-heat**. While some may think Michigan is solidly blue, this poll shows we need to be doing everything we can right now to set us up for success on Election Day.

Today, I wanted to pull back the curtain and explain what else was in this poll, and what it means for our campaign.

But I dive in, I need to ask: [_**Can you chip in $5 or more between my campaign and Fight for Progress before our FEC fundraising deadline on June 30th? In light of this poll, we need to show grassroots strength as National Republicans size up our ability to win.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65341918/413159117/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230624-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwNDFlNzZmLWM4MTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iY3d5I-yWSMXZRAqXaReOkldAQUYAORdg0eKjVrGqik=)
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65341919/413159118/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230624-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwNDFlNzZmLWM4MTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iY3d5I-yWSMXZRAqXaReOkldAQUYAORdg0eKjVrGqik=)
---
Despite Democrats’ success last year, Michigan is a swing state, and will flip red under the right conditions.

With a presidential election on the ballot as well, this election cycle is especially susceptible to that pendulum: This polling shows that not only is our race currently a one-point margin with 21% of voters undecided, but a potential match-up between President Biden and former President Trump is a _tie:_ President Biden: 44%
Donald Trump: 44%
Undecided: 12% So, what does this mean? **The big takeaways for our race in this open seat are that while this is a one-point margin, 21% of voters are undecided. And there is a large portion of the state that hasn’t had the chance to hear from us yet.**

So we’ve been doing everything we can to take our message directly to voters early by visiting towns all over Michigan and meeting with folks to talk about the issues that matter to them. And I will continue to meet with people in every corner of our state.

But this kind of poll really does guide our decisions about TV ads, digital outreach, hiring staff early, and building a ground-game that meets folks where they are – and makes it all much more urgent.

**This is why I say that the most important time to donate is before June 30th: Early support helps us be strategic and intentional about how we’re reaching voters.

[_In a race this tight, every dollar truly makes the difference, which is why I am asking: Will you donate any amount now between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us finish June strong and set our campaign up for success in this race?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65341920/413159119/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230624-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwNDFlNzZmLWM4MTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iY3d5I-yWSMXZRAqXaReOkldAQUYAORdg0eKjVrGqik=)**

name: Rep. Carlie Kotyza-Witthuhn
subject: Protecting reproductive rights
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?refcode=062423carlie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?refcode=062423carlie]
Friend,
Today I am reflecting on the rage I felt a year ago when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Seeing our freedoms and access to reproductive care stripped away was infuriating and scary, but here in Minnesota Democrats set out to turn our feelings into action. We talked to Minnesotans across the state and heard how important abortion access is to so many people.
After we held on to our House DFL majority in the 2022 election, we knew that one of the first things we wanted to do was pass the Protect Reproductive Options Act, ensuring that here in Minnesota people have the right to make decisions about their own reproductive health. I was honored to author this important bill, and I've been so grateful for all that we've been able to accomplish this year, but we can't rest yet.
Friend, we know extreme MAGA Republicans want to not only undo the work we've done but also pass dangerous and extreme abortion bans. We can't let that happen. Grassroots donors play a big role in our House DFL campaign and here in Minnesota there's a really great way to join us, called the Political Contribution Refund program. Through this program, you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year to a participating campaign and have it refunded by the state. Friend, will you make a donation today to help protect our House DFL majority so we can keep protecting reproductive rights?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Refundable $50 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=062423carlie]
Refundable $100 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=062423carlie]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?express_lane_other=true&refcode=062423carlie]
Thank you for your support, friend. Every little bit helps, and it means so much to see how many people are investing in our campaign, protecting the House DFL majority, and protecting reproductive rights for Minnesotans. Thank you.
Carlie Kotyza-Witthuhn
Representative, District 49B
Minnesota House of Representatives
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-june2023?refcode=062423carlie]
Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session. DFL House Caucus

clean_body: [] Friend, Today I am reflecting on the rage I felt a year ago when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Seeing our freedoms and access to reproductive care stripped away was infuriating and scary, but here in Minnesota Democrats set out to turn our feelings into action. We talked to Minnesotans across the state and heard how important abortion access is to so many people. After we held on to our House DFL majority in the 2022 election, we knew that one of the first things we wanted to do was pass the Protect Reproductive Options Act, ensuring that here in Minnesota people have the right to make decisions about their own reproductive health. I was honored to author this important bill, and I've been so grateful for all that we've been able to accomplish this year, but we can't rest yet. Friend, we know extreme MAGA Republicans want to not only undo the work we've done but also pass dangerous and extreme abortion bans. We can't let that happen. Grassroots donors play a big role in our House DFL campaign and here in Minnesota there's a really great way to join us, called the Political Contribution Refund program. Through this program, you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year to a participating campaign and have it refunded by the state. Friend, will you make a donation today to help protect our House DFL majority so we can keep protecting reproductive rights? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Refundable $50 Donation [] Refundable $100 Donation [] Or, another amount [] Thank you for your support, friend. Every little bit helps, and it means so much to see how many people are investing in our campaign, protecting the House DFL majority, and protecting reproductive rights for Minnesotans. Thank you. Carlie Kotyza-Witthuhn Representative, District 49B Minnesota House of Representatives Contribute [] Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session. name: Andrei Cherny
subject: [T-Minus 6 Days] When it comes to abortion, actions have consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
Reflecting on one year without Roe v. Wade

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342474/413162595/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZjMzdjMWQtY2ExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n2zrP76TOa_FYPMQADSzhzXUl3CWecrfbxh3ZeXhBR8=) Friends – one year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned nearly 50 years of precedent and struck down _Roe v. Wade_ , a huge blow to our freedoms and an affront to our democracy.

It also made America more unequal and women’s health more insecure – now, where you live and how big your bank account is determines your access to reproductive health services.

As a CEO, I knew I needed to act. And I did so right away: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342475/413162596/1693584905?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_ac_all&amount=33&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZjMzdjMWQtY2ExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n2zrP76TOa_FYPMQADSzhzXUl3CWecrfbxh3ZeXhBR8=) You see, actions have consequences. The _Dobbs_ ruling wasn’t an accident, and it wasn’t about states' rights. It was part of a fifty-year effort of the Republican Party to rob women of their rights. From George W. Bush to John McCain to Donald Trump, Republican presidential candidates told us exactly what they would do: appoint Supreme Court justices who would overturn Roe v. Wade and push for a Constitutional amendment to ban abortion.

My opponent, David Schweikert, has made opposing reproductive rights a core issue of his candidacy: He wants to make abortion illegal with no exceptions for rape or incest and has supported an abortion ban in Arizona. He has also repeatedly sought to restrict access to birth control: voting against the _Right to Contraception Act_ and repeatedly voting to defund Planned Parenthood.

The overwhelming majority of Arizonans and Americans agree that abortion should be safe and legal. In a well-functioning democracy, that would mean abortion would still be safe and legal today. But sadly, that isn’t the case.

In Congress, I’ll take action. I’ll support the _Women's Health Protection Act_ to re-establish a nationwide right to access abortion care throughout the United States.

But I need _you to take action, too_. My first FEC fundraising deadline is in just 6 days. **This is the most important fundraising deadline of my entire campaign.

[After June 30, everyone from pundits to David Schweikert will be able to see exactly how much I raised, and we need to show we have the resources needed to win this race. Will you chip in $3, $33, $330, or whatever you can afford right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342476/413162597/1693584905?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.24_b1_ac_all&amount=33&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZjMzdjMWQtY2ExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n2zrP76TOa_FYPMQADSzhzXUl3CWecrfbxh3ZeXhBR8=)**

Thank you for your support,

Andrei | To learn more about Andrei, visit [**AndreiForArizona.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342477/413162598/-651367276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZjMzdjMWQtY2ExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n2zrP76TOa_FYPMQADSzhzXUl3CWecrfbxh3ZeXhBR8=&emci=1af41145-0d12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6fc37c1d-ca12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342478/413162599/-786721108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZjMzdjMWQtY2ExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n2zrP76TOa_FYPMQADSzhzXUl3CWecrfbxh3ZeXhBR8=&emci=1af41145-0d12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6fc37c1d-ca12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342479/413162600/674641626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZjMzdjMWQtY2ExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n2zrP76TOa_FYPMQADSzhzXUl3CWecrfbxh3ZeXhBR8=&emci=1af41145-0d12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6fc37c1d-ca12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342480/413162601/-127890224?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZjMzdjMWQtY2ExMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n2zrP76TOa_FYPMQADSzhzXUl3CWecrfbxh3ZeXhBR8=&emci=1af41145-0d12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6fc37c1d-ca12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922)

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: one year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
My promise to you is that I will always advocate for the equal rights of all the people of West Michigan, and I am committed to continuing to fight for reproductive freedom.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342482/413162622/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230624-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFjODIxNy1jYTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x8FFOFSArwmQHQYZpNgPA2l6O4Mbj5-iPLSbAt6sGFc=)
---
| Folks,

**I was proud to cast the first pro-choice vote in West Michigan history**. For the first time in our district’s history, West Michigan is represented by a woman who will always fight for their right to make their own healthcare decisions.

I’ve shared with so many of you the personal connection I have with this issue, but this week, I’m reminded of how the current Supreme Court decided to overturn the half-century-long precedent set by _Roe v. Wade_ just one year ago this week.

Their decision to strip a person of their own bodily autonomy came as a shock to so many Americans, including myself. Since then, Republicans across the country have only continued to attack reproductive rights, passing bills designed to hurt abortion providers and make reproductive health care even less accessible.

My promise to you is that I will always advocate for the equal rights of all the people of West Michigan, and I am committed to continuing to fight for reproductive freedom. Still, to pass the much-needed legislation codifying _Roe v. Wade,_ we have to first take back the House majority in 2024.

[_**Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more to my re-election campaign right away to ensure West Michigan has a strong pro-choice advocate in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342483/413162624/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230624-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFjODIxNy1jYTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x8FFOFSArwmQHQYZpNgPA2l6O4Mbj5-iPLSbAt6sGFc=)

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Fox News & Lauren Boebert attacked my 81-year-old father
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Yesterday morning, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my 81-year-old father.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342540/413162774/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzc4YzFmMC1jOTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKtTOkH1zSPzDaIRcGduZBlgz14z8zHZXI3KOgSUOJ4=&emci=73a01b8a-a312-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3378c1f0-c912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342541/413162775/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzc4YzFmMC1jOTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKtTOkH1zSPzDaIRcGduZBlgz14z8zHZXI3KOgSUOJ4=&emci=73a01b8a-a312-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3378c1f0-c912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Yesterday morning, just before today’s anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
For decades, Dad was an OB-GYN. He delivered thousands of babies and wrote books on how to get pregnant and to navigate menopause. Dad provided women with full access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions, in the years right after _Roe_ – and he has now had to watch as women’s reproductive rights are gutted in the aftermath of _Dobbs_.
Dad and his clinic faced many threats over the years. It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions.
But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. **It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado.**
If Lauren Boebert wants to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support _freedom_ and _liberty_ – and how she supports big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how Boebert supports a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how Lauren Boebert is so extreme, she even wants to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades.
I am willing to talk all day about Lauren Boebert’s fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. **But what I won’t accept is Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister.**
I am _incredibly_ proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not Lauren Boebert – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose.
**Lauren Boebert is scared. Last year, I came just 546 votes shy of defeating her and ending her political career once and for all. I’m ready to finish the job in 2024, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you give $5 or more right now to my campaign to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the entire country in 2022. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to hold Boebert accountable and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65342542/413162776/1610638071?refcode=em20230624pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=3378c1f0-c912-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzc4YzFmMC1jOTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKtTOkH1zSPzDaIRcGduZBlgz14z8zHZXI3KOgSUOJ4=)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Everything in my power

body:
| | | Fellow Conservative,
When I became a Senator just over four years ago, I was determined to fight for the next generation.

And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threat of social media and big tech on our children has only grown.

_**That’s why I put together a petition to keep our kids as OFFLINE as possible, and I need every patriotic parent to sign it.**_

**[Sign our petition today and pledge to keep your kids AWAY from big tech and social media!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=af96cdc9382c421f9b1b56f16dcb3652&_e=qKpwyORoGAK2zRwPyKS49j0IOB4yKnTxNs3_zNWnenyMXInpj81ivIgP07tBkttYaa2oE_C1egdKur-rj20GJ_keF5_nqubA9TzKDKn2sUozVIQBRKjpQFtxWFsauBQBtJhh1Ad2YKCjZfDxdgemVZEYeaJrEj4b95nFz-wGFISJ61tAXlzfMVLt6ui7ajfKLVy77yrPqONSboOWS-7FZ55Jgtrf8arjE-O7-WMZrKuF6lDqDsAJzPvHvphA7hYmyVLGqQcm0gmJlxvYOhraM9mu673OVC9h5-vlT0QKA1eGHnhRdQZnFU0BuQ38OO0yq1U2dsi3KdmkRNSyJYz0Nv7HWQkJj8zrMGI5vt9eVQKWBlCAqIXaOUNpnAhimyIjdqdmNJdKXN7HwY4ZQPGKev-sS7CmedSwjbEFmMZIV6z1e8BHKAwmlSUBszyItKDCEeA7rr4cFUCY2CYCIiUgGA%3D%3D) **

Social media is poisoning our children. It’s addictive, it’s toxic, and it’s ruining their lives.

**_And the worst part is big corporations are using it to spread their far-Left lies and indoctrinate the next generation._ ** I will do everything in my power to hold big tech and social media accountable for what they've done to our youth. _But I can’t take on big tech alone._ **[Join me today and sign our petition to hold big tech accountable for what they’ve done to the next generation, and DEFEND our children.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=af96cdc9382c421f9b1b56f16dcb3652&_e=qKpwyORoGAK2zRwPyKS49j0IOB4yKnTxNs3_zNWnenyMXInpj81ivIgP07tBkttYaa2oE_C1egdKur-rj20GJ_keF5_nqubA9TzKDKn2sUozVIQBRKjpQFtxWFsauBQBtJhh1Ad2YKCjZfDxdgemVZEYeaJrEj4b95nFz-wGFISJ61tAXlzfMVLt6ui7ajfKLVy77yrPqONSboOWS-7FZ55Jgtrf8arjE-O7-WMZrKuF6lDqDsAJzPvHvphA7hYmyVLGqQcm0gmJlxvYOhraM9mu673OVC9h5-vlT0QKA1eGHnhRdQZnFU0BuQ38OO0yvagla2Tb6cnMHug1LXJBp3JDIwRjWON-w32F3OhWLBbvzopSqkR6JPgsonbA9m96DcmyGjb-FC4etNE-JxeuVzgxZMKgwc3JKHVBY0j7WamNl5pXw7deucR7TwrXc98Xa_X-ys4s5FYOeaz9mOFZIQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, When I became a Senator just over four years ago, I was determined to fight for the next generation. And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threat of social media and big tech on our children has only grown. That’s why I put together a petition to keep our kids as OFFLINE as possible, and I need every patriotic parent to sign it. Social media is poisoning our children. It’s addictive, it’s toxic, and it’s ruining their lives. And the worst part is big corporations are using it to spread their far-Left lies and indoctrinate the next generation. I will do everything in my power to hold big tech and social media accountable for what they've done to our youth. But I can’t take on big tech alone. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Allyson Damikolas
subject: My daughters should have the same rights I did
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Friends,

You’re probably getting a ton of emails on abortion rights but I want to emphasize the importance of today.

Exactly one year ago , the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade , taking away the reproductive rights of millions of women across America.

I’ll never forget that day. Like so many other Americans, I was extremely frustrated by our political system. It felt (and still does) like we were going backwards.

But I got myself up and the next day my daughters and I went to a local protest supporting women’s right to choose and have freedom over our bodies.

Friends, I’m not going to let my daughters grow up in an America where they have fewer rights than I did growing up.

What we need in this country right now is congressional legislation that protects women’s right to choose and have freedom over our bodies.

That’s why it’s so important to FLIP CA-40 BLUE and ensure we can PASS a bill that PROTECTS reproductive rights like abortion. Can you pitch in whatever you’re able to afford today and help my congressional campaign? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.24_B1_AbortionRights

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.24_B1_AbortionRights

Young Kim is doing everything she can to stand up against reproductive rights. She voted to defund Planned Parenthood 7 times.

And it gets even worse. Young Kim is against abortion even in cases of rape, incest and life of the mother.

I genuinely don’t understand how someone can be against abortions in such extreme circumstances.

Instead of fighting to take away women’s freedoms, why isn’t Young Kim actively working to solve issues like affordable housing, gun violence, wealth inequality, and the multitude of other problems direly impacting our district and country?

Friends, it’s clear to me that Young Kim’s votes and principles in Congress will be dictated by what the MAGA extremists want her to do.

Friends, can you pitch in and help me flip CA-40 blue and DEFEAT Young Kim so that we can PASS legislation protecting reproductive rights like abortion?

DONATE>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.24_B1_AbortionRights

A lot of politicians might say this, but I sincerely believe we are at a precipice in history at this moment where if we don’t take ACTION NOW, I don’t know how we’ll be able to turn the tide.

Friends, your early support in my campaign has helped me tremendously. We have to keep this momentum going to ensure we have the resources to stand up to Young Kim.

Thank you for your help!
– Allyson

Paid for by Allyson for Congress
Allyson for Congress
PO Box 1813
Tustin, CA 92781-9998
United States

clean_body: But we will not bend, we will not break, and we will NEVER SURRENDER to tyranny. | | | Friend, The Deep State and the radical Left will never understand our movement’s unbreakable resolve. They can’t fathom why you would never bend the knee and hand over your country, because in their eyes, America – and everything YOU hold dear – already belongs to them. They believe the unearned power that they’ve amassed at YOUR expense gives them the right to put you DEAD LAST. And it’s why they truly think they have every right to weaponize your own government against you, and to relentlessly attack, smear, and even ARREST their political opposition. So, to them, our resilience is inexplicable. And that’s why nothing terrifies them more than OUR America First Movement... ...MILLIONS of freedom-loving patriots who will not bend, who will not break, and who will NEVER SURRENDER to their tyranny. With a movement as large and as determined as ours, even just $1 is all it takes to PROVE to the Deep State thugs and the radical Democrats that WE WILL PREVAIL. | | Thank you, | Donald J. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65344535/413165281/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFjYjdkMGMtY2QxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7Yjx5ODlQKuEHijOk5hZBi5hGdqvIp3hOAhgFSFyq0E=)

| | _On this day last year, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. One year later, we’re as motivated as ever to elect unapologetically pro-choice women up and down the ballot box to restore our rights._ [_**_Will you chip in now to help us do it?_**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65344536/413165284/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFjYjdkMGMtY2QxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7Yjx5ODlQKuEHijOk5hZBi5hGdqvIp3hOAhgFSFyq0E=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65344540/413165286/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFjYjdkMGMtY2QxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7Yjx5ODlQKuEHijOk5hZBi5hGdqvIp3hOAhgFSFyq0E=)
---
Let’s be blunt, Peter: Republicans want to take away your right to an abortion.
They won a major victory last year when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Now, dozens of states have enacted partial or total abortion bans. But Republicans still aren’t satisfied.
They’re going after FDA approval for the most common method of abortion in the country: medication abortion. If mifepristone loses its FDA approval, it will immediately become unavailable across the country — even in states where abortion is protected.
But it STILL doesn’t end there. Both Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy have made it clear they want to pursue a national abortion ban.
Republicans won’t rest until all our rights are stripped away. So we can’t rest, either.
We’ll be straight with you: It’s been a long, discouraging, and mentally-draining year. Bad news story after bad news story, new bans or draconian bills popping up all the time. It can be easy to get cynical or check out completely. But we’re counting on you to do the opposite.
Please, Peter, take this anniversary to elevate your activism to the next level. Don’t stand on the sidelines and watch our rights, and the rights of future generations, slip away.
[_**If you’ve been waiting for the right moment, here it is. Please, chip in $3 today to fuel our work to protect abortion rights across the country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65344541/413165290/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230624_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFjYjdkMGMtY2QxMi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7Yjx5ODlQKuEHijOk5hZBi5hGdqvIp3hOAhgFSFyq0E=)

[**June 24, 1795:** Jay's Treaty, enacted on June 24, 1795, was a diplomatic agreement between the United States and Great Britain. This treaty, negotiated by Chief Justice John Jay, aimed to address various issues stemming from the Treaty of Paris of 1783, which ended the American Revolutionary War.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7fda8b8648034b60a2ff68ff50d296e1&_e=zLNcqcnQkTCAwY9pzweyjQbbNMFZT5Fg2LeBtwLKeoZcxsKN1lkxFHFVOcBfl26Lc5FuOu0ZzaSD4fXaBERgeYKjvxTs1i9mR_MLESBZU6CzRmPFL5KZy3b1f-3J87z4DhgG9VurzPoUCmzwSzGOun7v6fUoe7gz1aTuEwE-DMjt9FLdMM4zWcx_77El5GjVnYHukzYSvhJCvGKJiugMgzYygb1UrAbUUdCK7m1L-0QMyhJuWDI5L7MqWTQhT2hcpS5hW6S8V-2E9TYXcCRond0jnn6-efQ2klVav7dCtJc%3D) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7fda8b8648034b60a2ff68ff50d296e1&_e=zLNcqcnQkTCAwY9pzweyjQbbNMFZT5Fg2LeBtwLKeoZcxsKN1lkxFHFVOcBfl26Lc5FuOu0ZzaSD4fXaBERgeYKjvxTs1i9mR_MLESBZU6CzRmPFL5KZy3b1f-3J87z4DhgG9VurzPoUCmzwSzGOulNws3Y_clUIy5wwKO63FRYLjtvoRiA9BQSecrBM5-sMO7tQhD_6s2ozxErwhhlAW6_dtbTRC7RuOWMZAUi3r_gAwrx_hMGcm6OvsObyUu5nB_Xs3ITAUdNpP8W6GobhmfieKMp2n9jTHoR_mlRe87Y%3D)**

[**June 24, 1953:** After dating for two years, John F. Kennedy proposed to Jacqueline Bouvier with a 2.88-carat diamond-and-emerald ring from Van Cleef and Arpels. Their engagement generated considerable media attention and marked the beginning of their influential and iconic partnership.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7fda8b8648034b60a2ff68ff50d296e1&_e=zLNcqcnQkTCAwY9pzweyjQbbNMFZT5Fg2LeBtwLKeoZJKDFPwqsUz9OFckgGM66_0RO9s0kHWTVqOOhHk0TtjMgHZGYZDT6L7tYm6HyfnZfQfkFo2dBU2uwmHLfc-r-3dbDI7L7JLeH5FRrjUBLqWrjMYoSqpFLb3nKAuYOuSXtPhFy2zjzs9i70tFz7pLNY4HVNKRhWV3hxhAterEYndGBYa2Fy4t988ukXXBtGp13djJqQ_fiBiLCL5O5XcQ0nUImWw9z6aZ2PuPZNESm6_0RbizITaRU3gTJ5gf_I2Cs%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7fda8b8648034b60a2ff68ff50d296e1&_e=zLNcqcnQkTCAwY9pzweyjQbbNMFZT5Fg2LeBtwLKeoZJKDFPwqsUz9OFckgGM66_0RO9s0kHWTVqOOhHk0TtjMgHZGYZDT6L7tYm6HyfnZfQfkFo2dBU2uwmHLfc-r-3dbDI7L7JLeH5FRrjUBLqWiYNZCI3R9VM5YoZqwLS_0fhA-7BkBmAb8CKl_O2EtRfcBxLmJBSiqG5ElVm8-1YCX6BJzJWz8qw_2TfUVKfu5_C9_1H9VZ4yhQZ3H6p9vKSnjTSG4YzX9C5akYXuWN_9j2Xnpeq-GxPYJnsiM3XqFM%3D)**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand via Blue Amp Action
subject: if Republicans retake the Senate, far-right extremists within their ranks will do whatever it takes to pass a nationwide abortion ban
body:
A year after the Dobbs decision
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a6cb89d-f1de-49dd-99e9-a59c94742011/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | It’s Cliff, here. I wanted to make sure you heard that pro-choice champion, Kirsten Gillibrand, is running for reelection. Her message is below: Peter, I was only 6 years old when Roe v. Wade was first decided. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d75f2cb-6554-441c-b654-7d1043c4a68b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I grew up, entered adulthood, went to law school, fell in love, got married and had two beautiful boys in a world where women's reproductive rights were always protected — where I had the choice to live whatever kind of life I wanted. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T355fd5b2-d24f-4988-9a8d-7cb84c5870b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But a year ago, six radical conservatives on the Supreme Court ruled to take away the freedom to choose that millions of us had counted on for decades. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93fc5ee8-ccd4-4fee-8f52-6f54ebd8c7b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Today, a generation of young women are growing up in a world where that right isn’t guaranteed — where far-right extremists are working every single day to take away their right to choose and control their bodies. In the year since Roe v. Wade was overturned, we’ve watched radical state legislators pass increasingly extreme abortion bans, outlaw interstate travel to receive reproductive health care, make abortions a felony and attack the right to birth control. And if Republicans retake the Senate, far-right extremists within their ranks will do whatever it takes to pass a nationwide abortion ban. You have my word that I will never, ever give up the fight to restore our reproductive rights. But this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. [That’s why we’ve set a $25,000 goal to defend and expand our pro-choice Senate majority. Can I count on you to split a donation between Blue Amp Action and me before midnight? Please, Peter, this is the fight of our generation — none of us can afford to sit on the sidelines.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te970aecd-4946-47a1-bd66-a889a552ce58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With gratitude and hope, Kirsten
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97970461-d844-4440-ac3c-5dbae6a41f70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---

clean_body: A year after the Dobbs decision | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | It’s Cliff, here. I wanted to make sure you heard that pro-choice champion, Kirsten Gillibrand, is running for reelection. Her message is below: Peter, I was only 6 years old when Roe v. Wade was first decided. I grew up, entered adulthood, went to law school, fell in love, got married and had two beautiful boys in a world where women's reproductive rights were always protected — where I had the choice to live whatever kind of life I wanted. But a year ago, six radical conservatives on the Supreme Court ruled to take away the freedom to choose that millions of us had counted on for decades. Today, a generation of young women are growing up in a world where that right isn’t guaranteed — where far-right extremists are working every single day to take away their right to choose and control their bodies. In the year since Roe v. Wade was overturned, we’ve watched radical state legislators pass increasingly extreme abortion bans, outlaw interstate travel to receive reproductive health care, make abortions a felony and attack the right to birth control. And if Republicans retake the Senate, far-right extremists within their ranks will do whatever it takes to pass a nationwide abortion ban. You have my word that I will never, ever give up the fight to restore our reproductive rights. But this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. With gratitude and hope, Kirsten | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Don’t let trophy hunters blow up helpless wolf pups
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841954?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | You wake up sore and confused under a pile of charred debris. You’re a tiny wolf pup a few yards away from where your den once stood -- but it’s no longer there, and the rest of your pack is nowhere to be seen. Instead, all you see are mounds of ashes and burnt earth. _**Something tragic has happened here, but you aren’t sure yet what has occurred.**_ The last thing you can remember was being thrown across the forest floor after a sudden explosion of blazing fire and clouds of thick smoke filling your small lungs. _**Was that your mama wolf who tossed you aside in an attempt to save you from the raging flames?**_ As you reluctantly approach closer to where your home once stood, you quickly retreat in horror at the sight of a furry limb covered in blood. The corpse is far too mangled and dismembered to identify which of your beloved family members these specific remains belong to. You scurry away in fear. _**But where will you go? How will you eat?**_ Without a pack, the chances of survival for a wolf greatly decreases, especially for a vulnerable pup like you who has never had to fend for themself. Now, you are completely orphaned and alone in the world. And despite your mama wolf’s last efforts to save your life, _**you are simply too weak to survive on your own**_ _**\-- and soon, you will likely DIE of starvation or hypothermia.**_ Friend, if you didn’t already guess who was responsible for the murderous rampage in the story above: this was the work of **CRUEL TROPHY HUNTERS** who used dynamite to _**BLOW UP**_ the den of this harmless wolf pack as the helpless wolf pups slept peacefully. This brutal killing method is just ONE of the many violent ways that ruthless hunters will massacre innocent wolves -- and if we don’t speak up against these vicious slayings now,**more precious wolves will continue to be tortured.****_Every moment of inaction further empowers merciless trophy hunters to keep killing these beloved canines._** [**Friend, we know you don’t condone these inhumane murders, so we’re counting on you to do the right thing. Take action right now to protect gray wolves from vicious trophy hunters -- before it’s too late to save them! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841955?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841956?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thanks to the former Trump administration’s efforts to strip away critical Endangered Species Act protections for gray wolves, it’s completely **_LEGAL_** in several states for cruel trophy hunters to subject these innocent animals to **unimaginable deaths.**
But not all hope is lost, Friend. Attempts are being made RIGHT NOW at the federal level to finally **REVERSE some of the harmful Trump-era anti-wolf policies,** and in the coming months, these critical revisions to the ESA are to be reviewed.
This is likely to stir up already-heated policy debates, while GOP leaders are already working overtime with the hunting lobby to actively introduce bad bills intended to derail all efforts at restoring life-saving wolf protections.
_**That means it’s crucial that we are prepared to stand our ground, Friend.**_ We MUST urgently build a strong coalition of grassroots environmentalists who refuse to let violent trophy hunters MASSACRE one of America’s most beloved animals. [**Will you step up today and help us get 4,301 more activist signatures on our petition by 11:59 P.M. tonight? Please don’t let defenseless gray wolves down when they need us most: ADD YOUR NAME NOW! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841957?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1841956?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action,
Friends of the Earth**
|
