**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Jon Tester
subject: hogwash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230624-1?refcode=EMAI24_1_JON_20230624_V1_F&refcode2=25391_3422442_Z35aKX&akid=25391%2E3422442%2EZ35aKX)
_(Me getting a fresh cut)_
Hey Derek, Jon Tester here—Democrat representing Montana in the U.S. Senate.
I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this re-election fight.
I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat.
I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash—I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine.
I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life.
**But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team.**
[**Will you split a donation of any amount today between my campaign and Katie Porter’s so we can protect our majority and keep fighting in the Senate for hardworking Americans and their families?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230624-1?refcode=EMAI24_1_JON_20230624_V1_F&refcode2=25391_3422442_Z35aKX&akid=25391%2E3422442%2EZ35aKX)
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230624-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI24_1_JON_20230624_V1_F&refcode2=25391_3422442_Z35aKX&akid=25391%2E3422442%2EZ35aKX)**
Thanks for chipping in. I’m grateful you’re in this fight with me.
—Jon

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI24_1_JON_20230624_V1_F&t=1&refcode2=25391_3422442_Z35aKX&akid=25391%2E3422442%2EZ35aKX)**

name: Abortion Rights Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Roe v. Wade →
body:
One year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, leaving abortion rights up to the states and undermining 50 years of precedent. | | |
---
| | It’s been one year since the Supreme Court released its decision in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ , overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and leaving abortion access up to the states. **Over the past year, state Republicans have seized every available opportunity to restrict abortion access:** ❌ They’ve used their power in statehouses to shove through near-total abortion bans in over a dozen states, leaving millions without critical health care. ❌ They’ve introduced bills targeting abortion providers with jail time and six-figure fines. ❌ They’ve even worked to prevent abortion rights ballot measures from reaching voters – they know their far-right agenda is unpopular, they just don’t care. clean_body: One year ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, leaving abortion rights up to the states and undermining 50 years of precedent. | | | | | It’s been one year since the Supreme Court released its decision in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization , overturning Roe v. Wade and leaving abortion access up to the states. Over the past year, state Republicans have seized every available opportunity to restrict abortion access: ❌ They’ve used their power in statehouses to shove through near-total abortion bans in over a dozen states, leaving millions without critical health care. ❌ They’ve introduced bills targeting abortion providers with jail time and six-figure fines. ❌ They’ve even worked to prevent abortion rights ballot measures from reaching voters – they know their far-right agenda is unpopular, they just don’t care. While Republicans have worked to strip millions of Americans of their fundamental freedoms, Democrats have acted to protect them: ✅ Across five states – Illinois, New Mexico, Colorado, Washington, and Vermont – Democrats have enacted laws to create safe havens for those forced to flee their states to receive an abortion. ✅ With a hard-won trifecta in Michigan, Democrats repealed the state’s outdated 1931 abortion ban and protected reproductive freedom. ✅ In Minnesota, Democratic lawmakers have used their new legislative majorities to codify abortion rights into law. It’s critical that we expand our party’s power in statehouses nationwide to build on this progress. Without the protections of Roe , state Democrats are our last line of defense against Republican attacks on abortion – that’s why we’re counting on you to own a piece of this fight. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Reflecting on our ongoing fight for reproductive rights | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65359752/413172443/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk2NzBjZS1kODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTsJ25BHysuwUzuKtUIFbmQYAsEeRgWsdkW0gcj_nZs=&emci=45551440-0512-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=169670ce-d812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Today marks one year since the Supreme Court decision in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization to roll back abortion rights which set off a cascading effect across the country. Many states outlawed abortion outright, and today, only half of U.S. counties even have a single ob-gyn working in them – laws preventing doctors from getting required training will only make this inequity worse. This lack of access to care is unacceptable, and I am here to tell you that I will always stand up for the rights of anyone seeking an abortion. **I am proud to say that I not only have the endorsement of NARAL Pro-Choice America, but I am also working with my colleagues to ensure families and women have access to the reproductive care they need, every day.** [**Team, we must enshrine abortion access on the federal level, but the only way we can do that is by electing abortion champions like me to Congress. As one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the House, I need your help to support my re-election campaign! Can I count on you to chip in?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65359753/413172444/-1389685386?&refcode=E3125-20230624-Dobbs-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk2NzBjZS1kODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTsJ25BHysuwUzuKtUIFbmQYAsEeRgWsdkW0gcj_nZs=) | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65359754/413172445/-1389685386?&refcode=E3125-20230624-Dobbs-SB-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk2NzBjZS1kODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTsJ25BHysuwUzuKtUIFbmQYAsEeRgWsdkW0gcj_nZs=)

The majority of Americans agree that abortion should not be outlawed. We’ve heard so many heartbreaking stories in the last year of women and girls having to travel long distances to get the care they need, or worse, die because of lack of access to life-saving procedures.
We cannot stop fighting. We need to keep up the fight and elect more pro-choice champions so we can finally have the votes to restore Roe.
[**So today, consider chipping in any amount to support my re-election campaign so we can finally have enough pro-choice legislators to defend and restore the right to abortion, enshrine the right to birth control, and ensure everyone has access to the reproductive health care they need.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65359755/413172446/-1389685386?&refcode=E3125-20230624-Dobbs-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk2NzBjZS1kODEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTsJ25BHysuwUzuKtUIFbmQYAsEeRgWsdkW0gcj_nZs=)
Thank you so much,
Jahana Hayes

| | Peter,

A year ago today, the U.S. Supreme Court overruled _Roe v. Wade_. Since then, abortion access has been substantially reduced in many states.

**I’m proud to be working to restore abortion access in Wisconsin.** Women should have access to safe and legal abortion. And medical professionals shouldn’t have to worry that they could be prosecuted under a law that dates back to the 19th century for performing abortions that women have chosen to have.

_**[If you agree that women in Wisconsin should have access to safe and legal abortion, please add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65359810/413172644/549003037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE1OWUwOS1kYTEyLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=busWXHRlwlt6IMu-kFnyDZVc-P1l0aW-95cPOwOTn8A=&emci=2d42699e-d812-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea59e09-da12-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=349307)**_

**Team, we’re facing a critical inflection point.** Across the country, Republicans are actively working to undermine our elections and secure unearned power by manipulating maps, restricting voting rights, stacking courts with their preferred judges, and more.

The NDRC has been fighting back to strengthen our democracy and hand power back to the people. Attorney General Eric Holder had this to say about our work: | **"Support from people like you helps us continue our mission of mobilizing grassroots efforts, advocating for fair maps, and supporting initiatives that ensure every American has equal access to the ballot box.

This vision cannot be achieved without commitment and sacrifice."**
---
**He’s absolutely right, team – and that’s why we’re asking our top grassroots supporters to[ _pitch in any amount before the end-of-quarter deadline_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65360209/413174220/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230624_FR_6DD_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjZjRmZThkLWRjMTItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5DWWXqzSizfcxarUDaVSQplaPJkDLVnh9HvJwfKrWlk=) to help us hit our fundraising goal so we can keep fighting for fairness.**

clean_body: | Team, we’re facing a critical inflection point. Across the country, Republicans are actively working to undermine our elections and secure unearned power by manipulating maps, restricting voting rights, stacking courts with their preferred judges, and more. The NDRC has been fighting back to strengthen our democracy and hand power back to the people. Attorney General Eric Holder had this to say about our work: | "Support from people like you helps us continue our mission of mobilizing grassroots efforts, advocating for fair maps, and supporting initiatives that ensure every American has equal access to the ballot box. This vision cannot be achieved without commitment and sacrifice." He’s absolutely right, team – and that’s why we’re asking our top grassroots supporters to= to help us hit our fundraising goal so we can keep fighting for fairness. Supporter Record Has dpwillis67@gmail.com made a donation to support the NDRC’s democracy-saving work this quarter? Not yet – make your donation now | = We have just a few days before the quarter ends. If we all dig deep and do our part, we can hit our goal and help ensure we’ll have the resources we need to continue our critical work. But if we get complacent, we could very well fall short...and we’ll leave our democracy vulnerable to the GOP’s power grabs. Please, team, our democracy is on the line, so we can’t afford to get complacent. Will you rush a quick donation to support the NDRC? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Joe Biden
subject: MAGA Republicans won’t stop until they accomplish their ultimate goal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. | | |
---
Peter, Fifty years ago, _Roe v. Wade_ was decided -- reaffirming basic principles of equality and reinforcing a fundamental right of privacy, the right of each of us to choose how to live our lives. **But one year ago today, the Supreme Court took away this constitutional right. It was a realization of an extreme ideology -- one with real and immediate consequences.** In the aftermath of the Dobbs decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , Kamala and I got to work to protect emergency medical care, safeguard access to medication abortion, ensure people are not penalized for crossing state lines to receive care, and more. And if Congress sends a bill codifying _Roe v. Wade_ to my desk, I have promised to sign it. **But right now, across the country, Republicans are pushing their radical agenda, enacting extreme policies to threaten access to basic health care.** Peter, MAGA Republicans won’t stop their campaign against reproductive freedom until they accomplish their ultimate goal: _Banning abortion nationwide_. With so much on the line, we must keep fighting back against their extreme agenda. **[So I’m asking: Will you make a $25 donation to our reelection campaign now? It’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqTn1nB5X1rOxL7-i3KQqZ_wCAa2XScN-OPPqXwNKoi-UWWn2ZmG3x-kXUtrnhbeGD_bfxKAOPpQJ4mex3MEMosre4Inr9j12XYMiNLnjvcGNz93D2pH4EfPBYgutY3NkvhU1MLYoHhbcakCTAKlf_mcfvY7PIEA0CFE5yeWLzQDhS9YmSMD5QMn8WbBVrP0cFcjBDsaqMhxwesBc1HyH51DWSMklZ8f8GACdUEO9Q_vOJlGWlHA37esr1qFFVEnY2KP-eRfb-mvvdj8iQNp3nLn8ci-cUTy99svpsySWWQA0xc1akYjiD54pMXK3FLyt2e0OSHm149fc5KpcEB1_pQ6P0IUFKf_XMaHaLrerxb-fsnMAPUTH85yGl97iOQ1YdPWvMa1lhxJJ0coOu9z07/3xb/R_BS99_HS3qG_OQGlOwX0Q/h0/DuEpdQKfckWMFtaWFl-dyecUsbpUXCb7EyCPKqJh-tg)** Thanks, Joe Joe Biden [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqTn1nB5X1rOxL7-i3KQqZ_wCAa2XScN-OPPqXwNKoi-UWWn2ZmG3x-kXUtrnhbeGD_bfxKAOPpQJ4mex3MEMosre4Inr9j12XYMiNLnjvcJgfaJbFipto3V2rM-ck3v_AZGhsuSV1YltYib1dGpxLkSEsu078ajTKnPOw0Zi2d91nxbpbhU13rOsdE2OtjpRw_NFa7x83fSUamc_uQNud-Z9LqNlHHL8BF-pFoLoVAKlBvPsyxIhn3E6jAjxY1i3BItiWyXTXs23P0vE9-8mVp8YVyRgtB9xvZPZxxm9Ekn2tDMQDCUCFQ1VkPFqqBeZVsgC8fbZk2bKy9wHjuDPVXhp6QXfHxonmScxPyHcbajNQuWBkiSyTO_Tii_Vf1xT464wczdsnSrCzol3HWCsm/3xb/R_BS99_HS3qG_OQGlOwX0Q/h1/VknwrA-xj60bIdANR3G_sn9XV1HfaVh4etDZPmF-S3E)

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: One Year
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
This weekend marks one year since the Supreme Court’s Dobbs decision overturning Roe v. Wade and undermining the health, dignity, and freedom of women across America.
Here in Texas, we were already living in a nearly post- Roe world a year ago today, with the dystopian SB8 law turning the Lone Star State into a state of chaos and confusion and fear. That was, of course, the point. And as things have gotten worse in states across the country, they have gotten worse here in Texas, too, following the Dobbs decision.
The majority of Americans believe that decisions about reproductive health care--including abortion--should be made between patients and their care providers. People, not politicians. As do the majority of Texans.
The enormous gap between public opinion and public policy speaks to fundamental dysfunction in our political system. But our political system also gives us important tools to fight back against the assault on our health and freedom. And that’s what we have to do now.
We must work together to protect the equality, dignity, and freedom of American women. Giving up isn’t an option. Will you join me? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zKDE2-sAx0iGZP90Z00RDA2]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zKDE2-sAx0iGZP90Z00RDA2]

You know by now that I’ve been in the fight for Texas women’s right to choose since I was a teenager. And I hope you know that I will continue to do all I can in Congress to restore access to abortion for Texans and all Americans. As the whip of the Pro-Choice Caucus, I am working with my colleagues daily to protect our rights and pass the Women’s Health Protection Act , making the framework of Roe the law of the land in all 50 states.
As hard as today is—and as hard as it was a year ago—we must remember that we can and will make a difference.
We did it in 2018, winning this seat and holding on to it since, by doing the work together. We have to do it again in 2024 in this race and in races across the country to take back the House, hold on to the Senate (while sending a new Senator from Texas), and hold on to the White House.
We have to organize. March. Knock on doors. Make phone calls. Donate. Vote. That is what it will take to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and restore the freedoms taken away from us one year ago.
Let me know you’re with me. If you’re committed to our fight for freedom and equality, add your name here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zKDE2-sAx0iGZP90Z00RDA2]
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie_signoff [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=3BiPRluBJjsMzD9MiZNBVcTTf4QdYVm9AlCEdTcxVmgb2ihYiEKEgBogaddnSpz9mxdCSSap3VjEC1Kdo6cYIT4EXHz2Uo4xU16QIa4zrBQexzTNZeDgT8Lehul%2BKxiWrPkneowDkFDkmXOFE7YaKY3NHSPkpsTV8aoHA8weejL1oh05JWYJ1%2BGCLiHTy%2FGO3HkXnklrHhxcyMhhCtce8OxZR5gJeqztKsp0KFIhQDyjE0uLqG%2B4fgw8SUkv9ArWieZ%2Bm%2BFYc%2BP4yP7LpXRIi%2BpOhN2W6rGpZdhJrGJxpUBE%2BbNYh9Q1pn9pmAoTBxD6W1WFoPgQ0jaL4dYLCXk2NPidTqHjB3gFzG66jOXD5Jye9RUIv%2B2TZjZ1Y%2B%2FN0p4Jinj3tu6BmeMLQ09z4ZhY5Dym4KY3wm28yjPBN5Mn%2Fi%2F9TYWTOX0yF%2BzqZBkHIUF7 www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
Hunter is a disgrace. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-ankuil-trhiujldw-jj/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* Blinken claims the US [**does not support** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-y/)Taiwan's Independence.
* More **[Impeachment articles](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-j/)** against Biden.
* **[Religious groups protested](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-t/)** the Dodgers Game.
* The government is **[spying on you](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-i/)**.
* The Army blames **[right-wing rhetoric](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-d/)** on recruiting crisis.
* Hunter Biden **[got off easy.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-h/)**
* **[Biden's campaign](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-k/) **is in trouble. He's having **[trouble raising money.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-u/)**
* I want no part of the **[world's climate agenda](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-o/)**.
* Watch the **[June CaucusRoom Council Meeting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-x/)** and take the survey.
* Another Ukraine **[accounting error.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-m/)**
* We are so **[much prettier](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-c/).**
* OceanGate CEO has**[weird hiring criteria](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-q/).**
* **[RIP Titan Sub](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-a/) **passengers and crew.
* Kamala got a **[new gig](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-f/).**

### **Disgraceful Hunter**
A tax probe of**[Hunter Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-z/)**, with the president's son agreeing to plead guilty to misdemeanors,**[began as a probe of a foreign amateur porn platform](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-v/). **As a reward, Hunter was**[allowed to attend a White House state dinner.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-e/)**
### **Socialist****Mortgage**** Plan**
Remember a few months ago when Biden wanted people with good credit to pay more for their mortgages to bankroll people with bad credit? **[The House just passed a bill to reverse that nonsense!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-s/)** **Share Your Thoughts**
# [**What 2024 candidates interest** you](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-g/) the most right now and why? Do you agree with the **[direction the GOP is going](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-w/)**[** _?_**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-yd/)
[**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-yu/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-jl/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-jr/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ankuil-trhiujldw-jy/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

This is a rough one, Peter, so please stick with us.
After SCOTUS rolled back _Roe v Wade_ one year ago this week _,_ we were devastated. We saw the right to essential health care stripped away from millions of Americans, and we soon witnessed the GOP’s first attempt at a national abortion ban. But our Emerge community, including supporters like you, rallied together immediately to plan our way forward. **Now, at the one year mark, we’re going to ask you to raise your voice again. **** **

clean_body: | | | This is a rough one, Peter, so please stick with us. After SCOTUS rolled back Roe v Wade one year ago this week , we were devastated. We saw the right to essential health care stripped away from millions of Americans, and we soon witnessed the GOP’s first attempt at a national abortion ban. But our Emerge community, including supporters like you, rallied together immediately to plan our way forward. Now, at the one year mark, we’re going to ask you to raise your voice again. | | | | Right now, we’re fighting for our reproductive freedom state by state – and the battle is in the courts. We must ensure that the benches are stacked with fierce Democratic women who will defend access to abortion and uphold the bodily autonomy of every person. But we can’t win this battle overnight. With near-total abortion bans in 14 states, we need urgent action at the national level. That’s why we’re asking 10,000 Emerge supporters to answer our poll, before our midnight deadline. name: LucasKunce.com
subject: One year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Just minutes after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, Missouri became the first state to fully outlaw abortion
#
Peter,
One year ago today, just minutes after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, Missouri became the first state in the nation to fully outlaw abortion.
Politicians like Josh Hawley had been working toward that moment for decades — and if there’s anything this last year has shown us, it’s that their fight isn’t over yet.
These corrupt elites are obsessed with using their power to control every aspect of our lives. They’ve launched an all-out attack on the right for working people to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities.
In fact, just a couple months ago, Hawley’s own wife and donor judge tried to ban the most commonly used abortion pill, mifepristone, in all 50 states.
It’s time to take back power for working people and end these attacks once and for all.
**When Lucas is in the U.S. Senate, he’ll stand up to these Big Brother attacks and fight to finally protect abortion access in Missouri and all across the country.**
**[Will you stand with him by adding your name to our petition to end the Senate filibuster and codify Roe v. Wade today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230624_filibuster-petition?t=1&akid=3307%2E614464%2Er7VuFS)**
**[SIGN ON NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230624_filibuster-petition?t=2&akid=3307%2E614464%2Er7VuFS)**
Thank you,
Team Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230624-3307-footer&t=3&refcode2=3307_614464_r7VuFS&akid=3307%2E614464%2Er7VuFS)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3307%2E614464%2Er7VuFS). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3BiBE8L0wKEtolIrzaGnbS8rQ8xMdmLChlA6b1-Btj1Ue_382b9lk8zejY8G6k-AeHN2AURQHwHx9ccmcX2Rb1_y6tfP_NVcpNqL-BkQ02Pmf-bbkBMLOb_Tus1sQ4ZGthk3pTnXRn84qzK7NUrpc11WumRtiZh5NINWBsteV1yxylyDBarCoEal6kKdNNXG6Ip1X_FY6B50cQSdqNwoxhDkNATJfHNLaV6OjTrAbuFhjXyiiW1IuwHYeddzTI_8ulK0gN0LCS95uDOPnFNKNNxz6fMgoLo1yfMS1jgwqPYdEdDsirB1q4Bq94CDDCQzuesEqpX-jSWOu7NFDWhIwjolUC1Wf1vClPhA0-Dz-9fLdInX_okBzfPknQXV_gePT6m29nT7vv1-ymJj58157xZTgy6ux4GGIH8CAAD__w2RmXw)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskbGS1DAMhp9G6ZLxyo6zW6QAMqFguIKhAJobx1ZufWvFOce5sDw9k8xBwdB--qRfIxmegx_vLTTvAfHq3QKIIN8B4sv3jdP6zJ8-lvXrj_JFP3C9F_EDIOb7TH_NtyEVsfFhp01XuNZoM5IrqD3pc6PV5SxPxbUdzmZUzurxpCVepBANoR2FkONFIJ6x8C0KlEKjQikbIStlGq1VTWqoaRRqACWOoMqcNpNSjFzZyEVorznPy7FRD9gvZNdElZnIxbwbgH3wA6V8L59Wkxxg_2yYljLeiEYqTc7G3koeysgg-zXz4xLXZAlk9x8RUO8Kk_Mrg-z2gINYw7PxTxPIjoc3lintzpYUoDYc1ymD7LD-0xKnTAeabChf-4f7r8vXG34G1I9T8A5k9w88PiW7Jpjrl-3ntyK1bt58CH7RDSjxdBzIRv4dAAD__3BKmI8)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskUFvnTAMxz-NufEETkheDxy2IXqYNE2TJq29VCEx76WNCQ1h9H37CdTtMPX688_-W7bhOfjx1oL-DIhX7xZABPEJEF8fNk7rM3-9L5vfj-Wr-sbNXsQvgJhvM_0z34eciI0PO9Vd4VqjzEiuoLZWZ63k3VnUxbUVVgmUiuwoq7EeK2mdPFM9DJpGGiwVvsUKRaVQohC6EidptFKyITk0NFZyAFkdQSdTbyalGPlkIxehveY8L8dGPWC_kF0TncxELubdAOyDHyjlW3lZTXKA_bNhWsr4QjRSaXI29qXkoYwMol8zPy1xTZZAdB-IgGpXmJxfGUS3BxzEGp6Nv0wgOh7eWaa0O1uSgMpwXKcMosPmb0ucMh1osqG80_L748P9z8sboHqagncguv_g8SnR6WCuP7a3X0Vq3bz5EPyiNMjqchzIRv4TAAD__wKJmUA)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGulTAQhp9m2EFgWtrDgoVK0MTEGBMTdXMz0OGc3tNSbinieXsDubowbr9-_f_JDPnF2enRgn4LiDdrVkAE8QYQX77vPm7P_uP7vP75I39Rn3x9POI7QEyPhf-aryEFe7LuoLrLTEuKJjYZt5W6aCWbi6iyW9uIZpJVPdF4QTHopmoGLEs5NMqoA2W2xRJFqVCiELoUhSStlKxZDjVPpRxAlmdRQdVOMYbgizH4zLW3lJb1nKgH7Fcet8gFzWxCOgzA3tmBY3rk142iAeyfyfOahzvzxDmlROM990MePIh-S_5pDVscGUT3HxFQHYpnYzcPojsKTjKSX8heZxCdH15Z4ng4e5SAinzY5gSiw_rPlzAnPtE8uvzzV_HhTvqKR-LT7KwB0f0Dz0uJTju6fdl_fctia5bdOmdXpUGW13NBY_C_AwAA__8bTZfd)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.
